E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，金色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 幻宴的入口，虚妄的边境。踏入城门的一刻，耳边便会响起无休的旋律。
E: The entrance to the illusory feast, at the borders of delusion. The moment you step through the city gates, an endless melody echoes in your ears.

C: 负世者的愿望曾凝结于此，它们虽能将人照亮，却也如正午的烈阳般烧却了负世者的自我。
E: The wishes of the Worldbearer once gathered here. Though they could light up a person's life, they also scorched away the Worldbearer's self like the midday blazing sun.

C: 残破的浆体循环区域，信息端口早已失能。
E: The dilapidated plasma circulation area. Its information ports long since disabled.

C: 大矿区的决胜乐园-第一赛点
E: Great Mine Victory Zone: Match Point 1

C: 匹诺康尼常见的自助推车，主打一个方便快捷、数量繁多。
E: A self-serve goods trolley. It is a common sight in Penacony with its convenience, speed of service, and ubiquitousness.

C: 贝洛伯格的执法者，守护冰雪中残存文明的最后一道阵线。被分配到不同地区的银鬃铁卫职责不尽相同，但共通的是他们保家卫民的决心。
E: The keeper of peace in Belobog, and the final line of defense protecting this last bastion of civilization in the snow. Silvermane Guards allocated to different areas have different duties, but they share a common resolve to protect their home and people.

C: 行为怪异的机器，本是服务宾客的「美梦剧团」，因梦中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。它们仍在忠实扮演着自己在梦中的角色，但这些疯狂的「演出」已与破坏无异。
E: An abnormally behaving machine. Originally, they were supposed to be a "Sweet Dreams Troupe" meant to service guests, but have lost control due to emotional disturbance in the dream. They remain true to the roles they were playing in the dream, but their madness-infused "performances" are no different to acts of destruction.

C: 自远古时期便在翁法罗斯存在的自然生物，由裂分之枝，瑟希斯为其赋予活性。从未被任何城邦驯服过，性情暴烈不羁，泰坦的赐福同时也成为了致命的武器。
E: A natural creature from the ancient Amphoreus era, brought to life by Cerces, the Bough of Rift. Untamed by any city, they are feral and unruly. As it turns out, the blessings of the Titans have transformed into a lethal weapon.

C: 界种科的「未知生命体嗅觉诱导的感知与幻觉」专项测试现已开启，你已获得特邀测试资格……
E: The Department of Ecology's "Unknown Lifeform Smell-Induced Perceptions and Hallucinations" special test has begun. You have been specially invited as a qualified tester...

C: 匹诺康尼的服务器械，因梦境中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。原本是电视节目中的娱乐演员，失控后仍在演绎自己多变的身份，为观众带来惊喜或是惊吓。
E: Penacony's service machinery that got out of control due to the emotional interference in the Dreamscape. Originally an entertainer on a television program, this out-of-control actor continues to portray their roles, surprising or frightening the audience.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，能承载泰坦灵魂的强大造物。以巨剑抵挡黑潮的侵袭，亦会用巨剑带来战争的侵袭。\n天谴先锋会献祭弱小的眷属，以此暴行换得泰坦的天罚。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They are mighty constructs capable of housing a Titan's soul. With their greatswords, they stand ready to repel the rush of the black tide or turn their blade in a countering onslaught in times of war.\nFuriae Praetor will sacrifice their weaker kin, exchanging atrocity for divine punishments from the Titan.

E: Based on a comparison of numerous "trailblazing experiences," the Nameless {NICKNAME} is closer to an "Ideal Trailblazer."

C: 首领幻影的部位被消灭后会进入假死状态且行动延后，并在下次行动时再生。当三个部位<color=#f29e38ff>同时处于假死状态</color>时，本体陷入弱点击破状态并行动额外延后，受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: After any of Boss Mirage's parts is eliminated, it enters a Feigned Death state and have its actions delayed. The parts regenerate during its next action. When all three parts are <color=#f29e38ff>in Feigned Death simultaneously</color>, the main body enters Weakness Break state with Boss Mirage's actions further delayed, increasing DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 敌方目标具有【点数】，其【点数】大于我方时，受到的伤害大幅降低，且会获得韧性保护。
E: Enemies have Points. When their Points are more than allies' Points, the enemies' DMG taken greatly decreases, and they gain Toughness Protection.

E: Steadfast Safeguard

E: Egg Burst

C: 银鬃铁卫的戍卫长。\n杰帕德会为士兵提供抵挡攻击伤害的护盾。出现于此的是基于你的记忆模拟出的幻影。
E: Captain of the Silvermane Guards.\nGepard will provide soldiers with a shield that can block DMG taken. What you see here is a simulated illusion based on your own memories.

C: 「星核猎手」的一员，面带莫测笑容的杀手丽人，善用种类纷繁的武器和心控之术。正是她将星穹列车引至此处，以实现某个计划……
E: One of the Stellaron Hunters. A beautiful assassin wearing an enigmatic smile, she excels in manipulation and various weaponry. It was by her design that the Astral Express was led here, all of which was simply part of a certain plan...

C: 匹诺康尼的服务器械，因梦境中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。\n原本是「苏乐达」汽水的运输工，失控后仍在分享背负的美味，向路过的宾客抛掷它的礼物。
E: Penacony's service machinery that got out of control due to the emotional interference in the Dreamscape.\nOriginally a transport robot of SoulGlad, it is still carrying the burden of the delicacy after losing control while launching its gift to guests passing by.

C: 某人对至亲记忆之余音。迢迢长夜里，它们与他同在——昔在、今在，以后永在。
E: The echoes of the memories someone once held of their beloved family. Across the long night, they will accompany him in the past, present, and future.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为「星核猎手」的一员，身着沉重装甲的神秘战士。他的铁甲能够释放炽焰，点燃战场，发动烈火般的攻势。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is one of the Stellaron Hunters, a mysterious warrior donning formidable armor. The mech suit wields the power to unleash fiery onslaughts, engulfing the battlefield in flames.

C: 伴随黑潮而来、狩猎泰坦火种的无名剑士，无人知晓其真身。\n身负不可思议的力量，剑技也近乎无懈可击。疯狂与执着交织于它的锋刃，神悟树庭与哀丽秘榭皆毁于其手。
E: A nameless swordmaster who came with the black tide and is hunting down the Titans' Coreflame. None knows their true identity.\nTheir power is incredible, and their swordplay is nigh impeccable. Within their swords, madness and obsession entwine, once leading to the fall of the Grove of Epiphany and Aedes Elysiae.

E: Stellaron Hunter: Kafka (Complete)

E: Memory Zone Meme "Allseer"

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 阶段开始时，立即召唤【银鬃炮手】。
E: When the phase starts, immediately summons Silvermane Cannoneers.

C: 杰帕德和布洛妮娅会轮流进入主攻状态和辅助状态。当处于主攻状态时，自身会解除韧性保护并正常行动。当处于辅助状态时，降低自身的速度，获得韧性保护并仅施放【增援协同】或【作战再部署】。
E: Gepard and Bronya take turns switching between the Main Attacker and Support state. When in the Main Attacker state, their Toughness Protection is removed and they take normal actions. When in Support state, their SPD is reduced, they gain Toughness Protection, and they can only use Coordinated Reinforcement and Combat Redeployment.

C: 使敌方全体造成的伤害小幅提高，伤害提高效果可叠加。
E: Slightly increases the DMG dealt by all friendly units. This DMG boosting effect is stackable.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target.

C: 对陷入灼烧状态的我方单体施放攻击后自身造成的伤害提高。
E: After attacking a Burned target, receives a DMG increase.

C: 召唤【永冬灾影】。
E: Summons Everwinter Shadewalker.

C: 对指定我方单体造成雷属性伤害，并有概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入触电状态。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target, with a chance to Shock the target.

C: 对指定我方单体连续造成冰属性伤害。施放该技能时，额外造成伤害，伤害次数等同于场上【飞剑】的数量。施放技能后，清除场上所有的【飞剑】。
E: Continuously deals Ice DMG to a target. After using this ability, additionally deals DMG for a number of times equal to the number of Flying Swords on the field. After using this ability, remove all Flying Swords on the field.

C: 战斗中会出现黑泥对首领进行强化。强化后【云骑骁卫•彦卿（污染）】会立刻施放【燕归来】。
E: Black Mud will appear in battle to enhance the Boss. After enhancement, "Cloud Knight Lieutenant: Yanqing (Corrupted)" will immediately use "Swallow Return."

C: 进入反击状态，在被我方单体击中后立即对该目标施放【折叶】技能。
E: Enters the Counter state: When attacked, immediately uses "Leaf Hinging" on the attacker.

C: 当敌方施放攻击后，为<u>能够进入【噬月】状态的敌方单位</u>附加1层【<u>嗜血</u>】，当【<u>嗜血</u>】达到指定层数时，将使其进入【<u>噬月</u>】状态。
E: After a friendly unit launches an attack, applies 1 stack of "<u>Bloodlust</u>" to <u>friendly units that can enter the "Lunar Devourer" state</u>. When "<u>Bloodlust</u>" reaches a certain stack, the unit enters the "<u>Lunar Devourer</u>" state.

C: 进入【守备】状态，弱点未被击破时受到的伤害降低，被击破时行动额外延后，被击破后受到的伤害提高。
E: Enters the Safeguard state. While not Weakness Broken, reduces DMG received. Once Weakness is Broken, action will be delayed. After Weakness is Broken, increases DMG received.

C: 我方可选择1名角色，随后对选定的我方角色造成风属性伤害并使其陷入【厉咒】状态，【厉咒】状态下的我方角色及其召唤物<u>离场</u>。同时召唤【浴血人狼】，代替该离场角色继续战斗，【浴血人狼】视为我方角色。
E: Target can select one character. Then, deals Wind DMG to the selected character and causes them to enter the "Malediction" state. In the "Malediction" state, the target and their summon are <u>Departed</u>. At the same time, summons "Bloodstained Lupine" to replace the Departed character in battle, and "Bloodstained Lupine" is considered as a target character.

C: 自身在攻击时有概率对目标施加减速状态。
E: When attacking, this unit has a chance to apply the Slow state on the target.

C: 从【课堂频道】状态转变为【课间频道】状态时，使我方全体目标攻击力提高。
E: When switching the state from "Classroom Channel" to "Off-Class Channel," increases all targets' ATK.

C: 本次战斗中，「奇想林中的蕉研组（完整）」与所有「蕉研组」成员共享血量。
E: In this battle, Wonder Forest's Banacademic Office Staff (Complete) shares HP with all Banacademic Office members.

C: 进入【夜幕将临】状态并获得【弱点无效】效果，为我方全体恢复能量，期间会锁定1名最先行动的我方目标。下次行动时使用【如水逝于水中】。
E: Enters the Nightfall state, gains the Weakness Protected effect, regenerates energy for all characters, and locks onto the character who is due to act next. Uses Watery Dissolution in the next action.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 进入【将掀起反叛】状态，【反造物主】下次行动施放【神的冠冕将要粉碎】。
E: Enters the "Rebellious" state. "Anti-Creator" will use "The Crown of Divinity Shall Shatter" on next action.

C: 施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，消耗生命值召唤【残破容器】，并使消耗的生命值转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>。若该攻击召唤的【残破容器】被消灭，则额外对自身造成物理属性伤害。当自身再次施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，曾被该攻击召唤的【残破容器】将一同发起攻击，随后被自身吸收， 回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值并使自身获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>。
E: When using "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate," consumes HP to summon "Long-Shattered Vessel" and convert the consumed HP into <u>"Entangled By Agony."</u> If the "Long-Shattered Vessel" summoned by this attack is defeated, additionally deals Physical DMG to this unit. When this unit uses "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate" again, the "Long-Shattered Vessel" that was summoned by the attacking ability will attack together with this unit. This unit will then absorb the Vessel, restoring the HP that was converted to <u>"Entangled By Agony"</u> and granting <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to this unit.

C: 与【残破容器】一同施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】，随后吸收【残破容器】治疗自身，并获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>。
E: Uses "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate" together with "Long-Shattered Vessel." Then, absorbs "Long-Shattered Vessel" to heal this unit while obtaining <u>"Calamity Power."</u>

C: 对指定我方单体造成量子属性伤害。

E: Deals Imaginary DMG to a target that lost the Gamble, with a high chance of inflicting Imprisonment on the attacked target.

C: 地底的流浪者在炉心竖井周围自发形成了聚落。在这里，人机关系尚且还能称为和睦。
E: Vagrants from the underground have formed settlements around the Furnace Core of their own accord. This is the only place in the underground where a rapport between humans and robots can be seen.

C: 强敌挑战
E: Formidable Foe Challenge

C: 「几尺布绸为美，几行散诗为美，几串音符为美——欢迎来到『美』之赞誉一文不值的年代！庸俗，无奈，悲哀！」 ——《银河潮流指南》主编米舍利娜•冯•塔伦蒂诺 在诡丽变幻的宇宙图景中，伊德莉拉窥见了世界存在的终极意义：人们谓之「美」的存在。 星神「纯美」在某一日突然失踪，祂的消失与其诞生一样神秘。
E: "There is beauty in a stretch of fabric, in the lines of a poem, and in a few notes in a song — Welcome to an era where the idea of 'beauty' is absolutely worthless! How vulgar! How hopeless! How sad!" — Fashion Guide of the Cosmos Chief Editor, Micheline von Tarantino Idrila witnessed the ultimate meaning of the world's existence through the ever-changing view of the universe, known to the rest as the concept of "beauty." The Aeon of Beauty suddenly vanished one day. It was just as mysterious as when THEY first appeared.

C:
仙舟「曜青」是仙舟联盟的六大座舰之一，它漂航于无尽的星海中，宛如荡平一切的巨剑，横扫孽物肆虐的众多星域。

作为六大仙舟中以武力著称的座舰，曜青仙舟长久肩负最为激烈的作战使命。在以狐人为主的曜青劲旅「青丘军」的勇猛冲杀下，如步离人之流的孽物大军终成散沙，气数渐衰。

尽管频传的捷报换得了联盟内极高的声望与敬意，但曜青仙舟同时也面临着沸然物议：曜青仙舟与星际和平公司长久密切合作，换得作战所需的技术与物资支援。他们扫平众多世界的孽物灾患，也让其中不少成了信用体系的战利品——这一切不免让人怀疑，仙舟曜青究竟是「巡猎」的锋镝，还是在无形中成为了「存护」的战船？
E:
The Xianzhou Yaoqing is one of the six flagships of the Xianzhou Alliance. It sails in the endless ocean of stars like a colossal sword, wiping out the abominations ravaging the various segmenta.

Out of the six flagships, the Xianzhou Yaoqing is known for its military prowess and has long been standing at the forefront of the most intense combat missions. Under the ferocious assault of the elite Verdant Knights of the Yaoqing — armed forces mainly comprised by foxians — the army of abominations made up of borisin and the like has finally been routed, with their numbers now on the decline.

Despite earning a high reputation and respect within the Alliance due to their frequent reports of military victories, the Xianzhou Yaoqing is also the center of a heated debate. The Yaoqing has been closely cooperating with the Interastral Peace Corporation for a long time in exchange for technology and supplies required for combat. They have annihilated countless abominations in many worlds, rendering many of them spoils of war in the credit system. This has led to many raising suspicions on whether the Xianzhou Yaoqing is indeed the vanguard of The Hunt, or whether it has become a warship of the Preservation gone unnoticed.

E: Nous the Erudition

E: Drive safely

E: Give me an easy win, please!

E: Feel the festive atmosphere of the Golden Hour next to the dance floor

C: 鼓励陷入消极情绪的证书收藏家
E: Encourage the discouraged Certificate Collector

E: Use Dream's Eye to connect the inconceivable path

C: 找到梦境酒店内巨大的鲸鱼形梦泡
E: Find the giant whale-shaped dream bubble in the hotel in the Dreamscape

C: 天门
E: Skygate

C: 幻胧调动建木力量，以「丰饶」的赐福为自己打造出一副巨大的身躯。
E: Phantylia channeled the power of the Ambrosial Arbor, using the Benediction of Abundance to forge herself a colossal form.

C: 战败的尼卡多利再度起身，不死的神躯恢复完好。尼卡多利调转竞技场上空的天谴之锋，使其直指远方的负世泰坦和奥赫玛。
E: The defeated Nikador rose again, his immortal divine body fully restored. Nikador redirected the Blade of Fury, hovering above the arena, pointing it straight at the distant Worldbearing Titan and Okhema.

C: 铁墓诞生，来古士呼请博识尊见证名为「毁灭」的「时刻」。群星闪烁，黑塔率领银河联军，在天外战场对抗铁墓。
E: Irontomb rose, and Lygus called upon Nous to witness the "Instant" known as "Destruction." As the stars twinkled, Herta led the Cosmic Alliance into battle against Irontomb in the battlefield beyond the sky.

C: 万千的轨迹交织为一，昔涟以众生汇聚的「记忆」之矢瞄准铁墓。为了「救世」的宏愿，为了终将兑现的「明天」。
E: Countless trails intertwined into one, as Cyrene aimed the arrow of Remembrance, forged from the memories of all living beings, at Irontomb. It was for the grand wish of Deliverance, for the tomorrow that shall come to pass.

C: 在幽囚狱深处，公司生物机甲脱离货箱收容，将你们团团包围。寒鸦呼叫更多的幽府武弁支援，却未得到回应。
E: In the depths of The Shackling Prison, the IPC's biomechs broke free from their containers and surrounded you. Hanya tried to call for backup from the Wraith Wardens, but no one responded.

C: 守护者的意志向你致敬。身为开拓者，你执意肩负起世界的命运。去触碰琥珀的光芒吧，看看你内心「存护」的意志是否足够强大。
E: The Guardians' Will paid tribute to you. As a Trailblazer, you had chosen to bear the destiny of the world. Go touch the amber light and see whether the will of Preservation within you is strong enough.

C: 砂金向你展现知更鸟遇害的场景，认为唯有身为令使的黄泉有能力在梦境中制造「死亡」。砂金希望你与黄泉保持距离，以备不测。
E: Aventurine showed you the scene where Robin was killed, believing that only Acheron, an Emanator, had the ability to create "Death" in a dreamscape. He hoped that you would keep your distance from her, just to be safe.

C: 谐乐蕉师恼羞成怒，要对你们进行行为*蕉正*。芮克先生称这正是最精彩的桥段，请你们用高潮的*打戏*来拯救这部烂片。
E: The Charmony BananAdvisor was furious with embarrassment and wanted to give you a corrective bananishment. Mr. Reca claimed this was the most exciting plot and asked you to save this terrible movie with a climactic action scene.

C: 星期日登台，向万维克致以惜别之语，接受缺憾，以全新之我启程。
E: Sunday took to the stage and bid farewell to Wonweek. He accepted his imperfections and set off as a brand-new "self."

C: 众多娃娃在缇宝眼前燃烧、消失，母亲的声音愈发遥远模糊。缇宝铭记母亲最后的话语——<color=#f29e38ff>「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹。」</color>
E: One by one, the dolls vanished in flames before Tribbie. Her mother's voice grew fainter, drifting away. But Tribbie would never forget her final words: <color=#f29e38ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle."</color>

C: 来古士重返会场，揭露刻律德菈是想用「押送」来保护你的安全。来古士声称要肃清一切失控的因素，邀你步入与他相同的囚笼。
E: Lygus returned to the venue, revealing that Cerydra intended to use the "imprisonment" to ensure your safety. He announced his plan to eradicate all out-of-control factors and invited you to join him in the same cage.

C: 你看到一处照片墙，三月七拍摄的众多照片于此不断切换。
E: You saw a photo wall where the numerous photos taken by March 7th were constantly swapping in and out.

C: 你们被一辆损坏的矿车拦住去路。「家用寻宝仪」突然激活，称能够帮你们找到「矿车销子」与「矿车轮对」。
E: You were blocked by a broken mine cart. The Home-Use Object Finder was suddenly reactivated, claiming to be able to help find the Mine Cart Pin and Mine Cart Wheelset.

C: 星核降灾，「药王秘传」作乱，「建木」重生，反物质军团渗透罗浮……这一切始末，符玄想与你们一同梳理。
E: The Stellaron crisis, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus rebellion, the Arbor's resurrection, and the Antimatter Legion infiltrating the Luofu... Fu Xuan wished to sort out all these incidents with you.

C: 流萤对出现在路边的电视机感到疑惑，桑博却称这是一台「街机」。在桑博的鼓动下，你将手伸向面前的可疑屏幕。
E: Firefly found herself puzzled by a television on the side of the road, but Sampo claimed that it was an arcade machine. Under his encouragement, you reached for the suspicious screen before you.

C: 你与流萤同行时，遇到向你呼救的<color=#f29e38ff>钟表小子</color>。钟表小子称米沙有危险，奇怪的是，似乎只有你能看到它。
E: While you were traveling with Firefly, you encountered <color=#f29e38ff>Clockie</color>, who came seeking your aid. Clockie claimed that Misha was in danger. Strangely, you were the only one that could see Clockie.

C: 在钟表把戏的作用下，筑梦师的心情变为「悲伤」。筑梦师后悔于二十年前与家族签订的工作合约，陷入抑郁。或许你该换个方向试试。
E: Under the effects of Clockwork, the guard's feelings turned to "sadness." He lamented signing a work contract with The Family <unbreak>20</unbreak> years ago and fell into a depression. Perhaps you should try something else.

C: 你调查怪物残骸。残骸的表面切口窄而深，周围明显有剧烈灼烧形成的焦黑痕迹，看来这只怪物死于某种热能武器。
E: As you investigated the monster's remains, you found that the cuts on its exterior were narrow and deep. The surroundings bore obvious sights of scorching caused by intense flames. It appeared that the monster fell to some kind of thermal weapon.

C: 你在酒店大堂遇到托帕及其下属，他们正被猎犬家系监视。托帕称只有携带「邀请函」的砂金被允许入梦，公司无法从梦境外给予援助。
E: You met Topaz and her subordinate at the hotel lobby. They were being monitored by the Bloodhound Family. Topaz claimed that only Aventurine, who had an invitation, could enter a dream, and the IPC had no way of providing assistance from outside the dreamscape.

C: 你将搜集来的材料交给加拉赫。在你的好奇心与加拉赫娴熟调饮技巧的共同作用下，一杯特调饮品由此诞生。
E: You gave the ingredients you had gathered to Gallagher. With your curiosity and Gallagher's skillful mixing techniques, a special beverage was created.

C: 星期日与知更鸟在此等待梦主。知更鸟怀疑梦境对宾客的未来是给予或剥夺，星期日则称并非所有人都能走向未来，总有人自现实坠落。
E: Sunday and Robin waited for the Dreammaster. Robin questioned whether the dream granted or stripped away the guests' future. Sunday replied that not everyone could walk toward the future, that some would inevitably fall from reality.

C: 波提欧与丹恒分析现状，认为黄泉假扮巡海游侠别有目的。丹恒认为邀请函可能并非由家族寄出，坚持举办的谐乐大典也耐人寻味。
E: Boothill and Dan Heng analyzed the situation and opined that Acheron has another purpose in pretending to be a Galaxy Ranger. Dan Heng thought the invitation may not have been sent by The Family, and that it was intriguing that they insisted on holding the Charmony Festival.

C: 老奥帝察觉托帕带着姬子到来，意识到公司布局正在逐步推进。
E: Old Oti noticed that Topaz came with Himeko and realized that the IPC's plans were moving along.

C: 谐乐学院的其他同学们齐声说着*蕉语*，应该已经完全进入了睡蕉小猴的角色。你不由得感慨，真是一群称职的演员。
E: The other students at Charmony Academy were speaking Bananese in unison, clearly fully immersed in their roles as Slumbernana Monkeys. You couldn't help but marvel at what a dedicated bunch of actors they were.

C: 清晰的痛觉袭来，三月七将波提欧从转变中唤醒。助蕉声称，变成小猴不过是顺应人们的渴望。三月七拉着波提欧逃离此地。
E: With a sharp pain, Boothill was snapped out of his transformation by March 7th. The Assistanana claimed that turning into small monkeys was just following the people's desires. March 7th grabbed Boothill and fled the scene.

C: 奇怪的猴子们四散逃去。乱破感知到附近仍有邪祟徘徊，提议尽快离开此地。
E: The strange monkeys scattered and fled. Rappa sensed fiendling presences still lurking nearby and suggested leaving quickly.

C: 波提欧找到睡蕉社，发现有人正进行入社考核。笨拙的睡蕉小猴粉丝一问三不知，没能取得社员证。
E: Boothill found the Slumbernana Association and witnessed someone failing the admission test. The awkward Slumbernana Monkey fan couldn't answer basic questions and didn't receive a membership card.

C: 停云读到名为「停云」的观察日志，对自己身份产生模糊共鸣。
E: Tingyun read an observation diary on someone named "Tingyun" and had a vague resonance with her identity.

C: 你们到达命运三相殿。你从遐蝶与白厄处得知，缇宝是接过「门径」泰坦雅努斯神权的半神，并非每位泰坦都必须以暴力手段击败。
E: You made it to the Temple of the Three Fates. Castorice and Phainon told you that Tribbie was the demigod who received Janus the Passage Titan's power, proving that not all Titans had to be beaten through combat.

C: 你们谒见欧洛尼斯。欧洛尼斯对黄金裔弑杀神明、追逐火种的行为表示愤怒，不愿提供帮助。白厄只好做诉诸武力的准备。然而当你使用三月七的相机对泰坦拍照时，欧洛尼斯突然呼唤你前去，并重复呢喃着<color=#f29e38ff>「母亲」</color>。欧洛尼斯邀请你和它一起，远瞻你的过去。
E: You finally met Oronyx. The Titan was furious at the Chrysos Heirs for slaying gods and chasing Coreflames, and refused to help. Phainon got ready to fight. But when you took a picture of the Titan with March 7th's camera, Oronyx suddenly called to you, repeating <color=#f29e38ff>"Mother"</color> over and over. Oronyx invited you to look back into your past together.

C: 阿格莱雅在异象处遇到一名卫士，命令其保持缄默，以避免引起公民恐慌。阿格莱雅用金线将「纷争」眷属从异象中揪出，予以清理。
E: At the site of the anomaly, she encountered a city guard. Aglaea ordered him to remain silent, so as not to stir panic among the citizens. Then, with her golden thread, Aglaea dragged the Strife's Titankin from the anomaly and cleansed it.

C: 凯妮斯曾是专职刺杀黄金裔的刺客。阿格莱雅与缇宁会面，得知缇安剩余的力量只能再开启两次「百界门」，缇宝在那之后会接过职责。
E: Caenis had once been an assassin known for purging the Chrysos Heirs. Later, Aglaea met with Trinnon and learned that Trianne's remaining power would only be enough to open the Century Gate two more times. After that, Tribbie would take up the mantle.

C: 迷迷发现一块奇异的琥珀，但刚一飞近就被不知从何处出现的怪物团团包围。你与遐蝶寻找步行的通路，前去营救迷迷。
E: Mem had discovered a strange piece of amber, but the moment they approached, it was abruptly swarmed by monsters that appeared from nowhere. You and Castorice scouted for passable routes to rescue Mem.

C: 你们慰问卡林尼库斯的妻子。这位悬锋女人坦然接受与丈夫的永别，她将拿起长枪重返战场，向黑潮怪物们讨回仇债。
E: You paid your respects to Callinicus's wife. This Kremnoan woman accepted her husband's death with composure. Now, she would take up her spear and return to the battlefield, settling the blood debt with the black tide monsters.

C: 缇宝与缇宁用心灵感应交流先前遇到的幻象，但缇安无法感应到这种交流，专注于寻找「番红蕊」。
E: Tribbie and Trinnon shared the visions they had seen earlier through telepathy. Yet, Trianne could not sense this exchange. Her attention was fully fixed on searching for the saffron.

C: 你与白厄等人赶到命运重渊，只找到昏迷的缇宝与缇宁。丹恒与风堇留下搜寻缇安，白厄带其余人返回圣城，商讨围猎盗火行者的计划。
E: You, Phainon, and the others rushed to the Abyss of Fate, only to find Tribbie and Trinnon unconscious on the ground. Dan Heng and Hyacine stayed behind to continue the search for Trianne, while Phainon led the others back to the holy city to plan a hunt for the Flame Reaver.

C: 你与遐蝶发现一封怪盗信，遐蝶辨认出是<color=#f29e38ff>赛飞儿</color>主导了这一场盗窃。作为「诡计」的半神，赛飞儿在翁法罗斯各地留下过诡计传说。
E: You and Castorice discovered a coin and a letter from a certain phantom thief. Castorice identified <color=#f29e38ff>Cipher</color> as the culprit. As the demigod of "Trickery," she was a master thief who left legendary tales of her exploits all over Amphoreus.

C: 你与遐蝶来到赛飞儿的秘密据点。赛飞儿终于以真面目现身，并邀请你们谈一笔正式生意。
E: You and Castorice made your way to Cipher's secret hideout. The legendary thief revealed herself at last, and invited you to strike a bargain.

C: 遐蝶发现游荡的亡魂，试图与之交流以获取信息。
E: Castorice ran into some wandering souls and tried to communicate with them to learn more.

C: 宫廷学者执意求死，灵魂却在浅滩困顿千年。直到遐蝶赐下「死亡」。纵使有人不堪生命烦扰，遐蝶仍想创造一个没有「死亡」的世界。
E: The court scholars begged for release, having wandered in the shallows of the nether realm for centuries, and Castorice granted them the "Death" they craved. She expressed that even though there were those who could not bear to live, she still wished to wipe "Death" from the face of this world.

C: 你尝试与「追忆符文」互动，装置却没有反应。
E: You tried to interact with the Rune of Recollection, but it did not respond.

C: 你们打开装神谕牌的盒子，发现神谕牌被替换成了一封奇怪的信。昔涟猜想是妖精在调皮捣蛋，要带大家去寻找「迷路迷境」。
E: When you opened the box containing the Prophecy Cards, you discovered the cards had been replaced by a strange letter. Cyrene figured the fairies were up to mischief again and proposed leading the way to find the "Membrance Maze."

C: 为对抗来古士，昔涟和天才曾在过去商定计划。昔涟提议将「记忆」植入来古士的灵感回路，使其进程崩溃。黑塔指出，昔涟是依附于你的记忆而存在的模因，一旦被遗忘，就会消失。
E: To counter Lygus, Cyrene and the Geniuses had once devised a plan. Cyrene proposed implanting Remembrance into Lygus's Inspiration Circuit to trigger a system collapse. Herta warned that Cyrene was a memetic being who existed through your memories, and would disappear once forgotten.

C: 贝洛伯格也曾被关在天幕以下，直到无名客到来，才得以回归群星。昔涟以布洛妮娅的坚定信念，向刻律德菈说明和平走向群星的方法。
E: Belobog too had once been sealed beneath the sky, until the Nameless arrived and led it back to the stars. Through Bronya's unwavering resolve, Cyrene showed Cerydra that peace could also be a path to the stars.

C: 凯撒陨落，在翁法罗斯的界限内，她的征服已经抵达尽头。不必为之惋惜，能杀死凯撒的人无穷无尽，但真正能毁灭凯撒的，只有刻律德菈。
E: The Imperator fell. Within the bounds of Amphoreus, her conquest had reached its end. There was no need for grief, as countless could have slain her, but only Cerydra had the power to truly unmake her.

C: 你重塑晶体，光亮的范围随之扩大。那是希望的光芒，正如白厄汇集的愿望，变得越发贪婪。
E: As you reforged the crystal, the light expanded. It's the radiance of hope, growing ever more greedy, just like the wishes gathered by Phainon.

C: 昔涟询问你是否做好准备。以往昔的「记忆」，「开拓」来日的命运，镌写创世开篇的一笔。
E: Cyrene asked if you were ready. Using the "memories" of the past, you will "Trailblaze" tomorrow's destiny and pen down the first stroke in the story of Genesis.

C: 群组里的消息也未得到回复，这令你有些担心。浴室里传来异响，警觉的你决定去看看情况。
E: No one replied to your messages in the group chat. You started to worry. Strange noises came from the bathroom. Cautiously, you decided to check it out.

C: 你们发现把守此地的公司员工。杰帕德将「潜爆机兵」的操作权交给你，记住，要尽量保证不被敌人发现。
E: Upon reaching the area, you discovered IPC workers standing guard. Gepard transferred control of the "Automaton Stealth Bomb" to you and instructed you to proceed carefully and avoid detection.

C: 虎克找来斯薇塔帮忙调查「矿脉探测器」失窃案。斯薇塔称，小偷就在没有不在场证明的四位嫌疑人中，并且他们中肯定有一人在说谎。
E: Hook asked Swetta to help investigate the theft of the "vein detector." Swetta claimed that the thief was among the four suspects without alibis, and one of them was definitely lying.

C: 史瓦罗询问卢卡机械义肢的来因，卢卡称自己曾在一场保卫战中失去手臂，并由此找到生命的意义。史瓦罗表示会认真对待这场切磋。
E: Svarog asked Luka about his mechanical arm. Luka explained that he had lost his arm in a defensive battle, which led him to discover the meaning of life. Svarog promised to take the sparring seriously.

C: 永别半夏之后，你们前去寻找梁沐。
E: After bidding farewell to Banxia, you set out to find Liangmu.

C: 在「信使」的干扰下，三月七又回到了起点。
E: Due to the Messenger's interference, March 7th ended up back at the starting point.

C: 怀炎以剑匣作为演武仪典的奖品。为化解云璃与彦卿的矛盾，怀炎提出二人须共教三月七剑术，让其代表星穹列车参赛。
E: Huaiyan offered the sword case as a prize for the Wardance ceremony. To resolve the conflict between Yunli and Yanqing, Huaiyan proposed they jointly teach March 7th swordplay, so she could represent the Astral Express in the competition.

C: 问字部判官寒鸦前来接待你与丹恒。寒鸦请你们随她前往「录事厅」留下证言，务必听她号令，不得擅动。
E: Judge Hanya of the Interrogation Division arrived to receive you and Dan Heng. She asked you to follow her to the Scrivener Hall to give your testimony. You needed to follow her command and not act on your own.

C: 呼雷称，飞霄是从「蚀月猎群」逃离的战奴，体内流淌着步离血脉。「月狂」发作时，自愈力有限的狐人会四分五裂地死去，包括飞霄。
E: Hoolay revealed that Feixiao was a war slave who escaped from the Eclipse Pack and carried borisin blood. When "Moon Rage" occurs, foxians with poor regenerative abilities would explode into pieces, including Feixiao.

C: 为了问出线索，再次与浮烟战斗吧。
E: You fought Cirrus again to obtain the needed information.

C: 看到贝洛伯格的人们仍在为生存而抗争，希露瓦突然对自己的远行计划感到愧疚。等你准备好了，就和希露瓦一起去追上杰帕德吧。
E: Seeing the people of Belobog still fighting for survival, Serval suddenly felt guilty about her travel plans. When you are ready, join Serval to catch up with Gepard.

E: The aqua sprite leads you to a stash of canned food.

C: 环境比你的房间都好，这是可以说的吗？
E: The environment is better than your room... Are you allowed to say that?

C: 这已经是椒丘大夫的专业领域了。
E: That's already in Dr. Jiaoqiu's professional territory.

C: 新伊甸的舰队大战在粒子云中落下帷幕，一颗恒星变成了黑洞，一支舰队变成了碎片。公司必须为这巨大的损失找个说法——准确地说，问责。\n作为业务巩固部的调查专员，你被派去审问一位曾参与战斗的舰长。他正处在歇斯底里、语焉不详的状态中。主管认定他是故意隐瞒、拒绝配合，限你在<unbreak>24</unbreak>个系统时内从他嘴里撬出真相……
E: The fleet battle over New Eden has ended in the particle cloud, with a star turning into a black hole and a fleet reduced to debris. The IPC must come up with an explanation — more specifically, accountability — for this massive loss.\nAs an investigator from the Business Consolidation Department, you are tasked with interrogating a captain who was involved in the battle. He is in a state of hysteria, speaking incoherently. The supervisor has concluded that he is deliberately withholding information and refusing to cooperate, giving you <unbreak>24</unbreak> system hours to extract the truth from him...

E: Aventurine seems to have waited for quite some time on the stage in the center of Clock Studios Theme Park...\n...Join this crazed gambler for a perfect collaborative performance that will blow everyone in Penacony away.

E: Increases ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

C: 火属性伤害提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。
E: Increases Fire DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

C: 当装备者施放终结技后，使其行动提前<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。
E: After the wearer uses their Ultimate, their action is Advanced Forward by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

C: 当装备者对我方目标施放终结技时，我方全体速度提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>，持续<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>回合，该效果无法叠加。
E: When the wearer uses their Ultimate on an ally, SPD for all allies increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This effect cannot be stacked.

C: 敌方目标每承受1个持续伤害效果，装备者对其造成伤害时就无视其<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的防御力，最多计入<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>个持续伤害效果。
E: For every DoT the enemy target is afflicted with, the wearer will ignore <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of its DEF when dealing DMG to it. This effect is valid for a max of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DoTs.

C: 装备者的忆灵在场时，装备者的速度提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>，装备者的忆灵攻击时，装备者和忆灵的暴击伤害提高<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>，持续<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>回合。
E: While the wearer's memosprite is on the field, increases the wearer's SPD by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When the wearer's memosprite attacks, increases the wearer's and memosprite's CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

C: 当装备者及其忆灵为装备者及其忆灵以外的我方目标提供治疗后，使装备者获得【甘霖】，每回合最多触发1次，持续<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>回合。装备者持有【甘霖】时，速度提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>，我方全体暴击伤害提高<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>，该效果无法叠加。
E: When the wearer or their memosprite provides healing to ally targets other than themselves, the wearer gains "Gentle Rain," which lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and can only trigger once per turn. While the wearer has "Gentle Rain," SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and all allies' CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. This effect cannot stack.

C: 使装备者的防御力提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。当装备者的效果命中大于等于<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>时，防御力额外提高<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>。
E: Increases the wearer's DEF by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When the wearer's Effect Hit Rate is <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> or higher, the wearer gains an extra <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> DEF.

E: Firesmith of Lava-Forging

C: 沉欢醉饮的海隅

C:
反物质军团将衰亡的「战争熔炉」赠予火匠，让他们在烈焰世界中自由锻造。

在熔岩灼目的世界里，只要锤炼不止，新生与毁灭便不再是二元对立。

苏鲁特擅长利用活火山中喷涌的熔浆，为军团的生灵注入一道暴戾的毁灭气息。无论剧毒气体的沸动、还是热熔岩浆的翻滚，都不能打断苏鲁特淬火的专注。热浪喷溅着苏鲁特的围裙，那是由火巨蜥皮制成的阻燃衣料，待熔浆退去，皮革表面依然光洁如新。

大量的军团战力，在洪炉中被反复锤炼，直到肉体和武器在火匠的熔锤下结为一体，成为毁灭的武器。

「无与伦比的毁灭之力……」驾驭火焰的工匠们从不掩饰他们寄托在武器中的可怖愿望。
E:
The Antimatter Legion gifted the dying Warforge to the Firesmiths, letting them forge to their hearts' desire in a fiery world.

In this scorching world of lava, as long as the smelting and hammering never ceased, creation and destruction were no longer polar opposites of each other.

Surtur was especially good at using the molten magma that erupted from active volcanoes to infuse the Legion's creatures with a violent aura of destruction. Neither the bubbling of toxic gases nor the gurgling of magma could interrupt Surtur's concentration at the forge. Though burning waves of molten rock would splash on Surtur's fireproof apron of giant firelizard skin, the leather never lost its luster when the flames faded.

A massive proportion of the Legion's fighting forces were repeatedly hammered and smelted in the forge until their flesh and weaponry were fused together under the hammers of the Firesmiths, becoming weapons of Destruction.

"This incomparable power of destruction..." The Firesmiths who control the flames have never hidden the terrible aspirations they place in their weapons.

C:
优雅的火魔于万火之火中诞生，并笃信毁灭是赐予陀斐特的至上冠冕。

「我，于毁灭之际诞生，是陀斐特的罪恶信仰。我，即是纳努克的怒火。」

纳努克亲手覆灭陀斐特，白星烈焰与毁灭之力共同孕育了等离子体生命。优雅的火魔将诞生视为蒙受天启——「毁灭君主今日征服陀斐特，祂以炽焰授勋，轻浮与空虚的荣誉随日珥逸散，沉重与厚实的荣誉将为我加冕。」阿弗利特自诞生起，便痴迷于破坏与杀戮。

「世间荣誉的桂冠，皆是荆棘编织而成；胜过荆棘的桂冠，只有我无上的冥焰冠冕。」

毁灭星神灭星的余烬，被阿弗利特亲手捧起，捏制成陀斐特王冠的模样，佩戴至今。
E:
The elegant fire demon was born in the most fiery of all fires, and believes Destruction to be the supreme glory bestowed upon Fetora.

"I, born on the eve of destruction, am the sinful belief of Fetora. I am the furious flames of Nanook."

Nanook destroyed Fetora by THEIR own hands, and the White Star's flames coalesced with the power of Destruction to birth a plasmic lifeforms. The elegant fire demon saw its birth as a revelation. "Today, the Lord of Destruction conquered Fetora. THEY honored it with blazing flames. The frivolous and meaningless glory evaporate with the solar flare, but concrete and heavy glory shall mark my coronation." Ifrit has been obsessed with destruction and slaughter since birth.

"The laurels of honor in this world are all woven of thorns. The only laurel that surpasses these thorns is my supreme crown of netherflame."

The embers left behind from the Aeon of Destruction's annihilation of a star were clasped in Ifrit's own hands, molded into the shape of Fetora's crown, and worn to this day.

C: 她看着女孩的身影在朦胧月光下动如脱兔。她追随女孩的足迹与气味如追猎物。最终，她在道路尽头等着女孩到来。 或者，是女孩在等她到来。 月光映照下，将军看清了那张脸。 「你就那么想加入云骑？」 「我不想给狼头恩主卖命。」 少女的步离语艰难断续。那张脸上的神情，她曾在无数次解救沦陷地同胞时目睹过。 那些人虽和她流着同样的血，却说着不同的语言，怀着不同的心思。 他们从不认为自己是狐族的子裔，可这样一来，他们又是谁？ 将军微微颤身，让出一条路。 「你走吧，今夜开始，他们不会再追赶你了……」 「可我要他们死。」 将军难以置信地瞧着她，如同看到天空掠过流星般惊异，小兽般的身姿倏然没入黑暗。 将军闭目，仿佛被月光灼痛了眼。片刻后，她低头，瞧见少女精赤的双足，布满棘刺血痕与污泥。 「怎么不穿鞋？」 「忘了。没发现。」 将军脱下自己的战靴，比了比尺码，为女孩穿上。 「倒挺合适的…那就出发吧。」 「你怎么办？」 「我早习惯走在荆棘上了。」 她迈开步伐，赤足如飞，女孩一路紧紧追赶她的身影。 又或者，是她们在追赶彼此的身影。
E: She watched the girl's figure dart swift and sure in the soft moonlight. She followed the girl's footsteps and scent like a hunter tracking their prey. Finally, she waited for the girl at the end of the road. Or perhaps, it was the girl waiting for her to arrive. In the moonlight, the general saw that face clearly. "Do you want to join the Cloud Knights that much?" "I don't want to give my life to a wolf-headed master." The girl's borisin speech was difficult and broken. The expression on that face — the general had seen it countless times while rescuing trapped kin from the fallen territories. Though these people shared the same blood as her, yet they spoke different languages and harbored different thoughts. They never considered themselves descendants of the foxes, but then, who were they? The general trembled slightly, stepping aside and vacating the path. "Go. From tonight, they won't chase you anymore..." "But I want them dead." The general looked at her in disbelief, as amazed as if she had seen a shooting star streak across the sky, and the girl's animal-like figure suddenly vanished into the darkness. The general closed her eyes as if the moonlight burned them. After a moment, she looked down and saw the girl's bare, thorn-scarred feet covered in mud. "Why aren't you wearing shoes?" "I forgot. I didn't notice." The general took off her own boots, compared sizes, and helped the girl put them on. "They fit pretty well... Let's go then." "What about you?" "I'm used to walking on thorns." She quickened her pace, barefoot and agile, with the girl closely chasing after her. Or perhaps, they were both chasing after each other.

C:
士兵们沉默地走进废墟，开始打扫战场。有人艰难地拖动遗体，将战友与敌人分开；有人跪在阵亡的同伴旁，轻轻合上他们的眼帘…战场的嘶喊声早已远去，留下的只有令人窒息的静默——竞技场的英雄亦长眠于这群死者中，仅余一对烫金的护胫孤立于血尘之间。

「记住，战场上的战士从未彻底消失，他们的英魂将永远留在后人的记忆里。」

随后，静寂被哀婉的歌声打破，祭司们缓步走上战场，为阵亡者举行葬礼。

火焰于黑夜中腾起，哀歌久久不能停息…忽然，远处的天空被一道璀璨的光芒穿透，宛如天谴之矛刺向大地，那是尼卡多利呼唤着此地的英灵。随即，出席葬礼的士兵与平民纷纷跪地，双手高举，心中充满敬畏与感激——那光芒化作温暖的气息，轻轻托起每一位战士的亡魂，低语着泰坦的恩赐与宽恕，宣告英雄们的永恒不朽。

「看啊，即便身陷死亡，竞技场的英雄仍在引领战士们，通往故土的方向。」

英雄轻轻颔首，在古老的歌谣中，他那高尚的灵魂将再次被重铸。
E:
The soldiers mutely walk into the ruins and start to sweep the battlefield. Some drag the corpses apart with difficulty, separating friend from foe, while others kneel by their dead comrades and gently close the eyes of the deceased... The battlefield's roars have long dissipated, leaving only a suffocating silence — The hero of the coliseum also sleeps forever among these fallen, only leaving behind a pair of upright gilded shinguards among the blood and dust.

"Remember, warriors on the battlefield never truly disappear. Their heroic souls will forever stay in the memories of future generations."

Later, the silence is shattered by wailing elegies. Priests shuffle into the battlefield to organize funerals for the dead.

Fires light up the dark night, and the dirges endure for a time unceasing... Suddenly, the distant sky is pierced by a splendid ray of light, as if the Lance of Fury has been thrust into the earth — it is Nikador's summon to the heroic souls of this place. With that, the attending soldiers and commonfolk all kneel, raising both their hands above their heads, their hearts brimming with respect and gratitude — That ray of light turns into a warm aura of embrace, gently lifting each warrior's soul while whispering of the Titan's graces and magnanimity, proclaiming the heroes' everlasting immortality.

"Look, the hero of the coliseum leads the soldiers on a homeward triumph even in death."

The hero nods faintly — in the ballads of old, his noble soul will once again be reforged.

C: 受虚构史学家的影响，鲁珀特二世的结局向来模糊不清。有资料写道，血肉之躯让二世终究无法达成帝国的伟业，最终病死在铸铁的王座。有诗文戏言，糖果色纱裙的女士慢条斯理地走进王都，而后帝国轰然倒塌。有声音唏嘘，金属的戒指刺破了他的手指，于是暴起的机械杀死了眼前的有机体。也有剧目演绎，他忽地发出感慨，像是获得解脱那般，流下人类的泪水，缓慢而永恒地，在臣民面前阖上了眼睛。
E: Due to the influence of History Fictionologists, the end of #Rubert II has always remained enigmatic. Some references wrote that the second emperor's organic body ultimately hindered him from completing the empire's great work, as he died from illness on the cast-iron throne. Some poets warbled that a lady in a pastel-colored silk dress sauntered into the capital, and the empire collapsed in a cacophony. Other voices lamented that the metallic ring pricked his finger, and so the riotous machine killed the organic before him. Some plays also dramatized that he suddenly expressed his profound feelings and shed human tears as if he suddenly became free, then slowly closed his eyes before his subjects, never to open them again.

C: 迭代机甲
E: Iterated Mech

C: 叶片向上攀升，遮蔽天际，沐浴在恒星的光华里。枝干因重力垂下，它让渡出一抹阳光，落到根须托负的新芽上，令它舒展身体。多余的养分从筛管运输向盘错的根部，你欣慰地接收着它们的心情，想要向上生长，长到靠近太阳的地方。\n\n新芽扎根在你的身体里，汲取更多生机，你的枝桠枯黄，叶片腐烂作新的养料，供给新生的个体。还有多远才能抵达？你的躯干里填满了复杂的根系，在你的尸体里，它们会更进一步，攀升向眼前的恒星。然后，用根须将那颗火球包裹，吞没。
E: The leaves climb upward, eclipsing the sky and bathing in the light of the stars. As the branches are weighed down by gravity, a beam of sunlight descends through the gap onto the new sprouts below, allowing them to stretch out their bodies. As the excess nutrients are passed through the filtering vines to the entangled roots below, you accept their mood in relief. They want to grow even taller, all the way up close to the sun.\n\nThe new shoots take root within your body to absorb even more vitality. As your branches wither and yellow and your leaves decompose, they provide the new life with fresh nutrients. How much taller does it have to grow? Your trunk is filled with intricate root systems. Within your corpse, they will rise even higher and climb to the star before them. Then, these roots will ensnare that ball of flame and swallow it.

C: 你感到一阵幻痛，朽烂的双腿早已不在。带着筑城者徽印的螺钉，坚不可摧的巨盾，周身的零件被挨个拆卸，作为「存护」的旧忆售卖给公司。你将晶体振子稳定装置卖给他们，那是你雕刻着战时伤痕的耳朵。你将合金熔铸的臂膀卖给他们，蠹役血液的腐蚀仍清晰可见。你将晶体传感器摘下卖给他们，你最引以为傲的，曾注视过琥珀王的眼睛。\n\n可这仍然不够，远远不够，饥饿与贫穷比虫子的螯肢更可怕。你做了一笔交易，代价是筑城者的机心，作为报偿，这片土地上所有的人都不会再因饥饿哭泣。有什么在触碰你的面庞，也许是一只鸟儿，也许是人们欢笑的声音。
E: You feel a phantom pain, your decaying legs are long gone. The screws bearing the emblem of the Architects and the impenetrable giant shield were disassembled piece by piece and sold to the IPC as relics of Preservation. You traded away the crystal oscillator — that was your ears, etched with scars from wartime. You parted with the fused alloy arms, the corrosion from Swarm blood still visible. You even took off the crystal sensors and sold that to them, your most proud eyes that once gazed at the Amber Lord.\n\nBut it's still not enough, not by a long shot — hunger and poverty are far worse than the chelicerae of arthropods. So, you made a deal, sacrificing the Architects' mechanical heart, and in return, the people of this land will never weep from hunger again. Something brushes against your face — perhaps a bird, or maybe the sound of people's joyful laughter.

C: 生命分岔（其二）
E: Life Divergence (II)

C: 每个星系中最智慧的头脑获得博识学会的认可后，在其王国灵性典仪上可被授予换境桂冠，桂冠树叶取自掉落的介子衰变叶片，冠底用量子光束绑为树枝状编织而成，被认可之人戴上它后，将感到自己身处宇宙不同境界之中。
E: After the most intelligent minds from each star system are acknowledged by the Intelligentsia Guild, they could be granted the Laurel Crown of Planar Shifts at the Imperial Sentience Ceremony. The leaves of the laurel crown are made of leaves of decayed mesons, and the crown itself is woven in the shape of branches using quantum beams. After the acknowledged one puts it on, they will feel that they exist in a different plane of the universe.

C: 少有生物能在塔利亚的沙尘暴中存活，而巴扎顿蜥蜴是其中之一。它们以当地的高辐射矿石为食，并将其转化为生存所需的能量。过剩的精力和攻击性令巴扎顿蜥蜴展现出远超寻常载具的性能，更有奸诈的商贩将其命名为「毁灭巨蜥」，以求在黑市上高价出售给初出茅庐的泯灭帮新人。随着露天矿产日渐枯竭，越来越多的巴扎顿蜥蜴学会将自己的幼崽叼至废土客的地盘，为后代谋求生路，而塔利亚的蜥蜴养殖业也应运而生。
E: Few creatures can survive in Talia's sandstorms, and Barzarton lizards are one of them. They consume the highly radioactive ores on the planet as food and convert it as energy needed for survival. Their excessive energy and aggressiveness make Barzarton lizards demonstrate capacities far beyond that of ordinary vehicles. Some deceptive businesspeople even named the species "Destructive Mega Lizard," hoping to sell it to newbie Annihilation Gang members for a high price on the black market. As the open-air mines gradually became depleted, more Barzarton lizards learned to carry their young to the land of the Wastelanders to ensure the offspring's survival. That was how Talia's lizard breeding industry was born.
