C: 「唷，伙计。」 「唷——你也是来帮那个什么波桑干活的？」 「是。你是负责爆破的？」 「对。你是撬锁的？」 「嗯哼。」 「可以，都齐活了。开工吧。」 「…嗯…嗯…搞定，这样就行了。等着吧。」 「看着不太靠谱呢…这小玩意能炸开这大铁门吗？」 「我都没怀疑你的专业能力呢，哥们儿！信我，我炸矿山的次数比你玩过的泥巴还多。」 「唔…行吧。话说回来，那女的是怎么跟你说的？」 「废弃工厂，没人把守，货随便拿。没见过比这更轻松的活。你呢？」 「嗯，她跟我也这么说。但我总觉得有点不对劲……」 「有钱就挣，问那么多干啥。哎唷，赶紧把耳朵堵上——放烟花了！」 「……」 「…我了个去，太强了伙计，场面够劲爆的！」 「和你说了，别质疑我的专业能力。走吧，接下来该你表演——」 「嘘！别嚷嚷，你听到了吗？里面有人说话！」 「什么？不、不可能啊，她说过这是无人——」 「我去，是铁卫、铁卫！这下完蛋了兄弟，赶紧跑！」 「该死，肯是那个波桑搞的鬼！混账东西，老子和你没完！」
E: "Yo, my man." "Yo, you're here working for Poisson, too?" "Yeah. Are you in charge of demolitions?" "Yup. Are you the lockpick?" "Uh-huh." "Nice. Then we're ready. Let's get to work." "Unh... Unh... Done. Now let's just wait." "That doesn't look very reliable... Can this tiny thing blow through this steel door?" "I didn't doubt your professionalism. Why are you doubting me? Trust me. I've bombed mine shafts more times than you've had hot dinners." "Err... okay. Getting back on topic, what did that girl tell you again?" "The factory's abandoned, as it's completely unguarded. Just take what you want. I've never heard of such an easy job." "Mmm, yeah that's what she told me too. But something seems kinda off to me..." "Money's money. Don't ask so many questions. Come on, plug up your ears. It's fireworks time!" "..." "...Holy moly! That's too much, man... Just spectacular!" "I told you already. Don't question my professionalism. Let's go. It's over to you now." "Shh! Don't say anything. Can't you hear? I can hear voices inside!" "What? N—No way, she said there were no guards." "It's the Silvermane Guards. The Silvermane Guards! It's the end of the line for us, bro. Scram!" "Darn it. Poisson must've set us up! That piece of scum. This isn't finished yet!"

C: 「纸鸢是坠亡飞行士的纪念物。  好好保管——代替那些无法回到天空的飞行士们再度起飞吧。」  当我从燃烧着熊熊烈火的星槎残骸中爬出，看到的是那颗无血无泪的星球未经大气修饰的天空。  那是我见过的最美的天空，可我只感到难以忍受的悲伤。我只能像只该死的蚂蚁匍匐在大地上，眼巴巴地望着它。  在梦里，我死在了那天。  我想了很多。我想起过去。我见过死去的太阳。我见过活化的星球。我见过帝弓司命的光矢。我见过太多事物。我见过太多星星。我见过太多生命陨落。我见过太多生命诞生。我见过太多。我老了。我想我老了。我会死去。我的翅膀折断了。我回不去。我想我老了。我回不去。我想我会死去。我的翅膀折断了。我飞不起来。我像蚂蚁。我想我飞不起来。我想我的翅膀折断了。我想回去。我想回到天空。我想回去。我想回到天空。我想回去。  我从梦里醒来。  我想回去。我想回去。我想回去。  我必须回去。星空属于我。我渴望回归星空。  我将完成生命中的最后一次奋飞。
E: "Kites are mementos of fallen pilots. Take good care of them. Let them take off once more in place of those pilots who cannot return to the sky." When I climbed out of the burning carcass of the starskiff, I looked up into a clear sky — pure and seemingly unadorned by the atmosphere that arced far above us. It was the most beautiful sky I had ever seen... but all I could feel was unbearable pain. I sunk to the ground and gazed up helplessly. In my dream, that was the day I died. I think about it a lot. I think about the past. I have seen dead suns. I have seen sentient planets. I have seen the Reignbow Arbiter's Lux Arrow. I have seen too much. I have seen too many stars. I have seen the demise of too many lives. I have seen the births of too many beings. I have seen too much. I'm getting old. I think I'm getting old. I will die. My wings are broken. I can't go back. I think I'm old. I can't go back. I think I'll die. My wings are broken. I can't fly. I'm like an ant. I don't think I can fly. I think my wings are broken. I want to go back. I want to go back to the sky. I want to go back. I want to go back to the sky. I want to go back. I awoke from the dream. I want to go back. I want to go back. I want to go back. I need to go back. The sky belongs to me. I crave to return to the skies. I will complete the final flight of my life.

C: 如丑时三刻的闪光弹一般现身在匹诺康尼，以忍者自居，将世间一切归因于「忍法」的奇妙少女。\n贯彻吟诵忍•真言、绘制缭乱•忍符、修习忍•法帖的「忍•道」——即说唱，涂鸦，漫画——苦炼自身意志，驰骋星间行侠仗义。\n身为「巡海游侠」的一员，始终追猎着名为「御猿•邪忍」的恶党，直至银河尽头。
E: A peculiar girl who appears in Penacony like a flashbang at the darkest hour of night, identifying herself as a ninja and attributing everything in the world to "ninjutsu."\nUpholding the recitation of ninja mantra, creating Dazzling Ninja Seals, and studying ninja scrolls — That is, the Way of the Ninja involves rap, graffiti, and manga — Through rigorous self-discipline, she roams the stars, upholding justice and righteousness.\nAs a member of the Galaxy Rangers, she relentlessly pursues the villain known as Evil Ninja Osaru, chasing them to the very edge of the Cosmos.

C: 阿兰似乎担心自己会拖累你们，但你们在说服他这点上已经产生了一种微妙的默契，难道这就是同伴么？\n和同伴一起，抓紧时间去往最上层吧。
E: Arlan seems to worry that he would be a hindrance, but you as a group already developed a sort of delicate rapport in how to persuade him. Could this be what it means to be companions?\nHurry and reach the top floor with your companions.

C: 黑塔原来不止一个……仔细想想，倒也合理。这位黑塔要求你前往她的办公室。\n多半是个令人头疼的委托，但不去也不行。
E: So, there's more than one Herta... It makes sense now that you think about it. This Herta wants you to head to her office.\nIt'll probably be an annoying request, but you do have to go.

C:
矿区的危机基本解除，绝大部分「地火」成员已经护送矿民先行撤离现场。
不过，希儿尚未将布洛妮娅押送至首领面前，而你们也没有见到这位大人物——而这正是你们此行的根本原因。
然而，你的去路被一辆报废矿车强行隔断。
「嘭！嘭！轰隆！」你不禁想，「可惜杨叔不在，要不一个黑洞全都给他扬了…」
E:
The crisis in the mines is no more, and most of the Wildfire members have left the spot, escorting miners to safety along with them.
However, Seele has not yet brought her captive, Bronya, to the chief, and you haven't had the chance to meet this important figure, a meeting with whom is the biggest motive behind this journey.
And yet, the way forward is cut off by a mine cart out of order.
"Bang, bang!" You can't help but picture Mr. Yang destroying the cart with his black hole.

C: 矿区的危机基本解除，绝大部分「地火」成员已经护送矿民先行撤离现场。\n不过，希儿尚未将布洛妮娅押送至首领面前，而你们也没有见到这位大人物——而这正是你们此行的根本原因。\n所幸你们阴差阳错之下捡到了被遗留在矿洞里的星际和平公司寻物产品「查宝」，或许它可以带你们找到修复矿车所需的部件……
E: The crisis in the mines is no more, and most of the Wildfire members have left the spot, escorting miners to safety along with them.\nHowever, Seele has not yet brought her captive, Bronya, to the chief, and you haven't had the chance to meet this important figure, a meeting with whom is the biggest motive behind this journey.\nLuckily, you happen to have picked up a Findie, a product from the Interastral Peace Corporation with the purpose of searching for things. Someone must have left behind in the mines. Maybe it can lead you to the parts required to fix the mine cart...

C: 看来，在三月七和丹恒的斡旋下，「地火」终于和无名客们统一战线。现在，你们的目标已经非常清晰了：尽量与史瓦罗和平交涉；如果不成，「地火」也做好了开战的准备。\n为了达成这一目标，奥列格为列车组的各位安排了向导。至于向导的人选，你恐怕已经心里有数了——\n然而，在指定地点等待着你们的，似乎不是那个熟悉的深蓝色人影，而是某个混沌的漆黑化身…
E: It seems Wildfire has finally sided with the Nameless due to March 7th and Dan Heng's mediation. Now, your goals are crystal clear: Do your best in diplomacy with Svarog and if all fails, Wildfire will be ready for battle.\nTo reach your goals, Oleg has arranged a guide for the crew. You probably already know who the guide is going to be...\nHowever, the person waiting for you at the designated location doesn't seem to be the dark blue silhouette that you were expecting. Instead, it's some sort of black chaos avatar...

C: 你终于享受了一次优质睡眠——因为你根本不记得夜里有没有做噩梦了。\n你不妨在离开之前再多看看这个简朴却温馨的小房间…毕竟，很难说在这次离开后又要过多久才能够再回来。\n若是看够了，就出发与伙伴们会合吧。
E: Finally, a good night's sleep. Or not — because you can't remember if you had a nightmare during the night.\nWouldn't hurt to stay a while longer to appreciate this simple yet cozy little room of yours... After all, there's no way to tell when you will be able to come back.\nGo meet the group when you are ready.

C:
巨大的机关门扉再次阻断了你们的进路。
有了在铁卫禁区操作旋转栈桥的经验，你们很快意识到：要想解锁眼前的机关，必须找到与之相连的装置才行。
显然，控制机关铁门的装置并非只有一处——你不禁想，这道铁门存在的意义或许只是为了折磨其使用者…
不过抱怨也没用，继续寻找剩下的装置吧！
E:
A giant mechanism gate stops your advance once again.
Armed with the experience of dealing with the gear bridge in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, you quickly realize that if you want to unlock the mechanism in front of you, you'll have to find the device linked to it.
Apparently, there is more than just one device that controls the mechanism gate — you can't help but think that the sole purpose of this gate is to torture its user...
However, complaining won't do you any good. Keep searching for the remaining devices!

C: 抵达仙舟「罗浮」，等待列车的只有空无一人的港口。\n卡芙卡声称一颗星核降临此间，即将横生灾变。眼前闭锁的港口似也印证了她的预告。\n此间变数究竟如何，还需开拓者们仔细勘察一番。
E: Upon arriving at the Xianzhou Luofu, only an empty port welcomes the Express.\nKafka claims that a Stellaron had descended here and that the place is on the brink of catastrophe. The closed port in front of you seems to confirm what she said.\nThe Trailblazers will need to investigate carefully to understand what had happened here.

C: 变生腋肘，药王秘传的魁首濒死之际，呼唤为她带来星核之人，反物质军团的援手。而那位时刻追随你们左右的引路人「停云小姐」却以令人震悚的方式化为一团火焰，向你们宣布它的真实身份：绝灭大君，幻胧。\n幻胧以军团爪牙阻住你们的去路，而它即将深入鳞渊境，染指仙舟人长生的起源，建木。
E: In a sudden turn of events, the master primus of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus calls out on the brink of death for the one who brought the Stellaron to her, the assistant from the Antimatter Legion. Then, the guide who had been beside you all this time, "Miss Tingyun," suddenly turns into a ball of flame in a terrifying fashion, declaring to you their true identity of Phantylia, the Lord Ravager.\nPhantylia uses the Legion's soldiers to block your path while moving deeper into Scalegorge Waterscape to claim the source of the Xianzhou natives' immortality — the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n触碰这台神秘的机器后，你发现自己变成了一个不怎么爱说话的卡通人物。根据游戏设定，你现在打倒石头老板，没收他的非法所得物。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nAs you touch the mysterious machine, you realize that you've been transformed into a taciturn cartoon character. According to the game story, you will now defeat Boss Stone and confiscate his illegal items.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们在撤离的途中找到了许多烧焦的残骸，值得仔细调查一番。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou discovered a large number of charred remains during your evacuation. They are worth a thorough investigation.

C: 筑梦拼图在匹诺康尼无处不在。通常来说，看到筑梦拼图就等于看到了一扇大门…不知是有意还是无意，这种诡异的设计在匹诺康尼简直泛滥成灾，让你深感家族是不是没有新活可以整了。\n无论如何，还是按照流程集齐筑梦碎片吧，你知道教授朋友向来没什么耐心。
E: Dream Jigsaws are ubiquitous in Penacony. Generally speaking, seeing a Dream Jigsaw is the same as seeing a door... Intentional or not, this creepy design is so common in Penacony that it makes you wonder whether The Family has run out of creative ideas.\nAnyway, you might as well go through the procedure and collect all the jigsaw fragments. You know how your professor friend isn't known for his patience.

C: 另一边，黄泉——意思是你——和瓦尔特为了挖掘出家族正在隐瞒的真相，孤身潜入至朝露公馆。然而，你们发现本应壁垒森严的公馆里全然不见人影，仅有游荡的怪物四处巡逻。\n究竟发生什么事了？
E: Meanwhile, Acheron — that is to say, you — and Welt have infiltrated the Dewlight Pavilion to bring to light the truth hidden by The Family. To your surprise, the place is empty when it is supposed to be heavily guarded. Only some wandering monsters can be seen patrolling the place.\nWhat's going on?

C: 流萤向你解释了此前她种种不寻常举动背后的深层原因，并指引你下潜至家族宣扬的「噩梦」——美梦之外的原初忆域——「流梦礁」。而这一举动也揭露了「死亡」的部分真相：不过是协助有心之人往返美梦的驯化迷因，而「闭上眼睛」则是唤来它的奇妙咒语。\n短暂的不适后，你发现自己已经抵达了一座荒废的旧镇。与众人交流过、准备停当后，就开始此次废弃车站下车之旅吧。
E: Firefly explains to you the deeper reasons behind her various inexplicable behaviors, and guides you to dive deeper into a place declared as a "nightmare" by The Family... The primitive Memory Zone outside the sweet dream: "Dreamflux Reef." This move also exposes some of the truths behind "Death" — It is nothing but a tamed memetic entity that assists specific people who wish to travel between dreams. "Closing your eyes" is merely a strange invocation used to summon them.\nAfter a brief moment of discomfort, you realize that you have arrived at an abandoned old town. Once you have spoken with everyone and prepared yourself, alight and begin your adventure at this abandoned station.

C: 可憎！龙•邪祟又在以师长之名残害忍徒，宣扬邪祟之说。身为与缭乱•忍侠搭档的开拓上忍，你怎能忍受此等恶行发生在眼前，难道你已合眸安眠了吗？正义的球棒如金刚杵般坚硬了！\n虽然这段话非常热血，但按照剧本，你还是得陪这龙…猴演演戏。
E: Atrocious! The dino fiendling is once again terrorizing ninjas, spreading malevolence under the guise of mentorship. As the Trailblaze advanced ninja, partnered with the Dazzling Ninja Hero, how can you stand by and watch such wickedness? Have you closed your eyes and entered the eternal sleep already? Your baseball bat of justice is now as firm as a vajra scepter!\nDespite the inspiring dialogue, the script dictates your compulsory involvement in this farce with this dino... I mean, this monkey.

C: 筑梦艺术课开始了，所幸你的第一个任务不是跟混凝土打交道。课上的一切都很新奇，无论是想象力作画，还是你的忍者同学与猴子老师——看来这次学院之旅是离不开这两个词了。\n动手…不，动脑画出你的大作吧！
E: The Dreamweaving class has started, and thankfully, your first task doesn't involve dealing with concrete. Everything in this class feels fresh, from creative artwork to your ninja classmate and monkey mentor. It seems like these two elements are intertwined in your academic journey.\nUse your hands... or your brain to craft your own masterpiece!

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 与阿格莱雅商谈结盟一事时，我们与昏光庭院的风堇相识，{NICKNAME}与遐蝶决定陪她一同回到树庭，完成阿格莱雅交付的外交任务。
E: During alliance negotiations with Aglaea, we encounter Hyacine from the Twilight Courtyard. {NICKNAME} and Castorice opt to join her journey back to the Grove to complete Aglaea's diplomatic mission.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 计划有变，赛飞儿希望{NICKNAME}与遐蝶在奥赫玛城外会面。\n{NICKNAME}又稀里糊涂地在私人浴宫醒来。
E: Plans have changed. Cipher hopes that {NICKNAME} can meet with Castorice outside Okhema.\n{NICKNAME} awakens groggily in the private baths once more.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶为{NICKNAME}准备了礼物。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nCastorice prepared a gift for {NICKNAME}.

C: 成为半神的遐蝶成功将{NICKNAME}轻轻推出了冥界，她也为命运迎来结局。\n{NICKNAME}还记得与遐蝶再会的约定。
E: Castorice, who became a demigod, successfully pushes {NICKNAME} gently out of the nether realm and welcomes the end of her fate.\n{NICKNAME} still remembers the promise they made with Castorice to meet her once more.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 你已经逐渐开始适应这里的生活了，你觉得在这里工作也挺好的。要知道，宇宙里永远充斥着战争、贫穷和饥饿。空间站的生活，对他们而言，与天堂无异。
E: You're slowly getting used to life here. Honestly, the work's not bad. In a universe full of war, poverty, and hunger, life on the space station feels like paradise.

C: 你已知悉翁法罗斯的往日，如今，你要改写它的明天。该如何与命运的伟力抗衡？你身旁的伙伴与同行的智者，一定能驱散疑虑的阴云。
E: You have seen the past of Amphoreus. Now, you shall shape its future. How will you stand against the weight of destiny? The companion beside you and the sages who walk with you will definitely clear the clouds of doubt.

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C: 一场多么美的宴会，君王举起杯中的野心，令臣子与万民酣醉。但若细品蜜酿回味，甜中又夹杂了几分咸腥和苦涩，醉中难免伴着晕眩与痛楚——但在灵魂飞往高空的狂欢中，无人需要俯瞰大地。\n除非你飞到了最高、最高的地方，那里的寒风会让你清醒。\n继而咸腥、苦涩、晕眩、痛楚会如瀑布天降，抱着你下坠。
E: What a spectacle this banquet of power is, where the ruler's ambitious toast leaves everyone intoxicated with possibility. Beneath the sweet honey brew, though, salt and bitterness linger on the tongue.\nThe higher the revelry soars, the less anyone notices the world below. That's the trick of it all.\nOnly those who reach the absolute summit feel the sobering winds of truth. Then comes the inevitable fall. Salt, bitterness, vertigo, pain... all rushing up to embrace you as gravity collects its debt.

C: 鱼在在藻，有颁其首。王在在镐，岂乐饮酒。\n鱼在在藻，有莘其尾。王在在镐，饮酒乐岂。\n鱼在在藻，依于其蒲。王在在镐，有那其居。
E: Where are the fish? Among green weeds, nodding heads in gentle streams. Where is the king? In capital bright, wine brings joy and pure delight.\nWhere are the fish? In waters deep, long tails sway in graceful sweep. Where is the king? In capital grand, feasting peaceful through the land.\nWhere are the fish? By cattails serene, resting calm in waters green. Where is the king? In capital's halls, dwelling where tranquility calls.

C: 丹恒在螺丝咕姆的建议下重新回到星穹列车。\n时间的差速让事情变得与返程时截然不同。
E: Dan Heng returns to the Astral Express at Screwllum's suggestion.\nThe time discrepancy has made things drastically different from his return journey.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

C: 螺丝咕姆的宝贝看起来不错，希望它在探索矩阵上同样有效。
E: Screwllum's treasure looks promising. Let's hope it works just as well on the Matrix.

C: 铁墓之战，以「毁灭」的落败告终。我在熟悉的车厢中醒来，只是列车似乎不同往日，似有稀客到访……
E: The Battle of Irontomb ended in Destruction's defeat. I woke up in the familiar car, but the Express felt different today, as if some rare visitors had arrived...

C: 倘若世间因果是一条顺流而下的溪涧，那么少女就是被岁月之风吹起、溯流而上的花朵。沿着回望的方向，她踮着脚在水面上播撒着涟漪，圆满了因果、拂留了芬芳，将一切重要的瞬间铭刻于此，慢慢地靠近…那最初的起点。
E: If the world's causality were a stream flowing downstream, then the girl would be a flower, blown against the current by the winds of time. Following her backward gaze, she tiptoes across the water, casting ripples, completing the cycle of cause and effect, and leave a lingering fragrance. Engraving every precious moment here, she gradually draws closer... to that very beginning.

C: 在权杖身心合一的瞬间，藉由浮黎的瞥视，昔涟得以暂时保存受难者的记忆。在这刹那的永恒中，我必须不断奔跑，直至找到昔涟。
E: At the moment when the Scepter united its body and soul, Cyrene managed to temporarily preserve the memories of the victims thanks to Fuli's glimpse. In this eternal instant, I must keep running until I find Cyrene.

C: 空间站中流传着定格诡影的消息，闹得人心惶惶。\n防卫科正在调查此事，或许能从他们口中打听到什么。
E: News about the Stop-Motion Shadow sends the space station wild.\nThe Security Department is investigating the incident. Perhaps you could learn something straight from the horse's mouth?

C: 你连忙赶往特殊解析室，但防卫科已经将整片区域封锁了起来。你决定向防卫科的科员打探一下「瓜农」与这片区域的情况。\n尽管他们再三劝阻，但你执意要进入封锁区域救出「瓜农」帕梅拉。
E: You make your way toward the Special Purpose Lab, but the Security Department has already locked down the entire area. You decide to ask Security Department members about the area in which the Gossipmonger is trapped.\nDespite their repeated attempts to discourage you, you insist on entering the blocked area to rescue the Gossipmonger, Pamela.

C: 从丹恒和防卫科成员那里得到了不少线索。\n一起汇总交给艾丝妲，看看她有没有什么头绪吧。
E: You learned quite a few things from Dan Heng and the Security Department staff.\nGive everything to Asta and see if she has any more ideas.

C: 没想到螺丝咕姆此行前来是为了终止「模拟宇宙」项目。好在这位机械绅士是个开明的人，在关停系统前，他愿意为你们的调查提供最大限度的帮助。
E: Screwllum's visit was to terminate the Simulated Universe project, how surprising! Thankfully, the robot gentleman is an open-minded individual, and he is more than happy to provide you with whatever help you need in your investigation before shutting down the system for good.

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
发现一个怪地方，以前没来过。托帕就在这里。
不管她在计划什么，必须阻止。
帕姆注：「怪地方」是什么地方？好歹描述一下啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Found a weird place, never been here before. Topaz is here.
Need to stop her no matter what she is planning.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What kinda place is "weird place"? At least describe it!

C: 虎克大人的宝贝看起来好像全是破损，绝对卖不出去了…只好找玩偶的制作者——娜塔莎帮帮忙了。\n没想到在孤儿院照顾小孩还需要这样的本事。干脆找个机会让娜塔莎送你一个吧…要是她不忙的话。
E: Hook's treasure looks damaged. It's impossible to sell it... You have to ask Natasha, the doll maker, for help.\nYou had never thought that doll-making skills were necessary in order to be a helper in the orphanage. You'd love it if she could make a doll for you... when she is not busy.

C: 这大约是数年来铁卫首次重返下层区，而下层区已在被封锁的数年中物是人非，对铁卫与大守护者的非议也在街头巷尾中悄然流行。不过，朗道姐弟与你正是为解决这一问题而来。\n你将陪同朗道姐弟与众铁卫前往会谈地点——娜塔莎的诊所。在那里，来自上层区的铁卫与下层区的「地火」将进行首次正式会面。
E: This is the first time that the Guards have returned to the Underworld, and the Underworld had changed greatly in the years of blockade. Criticisms for the Guards and the Supreme Guardian also swelled up throughout society there. However, the brother-sister duo of the Landau siblings and you are here to solve this problem.\nYou head to the meeting place, which is Natasha's clinic, with the Landau siblings and the Guards. The Guards from the Overworld and Wildfire from the Underworld will have a formal meeting for the first time there.

C: 原来，诺尔伯特从始至终一直在受代号「寒腿叔叔」的神秘人物煽动，展品盗窃案的真正策划者现在仍然逍遥法外。\n佩拉已经从诺尔伯特口中撬出了他与「寒腿叔叔」接头的地点——歌德宾馆。\n前往歌德宾馆，揪出幕后黑手吧。
E: The truth is that Norbert was spurred on by a mysterious person with the code name "Mr. Cold Feet." The true mastermind behind the artifact thefts is still free.\nPela had already pried out of Norbert his rendezvous point with Mr. Cold Feet, which is none other than the Goethe Hotel.\nHead to the Goethe Hotel and expose the hidden mastermind.

C: 为了获取药王秘传的信任，你不得不帮助绿芙蓉完成一些「任务」。只希望他们的任务不会让你太过为难。
E: In order to obtain the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus' trust, you have to help Green Hibiscus complete some tasks. Hopefully, their tasks won't put you in a difficult spot.

C: 丹枢请你给一位小女孩送药…但话里话外，她似乎又需要你做一些「送药」之外的事情。
E: Dan Shu wants you to deliver medicine to a little girl, but laced between her words seems to be another request other than the medicine delivery.

C: 刀兵人患之下，医书散落在四处，几经波折你总算找到齐了陶德要的《要药分剂》，赶紧将医书带回去给他吧。
E: In the midst of the conflict, medical books were scattered all over the place. After several obstacles, you finally managed to gather the Compendium of Remedies that Todd wanted. Hurry and bring the book back to him.

C: 梅姐拿到了她心心念念的笔记，还是让她赶紧回到医馆接受检查吧。说起来芦慧告诉你，她原本是打算辞退梅姐的，要不要告诉她呢？
E: Mei has gotten back the notes she was fretting about, so she had better get back to the apothecary for a full check-up. Speaking of which, Luhui told you she was planning on firing Mei. Should you tell her?

C: 隐书曾与两个黑衣人一起出现在那个隐秘的角落，而恰好，那个时间段罗刹也在里面。也许隐书能提供一些目击证词，帮助你们搞清楚，罗刹到底在搞什么阴谋。
E: Yinshu has appeared in that obscure corner with two men in black, in the period that Luocha happened to be there. Maybe Yinshu can provide some eyewitness statements to help you understand what Luocha was up to.

C: 正当我随着剑痕残迹一路寻去，有位姐姐被几只魔阴身围困。真是怪了，云骑军封锁港口，怎么还有旅客困在这儿？罢了罢了，她孤身一人难免遇险，少不得在完成任务前我得护送她走上一段路。可惜她眼罩黑纱，似乎目不视物，看来无缘见识我舞剑的英姿了。
E: When I follow the sword marks, a lady was trapped by several Mara-struck monsters. Odd, with the Cloud Knights locking the port, why are there travelers being stuck here? She would be in danger traveling alone, I should escort her to safety before completing my mission. It's a shame that her eyes are covered with a black cloth, so she won't be able to see my graceful swordsmanship.

C: 解决完不自量力的刺客后，丹恒决心不理会持明龙师的邀请，直接与使者前往鳞渊境，与小龙尊会面。\n你认识的持明族不算多，之前有这么多人关心有关龙尊去向吗？丹恒就像是惊起涟漪的一枚石子。
E: After dealing with those arrogant assassins, Dan Heng decides to ignore the Vidyadhara Preceptors' invitation and head to Scalegorge Waterscape directly with the messenger to meet the young high elder.\nYou don't know many Vidyadhara, so you're not sure whether it's normal for so many people to care about the whereabouts of the high elder. Dan Heng's presence is like a rock striking ripples across the water.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 眼前的芙洛拉竟然是莱斯利•迪恩生前的演员助理。\n追随她留下的影子，见证她和莱斯利之间的故事吧。
E: It turns out that the lady named Flora was Lesley Dean's former assistant during his lifetime.\nFollow her shadow and witness the stories between her and Lesley.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n你救出了天谴猎手，以及她念叨的那位帕里斯——一个油腔滑调的年轻人。多亏翁法罗斯是个封闭的世界，他这说话方式拿到外面去，估计要在星际和平网络论坛里被笑话几百楼。
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nYou rescue the Furiae Archer and this "Paris" that she had mentioned so many times... A glib and cheesy young man. He's fortunate that Amphoreus is a closed-off world. If anyone outside of Amphoreus heard him speak like that, there's no doubt he'd be trolled brutally on the Interastral Peace Network.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

C: 这场记忆的主人在陌生的城邦中生活着，感受着新的事物与自己的变化。这里有许多她从未见过的东西，就比如这场云石天宫的宴会——对悬锋人来说，法吉娜没什么好歌颂的，只有在纵欲畅饮的时候值得唱上两句。\n看来纷争的舞步没法在海洋的宴会上展示风采，偏见与恐惧像汹涌的大浪，刀枪盾斧是无法抵挡的。你和帕里斯能帮上忙的，也只是让这浪别这么早把她的小船掀翻，仅此而已。\n「迅速接受情人是可耻的，应该经过一段时间，因为时间对于许多事物常常是最好的考验」
E: Living in this unfamiliar city, the master of this memory is experiencing new feelings and changes within themself. There are many things here that she has never seen before, just like this banquet at the Marmoreal Palace... To the Kremnoans, Phagousa is nothing worth singing about. They may simply throw them a passing mention when they indulge in heavy drinking.\nIt seems that the dance of Strife cannot fully express its grace at a banquet of the ocean. When prejudice and fear rage like giant waves, no blade or shield can hold them back. The only assistance that you and Paris can offer is to prevent her little boat from being overturned so soon.\n"It is shameful to accept a lover too quickly. One must take their time — as time is often the best test."

C: 第二站，仙舟「罗浮」！\n还得再跑一个部门。驭空姐姐也有无名客之魂，应该会喜欢我的书吧？
E: Second stop, The Xianzhou Luofu!\nStill need to visit another department. Madam Yukong has the spirit of the Nameless as well. She will probably like my book, right?

C: 解救成功！回去告诉那只着急的呜呜伯一声，让它别再担心啦。
E: Rescue complete! Go back and tell the anxious Wubbaboo that it can rest easy.

C: 做好心理准备后，前往特殊地点与阿德勒碰头，询问「怪谈」究竟是什么。
E: After preparing yourself mentally, go to the special spot to meet up with Adler and ask about the "ghost story."

C: 原来「怪谈」不过是「空谈」一场，赶紧将这个真相告诉阿德勒吧！
E: The "ghost story" was just a rumor. Tell Adler about this discovery!

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n他希望能和政务部官员曼娅交朋友，还想派你去和她交涉——好人做到底，你决定帮他这个忙。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nHe wants to be friends with the administrative official, Manya, and would like you to talk to her — You decide to help him the whole way through.

C: 配音演员塞琳似乎在为什么事感到苦恼。\n找她聊聊，看看你能如何帮到她。
E: Celine, the voice actress, seems to be distressed about something.\nSpeak with her and see if there is anything you can help her with.

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n紧张的铁卫似乎想要修好屏障发生器……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe nervous Silvermane Guard wants to repair the Barrier Generator...

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 奥赫玛维系千年的黎明结束了，黑潮袭来，城邦为苦痛、哭号和死亡吞没。\n聚集着大批避难者的黎明云崖圣殿里，似乎有人正在请求帮助……
E: The millennium-long dawn of Okhema has ended. The black tide surges in, engulfing the city-states in suffering, wailing, and death.\nIn the Dawncloud Temple, where many refugees have gathered, someone seems to be seeking help...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」并非是次元扑满个体行为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「牧场行动」。\n接下来就是抓扑满、抓很多扑满，直到完成行动、彻底收官……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "imitated cloudhymn magic" isn't something caused by one Warp Trotter alone. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to begin a "Herding Operation."\nWhat you need to do next is capturing Trotters. Lots and lots of Trotters. Capture them until the operation concludes and the whole thing comes to a close...

C: 工作圆满完成了，你的表现甚至比一些入行几百年的老员工都要好。\n快去找夕葵和梓桥领取你应得的酬劳吧。
E: The job is done, and you did even better than some senior employees that have been working for a few centuries.\nGo back to Xikui and Ziqiao quickly to receive your payment.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 昔涟似乎丢失了什么重要的东西，她需要你的帮忙......
E: Cyrene seems to have lost something important. She needs your help...

C: 在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。\n但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。
E: You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request.\nAside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...

C: 现在，你必须以身入局，拦住这头肆意妄为的大地兽吧！
E: Now, you must enter the fray and stop this reckless dromas!

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 帮助商会完成码头营收的任务，建立商铺与商会的合作，规划合理的路线…这都将帮助金人巷实现复兴。\n金人巷商会通过码头运营赚取储值金，至少应该先挣到目标金额，帮助商会摆脱眼前的危机。
E: Help the merchant guild reach the dock's revenue goal, build up cooperation between the guild and the stores, plan reasonable routes... All these tasks will help revitalize Aurum Alley.\nThe Aurum Alley Merchant Guild accumulates funding through operating the docks. You should prioritize reaching the revenue goal and help the guild overcome their immediate crisis.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 使用调虎离山计的浮烟趁绥园中没有判官，再次纠集起巨大的力量。显然这一次它也不会得逞。\n和浮烟聊聊，看看它究竟在考虑什么。
E: Cirrus, having distracted the attention of everyone, gathered its power once again while the judges were absent from Fyxestroll Garden. Evidently, its plans failed once more.\nTalk to Cirrus and find out what it is planning.

C: 你见到了坠入自己野心中的青雀。她让你感到有些…陌生。但没关系，她决定给你一个发财的机会，可别说做朋友的不关照你啊。
E: You meet Qingque, who has been consumed by her own ambitions. She feels rather... alien to you, but regardless, she decides to offer you a chance to get rich. You certainly can't say that she didn't look after you as a friend.

C: 星穹列车收到了一份神秘包裹，似乎是由银河之中的无名客寄来的礼物。还等什么，赶紧回到列车去看一看吧。\n\n有一种掷骰子的预感……
E: The Astral Express has received a mysterious package, seemingly a gift sent by the Nameless from across the cosmos. What are you waiting for? Hurry back to the Express and take a look.\n\nThere's a dice-rolling premonition in the air...

C: 它不仅是一份不完整的经费报表，也是一份很有仪式感的经费报表。
E: It's not just an incomplete expenditure report, it's also a very meaningful expenditure report.

C: 事不过三，你对迷宫发出警告。
E: This is the third and final time! You're issuing a warning to this maze.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 电影开始了，另一个主角似乎就在前面等你。
E: The movie has begun. The other protagonist seems to be waiting for you ahead.

C: 再次调查那盘录像带，为电影画上一个句号。
E: Investigate the videotape again and bring the film to a close.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 按照爱德华医生提供的地址，你来到了那座「雕琢自原始梦境的城市」。但彼处并没有看起来像是「合作伙伴」的人，而只有一尊形态诡异的人偶。难道…这就是爱德华医生的「合作伙伴」？
E: According to the address given by Dr. Edward, you arrive at "the city chiseled from the Primordial Dreamscape." However, there is no one here that looks like a "collaborative partner." The only thing here is a bizarre puppet. Could this be... Dr. Edward's "partner"?

C: 十五日约定的时间已经到了，无论剑法好坏，既然彦卿师父、云璃师父说了三月七可以一战，你也大可相信她有作为胜者的能耐。\n战败的斯科特也该实现他的诺言了。
E: The day of the duel has arrived. Putting aside March 7th's aptitude in swordplay, you believe she has the capability to emerge victorious, especially since both of her mentors — Yanqing and Yunli — agreed to let her go to battle.\nSince Skott lost the duel, it's time for him to hold up his end of the pact.

C: 托帕——一个和贝洛伯格颇有因缘的人物。\n能有机会和她对决，卢卡心中充满了期待。\n「也许让她成为我面对的第一个强敌，也算是一种贝洛伯格人的宿命。」卢卡不由得想到。
E: Topaz — someone who has quite the history with Belobog.\nLuka is very much looking forward to this chance to fight her.\nLuka can't help but think "maybe it is the destiny of a Belobogian for me to fight her as my first powerful opponent."

C: 你与卢卡应邀参加了托帕举办的发布会。\n不知道托帕能否帮你们渡过这场舆论风波……
E: Luka and you attended Topaz's press conference at her invitation.\nWho knows whether she can help you to get through this PR emergency...

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n在校园里到处逛逛，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nWander around the campus to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 三月七似乎有了新的灵感，和她聊聊今日的摄影课题吧。
E: March 7th seems to have a new inspiration. Discuss the Photography Task of the day with her.

C: 藿藿在「镜头万花筒」里会变成什么样呢？以她为模特进行拍摄吧。
E: What would Huohuo look like in the "Camereidoscope"? Try the effects of the "Camereidoscope" with Huohuo as your model

C: 「银盏徽章」是参赛者荣耀和汗水的证明，岂是区区小贼能够染指的？揪回贼灵，将它夺回来吧。
E: The Silver Chalice Badge is a testament to a contestant's honor and hard work — how could a mere thief lay their hands on it? Hunt down the Spirithief and take it back!

C: 原来喝下「特调配方」是这种感觉…你对此前的客人们顿生感激之情。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人吧，又或者，你也许还有兴趣让花火替你再调制一杯？
E: So this is how it feels to drink the "Special Mix Recipe"... You suddenly feel grateful for all your previous guests.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the temporary bar to serve the next customer. Or, perhaps, you'd like Sparkle to mix you another glass of it?

C: 寻找姬子
E: Search for Himeko

E: Sit on the sofa and wait for the warp jump

E: See what's around the Goethe Hotel

E: Listen to Natasha's request

E: Search for any clues that may be related to Kafka

C: 搜寻可能与卡芙卡有关的线索
E: Search for any clues that may be related to Kafka

E: Stroll around the Exalting Sanctum Plaza and look for the messenger sent by Fu Xuan

E: Examine the Revelation Slate under the foot of the abomination

E: Advance with Acheron

C: （可选）找到流萤，结束游玩
E: (Optional) Find Firefly and bring the sightseeing to an end

E: Use the Clockwork on the Gangster Boss

C: 与黑天鹅交谈，答复黑天鹅
E: Speak with Black Swan and give her an answer

C: 取得隐夜鸫雕像的线索
E: Obtain the clue regarding the Nightingale Statue

C: 分发宝石，打听偷渡犯的线索
E: Distribute gems and ask around for clues regarding the stowaways

C: 给███ █自██卡卡瓦夏█ █ ██拍照
E: Take███ █ ph█to of █ █ ██ Kakavasha

C: 跟随米沙，探索流梦礁
E: Follow Misha and explore Dreamflux Reef

E: Go to the first stage entrance

C: 离开《小小哈努行动》的世界
E: Leave the world of Hanu's Adventure

C: 苦行圆满！二度参见苦茶大师！
E: Trial complete! Meet Master Kucha once more!

C: 与姬子会合
E: Meet up with Himeko

C: 再次拿取大地兽饲料
E: Take the dromas feed again

C: 找到比「世界命运」更沉重之物
E: Find something that has more weight than the "Fate of the World"

C: 前往往世的悬锋城
E: Head to Castrum Kremnos of yesteryear

C: 继续深入悬锋城，寻找尼卡多利的线索
E: Proceed deeper into Castrum Kremnos and search for clues about Nikador

E: Go to the Communications Zone

E: Approach the Third Mirror to advance the audience's progress

C: 继续前进，在王座处与瑟希斯会合
E: Keep moving forward and meet up with Cerces at the throne

C: 回返家乡
E: Return home

C: 与缇宁交谈
E: Speak with Trinnon

C: 搜寻那刻夏留下的资料
E: Search for the materials left by Anaxa

C: 查看灵魂的残留
E: Check the souls remains

C: 继续探索龙骸古城，与炼金术士的亡魂交谈
E: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and speak with the spirit of the alchemist

C: 前往「龙骸古城」斯缇科西亚，继续冒险
E: Head to the "Dragonbone City" Styxia and continue your adventure

C: 跟随奇兽继续前行
E: Follow the mythical beast and continue forward

C: 解开秘术锁，开启火种匣
E: Unlock the Arcane Seal to open the Coreflame Casket

C: 与来古士交谈，唤起最后的记忆
E: Talk to Lygus to show the final memory

C: 前往克劳克影视乐园
E: Head to the Clock Studios Theme Park

C: 归席等待向刻律德菈献言
E: Return to your seat and wait for your turn to speak to Cerydra

C: 聆听海瑟音与刻律德菈的对谈
E: Listen to the conversation between Hysilens and Cerydra

C: 窥探下一场故事的开端
E: Glimpse the beginning of the next story

C: 接见天外的臣子
E: Receive envoys from beyond the sky

C: 前往黎明云崖
E: Head to Dawncloud

C: 触摸识刻锚，进入「神话之外」
E: Touch the Chronocognitive Anchor to enter Exomyth

C: 找白厄聊几句
E: Chat with Phainon

C: 跟随阿德勒前进
E: Follow Adler

C: 跟随佩佩继续前进
E: Keep following Peppy

C: 使用终端机查看乔安的数据记录
E: Use the terminal to check Joanne's data record

C: 深入「模拟宇宙」
E: Go deep into the Simulated Universe

C: 与螺丝咕姆交谈
E: Talk with Screwllum

C: 听真理医生盘点调查结果
E: Listen to Dr. Ratio collate the findings

C: 前往地下
E: Head underground

C: 与尤利安交谈
E: Talk to Julian

C: 和希儿交谈，前往大矿区
E: Speak with Seele and head to the Great Mine

C: 收集上层区居民对托帕提议的看法
E: Compile opinions held by Overworld residents regarding Topaz

C: 去调查矿脉探测器失踪的地点
E: Investigate the scene where the vein detector went missing

C: 前往歌德宾馆赴约
E: Head to the Goethe Hotel for your appointment

C: 前往磐岩镇诊所
E: Head to the Boulder Town clinic

C: 离开诊所，听听希露瓦想说什么
E: Leave the clinic and listen to what Serval has to say

C: 收集地髓激活元件和露营食材
E: Collect the Geomarrow Activation Element and food

C: 根据斯薇塔提供的信息寻找线索
E: Find clues based on the information provided by Swetta

C: 追捕嫌疑人诺尔伯特
E: Catch Norbert, the suspect

C: 抄写《千手慈怀药王救世品》1/<unbreak>500</unbreak>
E: Copy the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation 1/500 times

C: 在长乐天与丹枢交谈，听取她的请托
E: Talk to Dan Shu at the Exalting Sanctum and listen to her request

C: 前往丹鼎司，向医士们借阅《要药分剂》
E: Borrow Compendium of Remedies from the healers at the Alchemy Commission

C: 再次前往丹鼎司，向医士们打听药材的事
E: Head to the Alchemy Commission again to ask the healers about the herb

C: 驱使谛听追踪人犯遗留的痕迹，确定去向
E: Make the Diting track down the wanted man and ascertain his direction

C: 护送镜流同行
E: Escort Jingliu

C: 调查舵航仪，寻找刃劫走的星槎去向
E: Investigate the navigator array for the location of the starskiff that Blade took

C: 自流云渡中调查线索
E: Find clues at Cloudford

C: 借助蜃影回响，离开鳞渊境
E: Leave the Scalegorge Waterscape using Mirage Echolocation

C: 修理自动机兵•灰熊
E: Repair Automaton Grizzly

C: 推理出谜题的解答
E: Figure out the answer to the puzzle

C: 在人群中寻找彦卿
E: Look for Yanqing in the crowd

C: 见证彦卿与云璃的比试
E: Watch Yanqing duel Yunli

C: 与一位故友重聚
E: Reunite with an old friend

C: 离开迴星港，返回练剑处
E: Leave Stargazer Navalia and return to the sword practicing area

C: 前往选手大厅
E: Head toward the contestant hall

C: 追随芙洛拉的幻影，见证她的经历
E: Follow Flora's visions and witness her experiences

C: 找乔凡娜询问柯柯娜的情况
E: Ask Giovanna about Cocona's situation

C: 经历柯柯娜的第一份回忆
E: Relive Cocona's first memory

C: 继续前进，见证查德威克的经历
E: Continue onward and witness Chadwick's experiences

C: 向「湛蓝爵士」求证
E: Ask Dr. Blues for confirmation

C: 继续大堂经理的工作
E: Continue fulfilling your duties as the lobby manager

C: 与知更鸟合照
E: Take a group photo with Robin

C: 与曜青仙舟的客人对话
E: Speak with the guests from the Xianzhou Yaoqing

C: 随帕里斯一同逃出奥赫玛
E: Flee Okhema with Paris

C: 寻找发出奇怪声音的门
E: Find the door making weird noises

C: 向磐岩镇歌蒂递交物资
E: Deliver the supplies to Gertie at Boulder Town

C: 寻找能帮雷金投递论文的上层区官员
E: Find the Overworld officer who can submit Regin's thesis for him

C: 向老歌德复命
E: Report back to Old Goethe

C: 前往金人巷，和杜老板对话
E: Speak to Boss Du at Aurum Alley

C: 阅读「演化神秘学信徒」的相关短信
E: Read messages regarding the "Disciples of Evoccultism"

C: 为解救小奇美拉吞下它
E: Swallow the Little Chimera to save it

C: 通过「均衡」的试炼•伍。
E: Pass the Trial of Equilibrium: Part Five.

C: 回到列车，将医嘱告知帕姆

E: Talk to Cyrene about your experience in the Membrance Maze

E: Plan at least 1 Excursion: All actions today additionally increase Strength by #1

E: Positive Bug

E: Please select the assist you want Jiaoqiu to provide you today

E: Please select the 2 assists you want Silver Wolf to provide you today

E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 我刚从冰里醒来的时候，睁开眼睛就看见一簇星光——于是我本能地伸出手，结果那只是车厢的顶灯罢了。
E: When I first woke up after being rescued from the ice, I could see clusters of stars in front of me. I reached out for them automatically, but they turned out to be the carriage ceiling lights.

C: 没事的，我结实得很～而且，冰会保护我。
E: It's fine, I'm sturdier than I look~ Besides, the ice will protect me.

C: 请大家回座位坐好。
E: All passengers, please return to your seats.

C: （它突然沮丧了……）
E: Pom-Pom's so dejected all of a sudden...

C: 我进行了初步勘测，发现这颗星球的表面有一处的温度相对正常——不过所谓正常，其实也就是人类能勉强生存下去的程度。
E: I've conducted a preliminary survey and found that there's one area with a relatively normal temperature on the surface of the planet. By "normal," I mean a temperature that just about allows for human survival.

C: 所以，这次「开拓」之旅的目标，就是要找到雅利洛-Ⅵ上的「星核」，清除它对星轨的阻塞…对吗？
E: I assume the trailblazing objective this time is to find the Stellaron on Jarilo-VI and dispel the effect it's exerting on the star rail... right?

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 不要！我才不想听她的——联盟那么厉害，难道还处理不了一颗星核嘛！我们是星穹列车组，又不是星核封印专业户！
E: No! Why are we listening to her? The Alliance is strong — is a single Stellaron burst really too much for them to handle? We're the crew of the Astral Express, not some squad of Stellaron-sealing super specialists!

C: 哇，你怎么也来了。
E: Whoa, what are you doing here?

C: 我们走了，姬子，你在列车上也要多加小心。
E: We should get going. Himeko, stay vigilant back here on the Express.

C: 从结果上看，克里珀回应了你强烈的愿望。你能够挥舞大守护者的武器、并操纵那尊巨像，大概也是由于祂那一瞥吧？
E: Judging by how the battle turned out, Qlipoth responded to your wish. THEIR gaze infused you with the power to wield the weapon of a supreme guardian and to take control of the Colossus.

C: 不用客气，{NICKNAME}。好好休息吧，这是你应得的奖赏。
E: You're most welcome, {NICKNAME}. Have some rest, you've earned it.

C: 赞美筑城者，赞美贝洛伯格——加入我吧，让我们一起为大守护者献上礼赞的歌声！
E: Praise the Architects of this city, and praise Belobog! Join me and let's sing a song of praise for the Supreme Guardian!

C: 部分黑屏的画面倒映出自己的脸，仔细看看还觉得挺有意思的。
E: The partially black screen reflects your face—you find it quite interesting as you look closer.

C: 已证实该块碎片属于某把大剑的剑身。
E: This fragment has been confirmed to belong to the body of a certain greatsword.

C: 故而本人申请暂停使用本监控室，同时申请本年度未使用带薪年假。
E: Therefore, I request to suspend the use of this monitoring room. Also, I'd like to go on holiday with the paid annual leave that I have left over this year.

C: 艾丝妲站长？
E: Lead Researcher Asta?

C: 星穹列车？
E: The Astral Express?

C: 我也…没什么头绪。军团来得十分蹊跷…站内的防卫系统突然失效，没过多久那些家伙就出现了。
E: I... have no idea. The Legion came at a very suspicious time — almost right after the security system suddenly failed.

C: 阿兰去休息区包扎了。他很有自知之明…要是他还硬撑，我肯定要好好骂他一顿。
E: Arlan went to dress his wounds at the rest area. He knows himself well... but if he insists on pushing his limits, I'll give him a good earful.

C: 我不一样…咦，这家伙该不会和你们那个三月七一个类型吧？那……
E: That's... beside the point. Hey is this one the same kind as that March 7th? If that were true...

C: 我是这儿的列车长帕姆，在车上遇到任何问题你都尽管来找我吧。
E: I'm Pom-Pom, the conductor. Just come find me if you have any trouble.

C: 有这么个东西，或许能给旅途带来些许调剂。
E: This thing might add some nice flavor to the trip.

C: 所以我把收集到的资料输入资料室的「智库」，并将列车所过之地的人文生态、地质特征等等逐一整理录入并与过去的数据比对印证。
E: I enter the collected data into the archives' data bank. I try to catalog the people and places the Express encounters, and compare and contrast them with the existing records.

C: 但这个假说也存在很多问题。俱乐部#56会员以利亚萨拉斯发明了超距遥感，证伪了虚数的唯一性，一下子动摇了宇宙之树说的根基。
E: However, the theory has its flaws. Elias Salas, the <unbreak>56</unbreak>th member of the Genius Society, invented remote detection, disproving that the imaginary is unique. This shook the foundation of the "Cosmos Tree" theory.

C: 它会读取我的思想？
E: Does it read my thoughts?

C: 侵蚀已经接近城市内部了吗…情况很严峻啊。
E: So the corrosion is inside the city... that's a grave situation.

C: 哈哈，也有可能啦。
E: Haha, it's possible.

C: 可能是我太敏感了…她承诺要帮助我们，希望她不会食言……
E: Perhaps I'm too sensitive... She did promise to help us. I just hope she keeps her word...

C: 不错不错，手脚挺麻利呀，悟性很高！要不要考虑当我的助手？报酬可能一般，但其它方面绝对不会亏待你的。
E: Nice! You guys are pretty handy — you picked that up in no time. Wanna be my assistants? Average pay, but I'm a good boss.
*sigh*

C: 筑城者是什么人？
E: Who are the Architects?

C: 寒潮是怎么出现的？
E: How did the Eternal Freeze occur?

C: …没办法，只好让他闭嘴了。
E: ...Well, now we have to help him keep his mouth shut.

C: 但从坐上大守护者的位置开始，她就完全变了一个人。她以前秉持的信念，还有身上那股热情…就好像被某种力量抽出了躯壳。
E: She became a completely different person when she took on the supreme guardianship. The convictions she once held, her enthusiasm... it was like they were drawn out of her by some mysterious force.

C: 杰、杰帕德——你来了啊！我还以为前线这么紧张，你没空过来呢，哈哈……
E: G—Gepard, it's you! I didn't think you'd have the time to visit with things so tense on the front line, hehe...

C: 你别这样…唉，算了。反正我不说，佩拉也会告诉你的吧……
E: Don't say that... *sigh* Forget it. If I don't tell you, Pela will...

C: 嘿…和处分我的理由差不多啊。可可利亚的手段一点没变。
E: Huh... reminds me of the accusations against me. Cocolia's methods haven't changed.

C: …布洛妮娅有危险，不行，我们得去救她。
E: ...This is bad. Bronya's in danger. We have to go save her.

C: 毕竟军队里现在只剩烦心事儿了，我还惹上了不该惹的大人物——我也不知道该不该继续待在技术部…唉。
E: I mean, there's nothing but chores left for me in the military right now, and also, I messed with some big-wigs that I shouldn't have. I don't know if I should stay in the Technology Division anymore... ugh.

C: 呀，这不是希露瓦嘛。生意嘛，还是马马虎虎…不过能像这样填饱肚子之后悠闲地读书，倒也无所谓啦。
E: Aha, if it isn't Serval. Business? Same old... But it's a nice way to earn a living. Every now and then, I can read leisurely like this.

C: 是这样的——佩拉小姐不知道这次的新刊还有会场限定附刊，所以只带了买普通版的钱……
E: Here is what happened. Miss Pela wasn't aware that this new magazine has a venue-limited edition, and she only brought enough money for the regular edition...

C: 而「关键」指的应该就是打开盒子的钥匙。也就是说，这位祖辈把传家宝铁盒的钥匙藏在了残响回廊里。
E: And the "key" must be referring to the key that opens the box. In other words, this ancestor hid the key of the heirloom tin box in the Corridor of Fading Echoes.

C: 啊，是要开始了吗？
E: Whoa, this must be it.

C: 还能再战八百回合！
E: I feel like I could fight a hundred more monsters!

C: 唔…明明克拉拉费了很大力气才没有眨眼……
E: Um... I was trying really hard not to blink...

C: 什么啊，之前都住进豪华客房了，却被那个坏女人给算计了一把…你们不觉得不甘心吗？
E: Not so fast! Last time we were here, that evil Madam Guardian interrupted us before we'd gotten the most out of our luxury suites... Don't you think we should make up for it?

C: 那个，请问…请问您是奥列格兵长吗？
E: U—Uh, excuse me... are you Captain Oleg?

C: 上任仪式开始之前，我收到了布洛妮娅的消息——她把在贝洛伯格北方发生的事都告诉我了。关于「星核」，还有可可利亚的牺牲……
E: I received Bronya's message before the inauguration ceremony. She told me everything that happened north of Belobog — about the Stellaron, and Cocolia's sacrifice...

C: 我理解你。欢迎上车！
E: I understand how you feel. Welcome aboard!

C: 哇哦——很利索嘛，{NICKNAME}！不愧是你。
E: Wow, great job, {NICKNAME}! Like I said — a reliable apprentice!

C: 其实也没聊那么多…你懂的，跟老爸聊天总会让我一肚子火。
E: We didn't speak all that much... You know how it is, I can only talk to Dad for so long before I start losing it.

C: 筑城者们建立贝洛伯格的故事总是被人们津津乐道，扮演阿丽萨•兰德的演员也换了一代又一代，形成了光荣的传承。
E: The story of the Architects who built Belobog is always a popular one. The actors who played Alisa Rand have changed from version to version, creating a glorious legacy.

C: 你盯着垃圾桶看了许久，但这还是平平无奇的垃圾桶。
E: You've been staring at it for a while, but it's just an ordinary trashcan.

C: 你想想「地火」要是知道了，会怎么对她，怎么对你？
E: ...what would Wildfire do with her? What would they do with you?

C: …总算醒了？
E: ...So you're awake?

C: 呼…呼……
所以，你们费这么大的力气来这儿找「地火」，是要我们帮什么忙吗？
E: So, you went to all this trouble to find Wildfire. What help is it you need?

C: 我就喜欢接近敌人。
E: I like to get close to my enemies.

C: 银鬃铁卫从地下撤离了以后，下层区的住民们自发组织了维护秩序的民兵组织，代行银鬃铁卫的职责。
E: After the Silvermane Guards withdrew, and in order to keep the peace, the residents of the Underworld spontaneously organized their own militia — thereby taking over the Guards' duties.

C: 你表现得这么自信，我反而心虚了…这可不像帮小孩子捏雪球那么简单啊。
E: Your confidence actually makes me even more worried... This isn't like helping a child make a snowball.

C: 地下还有别的镇子吗？
E: Are there other towns in the underground?

C: 我知道。但毕竟我是一路看着她长大的，可不希望她有个三长两短。
E: I know, but she grew up before my eyes after all. I don't want anything bad to happen to her.

C: 而且，我们仍然没有掌握「星核」的具体方位和坐标。
E: And, we still don't have the coordinates and location of the Stellaron.

C: 我听几个铁卫老兵说过，在隔绝令下达以前，上层和下层并没有什么分别。大家吃的是相同的食物，聊的是相同的话题，庆祝的也是相同的节日。
E: I've heard from some Silvermane veterans that before the orders were made to seal off the Underworld from the Overworld, there was no difference between the two places. Everybody ate the same food, chatted about the same topics, celebrated the same festivals...

C: 人与人之间的信任呢？
E: What ever happened to trust?

C: 朗道，老朋友了，主要是和弟弟打交道多，姐姐嘛…比弟弟还可怕。今天是大喜的日子，就别聊这个了吧。
E: Landau... Uhh yeah, we're old friends. I've mostly dealt with the younger brother in the past, but the sister... *shudder* She's much scarier. Today's supposed to be a day of celebration, so let's not talk about it right now.

C: 就为了这个玩偶，你就让{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}带着你到裂界里去冒险？虎克，我跟你说过多少次……
E: You had {NICKNAME} take you to the Fragmentum just for this teddy bear? Hook, how many times have I told you...?

C: 让我们拭目以待，看看这位超级新秀今天能交出怎样的答卷！有请——{NICKNAME}！
E: Let's wait and see what the new rookie has in store for us today! Please welcome— {NICKNAME}!

C: 最近…呃，拳馆的利润水平不是特别理想。我现在只能给你发一部分，至于尾款……
E: It's just that lately... the boxing gym hasn't exactly been printing money. I can give you some now, but the rest...

C: 还有别的事吗？如果没什么急事，请不要打扰我，我还在适应这套盔甲……
E: Anything else? Don't bother me if it's nothing urgent, I'm still getting used to this armor...

C: 没多久，也就打了一两场吧。
E: Not long, a game or two.

C: 不信拉倒！相信我，这些个拳手老粗根本不懂什么叫感恩，不值得你浪费时间。
E: Believe it or not, these boxer scums know nothing about being grateful. He's not worth your time.

C: 你肯定需要幼儿衣物了。
E: You must need toddler clothes then.

C: 他为什么还在打拳？
E: Then why is he still fighting?

C: 看啊，多惨烈的场面！我们的「外来者」{NICKNAME}毫不手下留情！机械师和他的搭档倒在了逐梦之路上——他们还有再起的可能吗？
E: Behold, what a tragedy! Our Outsider {NICKNAME} showed no mercy! The mechanic and his partner fell on the road to their dream. Is there a chance for them to make a comeback?

C: 走，快上去看看吧！
E: Quick, let's head over!

C: 喂，他好像醒过来啦，快看！
E: Look! Seems like he's coming around.

C: …谁说不是呢，奥列格。
E: ...You're right, Oleg.

C: 你还有脸提大守护者？
E: You dare to bring up the supreme guardian?

C: 娜塔莎的气场完全不输杰帕德…
E: Natasha won't back down easily...

C: …怪、怪物…！裂界、裂界的怪物…！
E: M—Monsters! Monsters from the Fragmentum!

C: 就不能进屋一口气说完？
E: Why don't you finish your story first?

C: …总之，奥列格先生已经确认了矿区的灾情。
E: ...Mr. Oleg has a pretty good handle on what's needed in the mine.

C: 明明是想直接对我说的话，却还要借着别人拐弯抹角地说出来……
E: You made it sound like you were talking to those kids... but you were talking to me.

C: 两只垃圾桶紧紧地并排站着，如果一只倒下，另一只必不会独站。
E: The two trashcans stood tightly side by side. If one of them falls, the other will surely follow.

C: 我全都要。
E: I want them all.

C: 你猜这个镇子上有多少个垃圾桶？规则照旧：并排放在一起的只算1个，而且，那些你看得见但够不着的不算。对了，垃圾箱也不算。只算这种圆圆的，筒状的垃圾桶。
E: Guess: How many trashcans are there in this town? The rules are the same: Trashcans placed side-by-side are considered as one. But, those that you can see but cannot be reached do not count. Count only these: Cylindrical trashcans.

C: 如今，由博识学会武装考古学派首席学士艾伦•德雷克•独臂•琼斯发起，天才俱乐部成员螺丝咕姆参与合作，正式挖掘这座潜在灾害评级为Ω的钢铁遗迹，揭开它的神秘面纱。
E: The excavation of the tomb is headed by the head of the Armed Archaeologists of the Intelligentsia Guild, Allen Drake One-Armed Jones, with assistance from Genius Society member, Screwllum. It is hoped that the excavation of this metallic relic, which holds a Category Omega ranking on the Potential Disaster Index, will finally shed a light on its mysterious nature.

C: 放心吧，小女子不是乱嚼舌根的人～
E: Don't worry, my lips are sealed~

C: 还不快说声多谢驭空姐！
E: Say thanks to Madam Yukong for us!

C: 对不起，请您谅解，前方禁止通行……
E: I'm sorry. Please understand, the road up ahead has been sealed off...

C: 你这套东西早几百琥珀纪就不流行了！
E: That's been out of fashion for hundreds of Amber Eras!

C: 这还用好像？
E: You think?

C: 她事先看过「剧本」。
E: She read the "script" in advance.

C: 那我能怎么办？通往丹鼎司洞天的航路也不见了。我们这些在外执勤的医师手头缺针少药，又能做些什么？
E: What else am I supposed to do? The route back to the Alchemy Commission has disappeared, and we're in the field without the right medicine or supplies.

C: 话也没错，严格来说，每一位抵达仙舟「罗浮」的旅客，都是受将军之邀而来的贵客。
E: Technically speaking, every traveler aboard the Luofu is a guest of the general.

C: 等等，我是不是才刚发给过你物资来着…这位客人，请不要戏弄我们地衡司的工作人员。
E: Wait a minute, I already issued you with supplies... You won't fool the Realm-Keeping Commission that easily.

C: 那么，有劳您，能否为我描述一下看到的景象？
E: In that case, would you mind describing it to me?

C: 别胡说！
E: Don't be ridiculous!

C: 她叫素裳，好像刚从仙舟「曜青」调动过来。
E: Her name is Sushang. She apparently just transferred here from the Yaoqing.

C: 你可不要因为我是新兵就小瞧我哦～
E: Don't look down on me just because I'm a new recruit~

C: 奉命过来疏散群众啊，瞧，我身后这几位就是。我得赶紧带他们出去，这里面好危险啊。
E: I have orders to evacuate civilians. See these two behind me? I need to get them out of here quickly. It's too dangerous.

C: 刚才看到有美女路过…
E: I just saw a pretty lady go past...

C: 全宇宙——你信吗？当然是：对我而言。
E: If I said "best for the universe," would you believe me? Hehe... Best for me, naturally.

C: 哼，虽然如此…本座心里面还是怕得要死！本座还年轻，不想这么快就坠入魔阴身啊！
E: Hmph, even so... Okay I admit it — I'm terrified! I'm still young! I don't wanna become mara-struck so soon!

C: 那怎么成！景元将云骑交托给我，连身先士卒都做不到，还想继任将军…咳，还想服众吗？
E: Out of the question! Jing Yuan gave me authority over the Cloud Knights. If I can't even stand on the front lines, then how can I succeed him as general? *cough* How can I win the hearts of the people!?

C: 既然是天舶司派出的使节，显然天舶司中确有「停云」其人，放心，她的去向就由云骑军探查究竟。
E: Since she was an Amicassador dispatched by the Sky-Faring Commission, it's evident that there must indeed be a person with her name in the Commission. We'll have to let the Cloud Knights get to the bottom of what happened to the real Tingyun.

C: 喔，你也在啊…不巧，将军指名要你同几位客人同行，就受累走这一趟罢。
E: Oh, you're here too... Unfortunately, the general designated you to accompany our guests. So yes, you do.

C: 好了，各位，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：住手吧。
E: All of you, <color=#dbc291ff>listen to me</color> — stop.

C: 将军！
E: General!

C: （抱歉了，两位，我必须赶上我的朋友，这一路来多谢照顾了……）
E: (I'm sorry, I have to catch up to my friends. Thank you for looking out for me on this journey, both of you...)

C: …阿刃，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：你已经回来了。
E: ... Bladie, <color=#dbc291ff>listen</color>: You're back.

C: 以<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>的身份帮我最后一个忙，此间事毕，我就由他死去，撤销对你的放逐令。往后我可以保证：至少在罗浮之上，你不再是任何人的影子。
E: Before I can let <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> die and revoke your banishment edict, I need him to do me one final favor. I can guarantee you that when it is done, you will no longer walk in anyone's shadow aboard the Luofu.

C: 三爪叩拜已毕，接下来，该是前往「建木」玄根的时候了。
E: The reverence to the three talons is complete... now we must head for the roots of the Arbor.

C: 错了，错了！要知道，为了抢到毁灭联盟的殊荣，大君之间还发生过争斗呢！
E: You were wrong! You should know that we Ravagers fought each other for the honor of destroying the Alliance!

C: 喂！醒醒呀——
E: Hey! Wake up...

C: …那么，开始吧！
E: ... So it begins.

C: 逞强。
E: Your arrogance betrays you.

C: 现在看来，幻胧正是一切的主使；在仙舟历史上，反物质军团也曾与联盟有过交战，故而我们始终警惕着军团兵力的动向。
E: It appears that Phantylia was the mastermind behind it all. The Xianzhou warred with the Antimatter Legion in the past, and ever since we have kept a watchful eye on their movements.

C: 等你有空了，咱们一起去太卜司跑一趟，看看符玄怎么说。
E: When you're free, let's go hit up the Divination Commission together and see what Fu Xuan has to say.

C: 「慰灵奠仪」？
E: A "soul-soothing ceremony"?

C: 平日里你总是嫌我碎嘴爱管闲事，你瞧我唠唠叨叨说了这么久，你怎么也不跳出来阻止我？
E: You always did say that I liked to gossip, and here I am rambling on proving you right again... If only you were here to cut me off...

C: 谢谢各位，梦茗觉得…应该送停云姐姐什么才是。
E: ...Thank you, all of you. I think... I should gift something to Tingyun in return.

C: 客官你好哇，欢迎光临敝店，有什么想吃的菜？
E: Honored guests, welcome to our humble eatery! What can we get for you today?

C: 我们来代停云小姐送礼…
E: We're here on a gift-giving errand for Miss Tingyun...

C: 谢谢你们，能帮她完成这些后事，不留遗憾。
E: Thank you for helping her complete all these tasks. She can depart in peace.

C: 我倒是不介意和你过两招…
E: We could schedule in a couple of rounds...

C: 那么，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}再见啦，旅途平安喔！
E: Well... bye-bye, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. Have a safe journey!

C: 那么，各位，咱们神策府见。
E: Please, let us reconvene at the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 只有名字和职业？听着还不一定是真名…这不是大海捞针吗？
E: Just names and occupations? And they don't even sound like their real names either... This will be like looking for a needle in a haystack!

C: 酒店的「入梦池」会提供舒适的梦境体验，您不用担心！
E: The hotel's Dreampool provides a comfortable dream experience, so don't you worry about that!

C: 那我就不客气了。
E: Then I'll gladly accept it.

C: 具体的使用方法，梦境护照也会为您提供完整指引。
E: Regarding the method of usage, the Dreamscape Pass will guide you through the process.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>…难道是我走错了？这不应该，出声打扰你们前，我再三确认过房间号的……</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>...Have I come to the wrong room? This can't be. Before I said anything, I even made sure that I had the right room number...</color>

C: 你现在已经完全掌控梦境了，{NICKNAME}——欢迎来到匹诺康尼。
E: You should be feeling fully in control now. {NICKNAME}, welcome to Penacony.

C: 非得是熟人吗？
E: Does it have to be the voice of someone I'm close to?

C: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
E: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
E: Could there be anyone worse than me?

C: 从建成的那一刻起，大剧院便不断地为整个美梦世界奏响《谐乐颂》。
E: Since the moment it was built, the Grand Theater has graced the entire Dreamscape with its rendition of the Odes of Harmony.

C: 这片梦想之地——匹诺康尼——「黄金的时刻」，还是很棒的，对不对？
E: Penacony's Golden Hour is pretty amazing, isn't it?

C: 你不是本地人吗？
E: Aren't you a local?

C: 对，你的老朋友桑博！如假包换！
E: Yes, it's none other than your old friend, Sampo!

C: 弹球机？{M#他}{F#她}还没适应梦境，这恐怕会很危险……
E: Pinball machine? {M#He}{F#She}'s not fully acclimated to the Dreamscape yet. This could get dangerous...

C: 贵宾卡给我看一眼。
E: Show me your VIP card.

C: 你现在真是太酷了，亲爱的！
E: You've got swag now, pal!

C: 当然——没什么是我桑博搞不定的。
E: But then again, nothing is too difficult for Sampo.

C: 这条路…我们是要回奥帝购物中心吗？
E: This road... Are we heading back to the Oti Mall?

C: 准备好体验美梦了吗？——请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上。
E: Are you ready to experience a wonderful dream? Please close your eyes and rest your forehead on the dream bubble.

C: 「荧光」…
E: A glowing light...

C: 准确地说，是<unbreak>45</unbreak>分钟。愉快的时光总是过得飞快，不是吗？
E: To be more precise, it's been <unbreak>45</unbreak> minutes. Time sure flies when you're having fun, doesn't it?

C: 钟表小子，我能帮上你的忙吗？
E: Clockie, how can I help?

C: …钟表小子？
E: ...Clockie?

C: 可恶，我竟然输了…这就是…青春的力量吗……
E: Darn it, I can't believe I've lost... Is this the power of youth...

C: …不行吗？
E: ...Is there a problem?

C: 让我们言归正传吧——您…曾听说过「垃圾之王」塔塔洛夫吗？
E: Let's get back to the question... Have you heard of Tatalov the Garbage King?

C: 何不与我一起对抗塔塔洛夫？
E: Why not stand with me against Tatalov?

C: 以及，我从一些熟客口中得知，入梦后的第一站原本是「梦中的酒店」，但因为一些意外…「酒店目前正在进行修缮」。
E: Also, after speaking to some of the frequenters, the first stop when you enter the dream is supposed to be the hotel in the dream, but due to certain incidents... the hotel is now under renovation.

C: …我明白了。但在答复你之前，我们还需要做些讨论。
E: ...I understand. But before replying, we must first discuss this among ourselves.

C: 你没有拔刀…为什么？
E: You didn't even draw your blade... Why...

C: 但不用担心，他们不会赴约了。你知道为什么吗？
E: But there's no need to worry. They won't be able to attend. Do you know why?

C: 记忆告诉你，这里是三月七的房间。不出意外她会在这里「苏醒」。
E: Your memories tell you this is March 7th's room. Unless fate intervenes, she will "awaken" here.

C: 同样地，要找到领航员小姐所说的大堂…我们也得多花些心思。
E: In the meantime, if we want to find that lobby the Navigator mentioned... we'll have to try a little harder.

C: 她还不知道自己会成为受害者……
E: She has no idea that she'll become a victim...

C: 她被什么人逼迫着走了这边，而且……
E: Who forced her to go that way? And...

C: 变幻莫测的通路，指向游荡的忆域迷因…她完全迷失在忆域中了。
E: Unpredictable pathways pointing toward a wandering meme... She was completely lost in the Memory Zone.

C: 半部快要消散的手机躺在地上，残留着一条没有发出的消息…一张合照，照片上的两个人笑得很开心。
E: A half-faded cell phone lies on the floor, capturing an unsent message... with a snapshot of two people wearing smiles.

C: （捡起来）
E: (You pick it up)

C: 喔还有…拿去吧！要开展调查，手里总得有点闲钱。千万别客气！
E: Oh, and... take this! A thorough investigation can always use a little more funding. Don't mention it!

C: 而且…在梦境中致人死地的可能，目前没有第二种。
E: Plus... it seems unlikely that there would be two lethal entities loose in the dreamscape.

C: 很不幸，记忆不会说谎…我们方才所见，都是真实发生的「现实」，不会因为醒来便消散在脑后。
E: Unfortunately, the Remembrance doesn't lie... What we just saw is the "reality" that happened — and it won't fade from our minds just because we wake up.

C: 事不宜迟，我们这就出发——带路吧！好戏…就要开场咯。
E: Without any further ado, let's set off — lead the way! The show... is about to begin.

C: 我见过许多看似高明的伪装，能掩盖外表，但藏不住内心。你也不例外。
E: I've seen many clever disguises that can conceal appearances, but they can never cover up who a person really is. And you're no different.

C: 黑天鹅引领你穿过了混乱的梦境……
E: Black Swan leads you through the chaotic Dreamscape...

C: 会是「酒店」吗？
E: Perhaps he's going for the Hotel?

C: …现在也就是随便想想。无论如何，和砂金打交道都得保持警惕，他很擅长把握人心，懂得什么时候该出手。并且……
E: ...I'm just speculating. In any case, we have to be careful when handling Aventurine. He's skilled at reading people and discerning the right moment to strike. Also...

C: 你去找他们了…？太危险了！这只是一串项链，不能吃，也不是水，没有它我们也能活下去。
E: You went to look for them...? That's too dangerous! It's just a necklace. It's neither food nor water. We can survive without it.

C: 嗯，你说得对，家族的破绽只能是「死亡」，星期日肯定也是这么想的。咱们下楼吧。
E: Yeah, you're right. The only way to destroy The Family is "Death." Sunday must have thought the same. Let's head down.

C: 简直就像是搭积木。我从没搭过积木，不知道和垒筹码比，哪个更有意思……
E: This reminds me of one of those building toys. With the blocks? I've never played with them before. I wonder if it's more interesting than stacking chips.

C: 好吧，我就开个玩笑。
E: Fine. I was just kidding.

C: 我是「橡橡橡橡橡橡木兵人」，负责引导您在基底模型的游览览览览览览览览——
E: I am an O—o—o—o—o—oak Soldier. I will be here to guide you through the to—o—o—o—ur of the base mo —

C: 你凭什么觉得自己能赢，该死的赌徒？
E: Ah, the charming audacity! To think that you, of all people, might emerge victorious, dear gambler.

C: 怎么会，砂金先生，我真的只是想知道，一位*偶然*出现在她命案现场的*过客*能有什么*发现*，仅此而已。
E: Why would I do that, Mr. Aventurine? I'm just wondering what a passerby who stumbled upon a scene of murder could have found out, that's all.

C: 再怎么抗拒「美梦」的人，到了时候，也会变得舍不得。有谁会愿意离开温暖的窝？只有傻瓜、小孩子…还有脑袋不清醒的酒鬼。
E: No matter how much one resists the "beautiful dream," when the time comes, they too will find it hard to let go... Who wants to leave a warm nest? Just idiots, little kids... and inebriated fools.

C: 所以我认为「美梦」的崩溃是必然。
E: This is why I think the collapse of the beautiful dream is inevitable.

C: 实不相瞒，我是个小报记者，正在收集匹诺康尼怪谈。这种东西嘛，想必您也明白…越令人害怕就越容易得到关注。也许您恰好能帮到我？
E: You see, I'm a tabloid reporter collecting ghost stories in Penacony. As you know, the more chilling the stories... the more attention they get. Maybe you could help me out?

C: 哼…是你啊。我早该猜到，知更鸟死后，出现在电视上的「替身」就是你吧，假面愚者。
E: Heh... it's you, Masked Fool. I should have guessed it. You're the "imposter" who appeared on TV after Robin's death, right?

C: 不不，我已经通过种种迹象证明了它确实存在，这就够了。至于这两个问题的答案，十七…不，十六个系统时足够我搞定一切。
E: Not exactly. I've gathered enough clues to prove its existence, and that's enough for me. As for the answers to my questions, I'll find them within seventeen... no, sixteen system hours.

C: 话是这么说没错，可是…这个也未免太……
E: That's true, but this... really doesn't seem fresh...

C: 可你明明有那份才能！你一定能吸引所有人的目光…你天生就属于鸢尾花的舞台，而不是这个破木台子！
E: But you have the talent! You'll attract a huge audience... You're destined for the Iris' stage, not for this run-down shack!

C: 我也不太清楚原因…
E: I've no idea either...

C: 据说这是那位哈努努最爱的饮料，当然，说的是它的原型。这玩意又酸又苦，气泡在喉咙里炸开，像咽了带锈的铁链，让人联系到监狱和牢房。
E: The original formula is said to be Hanunue's favorite drink. It's sour and bitter, and the bubbles burst in your throat like swallowing rusty chains, evoking thoughts of dungeons and prisons.

C: 啊？这岂不是意味着……
E: Huh? Does that mean...

C: 事情或许还有转机？
E: Maybe things will turn out different than what we think?

C: 「头一回」…所以在匹诺康尼，「死亡」确有其事，是么？
E: "Dealt with before"? So... "Death" does happen in Penacony, if I understand correctly?

C: 我知道的都告诉你们了，权当各位愿意瞧我这条老狗一眼的谢礼。
E: I've told you all I know as a sign of gratitude. Thank you for listening to this old dog — bark and all.

C: 我们此行前来，正是为了同星期日先生了解案情，以免调查过程中出现闪失。
E: On the contrary, that's exactly why we're here. To ask you about the case and gather more information — we don't want any loose ends.

C: 哦…你不愿面对那段过往？不想承认你这条命只值六十个{RUBY_B#赤铜币}塔安巴{RUBY_E#}？
E: Oh... You don't wish to face your past? Unwilling to admit that your life is worth only sixty {RUBY_B#Red Copper Coins}Tanbas{RUBY_E#}?

C: 我当然也会同行。
E: I will accompany you, of course.

C: 这只是一场转瞬即逝的梦，「IX」的万千表征之一…在「虚无」的见证下，我们在此短暂停留，然后行向各自的方向。
E: This is all but a fleeting dream, one of the thousands of manifestations of IX... Under the watchful eye of Nihility, we momentarily linger here, before moving on to our own paths.

C: …你不曾犹豫过吗？
E: ...Have you never wavered?

C: 所以你也一定能明白，我们为何*想要*做好准备。
E: So you can definitely understand, why we want to be prepared.

C: 所以——我所能使用的「手段」也只有一种。
E: So, there is only one method that I use.

C: 这可真是…令人意外。
E: That is... surprising.

C: 那你呢？这一次，你能得到想要的「死亡」么？
E: What about you, then? Is this the moment you finally find the "Death" you've been looking for?

C: 嗯，恭敬不如从命。
E: Alright, then. We'll follow your plan.

C: 你怎么不走？
E: Then why aren't you leaving?

C: 可惜，由于流光忆庭的存在，普通人不怎么关心忆质的性质。最后她籍籍无名地离世，只留下几本薄薄的笔记……
E: Regrettably, due to the presence of the Garden of Recollection, ordinary people don't pay much attention to the nature of memoria. She departed this world without much fame, leaving only a few thin journals behind...

C: 这两人是我的同伴！至于躺地上这位…是个吓晕过去的胆小鬼……
E: These two are my friends! As for the man lying on the ground... he's a scaredy-cat who fainted from fright.

C: 嗨！远方的朋友！
E: Hi there, friend from a distant land!

C: 哦…可怜的小东西，情况恐怕不乐观。你们想救它吗？
E: Oh... poor little thing. Doesn't look like it's doing well. Do you want to rescue it?

C: 我觉得妹妹说得对…但如果我们把它留在野外，它过不了几天就会死的。
E: I think she's right... but if we leave it out in the wild, it won't survive for more than a few days at best.

C: 我是说，如果这世上确实有些雏鸟，终其一生都无法飞翔……
E: I mean, if there are fledglings in this world that can never fly throughout their lives...

C: 我难以相信一个全身上下满是谎言的人，嘴里能有几句真话。
E: I find it hard to believe a man who's full of deception.

C: 虽然心里早有预期，但前辈们的故事…还是很令人遗憾啊。
E: Though I had expected as much, the tales of these heroes... truly are sorrowful.

C: 何止！他们对星核的了解比常人更甚，迅速帮米哈伊尔平息了内乱，又以「同谐」的名义加入到匹诺康尼的建设中。
E: Not just that! They knew far more about the Stellaron than the average person. They helped Mikhail swiftly quell the civil unrest and played a part in building Penacony, under the disguise of the Harmony.

C: 这就该问那个翅膀头小子了。星核一直处于家族的控制下，他又是橡木家系的牌面，心里肯定一清二楚。
E: That's a question for Mr. Wings. The Stellaron is still under The Family's control, and as the head of the Oak Family, I'm sure he holds all the answers.

C: 嗯，无名客可不是碰见困难就会退缩的人！{NICKNAME}，你说是吧？
E: Yeah, we Nameless won't back down from a challenge! Isn't that right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 怎么会这样？
E: How could a dream bubble be empty?

C: 上前来吧，家人。我已恳请祂与我等同在。
E: Come to me, my Kinship. I have sought THEIR presence with us.

C: 我侍奉苜蓿草家系近十余年，始终勤勉认真，从不惫懒，以同享谐乐为至善。然而就在昨日，我犯了错。为家主准备晚宴时，我不慎将餐点碰落地面。
E: I have faithfully served the Alfalfa Family for nearly a decade, promoting the Path of the Harmony to the best of my ability. However, I made a mistake yesterday. While I was preparing dinner for The Family Head, I accidentally dropped a prepared dish on the floor.

C: 很顺利，谢谢你，也辛苦你不远万里前来参加谐乐大典。
E: It's going smoothly. Thanks for making the trip to join the Festival.

C: 呵呵，我该做的事都做完了，接下来就只等看烟花咯。
E: Well, I've done my part, and now I'm simply waiting for the fireworks to begin.

C: 谐乐大典就要开始了，好期待呀～
E: The Charmony Festival is about to start! I'm so excited!

C: 对！不要怀疑，从你们身上，我看到了巨星的潜质！
E: Yes, you! There's no doubt about it. I see you have all the potential of a superstar in you!

C: 你怎么说话和那位罗浮将军似的……
E: Why are you speaking like the general of the Luofu?

C: 很好！接下来——虽然你很失望，但你的搭档反而很激动。现在！这位姑娘，你会说——
E: Very good! Now, though you're disappointed, your screen partner is conversely very enthusiastic. Now, young lady! You will say...

C: 现在——{NICKNAME}，什么样的台词最适合表达你此时的「惊喜」？
E: Now... {NICKNAME}, what line will best express your surprise at this moment?

C: （摸摸对方的头）
E: (Pat her head)

C: 漫长的战斗后，你终于胜利了，但当年和你一同来到匹诺康尼的伙伴，却因看不到希望而早早离去。
E: After an extended battle, you finally emerged victorious, but the companion who journeyed to Penacony with you chose to leave — having lost all hope.

C: 你们可以选择「枪火」，接受哈努兄弟的试炼；也可以选择「时间」，接受钟表小子的试炼。
E: You have the option to choose "Gunfire" and undergo Brother Hanu's trial, or "Time," where you'll face Clockie's trial.

C: 在美梦小镇，钟表小子可是无处不在、无所不能的！比如…我现在就可以帮你解决这位迷钟朋友的问题，滴答！
E: In Dreamville, Clockie is everywhere and can do anything! Like... right now, I could solve this problem with your Big Ticker pal, tick-tock!

C: 竟然是钟表小子本尊，你怎么会无缘无故来看望我这样一个失败的钟表？
E: I can't believe it's actually Clockie! Why would you come and visit a failure of a clock like me for no reason?

C: 告知「钟表匠」和星核的真相。
E: Tell the truth about the Watchmaker and the Stellaron.

C: 啊？
E: Ahhhwww?

C: 即便一定要与各位无名客为敌，也只有我和橡木家系而已。但我们还没走到那一步，不是么？
E: Should we need to stand against the Nameless, it would only be myself and the Oak family involved. But we haven't reached that point yet, have we?

C: 开始吧。第一个抉择，与一只雏鸟的故事有关。
E: Let's begin. The first decision: A story about a baby bird.

C: 这个问题…和雏鸟的故事有些内在联系，而这联系就是星期日想要说服我们的突破口……
E: This question... surely it has some connection to the baby bird story — and this connection is precisely the breakthrough Sunday aims to use to persuade us...

C: 现在，你们知道她为何要时常佩戴那样繁琐的颈饰了吧？
E: Now, you understand why she always wears such elaborate neck ornaments, don't you?

C: 呵…原来如此。
E: Heh... I see.

C: 单单描述思想还是太过抽象，让我举个简单的例子吧。各位也许知道，在某些世界存在着名为「双休日」或「三休日」的社会运作制度。
E: Simply describing thoughts is far too abstract, so allow me to provide a simple example: As you all may know, there are societal norms like "weekends" and "long weekends" that exist on some worlds.

C: 前面是…米哈伊尔的书房。最后一次见爷爷，就是在那边。
E: Up ahead is... Grandpa's study. It was in that room that I saw him the last time.

C: 嗯，当然。米哈伊尔是位航海士，再神秘的海域，再凶险的风暴都难不倒他。他总是出门在外，有许多朋友和他一起旅行。
E: Yeah, sure. He was a seafarer who fearlessly ventured into mysterious seas and storms. He was always on the sea and had a lot of friends who accompanied him on his travels.

C: 我会选择「开拓」。
E: I'll choose the Trailblaze.

C: 是指针，阿蒙森先生，它的指针还是好的，依旧能指向正确的方向，所以剩下的都有办法解决。
E: It's the hands, Mr. Amundsen. Its hands were intact and pointing in the right direction, so I knew there would be a way to fix the rest.

C: 无名客的脚步是停不下来的…安心吧，米凯。重操旧业而已，放心等我回来吧。但如果，我是说如果……
E: We Nameless won't stop... Don't worry, Micah, it's just a matter of getting back to my old profession. Just wait for me to come back. But if, and it's a big if...

C: 什么声音？
E: What sound?

C: 雨啊…什么时候才会停呢？
E: When will this rain... ever stop?

C: 为了公平，孩子。
E: It's for justice, my child.

C: 「阿斯德纳再度被战火席卷，这次的敌人来自内部。囚徒至死仍是囚徒，只知为自由而战，不知为自由而生。」
E: "Once again, Asdana was engulfed in war, this time the enemies originating from within. The prisoners remained prisoners for the rest of their lives, fighting for freedom rather than living for it."

C: 「祂撷星流制成笔尖，拟了发音和计数的符号。」
E: "THEY transmuted streams of stars into inked nibs, creating symbols to be pronounced and counted."

C: 根据第二幕的经验，你恐怕需要再次利用「钟表把戏」亲手完成剧目了。
E: Based on the experience from Act II, it seems you'll need to employ the clockwork once again to personally bring the performance to fruition.

C: 哪怕你们描绘的乐园如何圆满，囚笼也依旧是囚笼。
E: No matter how perfect your vision of paradise may be, a cage remains a cage.
Uh...

C: 好啦～我明白你担心。但没关系，我可也是个顶天立地的无名客，不会有事的。
E: It's alright! I understand your concern, but it's okay. I'm also a capable Nameless, just like yourself.

C: 哦？如此捉摸不透的情绪…这种记忆倒是第一次遇见，有点勾起我的好奇心了。
E: Oh? Such elusive emotions... I've never encountered memories quite like this before, it's stirred my curiosity.

C: 砂金先生和托帕小姐都来了啊…还有，那边那位是？
E: Mr. Aventurine and Miss Topaz are here too... And, who is that over there?

C: 这也是此前你与她同行时，会产生异常感的缘由。
E: This is also why you felt a sense of peculiarity when traveling with her.

C: 你应当知晓这件事：在无边无际的梦中，我们之所以能找到你们，找到破局的关键，全都仰赖一个人的付出与努力……
E: There's something you should know. We were able to locate you within this boundless dream and find the key to breaking free from the dream, all because of one person's unwavering dedication...

C: 倘若「虚无」是生命最原始的恐惧与颤栗，任何一种崇高的信念在祂庞然的阴影下都显得微不足道……
E: If the Nihility represents the primal fear of life, rendering any lofty convictions insignificant under THEIR imposing shadow...

C: 公司和家族这次碰面会直接影响匹诺康尼的未来发展。按理来说，这么重要的事应该要在…在…哦对，在「朝露的时刻」开秘密会议商讨才对。
E: This conference between the IPC and The Family will have a direct impact on Penacony's future. Such an important event should have been held at... at... well... somewhere secretive in the Moment of Morning Dew.

C: 就像我之前说的，来日方长，等收拾妥当，就前往我们的下一站吧。
E: Like I said, we'll go and see. Once we've packed everything, we should head to our next destination.

C: 打开天窗说亮话，很好！我最喜欢的就是公开透明。说来听听吧，你这步棋要往哪下？
E: Good! It's good to be straightforward! Openness and transparency are my things! So, tell me, what's your next move?

C: （感觉这个时机不太好……）
E: (No, it's not the best time to do that...)

C: （他们的愿望确实都成真了……）
E: (All of their wishes actually did come true...)

C: 哈哈，我猜也是！听说你们整了个大活，把橡木家系都连带着给一锅端了。
E: Hah, that's what I thought! I heard you guys pulled off a big stunt, cutting down the Oak Family in one fell swoop.

C: 我要当公司的董事长！
E: I want to be the CEO of the IPC!

C: 看来这次你也没能得偿所愿。
E: Looks like you didn't get what you wanted this time.

C: 等待开幕式开始。
E: Wait for the opening ceremony to start.

C: 我「开拓」天下无敌啊！
E: Our Trailblazing spirit is unparalleled!

C: 红鲱鱼…？
E: The red herring...?

C: 好吧，那我就去别处转转。
E: All right. I'll go take a look around then.

C: 迷人的反派角色？
E: Mesmerizing antagonists?

C: 在做出选择的瞬间，我们心中的「结果」早已有答案了。
E: That when that moment arrives for us to make a choice, the answer to our end will already be within our hearts.

C: 无名客无名客，「开拓」的人做好事从不留名，时间又过去了这么久，要怎么才能在这么大的匹诺康尼找到那三个人的下落呢？
E: The Nameless — Those who Trailblaze, doing good deeds but never seeking recognition. After all this time, how would we even find those three people in such a vast place like Penacony?

C: 我明白，只是有些怀念。
E: I understand. It's a feeling of longing.

C: 走吧，三月。
E: Let's go, March.

C: 「建造一片每个人都能获得安宁的真正乐园」，这是你们兄妹两人的约定，对吧？
E: To build a true haven where everyone can attain peace — that's the oath between you siblings, isn't it?

C: 我知道这个问题很沉重，所以，不需要现在就答应我。
E: I recognize the gravity of this question, which is why you don't have to answer me right now.

C: 放心，这种「枯燥」的活动就交给大人来处理吧。我和瓦尔特会应邀参与研讨，而你们三人……
E: Don't worry, you can leave such "boring" events to the grown-ups. I will attend the conference with Welt. As for the three of you...

C: 不用担心，旁听生不会有繁重的学业。师生们也都在忙着筹备庆典，就当是参加一场派对吧。
E: Haha, don't worry — guest students don't get a lot of homework. Besides, all of the professors and students are busy preparing for the festivities. Just... treat it as a party.

C: 前往匹诺康尼的途中，你不出意外地打了个盹儿……
E: On your way to Penacony, you unsurprisingly dozed off...

C: 我知道啊！但那家伙明明就是往这个方向跑的，怎么一下子就没影了……
