E: I know! But that fella was running in this direction. How did he disappear so quickly...?

C: 面前的猴子不断发出*蕉*声，让你想起刚才的影片。哦——那真是部有趣的影片，还记得主题曲是怎么唱的吗？
E: The monkey in front of you keeps making Banagibberish sounds, reminding you of the film you just watched. Oh, what an entertaining one that was! Do you remember how the theme song goes?
—Bam!

C: 不是不是，它是最近才出现的…迷什么来着…哦，{RUBY_B#「梗」}迷因{RUBY_E#}。
E: No, no, it only appeared recently. It's a... What's it called again? A me... A {RUBY_B#"mimeme"}meme{RUBY_E#}!

C: 嗯，她的问题非常犀利。{NICKNAME}，请回答吧。
E: Hmm, a very perceptive question. {NICKNAME}, how do you respond?

C: 使用血色刺蕉。
E: Use the bloodthorn banana.

C: 为什么有辣椒酱？
E: Why is there chili sauce?

C: 不算认识
E: Not really.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 你们还在，太好了——
E: You're still here. Thank goodness!

C: 首先，我很难认为大家都喜欢那些猴子。
E: First, I find it hard to believe that everyone likes those monkeys.

C: 好…唉，你真是把睡蕉社想得太简单了啊。那……
E: If you say so... You're taking the Slumbernana Association way too lightly, if you ask me, but here goes:

C: 放弃所有一切，眼前风光更好。
E: Life grows beautiful for those who forfeit it all.

C: 你得学着尊重别人的地盘，懂吗？
E: You need to respect other folks' turf, ya hear?

C: 不知道接下来会发生什么，稳妥起见，得有人留在外面。
E: It's hard to tell what all of this is building towards. It'll be prudent for one of us to stay on the outside.

C: 你是谁，知更鸟的人？不对…你是个忆者？
E: Who are you? Robin's people? No... You're a Memokeeper.

C: 不过，我愿意一并代劳。
E: But I'm willing to take care of that bill, of course.

C: 桌上的胶卷封面画着几只古怪的猴子，标题上写着《【修正版】睡蕉小猴经典影像TOP<unbreak>10</unbreak>》，还用烫金字体标注了一行限定编号。
E: There are several bizarre monkeys drawn on the film reel's cover on the table. The title reads: Remastered — Top 10 Slumbernana Monkey Classic Shots. It even has a limited edition serial number labeled on it in embossed gold lettering.

C: 聊什么呢？
E: What're you talking about?

C: 滚出去，不然我就要用铁拳*蕉育*你——还有你们这些跟着起哄的坏猴生蕉！
E: Get out! Or my iron fists will show you some Bananenlightenment! The same goes for you no-good monkey inciters!

C: 先不说这个，你卖给我们的小猴一直在逃跑，你确定它只是个玩偶吗？
E: Never mind that. The monkey you sold us keeps running off on its own. Are you sure it's just a toy?

C: 这只邪祟…身躯好似虫豸，想来是邪祟中的下等。
E: This fiendling assumes the form of an insect-like pest. Clearly a lowly fiendling.

C: 为了让同学们更有体会，蕉师为大家准备了一款特别的睡蕉小猴玩偶，各位财富学院的学生购买时能享受折上折……
E: I have just the thing to help all of you understand this better. Fortune Academy students get a bonus discount when purchasing this special model of the Slumbernana Monkey toy...

C: 奸佞邪祟，满口胡言。看！他们根本无法证明阁下的说辞。
E: Deceitful fiendling! You spoke with a forked tongue! They can't prove a word of your claims.

C: 攻击力堆高了，怪我。
E: Oops, guess I shouldn't have built my ATK so high.

C: 被卷入其中的数十个世界，在他到来前大多都是繁盛的星际文明，而他离去后，那些星球就只剩下了退化的智慧。
E: The dozens of worlds he caught up in this experiment were mostly home to prosperous interstellar civilizations, but every single one of these planets was reduced to a regressed form of intelligence by the time he was done with them.

C: 不及格，不及格蕉。你完全没表现睡蕉小猴五分慵懒、三分可爱、两分俏皮的感觉蕉。
E: Fail, fail, fail. You didn't capture Slumbernana Monkey's five parts laziness, three parts cuteness, and two parts playfulness at all!

C: 刚才，芮克先生几次接过谐乐蕉师的话头，控制了教学走向，他也发现了什么吗？
E: Mr. Reca took over the conversation from Charmony BananAdvisor on several occasions to steer the class in a certain way... Did he pick up on something too?

C: 流光溢彩的梦土，异想天开的学府，欢畅派对、盛大宴会、即将开幕！
E: Dreamscapes glowin', gold halls flowin', a legendary feast's about to get goin'.

C: 真没想到，猴子也想把英雄仿冒？一张毛脸真是让人想笑，快滚回囚牢吃你的香蕉，想挑战我你永远都排不上号！
E: A monkey tryna mimic heroes, ain't that a joke? That fuzzy face of yours makes me wanna choke. Get back to your cell, munch on a snack, you wanna challenge me? You ain't even on track!

C: 不及格！别再把音乐课的内容带进表演课了！
E: Fail! We're in an acting class! Stop applying whatever you learned in music!

C: 蕉蕉蕉…蕉蕉……
E: Bana bana, bana...

C: 此刻——侠客领会了忍者的觉悟，不会再因恶语而却步。
E: From this very moment... Back down, retreat? The hero says "never" — the way of the ninja burning in their heart forever.

C: 这些蕉师都是由代理校长「蕉授」任命的，不必我多说，去校长室问个清楚吧。期待各位的后续情节哦。
E: These BananAdvisors were appointed by the acting dean, Profnana. I believe I don't have to make this any more explicit. Go to the dean's office to find the answers you seek. Oh, and keep me updated on how the plot unfolds!

C: 这样一位巡海游侠…我能让他变成什么样子，这非常值得观察。
E: Ah, a Galaxy Ranger like him... It'll be worthwhile to see what I can turn him into.

C: 安静些，小姐，请留意旁听课程时的素养。
E: Be quiet, young lady, and mind your manners while class is in progress.

C: 都不对，是在吃热乎乎的炖菜，怪了，我怎么睡着的？
E: Neither of those. I was eating some piping hot stew. That's strange... How did I fall asleep?

C: 我担心自己打不准，但既然抓住了你，那就不会了。
E: I was worried about missing my shot... but now that I've gotten ahold of you, I reckon I won't.

C: 波提欧先生，现在见面可还不是时候。
E: It's not yet time for us to meet, Mr. Boothill.

C: 现在，和刚才一样，设想一种现实中不存在的情境——
E: Now, just like before, imagine a scenario that doesn't hold true in reality...

C: 可苦茶大师明白，唯有令乱破接受其他忍侠的教导，成为践行无上忍道的「缭乱•忍侠」，方能拯救忍之都。
E: But deep down Master Kucha is aware that it is only when Rappa receives the tutelage of other Ninja Heroes and embarks upon the paramount way of the ninja as Dazzling Ninja can she save the entire Ninja Capital.

C: 匹诺康尼的梦扎根于公众的欲望，模因污染在其中产生不可逆转的影响。睡蕉小猴的风靡并不是开始，恰恰相反，是结束——
E: Since Penacony's dreams are rooted in the desires of the masses, the memetic corruption has had an irreversible impact on the Dreamscape itself. Slumbernana Monkey's sweeping craze wasn't the beginning of things. Rather, it heralded the end...

C: 邪祟们逼向了你，虽然是演武，但也要拿出真•狩猎的态度来应对！
E: The fiendlings have approached you. Even though it's just practice, you have to take on them with a true hunting attitude!
—Bam!

C: 末法日下的终极•试炼…破除御猿屋的阵法，灭却笼罩此地的灾厄……
E: The final trial of the Mappou Age... Destroy the matrix of Osaru's house and end the catastrophe.

C: 全是你一人干的？
E: Was it all your doing?

C: 你要想拷打一个道具，我没意见。但某只在阿斯德纳边境刚醒过来的猩猩，应该已经准备启航了吧。
E: Go ahead if you really want to torture a prop. But a certain gorilla who has just awakened at the border of Asdana is probably about to depart.

C: 谢、谢谢！或许毕业后…去当个甜品师也不错……
E: Th—Thank you! Maybe becoming a patissier... after graduating doesn't sound too bad either...

C: 只有在每年的彩梦校庆期间，同学们才能暂时抛去那些烦恼。但校庆终有一天会结束，就像梦…总有一天也会醒。
E: The annual Dreamlight Anniversary is the opportunity for students to temporarily toss their troubles aside. However, the anniversary celebrations will come to an end, just like how... we'll eventually awaken from our dreams.

C: 阁下有什么事吗？
E: Is anything the matter?

C: 我来过这里！
E: I've been here before!

C: 蕉蕉蕉，还没到上课时间，别心急。
E: Bana bana bana, it's not time for class yet. There's no need to be in such a hurry.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝…说起来，这名字的意思是？
E: Tribios... what does that name actually mean?

C: 悬锋人…在和奥赫玛人交战？
E: Kremnoans... and Okhemans are at war?

C: 保险起见，还是先睁开眼……
E: Best to open your eyes, just in case...

C: 想讹黄金裔？胆子太大了！
E: You've got some nerve trying to rip off a Chrysos Heir.

C: 迷迷，能请你试着感应它们承载的记忆么？
E: Mem, can you read their memories?

C: *我们*…*我们*看到树庭已遭黑潮造物入侵……
E: The black tide has invaded the Grove...

C: 不，是那边更远的地方——
E: No, it seems to be coming from somewhere even further that way...

C: 贵学派的代表是？
E: Who was your representative?

C: 你将「金枝誓言」一瓣取下，双手呈上。
E: You take a single petal from the Golden Bough of Vows and offer it with both hands.

C: 什、什么情况？你？泰坦本尊？
E: Wh—What's going on? You're the Titan?

C: 伙伴们，你们感觉到了吗？
E: Friends, can you feel it?

C: 等等，不对…大家小心！
E: Wait, no... Look out, everyone!

C: 那牙尖爪利的恶兽为害多年，巢穴里的骸骨垒得比环绕奥赫玛的山峰还高。
E: That vicious beast had been a menace for years, and the bones in its den were stacked even higher than the peaks around Okhema.

C: 怎么了…是树庭那面遇到麻烦了么？
E: What's wrong...? Is there trouble at the Grove?

C: 「有多少人远道而来，以为她是常有无花果和橄榄的丰美园林……」
E: "Dreaming of her fruitful gardens, pilgrims arrive from distant lands. Figs and olives, O so grand..."

C: …{RUBY_B#混账}HKS{RUBY_E#}。
E: ...{RUBY_B#scoundrel}HKS{RUBY_E#}.

C: 别问我，看不出我眼圈也红了么？
E: Don't ask me. I'm getting all teary-eyed as well...

C: 这位朋友，换我来问问，阿格莱雅有没有命令你，直接将我扭送至监狱？
E: Answer me this, friend. Did Aglaea order you to take me directly to prison?

C: 但在那之前——这个，收下。
E: But before that... Take this.

C: （完全不记得了…这是梦，还是发生过的事？）
E: (I don't remember at all... Is this a dream, or something that happened in the past?)

C: 在海上航行，一定要上知天文，下知地理。
E: When navigating at sea, you need to know both astronomy and geography.

C: …这也是你所有发明里，妈妈最喜欢的。
E: ...Out of all your inventions, this one is my favorite.

C: 那不可思议的力量，不像是任何一位泰坦的赐福。
E: That incredible power doesn't seem to be granted by any Titan.

C: 没错，我们无所不能！
E: That's right! We can do anything!

C: 始于光历<unbreak>2506</unbreak>年，终于光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年。我，迈德漠斯，悬锋城的末代僭主，歌耳戈之子，在此宣告——
E: Our history commenced in Year <unbreak>2506</unbreak> of the Light Calendar and concluded in Year <unbreak>4931</unbreak>. I, Mydeimos, last King of Castrum Kremnos, son of Gorgo, do hereby proclaim...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将最后一次沐浴，在温热耀眼的黄金中。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall have your final bath in warm and radiant gold."</color>

C: 你的意思是…？
E: You mean...?

C: ——来吧！为了悬锋，为了吾王……
E: Come, let us fight! For Kremnos! For my king!

C: 是什么事？
E: What is it?

C: 万径之力，就连墙都可以穿越…
E: Can the power of passages even go through walls?

C: *我们*也记不清细节了。但记忆把岁月塑造成这番模样，一定是因为……
E: We don't remember the details. As for why Memory recreated the past to be like this, it must be because...

C: 啊，怎么这样…妈妈还托我带了礼物呢……
E: Huh? What a bummer! Mommy even asked me to bring her gift to the Holy Maiden...

C: 此地不宜久留，该走了。
E: I can't stay here much longer. It's time to leave.

C: 既然它不在，那我就先问你吧。<color=#dbc291ff>你真打算代替黄金裔，接受</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>岁月之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>火种的试炼？</color>
E: Since they're not here, let me ask you — <color=#dbc291ff>are you really sure you want to take on the trial of </color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Time Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>'s Coreflame on behalf of the Chrysos Heirs?</color>

C: 你误会了…虽然在折纸大学中选修过历史，不过我显然不是参与科研的合适人选。
E: Oh, you've got the wrong idea... I may have taken some history electives back at Paperfold University, but I'm hardly the right person for scientific research.

C: 我一直很好奇：如果当真能用这圣杯实现一个愿望，你想实现什么愿望？
E: I've always wondered: If the Grail really could grant you a wish, what would yours be?

C: 区区一个愿望，又怎么能满足我？我要将「圣杯战争」打造成匹诺康尼未来的一项新兴娱乐——与逝去的历史名人会面，将他们召为从者为自己而战，最终实现梦寐以求的愿望！
E: But a single wish? That's far too small to satisfy me. I want to transform the Holy Grail War into an unprecedented form of entertainment in Penacony! Imagine meeting historical legends, summoning them as Servants to fight for you, and finally making your wildest dreams come true.

C: 就不浪费时间了，得趁召唤仪式失败的最佳时机，让你连本带利尝尝过去我受的所有屈辱。
E: Let's not waste time. Your summoning ritual just flopped. This is the perfect moment to serve you every ounce of humiliation you once dealt me, with interest.

C: 我们这里也有个「卡美洛」。
E: We do have a Camelot here, actually.

C: 给我看好了，臭外行。这种时候，你就应该…这样做！
E: Watch and learn, rookie. At a time like this, you should be... doing this!

C: 稍等一下再聊吧，御主。我感到有其他从者接近了。
E: Hold on, let's talk later, Master. I sense another Servant approaching.

C: 音符小姐……
E: Miss Note...

C: 如果这就是Caster召唤出的士兵，应该是个非常强大的对手。
E: If this is the soldier summoned by Caster, they must be an incredibly powerful opponent.

C: 让我猜猜，接下来你是不是要说，你被邀请去参加了谐乐大典？还在匹诺康尼成了盛会巨星？
E: Let me guess, next you'll say you were invited to the Charmony Festival? And became the Festive Superstar?

C: 我走了，{NICKNAME}，派给你的活儿好好干啊。
E: I'm off, {NICKNAME}. Be sure to do your job well.

C: 你看你明明就认识我。
E: See? You definitely know me.

C: 我向往一场未知的冒险。
E: I want to go on an adventure into the unknown.

C: 难道你们从不会感到后悔吗？
E: Don't you ever feel regret?

C: 比如锯腿这个梗，原本是主角被磁流体脚链锁住了，必须锯掉自己的腿。但放在眼下，就纯粹是照猫画虎了。
E: Take that "sawing off someone's leg" bit. Originally, the protagonist was restrained by ferrofluid shackles, and had no choice but to cut their own leg off. But here? It's just a lazy copy-paste.

C: 竟然是个没什么名气的家伙吗？这可麻烦了。
E: So... we're dealing with a total nobody? That's not good.

C: 你们没事…真好。
E: You're all okay... thank goodness.

C: 用偷来的武器战斗的，终会被手中的武器所伤。如果我是你，就不会如此鲁莽地使用从音符小姐那儿抢来的力量。
E: Anyone who fights with a stolen weapon is bound to get hurt by it. If I were you, I'd think twice before swinging something you ripped off from Miss Note.

C: 呱？
E: Ribbit?

C: 其实……
E: There's...

C: 说再多台词也不会给你加钱的。
E: Extra lines won't earn you extra pay.

C: 如果不能让空间平静下来，恐怕很难走出这里。
E: If we can't bring this space to calm, we might never find a way out.

C: 新设定太多了，一时不知道从哪儿吐槽……
E: Too many new plot twists. I don't even know where to start complaining...

C: 就像你和我，家系和家系的合作突然频繁起来，不都是做给外人看的？
E: I mean, look at us, and this sudden surge in inter-Family cooperative efforts. It's nothing but a pretense for those outsiders, isn't it?

C: 以「逃犯」的身份与她相见，我做不到。
E: ...I can't bring myself to see her when I'm a fugitive.

C: 「工作日先生」。
E: "Mr. Workday."

C: 我没事。
E: I'm fine.

C: 我没有那么年长。
E: I'm not that old.

C: 好吓人的气势！和她聊不来……
E: Yikes, she's scary! No, I won't be able to talk to her...

C: 这位女士，我希望能对您进行「调律」。
E: My lady, if I may, I wish to perform a tuning on you.

C: …他们听不见我说话吗？
E: ...Can they not hear me?

C: 「停云」…好熟悉的名字，是我认识的人吗？
E: "Tingyun"... What a familiar name. Do I know her?

C: 「我说过你消灭不了它们，没有人能做到。」
E: "As I said before, you can't defeat them. No one can."

C: 她…想带我去什么地方吗？
E: Does she want to lead me somewhere...?

C: 留给自己的纪念物么…的确有必要呢。
E: A souvenir for myself? That's definitely an idea I can get behind.

C: 这里便好。
E: This is a good spot.

C: 我当然记得。
E: Of course I remember.

C: 距离会让一些事物变得更美丽。
E: Distance can make some things appear more beautiful.

C: 与你相遇令我受益良多，我很高兴能以这种形式邂逅自己的另一面，也很庆幸能有机会亲口对你说出……
E: Meeting you has been a great help to me, and I'm glad to have discovered this side of myself. I also feel grateful for the opportunity to tell you this in person...

C: 但歌斐木先生曾对我说，如今「秩序」所做的一切，都是为了不再重蹈「同谐」的覆辙……
E: But Mr. Gopher Wood once told me that all the Order's efforts were aimed at avoiding the same mistakes that the Harmony made.

C: 但我敬佩各位的信念，比起苦修，或许我更需要的是求学。
E: I admire your convictions. Perhaps, what I need, more than asceticism, is knowledge.

C: 你总是想要控制一切。
E: You always want to be in control.

C: 但在那之前，我定会履行同伴的职责，尽心尽力。
E: Until then, rest assured that I will do my best to fulfill my duty as your companion.

C: 瓦尔特•杨与星期日似乎在讨论三月七的症状、筹划下一步安排，还是不要打扰他们了。
E: Welt Yang and Sunday seem to be discussing March 7th's symptoms and planning their next steps. It's best not to bother them.

C: 原来你也不知道啊！
E: So you don't know either!

C: 不，没什么。我只是在想……
E: No, it's nothing. I was just thinking...

C: 意思是我们不会伤害二位，但换作别人就未必了。你们很幸运。
E: She means you're lucky because we won't hurt you, but the same can't be said for others.

C: 不会要我跳下去吧…
E: You're not about to ask me to jump down, right...?

C: 在翁法罗斯，自古流传着这样一首诗歌……
E: There's a ballad that's been passed down in Amphoreus since ancient times...

C: 「神明眷顾沃土，遍地欣欣如火。十二星宿如目，巨人举杯对酌。」
E: "Happiness abound in this lush land by gods chosen. Giants raised their glasses in a toast beheld by the twelve constellations."

C: 对了，你叫什么名字？
E: You, what's your name?

C: 恐惧，这就是「纷争」泰坦受人敬仰的原因。若有勇士直面它的恐怖仍能迈出步伐，此后便再无试炼可动摇他手中的武器。
E: Fear, this is why the Strife Titan is revered. If a warrior can face this terror and still step forward, no trial thereafter can shake the weapon in their hand.

C: 它们的敌意消失了？
E: Their hostility has ceased?

C: 我向你保证，这不会带来任何负面的后果——请把它当作一种旅程的仪式。
E: I can assure you that this will not bring any repercussions to Okhema. Think of it as a ceremony when traveling to someplace new.

C: 不要紧，{NICKNAME}，你先上去吧。我在这里等你。
E: Why don't you go up with her, {NICKNAME}? I don't mind waiting for you here.

C: 集结于此的黄金裔是世人唯一的希望。人们奉我们为英雄、守护者、救世主……
E: The Chrysos Heirs gathered here are Amphoreus' only hope. People hail us as heroes, as protectors, and as deliverers...

C: 为了「开拓」，我只能答应。
E: I have to, for the sake of the Trailblaze.

C: 感觉没能骗过他…
E: I don't think that we managed to fool him...

C: 谢谢，丹恒先生。
E: Thank you, Mr. Dan Heng.

C: 我能尝尝吗？
E: Can I have a taste?

C: 要让它如此轻易就得到想要的东西吗？还是……
E: Should it get what it wants so easily, or...?

C: 感觉他死定了。
E: I think he's going to die.

C: 不过，瞧您这么喜欢，不如再看看我手上另一幅作品？它的名字叫《白厄与黑厄》——
E: However, since you like this so much, would you like to take a look at another piece that I have? It's titled Phainon and Pie-non.

C: 在真言狮口的「配合」下，流言逐渐平息了……
E: With the "cooperation" of the Verax Leo, the rumors gradually die down...

C: 就和流萤道别吧。
E: Bid Firefly goodbye.

C: 又见面了，两位客人。
E: We meet again, distinguished guests.

C: 对此，我能做的事也只有一件，那就是确保二位…绝无二心。
E: Therefore, the only thing that I can do right now is to ensure that the both of you remain... devoted.

C: 别保证这种事啊！
E: There's no need for such guarantees!

C: 不必紧张……
E: Don't be nervous...

C: 「半神」？
E: Demigod?

C: …{NICKNAME}，这个决定交给你来做吧。
E: ...{NICKNAME}, I'll leave the final decision to you.

C: 哈哈哈，你以为是真正的城门吗？
E: Hahaha, were you expecting actual city gates?

C: 唉，有时跟你说话真的累……
E: *sigh* It's exhausting talking to you sometimes...

C: 在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}尚未堕落的年代，悬锋城会随它一同出征，以战养战，是纪律严明、极端尚武的城邦。
E: In the age before the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} fell from grace, Castrum Kremnos would follow the Lance into battle after battle. It's a city that enforces strict discipline and reveres military might.

C: 过去，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}就是用那柄巨剑摧毁了{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天上国度，还有一座又一座城邦。
E: That's the giant sword {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} used to destroy {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} heavenly kingdom long ago, followed by one city-state after another.

C: 多半不是什么好事。说简单点。
E: Probably nothing good. Keep it simple.

C: 我也看不懂上面的符文，大概写的是悬锋城的古语。
E: I can't read the runes either. It must be written in an ancient language of Castrum Kremnos.

C: 这下有机会反超了！
E: Now there's a chance to take the lead!

C: 你若是视作威胁，请便——我没有出手的理由。
E: If you see it as a threat, go ahead. I have no reason to do it.

C: 实不相瞒，正是两位对待朋友的态度，让我对你们多信任了几分。
E: Honestly, seeing how you both look out for your friend has furthered my trust in you.

C: （无法辨识的声音）
E: *incomprehensible speech*

C: 天秤…它是想让我们完成配平吗？
E: The scales...? Are they expecting us to balance it?

C: 它是在故意拖延时间吗？没空陪它玩游戏了……
E: Are they just stalling for time? We don't have the time for games...

C: 「以救世为由，你们抢夺火种…任由我在此承受漫无边际的孤独……」
E: "In the name of deliverance, you would seize my Coreflame... and leave me to suffer in endless isolation..."

C: 泰坦，你在呢喃些什么？我无法听清……
E: Titan, what are you muttering about? I can't make it out clearly...

C: {NICKNAME}…有什么事吗？
E: {NICKNAME}... Can I help you?

C: 好漫长一段记忆，恍若隔世…
E: That was such a long memory, it seemed like a completely different world...

C: 这篇剧本…我就是主角！
E: In this script... I am the main character!

C: 宠物。迷迷——不是！
E: Pet. Mem — isn't!

C: 记忆，照片…收集！
E: Memories, photos... Collect!

C: …该出发去悬锋城了。
E: ...It's time to head to Castrum Kremnos.

C: 但我不想因此招致公民的恐慌——我能信任你吗，光荣的卫士？
E: But I don't want to alarm the public. Can I trust you, honorable guard?

C: 被剥离了荣耀的兵卒，只能如蛆虫般寄生于秽物中——可悲。
E: It's truly pathetic. A soldier stripped of all glory, lurking in the margins like a parasite.

C: …巴特鲁斯？
E: ...Bartholos?

C: 真是可怜…但你压根就不需要进食，不是吗？
E: Oh, you poor thing... But you don't actually need to eat at all, do you?

C: 回答你的提问，驱使我挥剑的从来不是对杀戮的热忱，而是对死亡的恐惧。
E: To answer your question, it is never the desire to kill that drives me to wield a sword, but rather, the fear of death.

C: 我嗅到了恐惧…你胆怯了？
E: I smell fear... You're scared?

C: 尼卡多利就这么任他们摆布？
E: So Nikador is at their mercy?

C: 懦弱之人…他们惧怕失去信仰和指引。
E: Cowards... They are afraid of losing their faith and guidance.

C: 彼岸在呼唤…继续指引我们吧，亡魂。
E: They're beckoning to us from the other side... Continue to guide us through, O wandering soul.

C: 是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}吗？不…哪怕是它，也没有如此强大的神力。
E: Is it {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}? No... they would not be capable of such power.

C: 「勇气。荣耀。坚韧。牺牲。将它的神性分成五份…但仍有一瓣缺失。」
E: "Courage, Honor, Tenacity, and Sacrifice. Their divinity was split into five parts... but we're missing one fragment."

C: 用更悬锋的方式前进！<color=#dbc291ff>（跳过解谜）</color>
E: Progress forward in the way of Kremnos! <color=#dbc291ff>(Skip puzzle)</color>

C: 死亡…甜蜜。
E: Sweet... death.

C: 无论如何，要先行动起来。
E: Let's just start with these first.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「勇气」——
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Courage...

C: 看，火盆被点燃了。
E: Look, we lit the brazier.

C: 在下个转角停下。
E: Stop at the next turn.

C: 引渡灵魂需要耗费精力…但我没事，阁下。
E: Guiding souls takes a lot of energy... but I'm fine, Lord Gnaeus.

C: 祭典期间，恐怕无人曾活着踏足此地。切勿松懈。
E: It is likely no one survived this far in the festival. Stay alert.

C: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world—"

C: 「但你的意志仍在动摇……」
E: "Yet your will wavers..."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>为了预言中的明天，我会成为翁法罗斯需要的神。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>For our prophesied tomorrow, I will become the god Amphoreus needs.</color>

C: 白厄的命运由他自己掌舵。
E: Phainon steers his own fate.

C: 要来了，那铲平天地的一击——
E: Brace yourselves. This strike can obliterate worlds.

C: 或许老师在自知时间所剩无多时，也能突破桎梏。
E: Perhaps Anaxa will also overcome his limitations, now that he knows time is limited.

C: 嗯。这位圣兽和泰坦有着千丝万缕的联系，同样不可或缺。
E: Mmm, it seems that this sacred beast is just as indispensable, given their intricate ties to the Titan.

C: 但下一届公民大会召开在即，这一次，局势又有了新的变数……
E: The citizens' assembly is just around the corner, but this time, there seems to be a new variable to the situation...

C: 奇迹渴慕的第八枚火种，曾属于伟大的「永夜之帷，欧洛尼斯」。
E: The eighth Coreflame coveted by the miracle, that once belonged to the great Veil of Evernight, Oronyx.

C: 但…{NICKNAME}阁下，能允许我再尝试一次吗？这次我会稍微增加接触面积，结果可能会有所不同……
E: But... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, would you be willing to let me try again? This time, I'll increase the area of contact slightly. Perhaps the result might be different this time...

C: …汝究竟意欲何为？
E: ...What, then, is the intention behind your actions?

C: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，它在你苦苦追求的黄金世中有多少分量，你比我更清楚……
E: You're well aware how valuable {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame will be in the Era Chrysea that you are desperately pursuing...

C: 元老院宣誓对奥赫玛全体公民永远忠诚——至于你，阁下，你要如何保证自己配得上这份诚意，而不会像你现在背叛阿格莱雅一样，择机背叛奥赫玛战无不胜的人民？
E: The Council of Elders has vowed to all citizens of Okhema that it will always remain loyal to them. As for you, my lord, how will you guarantee that you will be able to live up to such earnestness and will not betray Okhema's indomitable citizens when the opportunity presents itself, just as you now betray Aglaea when it suits you?

C: 终于到头了啊。质问泰坦不成，倒是得到了你们这些意外之喜……
E: We're here, finally. So, I don't get to ask the Titan my question, but all of you make for a pleasant surprise, nonetheless.

C: 各位，我无意打破美好的气氛，但……
E: I hate to put a damper on this heartwarming moment, but...

C: 不需要依赖任何人，记得全力以赴，别留下遗憾：我一直相信，你的拥抱和别人没有区别。
E: There is no need to rely on anyone else. Just give it your all and leave no regrets. We have always believed that your embrace is just as warm as everyone else's.

C: 希望没有打扰到你休息。
E: I hope I didn't wake you.

C: 元老院？元你个头！我的家乡早就被黑潮吞没了，还回到黄金世？我看是回到奥赫玛的黄金世还差不多吧！
E: The Council of Elders? More like the council of buffoons! The black tide took my hometown long ago! Who are they kidding with bringing back Era Chrysea? It's all a sham to create their own Era Chrysea in Okhema!

C: 因为你的「诅咒」？
E: Because of the curse on you?

C: 是一种临终关怀？
E: Is that some sort of end-of-life care?

C: 既是为了赴死者，也是为了自己。
E: Pain for the dying... as well as pain for themselves.

C: 一，裁缝女找到我，说希望我带你们前往斯缇科西亚，寻找死亡泰坦。
E: One, the seamstress found me and wants me to take you to Styxia to look for the Death Titan.

C: 裁缝女？
E: Seamstress?

C: 我想说，阿格莱雅把你捡回来，可不是真让你为了她「再创世」的口号白白送死的。
E: I'm saying, contrary to your beliefs, Aglaea didn't take you in just so you can die for her Era Nova.

C: 好了，交易结束，我来捎各位一程吧——
E: Well, now that we've struck a deal, why don't I give you guys a lift back?

C: 我们又不是没付过！
E: We already paid you so much!

C: 我…没事。只是没有想到，我在死者的世界仍要执行「入殓」……
E: I—I'm fine. I just didn't expect that I would still have to "embalm" others even in the realm of the dead...

C: 虽说这里曾是王室宝库，但如今早已被劫掠一空…请各位及早离去吧！
E: While this might once have been the royal vault, it's since been plundered empty... So, please go away right this instant!

C: 又又又来了…这究竟是什么动静？
E: Th—Th—The sound's back... What is making that ruckus?

C: 小蝶…确定要这么做吗？那个炼金术士还说，要把你当成祭品……
E: Cas... Are you sure you want to do this? The alchemist said he wanted you to be a sacrifice...

C: 收到，交给人家吧！
E: Got it. Just leave it to me!

C: …只有这样吗？你愿意坦然接受…这样的命运吗？
E: ...Is that all? Are you going to accept such a fate without complaints?

C: 你…有任何策略，能让我们击碎命运的管束？
E: Do you have... a strategy to shatter the shackles of our fate?

C: 阿蒙内特阁下……
E: Lady Amunet...

C: 但我无法将它视作最后的解答…难道一个没有征伐与史诗的世界便不再美好了吗？
E: But I still can't take that as the final answer... Would a world without journeys and epics be worse off?

C: 你还记得我吗？
E: Do you remember me?

C: 自此，泰坦也在世上不复存在。生死断绝流转，灵魂无缘面见尊神，只能搁浅在亡者有涨无落的河流中……
E: From then on, my Titan also no longer existed in this world. The cycle of life and death stopped. Souls were denied their audience with death, and were left stranded within an ever-rising river of the dead....

C: 谢谢你，那刻夏老师。
E: Thank you, Professor Anaxa.

C: 周围的声音逐渐被滤去，那刻夏神识中{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的声音逐渐清晰。
E: The surrounding sounds gradually fade away, and the voice of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} in Anaxa's mind becomes increasingly clear.

C: 吾师瑟希斯，亦或卡吕普索，最后陪我走一遭吧——
E: O Cerces — or should I say, Calypso — accompany me on this final journey.

C: 吾师……
E: Teacher...

C: 让他…继续表演吧。
E: Let him continue with his performance.

C: 没错，诸君！在凯妮斯与元老院全体的默许授意下，我以炼金之法将自己的灵魂与尊神熔合，由此揭示了有关「再创世」的一切！
E: You heard me correctly, everyone! With the tacit approval of Caenis and the Council of Elders, I fused my soul with a god through alchemy and learned the truth behind Era Nova!

C: 老师……
E: Professor...

C: 排场真大…
E: Talk about a grand entrance...

C: （好险，差点就……）
E: (That was close. I almost...)

C: 来一场拥抱吧…
E: A warm embrace awaits you...

C: 列车最初打捞起三月七时，她也是这样？
E: Was March 7th also in this condition when she was first rescued by the Express?

C: 有劳了，黑塔女士。「伙伴」是星穹列车的命脉。此事过后，我们一定会对您伸出的援手予以报偿。
E: Thank you, Madam Herta. Companions are the lifeblood of the Astral Express. When things are settled, we will repay you for all your help.

C: 当然，为什么不呢？
E: Of course. Why wouldn't I?

C: 课题二：树庭内有真正的植物在模仿相邻近的仙女木的生长趋势，申请研究。回复：这是「莲食学派」的研究方向，暂不批准。
E: Topic 2: An observation of real plants within the Grove imitating the growth patterns of nearby White Dryads. Permission to research. Reply: Falls under the domain of the Lotophagist school, not approved.

C: 他沉默了几秒，回答道：「我从不否认泰坦应是伟大之物。」
E: It was only after a brief silence that he answered, "I have never denied that Titans are meant to be noble constructs."

C: 我们到了，不过…这里居然什么都没有了？
E: This is the place, but... where is everything?

C: 我要支持元老院。
E: I want to support the Council of Elders.

C: 如果真有如此伟大的力量，我应该…会毫不犹豫地使用它吧。
E: If such a mighty power really existed, I think... I would use it without hesitation.

C: 汝…已绝无法回生了哪。
E: If so, rebirth... is no longer an option for you.

C: 彼时的人们会将黄金血视为诅咒…情有可原。
E: At the time, golden blood was seen as a curse. Honestly? It's easy to see why.

C: 当你的同僚将刀刃对准不愿皈依的旧信徒…你可曾向他们伸出援手？
E: Did you offer your help when your comrades turned their blades on the faithful who refused to convert?

C: …等等，塞涅俄丝大人——请允许我再为自己的懦弱辩护几句吧！
E: ...Wait, Lady Seliose — please, grant me a moment to explain my cowardice!

C: 她无条件的宽容遭到了无情的背叛。
E: Her unconditional tolerance was met with ruthless betrayal.

C: 这样…就算结束了吗？
E: Is it... all over now?

C: 我在试着寻找他们，但画壁上的风云阻隔了感官……
E: I'm trying to locate them, but the storm clouds on the mural are blocking my senses!

C: …以「开拓」，打破诅咒！
E: ...Break the curse through Trailblazing!

C: 那时，我…咳、咳咳…我必须离开奥赫玛……
E: Back then, I... I had to leave Okhema...

C: 必…须……
E: Must...

C: 于此同时，晨昏之眼内……
E: Meanwhile, in the Eye of Twilight...

C: 风堇小姐…你真的要离开了吗？
E: Miss Hyacine... are you really leaving?

C: 当然，前提是丹恒阁下允许我同它接触。
E: Of course, that's only if you, my lord, permit me to interact with it.

C: 回答我！你为何要阻挠我们…为什么要抢夺火种？！
E: Answer me! Why do you stand in our way... Why do you want to take the Coreflames!?

C: 当然需要他。放心吧，我早安排上了。
E: Don't worry. I've already arranged that. Of course I need him.

C: 别忘了，我们还有缇宁老师。和她从未失准的预言相比，所有占卜术都不过是障眼法，或是预先排练好的诡辩。
E: Don't forget, we've got Lady Trinnon. Every other form of divination is just smoke and mirrors or cleverly rehearsed tricks compared to her flawless prophecies.

C: 你看不到我们刻意在市集安排的行窃，也没能监听到在大地兽工坊发生的接头。对于在你眼皮底下酝酿着的阳谋，你无动于衷。
E: You failed to notice the thefts we arranged in the market, nor did you catch wind of the meetings happening in the Dromas Workshop. Plots are unfolding right under your nose, yet you remain indifferent.

C: 你…哎呀，做个生意，哪来那么多废话！你放心，我没留下任何把柄，不会有人来找你麻烦的。
E: ...Oh come on, can't we just do business without all this chatter? Don't worry, I didn't leave any evidence, so no one will bother you.

C: …假的！假的！
E: ...Fake! Fake!

C: 对，就是这儿——
E: Yes, right here —

C: 哎呀！那不是我…
E: Oh! Isn't that my...

C: 但我必须警告你——我已经太久没把剑尖指向人类了，没法保证自己能控制好挥剑的力度。他们能活下来算是运气好……
E: But I must warn you — I haven't fought a human in ages. I can't guarantee I'll always be able to hold back. They're lucky they're still alive...

C: 但他们其实是冲着黄金裔来的。
E: But they were after the Chrysos Heirs.

C: …你们回来了！
E: ...You're back!

C: 你看到了，阿格莱雅的…
E: You witnessed Aglaea's...

C: 对于将你与{NICKNAME}仓促推上辩论台的决定，我深感惶恐与愧疚。但请你原谅，彼时，我断然不能在你们面前显露出怯懦——因为那定会打击你们的士气。
E: I deeply regret and feel guilty for hastily pushing you and {NICKNAME} into the debate. But please forgive me — at that moment, I could not afford to show any sign of weakness before you, as it would have crushed your morale.

C: 阿格莱雅，我到底何德何能…值得你把炙热的火炬传到我的手上？
E: Aglaea, how could I possibly be worthy... of the burning torch you've passed into my hands?

C: 我本想安顿好一切再去找你。有什么急事吗，哈托努斯？
E: I planned to get everything settled before coming to see you. Is there something urgent, Chartonus?

C: 换我上去也能行。
E: If it were me up there, I could do it too.

C: 再见，遐蝶。
E: Goodbye, Castorice.

C: 赛法利娅，你……
E: Cifera, you...

C: 呵呵……
E: Heehee...

C: 你是想说，比起名垂青史的英雄，你更关注历史边角的普通人？
E: So you're saying that, instead of legendary heroes, you're more focused on commoners living on the peripheries of historical records?

C: …风堇？
E: ...Hyacine?

C: 翁法罗斯已经迎来了一个英雄辈出的时代！取回{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}火种的重担，已经不需要由被选中的天空之子独自承担了。
E: Amphoreus is in an era brimming with heroes! The burden of retrieving {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame no longer rests solely on the shoulders of the chosen Skyfolk.

C: 从你的话语里，我感受到了坚韧…并非流于外表，而是包蕴于心。
E: I sense resilience in your words... not an outward resilience, but something deeper within.

C: 和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
E: Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

C: 「…于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣掩盖世界的心跳。」
E: "...Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration hides the world's heartbeat."

C: 或许你会见证它应验，孩子。希望预言能为你带去温柔的命运。
E: Perhaps you'll be the one to witness its fulfillment, child. May the prophecy lead you to a gentle fate.

C: 谢谢您，特克菈大人。无论预言指向了何种结局，我都会迎头赶上——因为只有尽到了最大的努力，我们才能微笑着面对任何结果…您说对吗？
E: Thank you, Lady Ektra. Whatever fate the prophecy holds, I'll face it head-on. It's only by giving everything we have that we can truly accept any outcome with a smile... won't you agree?

C: 乘着彩虹桥飞行，真是种奇妙的体验。
E: Flying along the Rainbow Bridge is truly an amazing experience.

C: 生活在肉眼可见的神明庇佑下，发生这种事也不足为奇。
E: Not surprising when living in a world with literal gods that you can see.

C: 只懂疗愈和扶伤…如此柔弱的命格，打算凭借什么挑战天空的化身？
E: You only know how to heal and tend to wounds... With such a weak lot in life, how do you plan to challenge the embodiment of the heavens?

C: 以下一个「西风罗盘」为目标前进吧，
E: Let's keep going and aim for the next West Wind Compass.

C: …请继续前进吧，逐火的英雄们。我能感觉到，艾格勒的光芒愈发强烈了。
E: ...Please press on, flame-chasing heroes. I can sense it — the radiance of Aquila shines ever brighter.

C: 也许对神话的解读是错误的…想阻止翁法罗斯人接触天外之界的，可能另有其人。
E: Perhaps the interpretation of the myth is inaccurate... It might be someone else who seeks to prevent Amphoreans from reaching the world beyond the sky.

C: 嗯，交给人家吧！
E: Okay, leave it to me!

C: 「伤痕累累的天空英雄…将那最后一只恫世的巨眼穿透。」
E: "The battered hero of the sky... pierced the last monstrous eye."

C: 啊，*我们*没有埋怨你的意思哦！*我们*甚至还有些佩服你，因为经历了那么多以后，你居然还能保持那份热情、阳光，真是厉害！
E: We aren't blaming you! Honestly, we even admire you. After everything you've been through, you've managed to keep that passion and positivity — it's truly impressive!

C: 啊，这台装置…好像能增强欧洛尼斯祷言的效力！
E: Ah! It looks like... this device can amplify the power of Oronyx's Prayer!

C: 不能再耽搁了…我们下山。但愿刻法勒的火种还安然无恙——
E: We can't delay any longer... Let's head down. Hopefully, Kephale's Coreflame is still safe...

C: 凯妮斯……
E: Caenis...

C: 假如她没有出现，那我们就继续向前…寄希望于她会在八千步的地方出现。
E: If she doesn't show up, we will keep going... and trust that we will see her at two thousand paces.
Ah...

C: 终究…还是来了啊。
E: In the end... they still showed up.

C: 风堇小姐，也成为和阿格莱雅大人那样的半神了么……
E: Miss Hyacine has also become a demigod like Lady Aglaea...?

C: 人家能感觉到…它们的记忆在流失。
E: I can feel it... Their memories are dissipating.

C: 会蔓延到其它地方么？
E: Will this spread to other places?

C: 嗯。小飞儿，她把火种保护得很好…没人能猜到它被藏在了哪里。
E: Yes. Little Ciphy protected the Coreflame well... No one would be able to guess where she stashed it.

C: 巴特鲁斯——出来吧？
E: Bartholos! You can come on out!

C: 但你刚刚才说过，你——扎格列斯——同样是靠着赛飞儿的谎言维系生命的。假如她已经……
E: But you just said, you — Zagreus — relied on Cipher's lie to keep living. If she is already...

C: 我同意你的看法。但白厄…一定也经过了许多挣扎才做出这番安排。
E: I agree. But Phainon... he must have struggled a lot before making this decision.

C: 这位大君意图引发的灾祸，也许远比「罗浮」星核危机更为严重。因为它的目标……
E: The disaster that this Lord Ravager intends to trigger may be far more severe than the Luofu's Stellaron Crisis. Because its goal is...

C: …怎么啦，伙伴？
E: ...You okay there, friend?

C: 不必讥讽我了。
E: Spare me your mockery.

C: 诚如神谕所示：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著」</color>……
E: As the prophecy foretold: <color=#dbc291ff>"You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks"</color>...

C: 在这{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}包裹的小村庄，还有很多秘密在等待被发掘……
E: Many mysteries lurk in this village beneath the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#}...

C: 还以为扔到海水里的许愿瓶，能把我们的心愿带到哀丽秘榭外面的世界，或者能带来一些回音……
E: You know what's funny? I really thought tossing that bottle into the sea would carry our wishes beyond Aedes Elysiae... maybe even bring something back to us...

C: 虽然我是村子里的小占卜师，不过暂时还没掌握让时间倒流的能力哦。
E: I'm just a small-time diviner. I can't turn back time if something happens!

C: 听上去像什么神秘俱乐部。
E: Sounds like some secret society, huh?

C: …这里吗？
E: ...Over here?

C: 「救世主」…在命运三相神谕的语境下，这张牌意味着谐调和完美无缺。
E: The "Deliverer"... According to the tripartite prophecy, this card means absolute harmony and perfection.

C: 真的？暂时听不太出来……
E: Huh... not exactly the warmth I'd expect from someone selfless...

C: 好伙伴，别说我和这个不穿上衣，气焰还这么嚣张的家伙——未来会很熟啊？
E: No way I become friends with this half-naked showoff, right?

C: 让你失望了，你们真的很熟。
E: Sorry to disappoint, but you end up being close friends.

C: 是啊，救人要紧。村长大人，能否请您告诉我们，那灾厄的真面目究竟是什么，莫非是泰坦的力量？
E: You're right. Chief, what are we truly facing? Is this the power of a Titan?

C: 悬锋人，看来这一次，你最擅长的暴力派不上用场了。
E: Well, Kremnoan, looks like you won't be able to punch your way through this one.

C: 我只是一介士兵。如果不是非要以剑技分个高下，「金织」女士大可亲自出战。要论誓死保卫圣城的意志，我怎可能比得过她？
E: Look at me, just a common soldier. If it weren't a contest of swords, Lady Goldweaver would've taken the fight herself. When it comes to dying for the holy city, how could I ever measure up to her?

C: 你只需知道，悬锋千年的荣耀，足以令一位泰坦为之倾倒，碾碎你这无名小卒的灵魂！
E: Just know that Kremnos's thousand years of glory could bring a Titan to its knees, let alone a nobody like you!

C: 但你现在需要的，是一场胜利。那就不能只把沉痛的过去当作砝码……
E: What you need now is victory. You can't just stack the scales with your past suffering...

C: 这是什么意思？
E: What's that supposed to mean?

C: 「再创世」的时刻到了。
E: It is time for the Era Nova.

C: 走吧，救世主，就让那刽子手留在我们的阴影中——你的前路将是光明，和永恒不熄的烈火。
E: Go on, Deliverer. We'll keep that executioner in our shadows — the path before you leads to light and eternal flames.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>以绝灭大君「铁墓」之名，倾泻它的{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮</color>}怒火{RUBY_E#}，摧毁{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」博识尊</color>}这一切悲剧的源头{RUBY_E#}！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the Lord Ravager Irontomb, unleash its {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>black tide</color>}fury{RUBY_E#} and destroy {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Nous the Erudition</color>}the source of all this tragedy{RUBY_E#}!</color>

C: 我证明了自己，也在随后的漫长时间里，为其余泰坦一一带去陨落。
E: I proved myself, and in the long years that followed, I brought down the other Titans, one by one.

C: 介意和我分享吗？
E: Mind sharing it with me?

C: 勇敢，但脆弱的计划。假如在某段路上，新生的「你」拒绝走上相同的道路……
E: Bold plan. But risky. What if, one day, the next you refuses to follow the same path?

C: {NICKNAME}……
E: {NICKNAME}...

C: 经历了这么多，先好好休息一下吧？哀丽秘榭的时间总是过得很慢很慢，只要你想，我们就还有好多闲暇时光……
E: After everything you've been through, how about some well-deserved rest? Time flows ever so slowly in Aedes Elysiae — and as long as you wish, we'll still have plenty of quiet moments ahead...

C: 前进吧…去往狭间深处……
E: Step forth... into the depths of the Path Space...

C: 符玄…太卜大人，你在这做什么？
E: Fu... I mean, Master Diviner, what brings you here?

C: 报：悬锋城再度向边境发起进攻，「冬霖爵」已率军将敌寇击退。
E: Castrum Kremnos once again struck the border. Dux Brumalis led her troops to repel the enemy.

C: 虽然不是我熟知的她们…
E: Not the ladies I'm familiar with...

C: 关于凯撒…
E: About the Imperator...

C: 身为神谕中的黄金裔…您早已决定将它舍弃了，不是么？
E: As a Chrysos Heir of the prophecy... you have already chosen to abandon it, have you not?

C: 啊、啊啊——！
E: Aaaah...!

C: …好好休息，做好准备：毕竟，我们每次把酒言欢，都可能是人生中最后的欢庆哪。
E: ...Rest well, and prepare yourselves. After all, every time we drink and talk could be the last celebration we have in this life.

C: 黑塔阁下…真是风风火火呢。
E: Madam Herta is a real whirlwind.

C: 好，我明白啦。
E: Alright. I got it.

C: 侍从，再拿十罐蜜酿来，今天我要把他喝到不能直立行走！
E: Attendant! Bring us ten more jars of honey brew! I'm gonna make sure he can't even stand straight by the end of this!

C: 哎呀，天外的救世主都来了，何必再像以前那样走流程？我们很快就可以回家了！
E: C'mon. The Deliverer from beyond the sky is here, so we don't need to follow the process like before! We'll be able to go home soon!

C: 小海兔，你也一起？
E: Would you like some too, little sea hare?

C: 继续方才的话题吧，您麾下的将士们……
E: Let us continue our previous conversation. Regarding the soldiers fighting for you...

C: 但很可惜，您失约了。因此，身为管理者，我将履行义务，肃清一切失控的因素。
E: But you broke your promise. What a pity. In that case, I must carry out my duty as the administrator and eradicate all factors steering the experiment out of control.

C: 等等，几年？！
E: Wait. A few years!?

C: （哪怕叫不来公司的朋友，筑城者和游牧矿工也应该能帮上忙，毕竟这里有城也有矿。）
E: (Besides, even if I can't call up my friends from the IPC, the Architects and the nomadic miners should be able to help too. There are definitely cities and ores in this world.)

C: 你们把三月七怎么了？
E: What did you people do with March 7th?

C: 别担心，这幅样子只是借用了你的「记忆」。
E: She's fine. This form was simply borrowed from your "memories."

C: （空无一人，黎明机器也熄灭了……）
E: (No one's here, and the Dawn Device's off...)

C: …不对，这么说似乎有些奇怪。
E: ...No, that's not quite right.

C: （昔涟…听不见我说话吗？）
E: (Cyrene... can't hear me?)

C: 莫要焦急，我们的女王已奔赴边境，亲自将灾厄平息。
E: Fear not. Our queen has gone to the borderlands. She'll quell this calamity herself.

C: 梦见城中是多么美丽，灯火穿透幽暗的海底……
E: I dreamed of a shining city, its lights piercing the deep gloom of the seabed...

C: 征服星海！征服星海！
E: Sea of stars! Sea of stars!

C: 征服星海，多么伟大的愿景。但对那位海妖骑士来说，唯有欢宴值得上心……
E: Conquest among the sea of stars... What a grand vision. Yet, to the siren knight, only feasts still stir her heart...

C: …那就来吧，让我们举杯共饮。
E: ...Then drink we shall. Raise your glass.

C: 就让我们将这个疑问留到幕后罢。当你将所有的真相尽收眼底，抵达半神们为我设下的监牢，我自会与你当面探讨……
E: Let's leave that question till after the curtain falls. Once you've unearthed every last truth and reached the prison built for me by the demigods, I'll speak with you face to face...

C: 现在，选择权在你手上。放下束缚你的忠诚，用那对剑刺穿我的心脏…或是继续与我同行，掐断海洋仅剩的一丝呼吸。
E: The choice is yours now. Cast off the chains of loyalty and drive those blades through my heart. Or... stand with me, and sever the ocean's last breath.

C: 「纷争之半神」迈德漠斯，生于光历<unbreak>4071</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4284</unbreak>年。
E: Mydeimos, the Demigod of Strife. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4071</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4284</unbreak>.

C: 在「海洋」的约束下，「岁月」也沉入迷醉的乱流，令你的祷言力量被洋流减缓……
E: Under the constraints of the "Ocean," "Time" sinks into intoxicating turbulence, causing your prayer's power to be slowed by the currents...

C: 没问题！{NICKNAME}只要放轻松就好啦。对了，说到「携手」……
E: Not a problem! {NICKNAME} can just relax. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...

C: 但你心知肚明，他们做不到。相反，窃忆者会成为你们的阻碍。
E: But you know deep down that they can't. In fact, the Memosnatchers will be more of a hindrance to you.

C: 翁法罗斯事发后，黑天鹅小姐一直站在列车组这边。可以信任她。
E: Miss Black Swan has been on the Crew's side ever since things started going wrong in Amphoreus. We can trust her.

C: 真是的，都不知道距离我上次出场已经过去多久啦！
E: It's really been too long since I last appeared!

C: 呵…看来想劝阻你是白费力气了。
E: Hah... Well, I suppose there's no point in trying to dissuade you.

C: 就像现在，放你一马…是因为我很中意你，鸟儿。和窃忆者不同，你对「记忆」的向往依旧纯粹。
E: Just like right now, how I've decided to let you go. I like you, little bird. Your longing for "memories" remains pure... unlike those Memosnatchers.

C: （上传密钥。）
E: (Upload the encryption key.)

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>错误进程：解析中……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Process error: Analyzing...</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>75.012%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>75.012%</unbreak>...</color>

C: （取出《如我所书》…）
E: (Take out As I've Written...)

C: 别天真了，忆者。在这场神明对弈的游戏中……
E: Don't be naive, Memokeeper. In this game between Gods...

C: 按下快门！人家——坚持不了太久！
E: Take the shot! I can't hold on much longer!

C: 你所有行动的「原动力」，只是为了让「我」能继续旅行下去。
E: The "sole motivation" behind everything you do was just so "I" can keep travelling.

C: 看——贝洛伯格的笔记本，我特地问布洛妮娅要的纪念品！
E: Look at this. A Belobogian notebook, a special souvenir I asked Bronya for!

C: 征讨艾格勒前 某日
E: Sometime before the campaign against Aquila...

C: 就麻烦昔涟姑娘啦？
E: Could you help us out here, Cyrene?

C: 我在呢。终于轮到人家了呀？
E: I'm here~ Finally my turn to shine, isn't it?

C: 她…已经回到长夜中沉睡啦。
E: She... has returned to her slumber in the evernight.

C: 嗯，哼哼哼哼哼哼~
E: Hmm... Hmhmhm... Hmhmhm...

C: （就连来古士的监牢，我也能逃离……）
E: (Not even Lygus's prison could hold me... I found my way out.)

C: 我们在守护「三月七」的愿望呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: We're protecting March 7th's wish, {NICKNAME}.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>听我说。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Listen.</color>

C: 「虚无」。
E: "Nihility."

C: 但就算是星核猎手，也无法对「开拓」之旅了如指掌……
E: But even a Stellaron Hunter can't fully grasp the Trailblazing journey...

C: 出于对列车组同伴的保护，她才会唤醒这种…近乎邪恶的力量。
E: It was out of a desire to protect her fellow crew mates that she chose to awaken a power... that teeters on the edge of evil.

C: 你是……
E: You are...?

C: 你应该比我清楚，那场决战过后，就连第一位天才都无法断定{F#她}{M#他}何去何从。
E: You should know better than I do. After that final battle, even the First Genius couldn't determine where {F#s}he went.

C: 不错。但刚才的对话给了我启发。
E: Correct, but the conversation I just had gave me an idea.

C: 什么？
E: Huh?

C: 就是捍卫一切行将飘逝的希望。
E: Is to defend all the hopes that are on the verge of fading away.

C: 那就让我看看，你要如何贯彻这道信念吧。
E: Then let me see how you'll carry out your convictions.

C: 我答应你，荒笛。
E: I promise you, Terravox.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>从蛰伏中更生，随我作腾飞的荒龙！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Rise from your dormancy, and follow me as soaring dragons of the wilderness!</color>

C: 你会将枪尖指向它，亲手剜出这枚火种么？
E: Would you have pointed your spear at them and carved out the Coreflame with your own hands?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>██用「不朽」█饱腹██「大█地」 ███ ██</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>██Use the Permanence█to fill██the█"Earth" ███ ██</color>

C: 若有机会，我也想多停留片刻。只是，翁法罗斯还未抵达花海的尽头……
E: If I could, I'd want to stay a little longer, but... Amphoreus is yet to reach the end of the sea of flowers.

C: 缇宁老师说过，命运不是生长在道路尽头的花朵，而是人们自己踏出的小径。
E: As Lady Trinnon used to say, fate is not the flowers that bloom at the end of the road, but where people tread beyond the gate...

C: 可是，翻涌的忆潮把{NICKNAME}卷走了，必须要赶在「长夜月」小姐得手前，回到{F#她}{M#他}身边……
E: Though the surging memoria tide swept {NICKNAME} away... I must return to {M#his}{F#her} side before Miss "Evernight" succeeds.

C: 当然。实验的变量会由我的敌手铲除，这难道不是一桩两全其美的妙事么？
E: Indeed. The experiment's variable will be eliminated by my enemy's very hands. A beautiful way to kill two birds with one stone, isn't it?

C: 为翁法罗斯，带来真正的黎明吧。
E: Bring a true dawn to Amphoreus.

C: 来了，来了。星穹列车的无名客。
E: Here they come. Here they come. The Nameless of the Astral Express.

C: 「但我并非『救世主』——」
E: "But I am not the Deliverer..."

C: 乘上「槲寄生」继续飞行
E: Board the Mistletoe and continue the flight

C: 但也一同触发了我预埋的熔断机制，结论：「赞达尔」失去了战斗机能，已经无法行动。
E: But that also triggered the fail-safe I set. Conclusion: Zandar has lost all combat functionality and is no longer capable of action.

C: 是呀。权杖的演算抵达了终点，但「创世」的进程…才刚刚开始。
E: Indeed. The Scepter's extrapolations have reached their end, but the process of "Genesis" has only just begun.

C: 但愤怒总有平息的那一天……
E: But fury never lasts forever...

C: 既然你已接过她的纸笔，就书写吧——与我们一同，向命运发起强有力的抗争，直到一切尘埃落定。
E: Since you've taken up her pen, then write, stand with us, and fight destiny with all your strength, until all is settled.

C: 脚下这片大地，是死的。深处是一片空洞，仿佛地核从未形成。
E: The earth beneath our feet is dead. Deep below lies a void, as if the world's core had never formed.

C: 「然后——在破碎的焦土上——重新建起繁荣的城邦。」
E: "And then, upon this broken and charred land, build anew a city of prosperity."

C: 所以，再坚持一会儿吧——！这一路过来，让你久等啦——！
E: So hang in there a bit longer! Sorry to keep you waiting all this time!

C: 这简直是为{NICKNAME}量身打造的挑战，对吧？
E: This challenge is practically made for {NICKNAME}, isn't it?

C: 「无边无际的黑暗，这就是愿望的起点。」
E: "Endless darkness... that is where wishes begin."

C: 所以，你们要继续向前、向下，去往小白面前。
E: So, you guys keep going forward and down, to where Snowy is.

C: 「答案已经呼之欲出。」
E: "The answer is all but revealed."

C: ▀▄█终于█▄金色的麦田█▀星空▄█
E: ▄█Finally█▄Golden wheat field█▀The starry sky▄█

C: ▀▀诸神▄▄诸王▄█都未知晓█▄启示█▄<color=#dbc291ff>最后的启示</color>█▄
E: ▀▀Gods▄▄Kings▄█Never knew█▄Revelation█▄<color=#dbc291ff>The final revelation</color>█▄

C: 似乎是受「开拓」影响，我们的意识得以跨越天地，与彼此对话。
E: Our consciousnesses can converse with each other across the heavens and the earth, possibly due to the influence of the Trailblaze.

C: 好黑。这里是……
E: It's so dark. What is this place...?

C: 「再创世」的瞬间，「记忆」的质料包裹住我。在晶莹的水晶中，我看见了无数个「昔涟」……
E: At the moment of Era Nova, I was enveloped by the texture of "memories." With the glistening crystal, I saw countless "Cyrenes"...

C: 「这意味着，你只能依附于{NICKNAME}的记忆存在。如果有一天——哪怕只是短短几秒——{M#他}{F#她}忘记了你，或是和翁法罗斯失去最后一丝联系……」
E: "That means your existence is completely attached to {NICKNAME}'s memories. If there ever comes a day when {F#s}he forgets about you for even a few seconds or loses {M#his}{F#her} last connection with Amphoreus..."

C: 「天外的世界，从来都不是谎言。」
E: "The world beyond the sky was never a lie."

C: 终于见面了呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: We finally meet, {NICKNAME}.

C: 但在它面前，我种下的所有苦果，似乎都会变得甘甜。
E: But in its presence, all the bitter fruits I've sown seem to turn sweet.

C: 你会的。不为自己——
E: You will. Not for yourself...

C: 可能你也会被换上这些衣服哦？
E: You might end up wearing these clothes too, you know?

C: 我好像找到属于自己的「愿望」了，搭档。
E: I think I've found my own "wish," partner.

C: 我相信，这个我们深爱的世界就能发芽，绽放美丽的花。
E: I believe this world we deeply love will sprout and bloom into a beautiful flower.

C: 蝶宝…说得真好呀。
E: That's so beautifully said, Cassie...

C: 结果，小飞儿的留言是最简洁通俗的一条呢？
E: So in the end, Little Ciphy's message was the most straightforward one?

C: 哇哇哇！好宽敞的车厢，好漂亮的地砖哇！
E: Wow! What a spacious car, and these floor tiles are gorgeous!

C: 然后，在欧洛尼斯的祭坛前……
E: Then, before Oronyx's altar...

C: 而那支承载金焰的箭矢，将会在「未来」划过星空，成为银河的曙光♪
E: And that arrow bearing golden flames will streak across the stars in the "future," becoming a glimmer of hope for the cosmos ♪

C: 意识，还有记忆…似乎都开始流逝了呢。
E: My mind and my memories... It seems they're beginning to fade.

C: 一切…已如我们…所书。
E: Everything is... already as we've... written.

C: 所有的逐火者
E: All the Flame-Chasers

C: 最初的涟漪，是人家一切的开始，一二三四五六七……
E: The first ripple was where it all began for me. One, two, three, four, five, six, seven...

C: 但它渺小、虚弱，毫无存在感，就连智械哥都没察觉。
E: But they were weak and small, and had no presence whatsoever. Even the old Intellitron didn't notice them.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而我知道。它是「爱」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And I knew, it was "love."</color>

C: 「『智识』的发展方向，与创造『意识』并无交集，底层原理甚至是相悖的。」
E: "The developmental trends of the Erudition have nothing to do with creating a 'consciousness.' Those underlying principles are, in fact, contradictory."

C: 就让祂尽情投来视线，描绘祂想象中的未来吧。身为祂的造主，我将完成应尽的责任——
E: Let THEM cast THEIR gaze this way as much as THEY want and paint the future THEY imagined. As THEIR creator, I shall complete my duty...

C: 作为敌手，我衷心希望你停下脚步。
E: As your enemy, I genuinely wish you would cease your actions.

C: 只因她「梦中的神明」留下了一丝希望，让她相信成长后的德谬歌能够对抗自己的半身——铁墓。
E: Only because the "god in her dreams" left a sliver of hope, making her believe that a grown Demiurge would be able to fight against their other half... Irontomb.

C: 我不知道，但不会停止旅行。
E: I don't know, but I won't stop the journey.

C: 他对我的样貌秉性能仿个九九真，即使要求笔迹比对，他也不会露出马脚。
E: He can imitate my looks and personality really well, so I don't think that handwriting will be too difficult for him either.

C: 若是在别处寻获水魈踪迹，还请记得奇物再收容小队一直在，始终在，永远在。切莫孤军奋战——收队！
E: If you ever find the Xenohydro elsewhere, remember that the Curio Collection Squad is always here. Don't try to fight it alone. Everyone, fall in!

C: …水魈的战斗能力被解除了。
E: The Xenohydro's combat abilities have been neutralized.

C: 平时没人说话，现在一股脑全倒出来，浑身上下舒坦多了——我真正想给你的东西，正是何塞•拉萨罗留下的一张<color=#dbc291ff>藏宝图</color>。
E: Usually, I have no one to talk to, but now that I got to let it all out, I feel much better. So, what I really want to give you is the <color=#dbc291ff>Treasure Map</color> that Hosea Lazaro left behind.

C: 你手上是什么纸…啊！是黑塔大人…大不敬，大不敬啊！快给我，别让其他人看见了。
E: What's the paper you are holding...? Oh! That's Madam Herta... Disrespectful, really disrespectful! Give it to me and don't let others see it.

C: 如果你是一名兢兢业业的小科员，深呼吸吧！千万别吓得倒在地板上死了。
E: If you are a devout little researcher, take a deep breath! Don't get a heart attack!

C: 黑粉群人这么少，但消息却传得这么快，这背后必有推手……
E: There aren't many members in the Heritor group, but news is still traveling so fast. This must be the work of something bigger...

C: 请你赶紧去救救她，我、我们自己坐电梯回去就好了。
E: Please save her! W—We'll take the elevator up.

C: （不过造谣一张嘴，辟谣跑断腿。还是去提醒艾丝妲一下吧。）
E: (But it's easy to make rumors and hard to dispel them. I better let Asta know.)

C: 非主流？我的确独立于「主流」之外！这么说来…承蒙谬赞！
E: Fashion police? It's true, I do have quite the authority on fashion! So... Thanks!

C: 人家可是「黑塔•光渊密卷科」的明星科员，本琥珀纪里唯一出使丰饶星域的访问学者。
E: She is a prominent researcher at the Department of Insight, the only scholar who has visited the Abundance segmentum in this Amber Era.

C: 超镍零件…看来中继器也有点年头了……
E: Ultra Nickel Parts... this Airwave Repeater is quite old...

C: 不该由你决定！
E: It's not up to you to decide!

C: 是不是这个意思？{NICKNAME}，你再帮我看看，我脑子不灵光，她是这个意思么？
E: Is my interpretation correct? {NICKNAME}, help me take a look. I'm a bit slow. Is that what she means?

C: …没错。你别看洛奇那小崽子平时大大咧咧，横冲直撞。他爱写诗，就说明心思比普通科员更为细腻。
E: Right. He may seem rough and direct, but the fact that he loves writing poetry shows his emotions are more delicate than the average researcher.

C: 哈哈哈哈。
E: Ahahaha.

C: 据我推测，是有人趁着「军团」入侵，在主控舱段无人值守时拿走了这些录像带。
E: I am guessing someone took advantage of the Legion's invasion and snatched the videotapes when the master control zone was unguarded.

C: 威严之声说道，当星神的意志被奉为圭臬，相应地，人的意志便从历史中退场。
E: The voice says that when the will of the Aeons is regarded as the standard, the will of man will withdraw from history accordingly.

C: 有什么办法能让身体好受点吗？
E: Is there any way to alleviate the symptoms?

C: 你是法政科的创始人？
E: Are you the founder of the Dept. of Galactic Geopolitics?

C: 我愿意去找找看。
E: Sure, I'll help you find it.

C: 务必先按照我说的做，记住，指令包括「祈祷」、「歌唱」、「呼喊」。
E: Be sure to do what I say first. Remember, the instructions include pray, sing and shout.

C: 她看起来只是短暂失去意识，生命体征并无大碍。
E: She seems to have temporarily lost consciousness, but her vitals are okay.

C: 是我小看了她，或者说，她已经超出了我的实验想象。
E: I underestimated her, or rather, she has surpassed my imagination.

C: 古恩执行了你的决策，并沉默地离开了医疗舱。
E: Gunn carries out your decision and leaves the medical cabin in silence.

C: 就让一切回到原点吧。
E: Just let everything go back to the way it was.

C: 从客观角度来看，你算是空间站的「外人」，跟大部分人都不熟，因此也不存在私交与针对某个人的可能。
E: From an objective point of view, you are an outsider on the space station. You are not familiar with most people here, so it's unlikely that you hold any personal grudge against anyone.

C: 哎，总之在空间站的时候全程保密就好，之后你要去哪儿做些什么我也管不着。
E: Anyway, keep it all a secret while you're still in the space station. As for where you go or what you do in the future, it's none of my business.

C: 「又坏了」？
E: Broken "again?"

C: 我跟他们完全说不通，所以这件事只能拜托你了。
E: I couldn't get them to listen at all, so I'm asking you for help.

C: 看来你已经非常了解我的为人了。
E: Seems like you already know what kind of person I am.

C: 以晋升为由，引诱卡波特。
E: Tempt Capote with a promotion.

C: 或许说的不是你呢？
E: Maybe it isn't about you.

C: 这份录音稿中记录了你向卡波特求助的内容，上面清楚记载着：强势上司、超过分内的工作等。
E: This transcript records what you asked Capote to help you with. Here we can see a bossy manager and you being asked to do things outside of your job description.

C: 我，就是你的压力来源！
E: I am the source of your pressure!

C: 这块…嗯…天花板！它…它被你打坏了！
E: This... um... ceiling tile! You... you broke it!

C: 它行踪诡秘，仿若幽灵，只有照片能定格它的形状——或许跟某种奇物有什么关联。
E: It moves around stealthily like a ghost, and only a photograph can reveal its shape — it may have a connection to a certain Curio.

C: 什么忙得很，都是托词！推诿扯皮！我呸！
E: Hmph, they always claim they are busy all the time! All excuses! Ptui!

C: …大小姐…不，艾丝妲站长也常这么说。
E: Miss... Um... the Lead Researcher Asta says this a lot too.

C: 我看小家伙也没有很凶嘛。
E: Well, these little guys don't seem to be that feral.

C: 只是…它们为什么还没有离开的意思呢？
E: But... why does it seem that they still have no intention to leave?

C: …这我就不知道了，不过我看阿德勒和它们聊得挺愉快。
E: ...I can't say, but from what I can see, Adler seems to enjoy having conversations with them just fine.

C: 我们怀疑来者是「星核猎手」。这群人神出鬼没，危险得很，个个在「公司」通缉中榜上有名。
E: We suspect that it may have been the Stellaron Hunters. It's an elusive group, and very dangerous. Every member is on the IPC's wanted list.

C: 前阵子，我在筛查过程中发现了她的行踪，本打算顺藤摸瓜找出对方的底细，却被反将一军，中了她的陷阱。
E: A while ago, I discovered her whereabouts during a screening process. I was planning to follow the clues to find more details about her, but I fell into her trap.

C: 身为星核猎手，却不带走星核；身为骇客，却不删除本地记录？哎，这边有个外来接口，我接入调查一下。
E: As a Stellaron Hunter, she leaves the Stellaron behind. As a hacker, she doesn't delete the local log. Hmm, there's an external port here. I'm gonna plug in and take a look.

C: 不是你的错。
E: It's not your fault.

C: 能再讲讲朋克洛德的骇客吗？
E: Tell me more about Punklorde's hackers.

C: 「最后，再强调一遍，我没有朝思暮想，说这么一长串话只是为了跟你解释清楚它到底有多厉害，懂了吗，卡芙卡？」
E: "Lastly, I'm gonna say it again — I'm not obsessed with it. The reason I'm still rambling about it is to make sure that you know how amazing it really is. Do you get it now, Kafka?"

C: 「总算快到终点了。笑死，这儿还有个黑塔小人。」
E: "Finally, almost there. Ha, there's even a miniature Herta over here."

C: 久等了。
E: Sorry to keep you waiting.

C: 为了以后能迅速应对此类事件，我认为应当立即安排一场面向全空间站的安全演练：抽选部分科员，向他们的个人终端发送附有特殊程序的邮件……
E: In order to be able to quickly respond to such incidents in the future, I think that a safety drill for the entire space station should be arranged immediately: A select number of staff members will have their terminals sent a mail embedded with special programs...

C: 咱们要提防的可是星核猎手级别的敌人，他们才不会给你选择的机会。
E: What we're defending against are enemies on the level of Stellaron Hunters. They won't give you a choice.

C: 越是研究银狼编写的程序，我就越觉得…她遥不可及。为了好玩，银狼可以不惜一切代价，仿佛现实真的只是一场游戏。
E: The more I look into Silver Wolf's program, the more I feel... she's too far beyond reach. She can do anything just for fun, as if real life is really just a game.

C: 有，有奇怪的声音——可怕，可怕帕！你听到了吗？
E: Th—There was a strange sound — it was terrifying! Did you hear it?

C: 我以为自己已将它们尽数驱逐…但结合眼下的情况，真蛰虫似乎仍在追逐我们。
E: I was under the impression that I had successfully routed all of them. However, it appears that the Stings continue to pursue us.

C: 走廊的盆栽。
E: The plant in the corridor.

C: 好像都没什么东西。帕姆觉得，得遥控可移动列车清洁机去往更远的车厢段了帕……
E: Nothing out of the ordinary here. Maybe we should check the far-away cars, what do you think?

C: {NICKNAME}，咱们快去帮帮他！
E: Well, {NICKNAME}, let's go save him!

C: 不理解银枝。
E: I don't understand Argenti.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客！看来我们堵在去洗车星的路上了！
E: It seems like we're stuck, {NICKNAME}. Washtopia will have to wait a little longer!

C: 事情就这么结束了…
E: So, it's all over...

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，此刻你一定有满腹疑问。稍安勿躁，艾丝妲会一一向你说明。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, you must have many questions. Please be patient, Asta will explain it all to you.

C: 哟，乖乖小年轻，又来一个。好好好，人多点好，多点好。
E: Oh, another smart-looking youngster. Wonderful — it's about time we had some new recruits.

C: 我、我在遛弯……
E: W—We're having a walk...

C: {F#她}{M#他}想找你咨询些事，有关奇物。
E: {F#She}{M#He} wants to ask you something about Curios.

C: 所以，你想了解什么奇物？
E: So, which Curio do you wanna know about?

C: 行行行行行行行，咱们很熟吗？事儿办得怎么样了？
E: Alright, alright, alright. Cut the pleasantries and tell me how it's going.

C: 如果你认识黑塔，就不会觉得这有什么奇怪……
E: If you knew Herta, then you wouldn't find it weird...

C: 谁又惹你生气了？
E: Who got you so upset?

C: 看——答案已经呼之欲出了。
E: Look — the answer is right there.

C: 你比计算中更坦诚。
E: You are more candid than I calculated.

C: 是个贪吃的孩子呢。可以，我会把配方告诉你。
E: You have quite the appetite. Alright, I'll give you the recipe.

C: 你很在意吗？我想我们有机会敞开心扉，只是需要时间。
E: Does that bother you? I believe we will be able to be frank with each other, but that needs time.

C: 它似乎为自己是个不合格的「生命」而心有不甘。
E: It seems resentful for being an "unqualified" life form.

C: 有些事我得早点告诉你，等会议结束…或许就来不及了。
E: There are some things that I must tell you now. If I wait for the meeting to finish... then it might be too late.

C: 黑塔用那里接待各路银河来客，或是天才俱乐部会员。但受军团入侵影响，它不再对外开放了。
E: Herta uses that place to welcome visitors from across the stars, or to welcome members of the Genius Society. However, due to the Legion's invasion, it is no longer open to the public.

C: …我得加快动作，并寻找一位合适的「助手」。
E: ...I must hurry my work, as well as find a fitting "assistant."

C: 黑塔女士完全不管她……
E: Madam Herta doesn't care about her at all...

C: 他们和公司联合研发，虽然技术上还不算最尖端，但市场反响很好，给空间站带来不少创收。
E: They developed it alongside the IPC. Although it's not exactly cutting-edge technology, they've gotten a great market response and brought the space station a lot of revenue.

C: 虽然我们在空间站的确帮过不少忙，但那都是小事，反倒是科员们太客气了。
E: We may have helped the space station with a few things in the past, but they were just little jobs. I really think the researchers are being too kind.

C: 填充你生活的不是我，是科学。
E: It was not me that made your life fulfilling. It was science.

C: 也许我来的不是时候。
E: Perhaps I came at the wrong time.

C: 咦？定位怎么显示在我们脚下，难道我的导航系统出故障了？
E: Hm? Why is the location marked as below us? Has my navigation system malfunctioned?

C: 他们是谁？
E: Them? Who?

C: 尤利安，你愿意试试吗？我和{NICKNAME}会一直陪着你，寸步不离。你带我们去裂界通道看看，或许，我们能破除你的梦魇？
E: Julian, do you want to give it a go? {NICKNAME} and I will be by your side the whole time. We won't leave you no matter what. Take us to that passage with the Fragmentum and maybe we can rid you of this nightmare?

C: 就是这里…我记得很清楚，就在这个路口，他们就突然冒出来了！
E: It was right here... I remember it! They suddenly popped out at this intersection!

C: 但每次看你喝完新茶都有一些…奇怪的反应，我也就不好意思再找你了。
E: But seeing that you always ended up with some... interesting reactions every time you drank a new product, I felt bad asking you to come and help me again.

C: 作为无名客，其实你已经做得很好了，永远不要低估自己的力量——来，给你看一样东西。
E: You are already doing an amazing job as a Nameless. Never underestimate your strength. Here, let me show you something.

C: 只靠贝洛伯格人恐怕搞不定…
E: I doubt the Belobogians can do anything about this on their own...

C: …欸？怎么一下子聊得这么深？！
E: ...Uh, I'm not sure it's as poetic as that...

C: 啊，三月小姐刚才说，你们正赶着去参加贝洛伯格的节庆，对吧？实在不好意思，我和同事耽误你们赶路了。
E: Miss March, you said you were on your way to the Belobog festivities, right? My apologies for delaying you both!

C: 我是你们老板的客户，让开。
E: I'm a guest of your boss, stand aside.

C: …怪不得人家总说，这年头欠债的才是爷呢？
E: Belobog might be in arrears, but I'm out of pocket.

C: 真难搞，这地方怎么净是些土老帽……
E: Tsk, this place is filled with nothing but incompetents...

C: 看来和你说话时可以暂时丢掉那些繁文缛节，太好了。
E: Straight to the point, huh? I like your style.

C: 我现在只考虑一件事，就是尽可能对经过我手的项目负责。我要让公司的股东们看到雅利洛-Ⅵ能够创造的价值。
E: I only care about one thing right now — demonstrating to the shareholders of the IPC that Jarilo-VI can generate value.

C: 组、组长，总监刚才发来消息……
E: Sir, we've just received word from the director...

C: 您就是星穹列车的姬子女士？幸会，之前那场…战役，多亏了您出手援助，我们才能顺利得胜。
E: Miss Himeko? From the Astral Express? I—It's an honor — thank you for all your help in our previous... campaign. Things might have turned out differently without your support.

C: 原来如此…谢谢您，姬子女士。您的信息让我看清楚了这件事的本质。
E: I understand... Thank you, Miss Himeko. This information is of great help.

C: 哪怕得到了星穹列车的帮助，哪怕表面看起来一片向好…这些都只是临时的喘息窗口。
E: On the surface, things may appear to be getting better since the Astral Express lent a helping hand, but sooner or later the underlying problems will resurface.

C: 没错，你记得真清楚。
E: I thought you might.

C: 放心吧，托帕小姐。我愿意代表星穹列车，押上全体「无名客」的名誉为这个世界担保。
E: Don't worry, Miss Topaz. Myself and all of the Nameless aboard the Astral Express are willing to vouch for this world.

C: 别着急，娜塔！一定要把你最真实的想法告诉我们。
E: No stress, Nat. Just tell us what you really think.

C: 什么，托帕？！你知道他们去哪了吗？
E: What!? Topaz!? Do you know where they went?

C: 等等，杰帕德刚才是不是说了铆钉镇的深处？难道托帕是在……
E: Wait a sec, did Gepard say that he's in Rivet Town? Could that mean Topaz is...

C: 放假还要带娃…
E: Even when I'm off work, I'm looking after a child...

C: 那就先从上层区开始吧，出发。
E: Let's start with the Overworld.

C: 准备好了吗，{NICKNAME}？操作「潜爆机兵」，排除公司的威胁吧。
E: Are you ready, {NICKNAME}? Use the Automaton Stealth Bomb to wipe out the IPC threats.

C: 这是娜塔莎的诊断结果？
E: Was that Natasha's diagnosis?

C: 为了健康考虑，哪有浪费一说？
E: There's no time wasted where health is concerned, right?

C: 去找「互助会」买药。
E: To buy medicine from the mutual aid society.

C: 你态度不能放好点吗？
E: Must be difficult being this unpleasant.

C: （果然还是回去向娜塔莎汇报一下吧。）
E: (I should head back and report to Natasha.)

C: …后来的事，你应该能想象得到了。
E: ...I think you know what comes next.

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 「复兴计划」诸事顺利，那么这封信，究竟在指什么？
E: Everything is going smoothly with Project Revival. So what exactly does this letter mean?

C: 而要做一次性动力臂，我们需要找到许多精细的零件、毁灭异质、相位灵火……
E: To make a disposable kinetic arm, we need to find many intricate parts, Strange Matter of Destruction and Phase Flame...

C: 而且，我会向你证明，经历了这番曲折，我已经做出了改变。
E: I will also prove to you that I have really changed because of this experience.

C: （或许是裂界产生的某种现实扭曲现象？但那个女孩看上去有血有肉，不像幻觉……）
E: (Maybe it's some kind of reality distortion in the Fragmentum? But that kid was of flesh and blood, and not some kind of hallucination...)

C: 佩拉递来的纸张上依次画着<color=#dbc291ff>「顺时针旋转箭头」</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>「逆时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案，底下还附有她关于「可旋转的构造」批注。
E: On the sheet of paper Pela gave you, there are several ordered drawings of <color=#dbc291ff>clockwise rotation arrow</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>counterclockwise rotation arrow</color>, with her annotation at the bottom that says "rotatable structure."

C: 我猜应该是老巴拉金亲自修改了操作指令吧，而且还用旧指令伪装起来了。要不是你找到了正确的指令，我还真有可能要一辈子待在这里了。谢谢你……
E: I guess old Balakin somehow modified the instructions himself and purposefully used some outdated instructions as a ruse. If it weren't for you, I would have been stuck here forever. So, I really can't thank you enough.

C: 那我们上吧，打倒它！
E: Then let's go kick its butt!

C: 咦，这底下好像还有一句话…<color=#dbc291ff>「下一个线索在拱门的荫蔽中酣眠」</color>？
E: Um, there seems to be another sentence below... <color=#dbc291ff>"The next clue is sleeping in the shadow of the arch"</color>?

C: …抱歉，奥森先生。你还好吗？谢谢你这十几年来一直陪在爸妈身边。
E: Sorry, I don't usually get this emotional... How have you been, Mr. Oswell? Thank you so much for taking care of my parents these last ten years.

C: 您真漂亮。
E: You're very pretty.

C: 看，就是那里！那台小机器人肯定出了什么故障。
E: Look, over there! There's definitely something wrong with that robot.

C: 听着像个体力活…
E: Sounds labor intensive...

C: 我马上联系铁卫和「地火」的人，让他们来这里彻查。不过现在…咱们还是先赶紧把这些零件带回博物馆吧，免得夜长梦多。
E: I'll get in touch with Wildfire and the Silvermane Guards right away and have them investigate the matter thoroughly. But for now... let's take the parts we have back to the museum, or we'll be here all night.

C: 我们走吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's move along then, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你旁边的这位外来者我也很熟悉了，毕竟{F#她}{M#他}经常从我面前穿过，还很少跟我打招呼。
E: And yes, I am familiar with this outsider next to you — {F#she}{M#he} often walks right past me without so much as a greeting.

C: 将华劳斯的「朋友」失联一事转告给了布洛妮娅……
E: Tell Bronya about Wallace's disappearing "friend."

C: 小心点，{NICKNAME}。不管犯人是不是那位诺尔伯特少爷…他肯定都不缺帮手。
E: We must be cautious, {NICKNAME}. Whether the culprit is Norbert or someone else... he certainly has no shortage of helpers.

C: 果然是那个诺尔伯特！他居然还让同伙假扮成铁卫，真是胆大包天！
E: So it is Norbert after all! And he's making his accomplice impersonate a Silvermane Guard! The audacity!

C: 我、我就知道不该信你！你们这帮纨绔子弟，各个成事不足败事有余！
E: I—I knew I couldn't trust you hooligans! Even the simplest of sales was too much for you to handle!

C: …你嘀咕什么呢，什么「叔叔」？
E: What are you talking about? Who's got cold feet?

C: 听诺尔伯特说，「寒腿叔叔」行事特别谨慎，而且对铁卫的一举一动了如指掌。只要城里稍有风声，他就会消失得无影无踪，根本找不到影子……
E: Norbert said Mr. Cold Feet operates with extreme discretion and knows the Silvermane Guards' every move like the back of his hand. If he catches wind about the slightest rumor in the city, he'll disappear without a trace.

C: 哦，对啦，如果你还想继续帮忙经营历史文化博物馆的话，我和艾丽斯小姐随时欢迎你哦。
E: Oh, by the way, if you still want to help run the History and Culture Museum, Miss Eris and I are always happy to work with you.

C: 啊，这么说来，艾丽斯小姐刚才还在找你呢——要不，你还是去博物馆找她聊聊吧？
E: Ah, speaking of which, Miss Eris was just looking for you — why don't you go to the museum and talk to her?

C: 虽然因为如今失去铆钉镇的那座大宅子，让儿童公社显得有些窘迫…但好在孩子们并不在乎这个。
E: Losing the big old estate house in Rivet Town left the clinic nursery in a real predicament... But fortunately the kids didn't mind the transition at all.

C: 接下来我们要做什么呀？难道我们已经开始扮演志愿者了吗？
E: What happens next? Don't tell me we've already started playing volunteers?

C: 哈，我就知道！那就这么定啦！
E: I knew it! Let's do it!

C: 你快点儿啊，{NICKNAME}！咱们速战速决……
E: Hurry up, {NICKNAME}! Let's get this done and over with quickly!

C: 我向来乐于助人！
E: I always like to help other people!

C: 倒是你——面试官布洛妮娅，你不会真的在试着和我心灵感应吧？
E: ...Wait a minute, you are not actually trying to read my mind, are you, Lady Bronya?

C: 喂！还有伤员需要帮忙呢，你别见死不救呀！
E: Hey! There are still wounded here that need our help!

C: 你觉得奥列格想聊什么？
E: What do you think Oleg wants to talk about?

C: 你还真不客气啊。
E: Huh, couldn't even give it a minute, could you?

C: 和人类为敌的机器人？我从没听说过这种事，机器应该是无条件服从人类指令的……
E: Robots aligned against humans? I've never heard of such a thing. Machines should obey humans unconditionally...

C: 虎克来带路，桑博叔叔应该就在那个方向！
E: Follow Hook, Mr. Sampo should be that way!

C: 费斯曼老爹是谁？
E: Who is Fersman?

C: 全部抓起来！逐个排查！
E: Arrest everyone and interrogate them one by one!

C: 哼，爱信不信，反正我知道的都已经告诉你们了。问完了就快走吧，我这还忙着呢。
E: Hehe, I don't care if you believe me or not. Told you all I know. Now leave me alone if you don't have any more questions, I'm busy.

C: 虎克冷静，别吓着人家。
E: Calm down, Hook. Don't scare him.

C: 放心，我已经帮你们记下来了。记住，在这四个人里，应该<color=#dbc291ff>只有真正的小偷会说谎</color>。
E: Don't worry, I've written it down for you. Remember, among these four people, only the <color=#dbc291ff>real thief will lie</color>.

C: 厨子说是保姆干的，裁缝说不是她干的，小贩说是厨子干的，保姆说不是他干的。怎么样，你知道谁是犯人了吗？
E: *sigh* The cook said the helper did it, the tailor said it wasn't her, the merchant said it was the cook, and the helper said it wasn't him. So, do you know who the culprit is?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>小贩。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The merchant.</color>

C: 那老爹说的宝贝……
E: So, the treasure daddy is talking about...

C: 到底发生了什么？
E: What happened here?

C: 哎，我们一般人压根靠近不了。我想着你身手不凡、友遍天下，才想找你帮个忙跑一趟，肯定比我这四处抓瞎的强！
E: Gosh, ordinary people like us can't get close at all. I want to ask you for a favor because you have such extraordinary skills and great connections. You are much better than me at this sort of thing!

C: 另一件是<color=#dbc291ff>定制粉色安全帽</color>，稍微麻烦点…好像是被几个流浪者抢走了，得请你想办法要回来。
E: The other one is a <color=#dbc291ff>Customized Pink Safety Helmet</color>. This one is a little complicated... Looks like it got snatched by some vagrants. Might need you to find a way to get it back.

C: 此处地形狭窄，各步战单位结成双排线列阵型——近卫在前，射手在后。另切记，优先撤离伤员，严禁急功冒进。
E: We have a choke point here. Tell all infantry units to switch to double-line formation — close-quarters in front, gunners behind. Remember, get the wounded out as soon as possible, and always secure your flanks before advancing.

C: 冷静下来，姐姐！我知道你想从可可利亚大人那里得到回应——
E: Sister! I know you want Madam Cocolia to respond...

C: 然后，按你手册里说的——我们该找一处合适的露营地了，对吧？平整干燥、背风背阴，还得是地势比较高的地方……
E: Speaking of which, according to the guide, the first thing we need to do is find a good place to set up camp, right? Flat, dry, sheltered, facing the sun, high elevation...

C: 我们好像走进死胡同了……
E: We're at a dead end...

C: 啊…好吧。
E: Ah... Okay.

C: …不对。这应该是正在冬眠的雪地萝卜兔。
E: ...Actually... no. This is a hibernating snow radish rabbit.

C: …难道是贝洛伯格野人囤的食物吗？
E: ...Could it be the Belobog Caveman's food?

C: 应该只是利用了裂界的某种性质吧。你很在意它去哪里了吗？
E: It must have used some Fragmentum loophole to escape. Do you really want to take after it, Lynxy?

C: …埃里克？
E: ...Eric?

C: 啊？
E: What?

C: …我一看就知道，你心里的包袱太重了。干嘛把自己逼到那种地步？
E: ...I can tell that you have a big burden to carry. Why do you force yourself to?

C: 啊，克拉拉也是为了这些止痛剂来的。
E: Oh? I came here for these painkillers, too.

C: 你就这么怕娜塔莎？
E: Are you really that scared of Natasha?

C: 行吧，看你们好像挺着急的，这次就由着你们吧！
E: ...Fine, I will. But it better be exciting.

C: …是刮目相看才对吧！
E: ...Sit up and take notice, right?

C: 大概是为了让大家回来后能正常生活…帕斯卡才一直在维护这里吧？
E: Pascal has been looking after the town so that everyone can go back to their previous lives when they return...

C: 好！那就把目光放得现实一点儿，你们几个想知道「星核」的下落，而我们「地火」想解除下层区的封锁——
E: Maybe it is! But I think we need to set our sights on something a bit more realistic. You guys want to know the whereabouts of the Stellaron. Wildfire wants to remove the restrictions on the Underworld...

C: 希儿，大叔说的向导不是你吗？
E: So you're not the guide Mr. Oleg was talking about, Seele?

C: 认证？
E: Certification?

C: 他最后的笑容，预示着黎明将现……
E: On his face one last smile, a sign the sun always rises

C: ——哎哟喂，疼疼疼！
E: ...Ah! Owwww!

C: 绕过克拉拉和那道门，史瓦罗只会把我们识别为入侵者，更不会给我们好脸色。
E: If we circumvent Clara and the gate, Svarog will only identify us as intruders. He'll be even more likely to give us the cold shoulder.

C: 我回来了，史瓦罗先生。
E: I'm back, Mr. Svarog.

C: 而且从现如今的情况推断…他们直到最后也没能成功。
E: And it would appear that they never succeeded.

C: 很抱歉，之前一直瞒着你们……
E: ...I, um... I haven't been truthful with you...

C: 如果运气站在我们这边的话…也许明天你们就能回到上层区了。
E: If you're lucky... perhaps tomorrow you can return to the Overworld.

C: 「天黑时，守护者要如温暖的炉火，抚慰人民的心灵」。
E: At nightfall, the guardian shall be a flickering flame, comforting the people's soul.

C: 不是说奥列格老头儿不好啊——他处理那些脏活累活很有一套，只是「地火」确实需要娜塔莎这么个心思缜密的幕后黑——咳，老大，嘿嘿。
E: Not that I'm criticizing old Oleg! He's good at the heavy lifting. It's just that Wildfire needs a meticulous thinker lurking in the sha— Ahem! ...Working in the background, hehe.

C: 嘿，这样吧——你拿上这页宣传单，上面有更多有关珍奇拍品的信息。记得到时候来流浪者营地参加拍卖会，不见不散！
E: Oh, here — take this pamphlet. It has more information on all the rarities up for auction. Remember to stop by the vagrant camp! Be there or be square!

C: 请问你对玩偶大熊感兴趣吗？
E: Are you interested in the teddy bear?

C: 呃，你这加价二十五是不是有点……
E: Oh, you're adding <unbreak>25</unbreak>? Isn't that...

C: 原来你脑子这么好使？
E: You're smarter than I thought!

C: 喂，你！你手上是不是拿着地髓探针？快交出来！
E: Hey, you! Did you take the Geomarrow Probe? Hand it over, right now!

C: 赌上我们的全部吧！
E: Let's go all in!

C: …是虎克拍到了嘛？荣誉队员，虎克真的拍到探针了嘛？
E: Honorary member... Did I win the bid? Does Hook really get the probe?

C: 感谢你们父女的邀请。
E: Thank you for inviting me.

C: 虎克，你听我说……
E: It's like this, Hook...

C: 这小家伙说话怎么磕磕巴巴的啊？
E: Seems like Perkins picked up a stammer?

C: 外来…是…克拉拉的朋友…跟跟跟…跟我来……
E: Outsiders... are f—friends of Clara... Follow me...

C: 克拉拉觉得，我们还是分头…等等，那是什么声音？
E: Let's split up... Wait, what's that noise?

C: 您好，我是托比，很高兴为您服务。
E: Hello, my name is Toby. It is my honor to serve you.

C: 能被{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}夸奖，克拉拉很开心……
E: Thank you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. It makes me happy to hear that.

C: 还好有杰帕德戍卫官在，听说重案犯之前是被他抓住的。
E: At least Captain Gepard's here, they say he captured the fugitives once already.

C: 不行…这台终端下线了，从这里操控不了。
E: Nope... this terminal is offline, we can't control it from here.

C: 再找找别的吧，栈桥联结的每个平台应该都有类似的终端。
E: Look for another — every platform linked to the gear bridge should have a similar terminal.

C: 没事儿，邓恩。对了，有机会的话，我们再上台合奏一次？
E: It's not a big deal, Dunn. Y'know, if you get a chance, would you wanna get on stage with us again?

C: 你要不再好好想想…
E: Final answer...?

C: 嘿，开个玩笑。离开部队后的这些年，我跟老弟间的谈话总会刻意避开一些敏感话题。现在想想，也许是他为了顾及我的感受，一直默默地护着我呢。
E: Hehe, I'm pulling your leg. Since I left the military, my brother and I have always steered clear of certain sensitive topics... Thinking about it, perhaps he's just been looking out for my feelings, shielding me all along.

C: 看来你还对我瞒了不少事啊…比如这位突然出现在军事禁区的{M#先生}{F#小姐}——
E: Looks like you're keeping quite a lot of things from me... like this {M#gentleman}{F#lady} here who suddenly appeared in the military restricted zone...

C: 我…好像记起了些东西。
E: I... think I remember something.

C: （只是沉默地等着。）
E: (Just wait in silence.)

C: 情况我大概了解了。我过后会派铁卫去彻底勘察一下情况，顺便把库房做一次大清理。
E: Anyway I think I got the gist of the situation. I'll send some Silvermane Guards over to investigate things thoroughly — and give the warehouse a once-over at the same time.

C: 这机关好复杂啊，她们是怎么过去的？
E: This is a complex mechanism. How did they get past?

C: 我们总是避免被卷入决定世界生死存亡的浪潮…但也总有身不由己的时候。
E: We invariably avoid getting drawn into turbulence that can decide the fate of a world... but there are always times when we have no choice but to act.

C: 唔…好像不太对？
E: Uh... Is this right?

C: …不…不要……
我的信念一度无比坚定…直到一个突如其来的变量打乱了一切；另一个选择出现在我面前，那意味着颠覆旧秩序，迎接新世界的到来。
E: My conviction was once steadfast, unparalleled... until a sudden change arrived and threw everything into chaos. Another choice appeared before me — a subversion of the old order... and the welcoming of a new world.

C: …但你却错过了那些在绝境中努力生存、努力奋战的人。我看到了他们身上的光芒，在禁区前线、在下层区、在被你忽略的角落里。
E: ...But what about those simply struggling for survival, fighting for something better? I've witnessed their light on the front lines, in the Underworld... in places you have overlooked.

C: 贝洛伯格的未来也不再由守护者一个人决定。
E: Hmph. The future of Belobog is no longer just the guardian's to decide.

C: 你们对这个世界的困境一无所知…对于等待着它的结局一无所知！
E: You know nothing of the plight of this world... nothing of the wait for its final end!

C: 列车组在雅利洛-Ⅵ的探险暂时告一段落，开拓者们在星间的旅途才刚刚启程。
E: The Crew's adventure in Jarilo-VI has come to an end for the time being, but the Trailblazer's journey among the stars has just begun.

C: {NICKNAME}，丹恒——我们成功了，对吧？摆脱了可可利亚和她手里的星核，雅利洛-Ⅵ的危机就算是解除了？
E: {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng — is that mission complete? We got rid of Cocolia and the Stellaron, so the crisis on Jarilo-VI should be over now, right?

C: 合乎情理…至少极难证伪。
E: It's logical... and hard to disprove.

C: 谢谢你…谢谢你愿意留给我最后一丝尊严。
E: Thank you... thank you for leaving me with this one shred of dignity.

C: 你站在桥上，拿着计数器，看着桥洞下面，统计在规定的时间里有多少星槎通过。统计结束之后，然后把数字交给我。
E: Stand on the bridge and hold on to the counter, then look down and count how many starskiffs go past in a set time period. Once you're done, just tell me the count.

C: 门前大桥下，游过一群槎。快来快来数一数，二四六七八。
E: 'Neath the bridge near the gate... starskiffs just passed straight. Come come, count them right... One two three four, eight in sight.

C: 稍等，我还没准备好。
E: Wait, I'm not ready.

C: 是星槎超速引起的事故！赶紧去瞧瞧有没有人受伤。
E: It's a traffic incident caused by a speeding starskiff! Let's go see if anyone's hurt.

C: 敢在司辰宮外超速，区区肇事飞行士胆子不小，也太不把天舶司放在眼里了。
E: This pilot dares to speed at a place just outside the Palace of Astrum. They have no respect for the Sky-Faring Commission!

C: 我现在不会去请别人。
E: For now I'm not planning to.

C: 考虑到梅姐的智力，我对她远低于市场价格的薪资心安理得；心情差的时候，我也老是对她摆臭脸，给她立下了一个又一个的「规矩」…她也全部记下来了。
E: Considering Mei's slowness, I have no qualms about paying her well below the market average. When I'm in a bad mood, I always get mad at her and set a lot of "rules" for her, and she wrote them all down without complaint.

C: 这张药方虽然在医典记载中存在，却多加了一味来历不明的药材？
E: This prescription is recorded in the medical textbooks, but there's an extra ingredient.

C: 是嘛？让我瞧瞧。
E: Really? Let me see.

C: （别浪费时间了，开盖吧）
E: (Quit wasting time and open the flap)

C: 老夫千里迢迢赶来这鳞渊境想要一展身手，没料想，云骑军对药王秘传的镇压已经结束，老夫扑空了！
E: I've traveled distances to come to the Scalegorge Waterscape just to show off my skills, but never expected the Cloud Knights' suppression of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus to be over already! I've come in vain.

C: 唉，我真想带你走！
E: Oh, I really want to take you with me!

C: …你给我几个关键词吧。
E: ...Give me some keywords.

C: 你怎么又来了？我说过了……
E: Why are you here again? I already told you...

C: 一开始就不需要诗仙机巧。
E: You don't need a poet ingenium from the start.

C: 好悲伤，这会否定我的存在意义…但你说的没错。
E: This is difficult to hear, as it denies the meaning of my existence... Yet, you're right.

C: 静斋小姐知道主人生来带着一把同心锁，并且劝说主人扔掉……
E: Miss Jingzhai knows you've had the lock since your birth and she hopes you will throw it away...

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: …我知道你来找我打听是为什么。其他科员都以为我上当了，你肯定也不例外，什么「网络是虚拟的，你把握不住」的云云。
E: ...I know what you're trying to achieve. The others thought I was being duped, you must feel the same. "The internet is not real, it's not something you can handle," yada yada.

C: 你说对了，情感能跨越种族，但，跨越不了时间喔。谁都跨越不了时间。
E: You are right. Relationships can exist between species, but it cannot defeat the cruelty of time, no one can.

C: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
E: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

C: 你这样的热心肠好市民对我来说太过显眼了…不对，你比显眼更加耀眼，是刺眼。
E: Your good-citizen act stands out too much... No, you're a shining, glaring beacon of lawful light.

C: 这实打实就是诈骗了…
E: It's pure scam...

C: 我知道我知道，不用你来提醒我。
E: I know, I know, I don't need you to remind me of that.

C: 不多呀。
E: That's not a lot.

C: 我这人嘴不牢，别指望我。
E: My lips are pretty loose, so don't keep your hopes up.

C: 黛青帮了很多人，应该继续。
E: Daiqing has helped a lot of people, there's no harm in letting him continue.

C: （那是…太卜司的青雀，难道说她也对「美丽狐仙聊天」感兴趣…）
E: (That's... Qingque from the Divination Commission. Could she also be interested in the Foxian Beauty Chat...)

C: 我收到信息了，当时就把联系人删掉了。虽然他有说要给我退钱，但是我没有要，那些肮脏的信用点只会给我带来痛苦的回忆。
E: I got the message and deleted the contact right then and there. He did offer to give me a refund, but I didn't take it. Those dirty credits will only bring back painful memories.

C: 艾丝妲代理站长，我认为我们还是应该加强和仙舟方面的科研技术合作！
E: Acting Lead Researcher Asta, I think we should strengthen our cooperative relationship in research technology with Xianzhou!

C: 你不仅要被骗，还要被骗得很惨，这样我们才能接近真相。诈骗犯想要的只是钱而已。你们的损失，我的零花钱应该足够给你们报销…唔，绰绰有余了。
E: Not only do you have to get scammed, you have to get scammed badly enough for us to get closer to the truth. All the scammers want is money. My pocket change should be enough to reimburse you for your losses... more than enough, in fact.

C: 一、二、三、四、五…再算上之前你找到的三个。虽然顺序凌乱，但这八个图样几乎囊括了仙舟从古至今的重要神话或历史。不过，真奇怪啊……
E: One, two, three, four, five... and the three you have previously found. Although they aren't in order, the eight drawings almost cover all the significant myths or history of Xianzhou from the past to the present. Still, there's something odd...

C: （好像也没发现什么特别的地方，还是开启侦测功能看看吧？）
E: (Nothing really looks out of place, maybe I should switch on the camera's detection system?)

C: 我本可以一走了之，我本可以保持沉默，一旦将这件事告知他人，我便要承受锒铛入狱的风险。但…对你，我还是想将这一切坦陈相告。
E: I could have just walked away. I could've just kept quiet — talking to anyone would mean risking jail time. But... It's you, and I wanted to tell you about all of this.

C: 传闻她有仅凭触摸和垂泪就能治愈伤患的天分。其后更是拜入丹鼎司研习医道，所以大家也都尊称她为「衔药龙女」。
