E: The rumor has always been that she can heal the wounded merely by touching them and shedding tears. She also studied medicine in the Alchemy Commission. That's why her other title is "Healer Lady."

C: 之前龙女翘家，都由我们地衡司负责盯梢，派人将她抓住送回丹鼎司。
E: It used to be the duty of the Realm-Keeping Commission to go after her and take her back to the Alchemy Commission.

C: 接下来，该是去波月古海边吹吹风的时候了。
E: Next up, let's go to Lunarescent Depths when it's windy.

C: 但是我错了。那根本不是长生赐福，甚至连「拙劣的模仿」都称不上……
E: But I was wrong. It wasn't a blessing of immortality, not even a poor imitation...

C: 此二人身着丹鼎司服色。
E: I only see two of you in Alchemy Commission attire.

C: 她是一只小龙人。
E: She's a dragon child.

C: 不必在意，我有龙女大人帮助。
E: Don't worry! I have the Dragon Lady with me.

C: 那可真是丢人啊。
E: That was embarrassing.

C: 可是，她竟然还没有失去理智。
E: But she still has her senses.

C: 你们是药王秘传，还是十王司？我什么都没有做，你们别碰我！
E: Are you from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus or the Ten-Lords Commission? Don't touch me! I didn't do anything!

C: 治疗完成后，你们离开了流云渡，并通知云骑军收殓了那具「魔阴身士兵」的遗骸。
E: After finishing the treatment, you left Cloudford and asked the Cloud Knights to take care of the remains of the Mara-struck soldier.

C: 那可不行，我已经答应半夏了。
E: That wouldn't do — I made a promise to Banxia.

C: 以仙舟常情而论，她这样的孩子都过着快乐自在的童年。但身为空负虚衔的龙尊，白露小姐深受管束，进退全无自由可言。
E: As far as the Xianzhou is concerned, children like her enjoy a charmed and happy childhood. But as a high elder in nothing but name alone, Miss Bailu is highly restricted in her actions and has no freedom or say about her own life.

C: 但作为朋友，我仍要提醒一句。只要身负「龙尊之力」的丹恒与身负「龙尊头衔」的白露一日并立于罗浮上，持明的内部对立就不会停止…尽管这并非你们二位的错。
E: Nevertheless, as a friend, let me remind you of one thing. So long as Dan Heng and Bailu, with their respective High Elder powers and titles, both remain on the Luofu, the Vidyadhara will never cease their internal strife. This is not to say that either of you are to blame.

C: 身为龙尊，你本应带我们脱离轮回的困境，踏上全新的道路。可你却被虚名所困…自甘堕落，与那些仙舟人，甚至短生种为伍……
E: As the high elder, you should have freed us from the plight of rebirth and set foot on a brand-new path... but instead you were seduced by your reputation and abandoned yourself... You counted Xianzhou natives and even short-life species among your friends...

C: 省省力气吧。等云骑将你送入十王司，请判官一审，便知真假。
E: Save your breath. We'll know the truth once the Cloud Knights send you to the Ten-Lords Commission's Judges.

C: 没错没错…嗯？不是，这不是重点吧？
E: Exactly! ...Huh? W—Wait! That's not the point!

C: 你们知道，在宇宙中有无数相似却又相异的世界。而在这些世界中，也有无数相似却又迥然相异的人。
E: As you know, there are infinite worlds in this universe that can be similar yet different from each other in various ways. The same is true of the people on those worlds.

C: 罗刹从一家小客栈中走出来。身上没有携带什么繁重的行李。
E: Luocha walked out of a small inn without any heavy luggage.

C: 不不，这和他绝对不是一回事。
E: No, no, this is completely different.

C: 原来她请了人替她看店啊…但是这个看店的人在哪里？怎么像是也不在店里的样子？
E: So she asked someone to look after the shop for her... but where are they? Looks like they must have left too.

C: 你这是侦探故事还是武侠？
E: Is this a detective story or an action movie?

C: （嗯…勉强也算说得通。）
E: (Hmm... I suppose that makes some kind of sense.)

C: 你看这个，苏打豆汁，一人来一罐。
E: Here. Mung bean soda. One can each.

C: 这样劳烦二位，真的合适吗？
E: Is it really okay to bother you two again?

C: {NICKNAME}，别开玩笑了。都说了是个挂饰。
E: Come on {NICKNAME}, are you kidding? It's a trinket, remember?

C: 你真的很像采翼。所以这些年来，你越是优秀，我就越是恐惧。我知道你早就准备好了…但是，我一直都还没准备好……
E: ...You are so very similar to Caiyi. The more outstanding you became over the years, the more fearful I turned. I've known for a long time you were ready... but I was not...

C: 我知道你一定会来的，{NICKNAME}。
E: Hm, I knew you would come, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我留下来帮你。
E: I'll stay and help you.

C: 谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I'm grateful. On the Xianzhou... you're the only one I can turn to.

C: 但我可以发誓：{NICKNAME}。我一定会遵守规则，「一真一假」。
E: But I give you my word, {NICKNAME}: I will abide by the rule of one truth, one lie.

C: 沿路找找，也许还有其他的幸存者。
E: Let's keep searching, there might be other survivors.

C: 我们呼叫港口接驳，起初没有回应，突然有人替我们打开了玉界门。进入仙舟后，我们见不到人影，只好一路寻找过来。
E: We called for port transfer and got no response, but then someone opened the Jade Gate for us. When we arrived there was no one to be found, so we started to make our own way through.

C: 杨叔，这儿有个人受伤了……
E: Mr. Yang, someone's hurt...

C: 又有人把路给堵上了？
E: Someone blocked our way again?

C: 看来你重生后也想寻回自己前世的经历么？
E: You seem to be interested in learning about your past life...

C: 我什么都记不得了。
E: I can't remember anything.

C: …像是回到了你教我剑术的第一日。
E: ...almost as if... we've returned to my first sword lesson.

C: 收到一封给你的信…
E: There's a letter for you...

C: 苦于短生的顽疾，向往永生的良药，这是智慧生灵的常情。要断绝这些念想，就像要杀死一位星神，荒诞不堪，几近笑谈。
E: It is natural for short-life-species to yearn for immortality — that is expected of any intelligent life form. To want to eliminate these thoughts would be equivalent to killing an Aeon. Such a goal is so impossible as to be laughable, to be honest.

C: 请讲人话。
E: Please speak in human.

C: 关于刃的事情…
E: About Blade...

C: 怎么还有被困着的百姓？这里的云骑办事不力啊。
E: Civilians are still getting attacked? Where are the Cloud Knights?

C: 我随一艘商船来到这儿。最近过去几个老朋友的影子，一个个在我脑袋里打转。我想和老朋友们碰上一面，重温旧时光……
E: I came with a merchant ship. The shadows of old friends have returned to my thoughts of late... I came to reunite with them and relive old times...

C: 云骑军中的武艺各有传承。小弟弟，你的剑术又是谁指点的？
E: The Cloud Knights have many martial arts traditions. Who was it that instructed you in swordplay, young man?

C: 不渴望。
E: No, I don't.

C: 说的好！谁会拒绝永远活下去的机会呢？
E: Excellent! Who would turn down the opportunity to live forever?

C: 那帮人根本就是一群疯子，你之后和他们接触可要小心啊……
E: Those people are out of their minds — watch your step next time you're around them...

C: 而药王秘传的职责，就是斩断这种无端的恐惧，让仙舟人重新回到慈怀药王温柔的怀抱之中。
E: The mission of the Disciples is to strike down this groundless fear, so that the people of the Xianzhou can return to the warm embrace of Merciful Medicus.

C: 可恨啊…妖弓祸祖让这群可悲的凡人变得视死如归，为了潜入药王秘传，甚至不惜用性命来一出苦肉计……
E: Detestable... The Devilish Archer Author allows these pitiful mortals to face death without fear — self-sacrifice is their way of fooling us into opening our doors.

C: 你记得住吗？
E: Will you be able to remember it all?

C: 但你此刻经历的一切也必将被人以金石刻下。
E: ...but your experiences now will be remembered forever.

C: 给什么呢？在仙舟上买的伴手礼？
E: Hmm, what should it be? How about a Xianzhou souvenir?

C: 呼…真不容易，现在终于只剩下一个选项了！
E: Phew, finally... After all that, there's just one option left!

C: 你我都不再孤独了。
E: We're not alone anymore.

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 他们当时…把封住我的冰块就放在了如今我住的客厢里。
E: They... set the ice down in one of the passenger cars — it ended up being my room.

C: 不用担心帕！帕姆都说了，星穹列车是欢迎每个人的帕！
E: Stop worrying so much! Pom-Pom will say it again: The Astral Express welcomes everyone!

C: 梦中之事不可尽信，更何况是他人的梦境。如有任何想要确认的信息…还是在清醒的现实中完成吧。祝您做个好梦。
E: Things in our dreams cannot be trusted, let alone in someone else's dreamscape. If there's any information that you'd like to confirm... please do so by the cold hard light of reality. Sweet dreams.

C: 谢谢老板。
E: Thank you.

C: 身高没一丁点儿，手里的家伙事倒还挺吓人！
E: Yeah, she wasn't big at all, but that weapon of hers was pretty intimidating!

C: 他想到用岁阳吸取情感…
E: So, he thought of using heliobi to absorb emotions...

C: 有没有可能是银枝偷了剑？
E: Could it be that Argenti stole the sword?

C: 「米卡•奇瓦沙」帮助过卡勒瓦拉先祖们创下基业，它绝不是什么「魔剑」！
E: The point is that the Miekka Kivessä did help the ancestors of Kalevala build a strong foundation! It's definitely not a "cursed sword"!

C: 没想到这把剑有这样一段过去。
E: I had no idea that this sword had such a past.

C: 不，我没能做到。身为一柄武器，我只会成为下一场争端的开始。
E: No, I did not. I am a weapon, and I only became the cause of more conflicts.

C: 我仔细观察了剑匣的锁扣，它没有任何被暴力撬动、破坏的痕迹。
E: I carefully examined the lock of the sword case, and there were no signs of tampering or damage.

C: 受害者的身份是？
E: Who was the victim?

C: 不对，凶手只能有一个人！三个人都是凶手还算什么疑案…稍等…稍等……
E: No, there can only be one murderer! It's not an unsolved mystery if there are three murderers... Hang on... Wait...

C: 佐罗是花火大人部下悍将，在对抗山贼时，奋勇抗敌，<color=#dbc291ff>右手不幸被斩断了</color>。现在正在练习用左手写字和拿筷子，真是可怜啊。
E: Lefton is one of Miss Sparkle's chief lieutenants, whose <color=#dbc291ff>right hand was unfortunately severed</color> while he was valiantly fighting off the Annihilation Gang. He's now learning how to write and hold a fork with his left hand — how tough that must be!

C: 看来没有别的线索了，我们回案发现场吧。
E: Doesn't look like there are any more clues. Let's head back to the crime scene.

C: 好一个「不想扰乱侦查」，这花火真是个遵纪守法的好公民——那她怎么不去自首呢？
E: She doesn't want to "distract" our investigation? What a law-abiding citizen this Sparkle is — why doesn't she surrender, then?

C: …没错，正是如此！
E: ...That's right. That's the one!

C: 偶尔也要来点轻松的嘛！来吧，亲爱的，快给出你的回答吧~
E: Sometimes it's nice to take things easy! Come on dear, give me your answer then~

C: 遗憾，遗憾。亲爱的，你真的只差一点点点点就答对了。可惜，正确答案是——
E: What a pity. Such a pity. My dear, you were so-so-so-SO close to the right answer. Unfortunately, the right answer is...

C: 请黑天鹅大人开始调查吧！案发现场留下了许多线索，一定能帮助您锁定真凶。
E: Please begin your investigation, Lady Black Swan! There are lots of clues at the crime scene that are sure to help you apprehend the real culprit.

C: 花火大人没想过阿佑会反抗自己，便随他来到试衣间。阿佑踩在板凳上，如平常那样为花火大人试戴领带……
E: Miss Sparkle never thought Wright would retaliate against her, so she went back with him to the changing room. As Wright stood atop the stool and helped Miss Sparkle try on the tie as usual...

C: 不，我说这位青雀。现在可是上班时间啊，居然能见到你。
E: No, I meant Qingque. I didn't expect to see her here during work hours.

C: 是啊。好清静如那位大人，竟然也会准许外人登堂入室。
E: Yes! The master diviner rarely allows outsiders — she likes her peace and quiet.

C: 多得你们，罗浮才能顺利将卡芙卡归案，容我道声感谢。公司为「星核猎手」设下悬赏以来，还从未有过抓捕纪录，呵呵，今日便由仙舟先得一筹。
E: Thanks to you, the Luofu has successfully brought Kafka to justice... I am truly grateful — there hadn't been a single Stellaron Hunter arrest since the Interastral Peace Corporation issued their bounty. Hehe, this is a victory for the Xianzhou.

C: 完事收工，下一个。
E: Done, next.

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 嗨，{NICKNAME}。
E: Hi, {NICKNAME}.

C: 小女子希望接下来的路顺顺利利，你可要保护好我啊。
E: I just hope everything is smooth-sailing from now on — please look after me.

C: 我当时只听他嘴里喊着「完啦！炉子完啦！」。等咱们几个缓过气来，人早没影了。
E: I just heard him shout "It's gone! We lost the furnace!" By the time we realized, he'd already vanished.

C: 你长这么大见过盆栽走路？见过盆栽把地板凿个对穿？
E: Have you ever seen an ornamental tree move? Have you ever seen one bore through the ground like that?

C: 不过这已是一条线索了。多谢你，{NICKNAME}，务必收下这些谢礼。
E: Still, this is a clue we can follow. Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Please accept these gifts for your efforts.

C: 你到底是谁？警告你别多管闲事啊，老子已经好几天没动过手咯。
E: Who do you think you are? Keep your nose out of this — I beat people up all the time.

C: 被欺负了，或是摔伤了，只能哭着求丹鼎司的医士为我治伤。一来二去，我自己也走上了这条道路。
E: If I was ever injured by bullies or after a fall, I'd run crying to the healers at the Alchemy Commission and ask them to heal me. I suppose that's why I followed in their footsteps — to pay a little kindness forward.

C: 这样的生活，对长生种而言还要持续将近千年的时光。她必须学会靠自己挨过去，而不是妄想任何人的救助。
E: As a long-life species, she can expect life to continue like this for nearly a thousand years. She must learn to depend upon herself rather than just foolishly waiting around for the next hero to swoop in and save her.

C: 长生种的身体状况是从出生开始就注定的。相貌妍丑，心智贤愚，身材高矮…这些全都自出生的那一刻被永久固定在了血肉基因之中。
E: For long-life species, these things are permanent. Whether we are beautiful or ugly, tall or short, wise or foolish — all of it is encoded into our flesh from the moment we are born.

C: 在下有一件礼物想要送给你。但这还需要我准备一段时间…等到谢礼准备好，在下会再联系你的。
E: I have a gift for you, but I'll need a little time to prepare it... I'll contact you once it's ready to collect.

C: 这阵子你奔波劳苦，我想为你提供一些有帮助的东西。
E: You've been running so many errands lately — I'd like for you to take some useful items away with you.

C: 虽说早就料到丹鼎司内有内鬼，但没想到是如此身居高位者……
E: I had a suspicion that there might be a spy in the Alchemy Commission, but I never expected it to be someone so high up in the organization...

C: （这个净砚真是自说自话…回去和那几个「放生帮」聊聊吧，不知道他们是否决定好给我准备什么试炼了。）
E: (Jingyan is literally talking to herself... I should probably go back and talk to the members of the Unshackled. I wonder whether they have decided on the kind of trial to put me through.)

C: 给钱我就能帮你。
E: Pay me, and I'll help you.

C: 触怒了会怎么样？
E: What will happen if I enrage the Aeon?

C: {F#丫头}{M#小子}，你可别走远。你打死了我的狼，不管入不入会，都要贡献等量的功德善举，才能让我不计较这事儿。
E: Don't go too far away, {F#girl}{M#boy}. Now that you have killed my wolves, you must contribute the same amount of merits whether you join our group or not. That's the only way I'll forgive you.

C: 也许药师真的在意…
E: Perhaps Yaoshi really does care about what humans do...

C: 我倒是没受伤，但那几个机械宝宝走进水后，在鳞渊境到处开花…持明的人把我扭送到地衡司公廨，说我…在持明族圣地乱放烟花爆竹！
E: I'm fine. But the mechanical darlings started blowing up everywhere in Scalegorge Waterscape once water seeped into the machinery... The Vidyadhara dragged me to the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery... and accused me of setting off fireworks illegally in the holy place of the Vidyadhara!

C: 原来…是这么一回事啊…那三个人都被她「放生」了？这真是…莫名其妙……
E: I see... She "unshackled" the three of them? This is... baffling...

C: 呵呵，你看，我说过我会帮你的。前面就有出路，你只管离开便是。
E: Hehe, see? I told you I'd help you. The way out is straight ahead. Just keep going...

C: 就说咱们被恶灵附身了…
E: We could say that evil spirits possessed us...

C: 这位判官大人真是通情达理，谢谢啦。我发誓，问完就走。
E: Th—That's very reasonable, Your Honor! Thank you. I promise we'll leave after asking our questions.

C: 桂乃芬？你在哪儿？藿藿，跟紧脚步——
E: Guinaifen? Where are you? Huohuo, stay close...

C: 嗨呀，真是过瘾，人类的情绪就像一桌美餐。嘿嘿，品尝悲伤的泪水就像痛饮一瓮美酒~
E: Ahhhh, what a feast! Human emotions are simply delicious. Your sorrowful tears are like bottles of potent wine~

C: 我打小就胆子小脸皮薄…从被尾巴附身起，这辈子就像掉进噩梦里一样…
E: I've always been shy and scared... My life's been a nightmare ever since Tail possessed me...

C: 幻境想要拖延我们，但它不可能真的无穷无尽地将自己的边界藏起来。我觉得，这里一定还存在第四面镜子。
E: The illusion wants to keep us in, but it can't possibly keep expanding its borders forever. I think there's gotta be a fourth mirror somewhere.

C: 要是我也在绥园里就能帮上你们了，说不定小桂子也不必住进医馆…哎。
E: I would've been able to help you if I were there too... and maybe Little Gui wouldn't have ended up in the apothecary... *sigh*

C: 欢迎光…欸？您是刚刚那位客人吗……
E: Welco... Eh? Are you the customer from just now...?

C: 我已经找到了最后的「解决办法」…请别担心，一切都会变好的。
E: I've already found my final solution... Don't worry. Everything will turn out fine.

C: …好，如果这样能让您放心的话——请把它给我吧。
E: ...Okay, if it will make you happy. Please give it to me.

C: 它对你很重要吗？
E: Is it very important to you?

C: 虽然有些冒犯，但现在也只能去她的内心看看了！必要的时候，我们得拉她一把！
E: It may be a bit intrusive, but the only thing we can do is to take a look inside her heart! We have to give her a hand if necessary!

C: 该给它取个什么名字呢……
E: What name should I give it...

C: 老师说我可以走这条路……
E: My teacher said I could walk this path...

C: 哎呀，没关系的…你还这么年轻，做事张扬点也很正常。你以为这里的前辈不想走捷径吗？条件不允许而已……
E: C'mon, it's fine... You're still young, and it's perfectly normal to be showy about these things. You think the more senior staff don't think about using relationships to skip ahead? They just don't have the means for it...

C: 扔掉唱片。
E: Throw away the record.

C: …这是我生命里最幸福的一天。
E: ...This is the happiest day of my life.

C: 大家一定会爱上你的歌声！
E: Everyone will love your singing!

C: <size=28>蒂娜！！</size>
E: <size=28>Tina!!</size>

C: 聚精会神地看一会儿。
E: Watch attentively for a while.

C: 说吧，我不会告诉别人的。
E: Tell me, I will not tell anyone.

C: 当然，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。您不必给自己压力，毕竟这件事与您并无干系。
E: Of course, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. Please do not put any pressure on yourself, as this matter has nothing to do with you, after all.

C: 你根本就不明白，什么才是美好的事物！你们没有一个人明白，只有他……
E: You don't understand what makes something beautiful! None of you understand, only he does...

C: …真的没什么，丽莎。不用为我操心。
E: ...I'm honestly fine, Lisa. Don't worry about me.

C: 迪恩先生，请您别开玩笑了。航班就要起飞了，大家都在等您——总是这么任性的话……
E: Mr. Dean, please don't make jokes like this. The flight is about to take off and everyone is waiting for you... If you keep acting like this...

C: 你正在消失…
E: You are disappearing...

C: 请您注意看，这里——
E: Please, look over here...

C: 如果是这样，还请致电白日梦酒店的服务投诉专线……
E: If that is the case, please call The Reverie's dedicated complaint hotline...

C: 老奥帝又发出一阵招牌的笑声，随后离开了酒店大堂……
E: Old Oti lets loose his trademark laughter, and departs the hotel lobby...

C: 今天到底怎么回事？怪事一桩接着一桩……
E: Did someone put something in the water today!? It's just one weird thing after the next...

C: 感谢，感谢！不愧是白日梦酒店，你们的服务效率比想象中还高。
E: Thank you, thank you! They're right about The Reverie. Your service is even better than expected.

C: ——也请为我办理续房手续，我的挚友。
E: ...And please extend my room for the next few days too, dear friend.

C: 我以前从来没遇见过真正的「骑士」，要是只听外面的传言，我甚至会觉得他们是一群热衷于哗众取宠的怪人。果然，凡事还是得眼见为实才行，是吧？
E: I'd never met a real knight before, and if I just listened to the rumors, I'd think they were just a bunch of sensationalist weirdos. Turns out, seeing is believing — right?

C: 哼哼哼…「工作习惯」，很重要吗？别忘了，战略投资部的部门文化之一就是「结果至上」——
E: Hmmm... "Work habits." Are they really that important? Don't forget, the Strategic Investment Department's work culture is "Results come first"...

C: 翡翠将三人的房卡交给了你……
E: Jade gives you the three room cards...

C: （应该都准备妥当了…赶紧开始工作吧！我倒要看看这酒店里住的都是些什么人。）
E: (Everything should be pretty much ready... Let's get to work, then! I wanna see what kind of guests stay in this hotel.)

C: 收割他们的脚踝！打碎他们的膝盖！
E: Slash their ankles! Crush their knees!

C: 跟我走！今儿个我就要为民除害，给这帮危险分子留个教训！
E: Follow me! I'm going to do the world a favor by teaching these dangerous criminals a lesson!

C: …虔信者们，冷静！
E: ...Everyone, please stay calm!

C: 「再给我两份葱…」
E: "Two more portions of scallions, please..."

C: （七个人，凑不齐两桌呢…哎，列车组什么时候能有新成员加入呢？）
E: (But that's only seven of us... one person short for two games... When will we ever find a new Crew member?)

C: （出发吧…去梦境酒店把青雀捞出来！）
E: (Let's go... Time to go rescue Qingque from the hotel!)

C: 那两位将军肯定不能一直留在罗浮的嘛！
E: But the two generals cannot possibly stay on the Luofu forever!

C: 完全没有注意到，以为你还在…
E: I didn't notice at all. I thought you were still here...

C: 诶？
E: ...Hmm?

C: 这件事沸沸扬扬的，本座自然是知道的。不过就像是仙舟民众一样，得知整件事都处在神策府、十王司的控制之中，结果上算得是振奋人心。
E: News about his escape has spread like wildfire. Of course, I am aware. Although, much like the citizens of the Xianzhou, I had nothing but joy when I learned that the entire matter was under the control of the Seat of Divine Foresight and the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 我拒绝，谁爱做谁做。
E: I'm out. Ask someone else to help.

C: 唉，老师的手稿本应该在仙舟历史中留下浓墨重彩的一笔…我却只顾着逃出生天，没能将手稿带出来，我真是，千～古～罪～人～
E: *sigh* My master's manuscript should have gone down in Xianzhou's history... but I was too busy saving my own skin and didn't take it out with me. I really am utt~er~ly~ use~less~

C: …哎，你说的对，我进去找找吧。
E: Alright. I'll go in there.

C: 不过，就算是同一个师傅教出来的徒弟，水平也参差不齐。
E: But even though we studied under the same master, we aren't exactly on the same level.

C: 每天乘坐它在航道里穿梭往返，注视着航道两侧的建筑匆匆后退，百年如一日。
E: I crisscrossed the skies on skiffs every day, watching the buildings on either side rush by, just like they have for a hundred years.

C: 我欠师傅的实在是太多了，我这人天性懒惰，做事情一拖再拖。要是我能早一点儿出师，现在也不会在这里空留遗憾。
E: I owe my master so much. I'm lazy by nature and always put things off. If I could've graduated earlier, I wouldn't be left here with my regrets like I am now.

C: 完成「损坏的手稿」，我真的做得到吗？
E: Complete the damaged manuscript? Can I really do it?

C: 你一个匠人，没参与过制造吗？
E: You're a craftsman, but you haven't seen how it's manufactured?

C: 铖杰开始有干劲了吗？
E: Has Chengjie started to get motivated yet?

C: 迴星港里的穹仪也是运用了相近的技术原理。
E: The Meridian Pin at Stargazer Navalia also operates using similar tech principles.

C: 感觉我也会生产星槎了呢。
E: One does not simply sail without a starskiff.

C: 是不是没有能源了？
E: Is it out of energy?

C: …你是担心被他人盗取设计。
E: ...You're worried that someone might steal the design.

C: 毕竟这是莱恩老师最后的设计了，我比较谨慎。
E: After all, this is the last design of Master Ryan. I'm very cautious about it.

C: 很简单，我们做个测试。小娃儿，你先把武器拿好。
E: I can show you by performing a test. Please hold the weapon first.

C: 要是复活莱恩老师就好了。
E: If only Master Ryan could be brought back to life.

C: 好啊，我得先说好，这么麻烦的事儿，两位得自己努力争取争取，我能帮的忙都已帮上啦。
E: Sure. By the way, you two must rely on yourselves to do all the heavy lifting. I have done everything I can to help.

C: 哼。孽物凶险，留手不杀反受其害。死人也是能提供证据的。
E: Hmph, if I didn't kill them, I would have been harmed by them. I can collect evidence from them even though they are dead.

C: 你算错了！我只是来闲逛的。
E: Your divination was wrong! I'm just here to check out the place.

C: 铖杰师傅带来的金人偃偶缓缓站起身。
E: Chengjie's aurumaton puppet slowly stands up.

C: 可是，今后…今后我该怎么办呢？
E: But, wh—what should I do in the future?

C: 不能凭附在雪衣大人身上吗？
E: Can't his master's soul be attached to your body, Madam Xueyi?

C: 下次再见，伙计们——
E: See you next time, everyone...

C: ——「等着见识火花四溅吧！」
E: ...there are sparks yet to fly!

C: 记得告诉我进展。
E: Keep me updated.

C: 哈哈哈，这就认输了？刚才的气势跑哪去了？
E: Hahaha, you're admitting defeat? What happened to all that bravado you had a few moments ago?

C: …嚯，厉害！谢谢你替我省去了一大段自我介绍。
E: ...Wow, impressive! Thank you for saving me the self-introduction.

C: 卢卡，你……
E: Luka, you—

C: 咳…算了。你量力而为。
E: *sigh* Never mind. Just don't go overboard.

C: 一无所知，这才是天才会出手的领域。科学要做的就是从无知的帷幕上挑破一个孔……
E: That's why geniuses are interested in that field. Science is all about uncovering the unknown...

C: 我们俩来自匹诺康尼，也许你听说过这个地方？这次来到仙舟，是为了采集一些有趣的梦境素材。
E: We're from Penacony, maybe you've heard of it? We came to this ship to gather interesting materials for making dream bubbles.

C: 我们问了啊！但本地人都回答说：「罗浮的景点有啥好去的，都没意思！」
E: We did! But the locals were all like, "Come on, there's nothing worth seeing on the Luofu! It's so boring here!"

C: 这是个不错的主意。金人巷的人间烟火气，在「盛会之星」上难得一见。
E: Hmm, good idea. The everyday vibe of the Aurum Alley is a rare find on the Planet of Festivities.

C: 喂！不要乱给别人出这种会被抓起来的馊主意啦！
E: Hey! That's a terrible idea! You'll get them arrested!

C: 闲话不提，该办正事了，将军要我接各位去司辰宫。
E: Well, enough with the chitchat. The general wants me to take you to the Palace of Astrum.

C: …罗浮剑士，不过如此。
E: ...Heh, so much for Luofu swordmasters.

C: 那是自然。为了彰显武德，云骑所设的擂台向来是不禁外人挑战的。
E: Of course. To honor martial arts, the Cloud Knights' ring is always open to outsiders.

C: 不要，我还想多活一阵子。
E: Nah, I'd like to live a little longer.

C: 那我不打扰你了。
E: Alright, I'll leave you to it then.

C: 早在三十年前，妾身的授业恩师，也是这罗浮丹鼎司的司鼎，已察觉了此间涌动的暗流，意欲正本清源。
E: Thirty years ago, my mentor served as Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master. She recognized the emerging undercurrents and sought to cleanse the source of the disturbance.

C: 在接触之前，我想先摒弃成见，观对方「所成之势」再下判断。这所成之势嘛，自然就是街上云骑的风貌，人们的风评，还有与他亲近之人的行止。
E: Before getting in touch with General Jing Yuan, I want to put aside my assumptions and see his "momentum." That includes the overall bearing of the Cloud Knights on the street, what people are saying, and how those close to him behave.

C: 元帅的命令？需要回避吗？
E: Since it's the Marshal's orders, do we need to step aside?

C: 哪有这样的道理？
E: How does that make sense?

C: 为什么不选丹恒？
E: Why don't you choose Dan Heng?

C: 这样一来，我就不用担心你每次射中我屁股了。
E: At least that way, I won't have to worry about you accidentally shooting me in the butt all the time.

C: 我一向射得很准！
E: Hey, I've never missed my target!

C: 将军不必介怀。无论如何，我都会留下作为列车的人证，接受询问。
E: Don't worry, General. No matter what happens, I'm prepared to stay here as the Express' witness, and answer any questions.

C: 这些都是我今天不得不踏入罗浮仙舟的原因。
E: It is for these reasons that I have come here to the Luofu today.

C: 肢体扭曲的步离遗骸，这头巨狼肢体似曾被牢牢捆锁。
E: These are the remains of a borisin. Judging from their twisted limbs, it is likely that this massive wolf once had their limbs restrained.

C: 啊…哈哈…好的……
E: Ah... haha... okay...

C: 下次吧，我还有点别的事要办。
E: Maybe next time. I've got something else to do now.

C: 是啦，叔叔，咱们是坐星槎呼一下飞过来的喔！
E: Yeah, we flew here on a starskiff! Like... woosh!

C: 难道是因为猎手中还有一位将军的{RUBY_B#刃}旧相识{RUBY_E#}？
E: Could it be because one of the Stellaron Hunters is actually {RUBY_B#Blade}an old acquaintance{RUBY_E#} of General Jing Yuan?

C: 严格说来，幽囚狱同处于多个洞天之中，古海不过是与其交叠的一处。客人，请入内。
E: Well, technically, The Shackling Prison is spread out across multiple delves, and the ancient sea is just where they overlap. Please come on in, dear guests.

C: 关押呼雷的牢笼之门，如有实质的虚空黑暗中透出令人胆寒的死寂气息。
E: In the suffocating, empty darkness, an air of deathly stillness lingered about the gates of the cage that once confined Hoolay, chilling all who gaze upon it to the marrow.

C: 可惜，这七百年来他们全都失望而归了，那是头杀不死的恶兽。
E: Unfortunately, for the past seven centuries, they've had to return disappointed, because this beast simply can't be killed.

C: 此行的所有兄弟都已做好了牺牲的准备——只要能让您离开这儿。
E: Every one of my crew is ready to lay down their lives if it means setting you free.

C: 可是，如果这些步离人能伪装成狐人…我们又该从哪儿开始将这些家伙挖出来呢？
E: However, if these borisin can disguise themselves as foxians... where do we even begin to search for them?

C: 说得不错。
E: Well said.

C: 想来这是同一种东西吧？
E: They're one and the same, aren't they?

C: …这名死去的云骑身上也有药气？
E: ...Did this Cloud Knight also take the medicine?

C: 听说一直以来博识学会都在研究长生种的生物特性，想获取能用于医疗或战斗的成果。只是碍于和联盟的表面关系，不敢做得太过出格。
E: I heard the Intelligentsia Guild has been researching the biological properties of long-life species, hoping to make medical or combat-related discoveries. However, they haven't dared to cross any lines due to their so-called "relationship" with the Alliance.

C: 先知告诉我们，曜青的狐人将军会借罗浮演武仪典召开的时机将您带走，这是我们混入此处，将您从牢狱里解放出来的绝佳时机——一切正如她所说！我们也做到了！
E: And the Prophet told us that the foxian general of the Yaoqing would take you to her ship during the Luofu's Wardance, and that it would be our best chance to infiltrate and free you from your prison. And just as she said, we did it!

C: 大人让你去港口瞧瞧，贱畜，你还在这儿磨蹭什么？
E: Lord Hoolay ordered you to go to the port and take a look, you lowly beast. Why are you still lingering here?

C: 能问下为什么吗？
E: May I ask why?

C: 你一直在监视着我，如果我向谁求救，你的人就会杀了他们…我说的没错吧，呼雷？
E: You were closely watching me, weren't you? And if I sought help from anyone, your people would kill them... Was that your plan, Hoolay?

C: 想好了目标的话，咱们就去探探底。
E: If you have a target in mind, let's go investigate.

C: …迴星港是罗浮仙舟的造船港，如果天舶司要封锁港口，肯定是有公文通知吧？
E: ...But Stargazer Navalia is the shipbuilding port of the Xianzhou Luofu. If the Sky-Faring Commission called for a lockdown, there should be official documents proving it, right?

C: …哦，合情合理，所以你们现在是排查步离人？
E: ...That makes perfect sense. So, you're now investigating the borisin?

C: 而那两位职员却以「迴星港封锁」为理由劝我们离开，这与云骑军原定的计划相悖。
E: But on the contrary, those staff members used "Stargazer Navalia is on lockdown" as an excuse to persuade us to leave. This contradicts the Cloud Knights' plans.

C: …三招两式就能被朱明的剑士打趴下！
E: ...Just a few swift strikes and the Zhuming swordmaster will have him on his knees!

C: 我是彦卿骁卫座下弟子…这么一想也算是景元将军的徒孙。如此说来，我来头还挺不小的！
E: I am a disciple of Lieutenant Yanqing... That means that I'm also technically a grand-disciple of General Jing Yuan. When you put it like that, I'm actually a pretty big deal!

C: 看来这就是选手大厅了。
E: So, this is the contestant hall.

C: 是啊，像这样的大场合里，一般少不了咱们这样的人。对了，趁着比赛开始，我能问些自己感兴趣的问题吗？
E: That's right! A big event like this just can't go ahead without a few of us running around. Since the competition is getting started, could I ask you some questions that are on my mind?

C: 这就是呼雷的「宣战」。他的血…能让狐人迅速扭曲变形、陷入疯狂，他将自己的血交给了手下，想在罗浮各处散布，掀起恐慌！
E: This is Hoolay's "declaration of war." His blood... It can cause foxians to rapidly transform and lose their minds. He has passed his blood to his minions and is planning to spread it across the Luofu and stir up panic!

C: 貊泽的信号就在附近。但是在一刻之前，他断开了联系……
E: Moze's signal is nearby, but we lost contact just a moment ago...

C: 你的嘴皮子可比爪子锋利多了。
E: Your tongue is sharper than your claws.

C: 你来了啊，飞霄！
E: There you are, Feixiao!

C: 还没认清现实吗？从现身这一刻起，你们只有死路一条。
E: Have you still not realized your situation? From the moment you appeared, you were doomed to one fate.

C: 竞锋舰
E: Skysplitter

C: 眼下我们还没有注意到异常情况。
E: We haven't noticed anything out of the ordinary yet.

C: 只要将登舰观众与选手全数替换成云骑士兵，高悬在空中的那座竞锋舰，将会成为绝佳的猎狼战场。
E: All we need to do is swap all the spectators and contestants aboard the ship with Cloud Knight soldiers, and the Skysplitter, soaring high above, will become the ultimate battleground for our hunt.

C: …为「曜青」带来胜利。
E: ...bring victory to the Yaoqing.

C: 再这样下去，我可要杀光他们啦！
E: If this goes on, they'll all be dead by the time she arrives!

C: 没有人能永远活着，椒丘…这一次，我要食言了。
E: No one can live forever, Jiaoqiu... This time, I must break my promise.

C: 无论你对步离人怀有多么深重的仇恨，也无论你和我之间怀有多少敌意。我都会为你展示一条你从未设想的道路，因为你做出了选择——
E: No matter how deep the hatred you bear for the borisin... No matter how much we may consider each other enemies... I will still show you this path that you never imagined was available to you, because you made a choice...

C: 我跑不动了…萨兰，他们追上来了吗？
E: I can't run anymore... Saran, are they catching up?

C: …论武力将军确实更胜一筹。但若是将军以为能就此对我们龙师进行一番清算，倒也不必想得如此美好。
E: ...In terms of martial prowess, you indeed have the upper hand. But if you're under the impression that this advantage can be used to settle the score with us Preceptors, that's quite an overestimation.

C: 少废话。有个叫埃夫姆的音乐人，来自克里姆特立宪国，你见过吗？
E: Cut the chit-chat. There's a musician by the name of Ephraim, from the Klimt Republic. You've seen him before?

C: 哪里的话，多谢。
E: It's all good, thank you.

C: 好名字，朕很欣赏。
E: A fine name, I admire that.

C: 灰骑士，朕看得出你颇有些手腕，能不能帮朕整治一下这些刁民？
E: Gray Knight, I am aware of your skills in combat. Will you help me rehabilitate these ruffians?

C: 三人留下简短的告别，转眼间便离开了梦境。你知道，这将是你和蒂索克二世的永别。
E: The three of you say your goodbyes and leave the Dreamscape. You know that this is your final farewell to Tizocic II.

C: 你该庆幸螺丝咕姆先生在你身边，逐梦客。否则……
E: Count yourself lucky that Mr. Screwllum is with you, Dreamchaser. Otherwise...

C: 莫伊拉离开了一会儿——再回来时，她的脸上已经没有了此前的锐气。
E: Moira is gone for a while. When she returns, her facial expression has softened a great deal.

C: 这么大个人，藏哪了呢…
E: Where else can he hide?

C: 推导：卡尔德隆•查德威克作为短生种族，他以肉身状态存活至今的概率无限趋近于零。时至今日，任何人为增寿的技术都无法将普通人类的自然寿命延长两个琥珀纪。
E: Deduction: The likelihood of Calderon Chadwick, as a short-life species, remaining alive to this day in a corporeal state is close to zero. As of now, no longevity technology has been able to extend the natural lifespan of a normal human by two Amber Eras.

C: 现在…按下它吧。
E: Now... Do it.

C: <size=28>「虚数坍缩脉冲」——引爆。</size>
E: <size=28>Imaginary Implosion Pulse — detonate.</size>

C: 它也许已经在这个房间里静躺了上百年的时光。
E: It may have been left untouched in this room for centuries.

C: 老人面前的书桌上叠放着几封未寄出的信件。
E: The desk before the old man is stacked with unsent letters.

C: 这么说，他的心愿完成了？
E: Does this mean that his last wishes are fulfilled?

C: 当时的匹诺康尼刚刚完成对梦境的开辟，各大家系也还未完全投入同谐的怀抱，无数机遇潜藏在梦中待人挖掘，因此无数逐梦客蜂拥而至，渴望财富与成功。
E: During that time, Penacony had only just completed the Dreamscape's development. The lineages weren't completely given unto Harmony's embrace yet, and countless opportunities buried in dreams were waiting to be unearthed, resulting in numerous Dreamchasers gathering like moths to a flame, thirsting for fortune and success.

C: 小鸟愣住了，你第一次从它那张折纸的面孔上读出类似「茫然」的情绪。
E: The bird is dumbfounded. It is the first time you see the definition of "bewilderment" written all over that origami face.

C: 哎！你们怎么一个个都站他那边！
E: Bah! Why're you all taking his side!

C: …怎么，又要把我抓起来吗？
E: ...What, are you going to arrest me again?

C: （放任奥尔拉离开）
E: (Let Orla leave)

C: 你可不要怪我到处乱讲——筑梦师奥尔拉因为害怕挨揍而哭鼻子！还不止一次！
E: Don't blame me for spreading nonsense — Dreamweaver Orla cries because he's afraid of getting punched! And he did it more than once!

C: 哼哼，等不到你，于是本公子只好屈尊来下面的「大树」了…不必谢我啾～
E: Heh-heh, you weren't coming, so yours truly has to personally come down to the Great Tree below... No need to thank me, tweet!

C: 罪人，你的行为早已触犯家族的底线！
E: Sinner, your actions have long tested the limits of The Family!

C: 究竟在哪呢…
E: Where is it...

C: 我也想过帮助那人来着…
E: I also thought about helping that person...

C: 关我什么事？
E: What does that have to do with me?

C: …你这是爱好异于常人，不像那群外邦人，纯属精力过剩。
E: ...You just have an odd hobby that raises some brows. That's nothing like those outlanders who're brimming with vigor.

C: 只有超高温浴池才能满足我。
E: Only a hot bath will satisfy me.

C: 我想，或许圣城的负担已经够大了。就算恳求卫兵放我们进城，也不过是给他们平添麻烦，最后闹个不痛快罢了。
E: I think the burden on the holy city is already heavy enough. Even if we beg the guards to let us in, it would only add to their troubles, and in the end, it would just lead to an unpleasant situation.

C: 苏克提瑞斯美美地吃起了苹果。吃到一半时，门口的卫兵走了进来。
E: Soctires gleefully crunches down on the apple. When he's halfway through eating, the cell's guard walks in.

C: 苏克提瑞斯清了清嗓子，他的眼神仿佛一头被困在泥潭里的大地兽——这种生物临死前的反应不是暴怒，而是眼眶湿润。
E: Soctires clears his throat, his eyes mirroring a dromas ensnared in swampy mud — when such a creature is on the verge of death, its eyes are not one of wrath, but wet with tears.

C: 物资不就是拿来用的？难不成一直放在仓库里等着发霉？还不如拿去给需要的人呢。
E: Aren't supplies supposed to be used? You're going to just let it collect mold in the warehouse? Might as well give it to those who really need it.

C: 外邦人是没有攻打圣城，但他们也没有守护圣城呀。奥赫玛是因为它的公民才得以幸存，轮不到外邦人来摘桃子！
E: The outlanders did not attack the city, but they also did not partake in its defense. Okhema survived because of her citizens — no outlander should deserve to reap her blessings!

C: 拉莱德试图挽回局势，却不能阻止公民们畅想那副画面。是啊，还有什么比团结一致、共创财富更振奋人心呢？
E: Liluder's attempts to salvage the momentum, but he can't stop the crowd from imagining that possibility. Yes, what else would inspire people more than a united front and creating shared fortunes?

C: 他还欠我钱没还呢！
E: He still hasn't returned the money he owes me!

C: 我有空就帮。
E: I'll help if I get time.

C: …不…你不是……
E: ...No... You are not him...

C: 能救一下吗？
E: Can we save her?

C: 接受不了一点。
E: I cannot accept any of that.

C: 收留？荒谬！你知道有多少同胞曾死于这些眷属的手下吗？
E: Shelter? Preposterous! Do you know how many of our kind have died at the hands of these Titankin?

C: 但是浪漫的幼虫又寄生在每个人的心中，不知何时就会蜕化成蝶，让原本看得清的人花了眼。这是墨涅塔赐予每个人的祝福，可能也是诅咒。
E: But, like parasites, the larvae of romance dwell in the hearts of all. We know not when they will metamorphose into butterflies and change our perception from clarity to bedazzlement. This is the blessing that Mnestia grants to all, though it may also be a curse.

C: 姑娘，来，跟我共舞一曲吧！
E: Miss, come, dance with me!

C: 哈哈哈，这不是跳得不错嘛！
E: Hahaha, not bad at all!

C: 所以来跟我一起来骂吧，向傲慢的命运宣泄不满吧！
E: So, why not curse them with me? Come and vent your dissatisfaction with the arrogance of fate!

C: 听，快听，远方传来了你熟悉的声音。
E: Listen, listen now! It comes from afar. You know this sound!

C: 上当了！
E: It's a trick!

C: 这只是给我所爱的人一个新的选择，有错吗？
E: I'm just giving the person I love another option. Is there something wrong with that?

C: 那姑娘…天谴猎手一定是被她的同类唤起了纷争的本能，选择回到了悬锋城的军队中…背叛了我……
E: That girl... The Furiae Archer's battle instincts must have been awakened by her kin. She must have chosen to return to the forces of Castrum Kremnos... She has betrayed me...

C: 戴着指环的男人躺在地上，我的箭让塞纳托斯的手掌捧走了他的灵魂。而与他同行的女子抛下了他，装饰花朵的马车头也不回地逃离了他的尸骸。
E: The man wearing the ring lies on the ground as my arrows guide the hand of Thanatos to claim his soul. The woman who travelled with him abandoned him. Their extravagant carriage, decked with flowers, sped away from his corpse without ever turning back.

C: 嗯？她怎么还在城里，难道是迷路了？
E: Hm? Why is she still in the city? Has she gotten lost?

C: 它说，在残破的命运三相殿里，一位名为帕西提亚的先知在等待着我们，她会带来命运泰坦的神谕，指引我们抵达奥赫玛。
E: It said that, within the dilapidated Temple of the Three Fates, a prophet named Pasithea was waiting for us. She will bring a prophecy from the Fate Titans, leading us to Okhema.

C: 还是多亏了迷迷。
E: It's all thanks to Mem.

C: 念诵万径之门…塔兰顿的赞词！
E: Recite the Gate of Infinity... Talanton's praise!

C: 你感到一阵眩晕，仿佛帕西提亚的情绪，正穿透时间和记忆，刺进你的大脑。
E: You feel a wave of dizziness, as if Pasithea's emotions are penetrating time and memory and going right into your mind.

C: 命运为什么总是这样！{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，你就这么恨我吗？！
E: Why does destiny toy with us so! {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, do you hate me that much!?

C: 帕西提亚，睁开眼睛，在欧洛尼斯的谕示里，你看到了什么？
E: Pasithea, open your eyes. What did you see in Oronyx's prophecy?

C: 这应该是最后的天外之音了，把它们带给帕西提亚吧。
E: This must be the final echoes from beyond the sky. Bring them to Pasithea.

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 可是，如果我一言不发，又有谁能去救救她？
E: But, if I kept my silence, who will save her?

C: 事不宜迟，你动身前往贝洛伯格…
E: Time is of the essence. You head to Belobog...

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 一个英雄辈出的世界。
E: A world where heroes rise.

C: 才没有呢，多亏了老师教会我的东西，哈哈，网络世界真的太有趣了！
E: Gosh no. You taught me well! Haha, the Internet is FUN!

C: 我觉得可以说…
E: How about this...

C: 她说话真的这么温柔？
E: Is she really that courteous when she speaks?

C: 我实在有些抽不开身，您能帮我去看看究竟是怎么回事吗？
E: I'm too busy to leave my post right now. Are you able to go and see what's going on?

C: 愿闻其详！
E: Let me hear it then.

C: 「这个奇物」是哪个奇物？
E: Which Curio is "this Curio"?

C: 对啊，我都等了好久了。
E: Yes. I've been waiting forever.

C: …和我无关。
E: ...Got nothing to do with me.

C: 听说你有事找我？
E: I heard you are looking for me?

C: 你想染什么颜色？
E: What color would you like?

C: 不不不，在我们空间站里，当然是「天才俱乐部联名致敬款」。
E: No no no. In our space station, it's gotta be the Joint Tribute to the Genius Society lenses.

C: 当然是买「琥珀星光」！
E: Definitely Amber Starlight!

C: 贝洛伯格只是这个世界的一隅。我相信在其它角落，一定还有其它生命在努力地生存，与寒潮作斗争。
E: Belobog is only one location in this world. I believe there must be other lifeforms elsewhere combating the Eternal Freeze and trying their best to survive.

C: 原来如此…原来那个罗希这么讨厌小孩子啊。
E: I see. It turns out that Rossy hates children.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 不行…那我就更不能和他发展私交了。我身为公众人物，又正处在事业上升期，万一在这个时候传出和名门望族的绯闻……
E: If that's the case, I can't be friends with him. As a public figure whose career is on the rise, I can't be seen getting involved with someone with a famous name...

C: 太、太感谢你们了！要是没有这箱东西，我今晚就只能穿着这身臭烘烘的工作服睡觉了。
E: Thank you so much! Without this box of supplies, I'd have to be sleeping in this smelly work suit tonight.

C: 稍息，荣誉队员！听我慢慢和你说……
E: At ease, honorary member! Let me tell you the details...

C: 我得了一种送快递上瘾的病…
E: I have an addiction to package delivery...

C: …喂，你怎么也不说话了！
E: ...Hey, why aren't you saying anything either?

C: …喔…喔哦！太酷了，说唱实在是太酷了！
E: Wow... oh! That's amazing! The rap is so cool!

C: 你认识吉尔伯特吧？对，就是这位，禁区资历最老的后勤官。
E: Do you know Gilbert? Yes, him, the oldest logistics officer in the restricted zone.

C: {NICKNAME}，你能带着老头儿去解决掉这个麻烦吗？只要干成了这件事，战功我可以记在吉尔伯特的名下。
E: {NICKNAME}, can you take the old man to deal with this problem? When this is done, I can give the credit to Gilbert.

C: 我还有别的事…
E: I have other things to do...

C: 你知道吗？「七彩虹」的花语是「平凡的美好」，在多年的朋友或者老夫老妻之间比较流行。
E: You know, in the language of flowers, rainbows mean "ordinary beauty." They're a popular choice among old friends and couples.

C: 你生气了？
E: Are you upset?

C: 其实，我从这字里行间能感觉出来，老爸他对自己在做的事明显还残留着热情…只是他不太好意思承认罢了。
E: Actually, reading between the lines, I can see that Dad's still passionate about his job. He just didn't want to admit it.

C: 如果你有这个意向，我随时可以给你安排学校。我还是很欣赏你的。
E: I can arrange some lessons for you any time, should you have the inclination. I quite admire you.

C: 是四风守护！
E: It's the four winds!

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 我该去哪里帮你问呢？
E: Where should I go for you?

C: 说说看吧。
E: Go on.

C: 哎，等会！我我我…我知道你是替「会社」来喊人的！
E: Hey, wait! I—I know you're here to find people for the Society!

C: 所以这「会社」到底是什么？
E: So, what exactly is the Society?

C: 交给我吧，我和她说。
E: Leave it to me. I'll talk to her.

C: 你被困在了过去。
E: You're trapped in the past.

C: 这也…太扯淡了吧？
E: That's... That can't be real...

C: 爸爸妈妈说，他们只会离开一下…马上就回来的……
E: Mom and Dad said they'll just be gone for a little bit... They'll be back in a flash...

C: 你是说…只要把这玩意泼在兄弟们身上，那帮怪物就看不到我们了，对吗？是个有趣的想法，不过那帮怪物是否靠视力索敌还是个问题……
E: So, you're saying that if we are covered with this stuff, the monsters won't be able to see us, right? Interesting stuff, but we don't know for sure if the monsters are using their sight to locate enemies...

C: 护珠人上一次的搜查结果。
E: The result of the last search by the Pearlkeepers.

C: 又是一个漂流瓶？如果说这是一场闹剧的话，未免有些认真。但要我认真对待的话，这封信显得又很荒谬。
E: Another drift bottle? This seems a little too committed for a prank. Although, this letter also seems a little absurd to take seriously.

C: 你和陌生人将粮食精华倒进了波月古海，正好奇着崇高的道德为什么还未投下赞许？
E: You and the stranger pour the grain essence into the Lunarescent Depths, and you wonder why the High Morals have not praised you yet.

C: 也许接下来，你又走上了别的命途。谁也不知道……
E: Perhaps you shall set off along a different Path in the future. Who knows...

C: 你对这种「避世隐居」的生活表现出否定态度，能进一步想想，到底是为什么吗？
E: You expressed disapproval of this kind of "hermit lifestyle," could you think a little further into why this is?

C: 方才…是发生了什么事吗？
E: Did something... just happen?

C: 你沐浴在法吉娜的秘酿之中——那迷人的韵味，好似令你自己更为坚实。
E: You are immersed in Phagousa's ambrosia, its captivating aroma seeming to strengthen your very essence.

C: 「我想…去岁月里流浪，或成为天空的一束光。」
E: "I want to... wander through the years, or become a beam of light in the sky."

C: 它的话语穿过长夜，敲我的门——
E: Their voice pierces the long night, knocking at my door —

C: 「双月是太阳的碎镜，在其中我们端详自己的面影。」
E: "The twin moons are broken mirrors of the sun. Within them, we see only reflections of ourselves."

C: 那以后我便将名字改成了歌耳戈。我将效仿先王，以我的鲜血开创悬锋城崭新的历史辉光！
E: From that moment on, I changed my name to Gorgo. I will follow the example of that previous ruler and carve out a glorious new future for Castrum Kremnos with my own blood!

C: 放肆。那是我与歌耳戈的骨肉，几时轮得到你非议？
E: Insolence! That child is mine and Gorgo's flesh and blood. When did you gain the right to criticize my actions?

C: 王，您的决断将功惠万世。只是，我还有一事忧虑……
E: My king, the generations shall prosper from your verdict. However, there is one concern that remains...

C: 曾经庇护众多求知者的枝叶已经稀疏，树冠上的华光也黯淡了许多，不知圣树繁盛时会是怎样壮丽的景象。
E: The branches that once sheltered countless seekers of knowledge are now sparse, and the radiant brilliance of the treetop has dimmed considerably. One can only imagine how magnificent the Sacred Tree must have been in its prime.

C: 通体银白的雕像笔直耸立，一眼望去总让人觉得它头顶的兜帽下藏着三张面孔。 果然是命运三泰坦的作风——连雕像都要一座顶三座的份量。
E: A silver-white statue stands tall and upright, its hooded head giving the illusion of hiding three faces. Truly fitting for the Three Titans of Fate — nothing less than triple the presence, even in their statues.

C: 这人是布利萨的国王，曾经的一城之主！
E: That man is the King of Bulsa, former lord of the city!

C: 这国王几年前就来过雅努萨波利斯，那会儿你还没上任呢。
E: That king came to Janusopolis a few years ago, before you had taken office.

C: 格拉维塔斯，你是我们中脚力的佼佼者，可愿担此重任？
E: Gravitas, you are the fastest among us. Will you accept this important duty?

C: 身着绣金长袍的史官时不时抬头看向圣烛流转的光芒，仿佛在确认着它与壁画的关联。
E: The scribe in gilded robe peers up at the shifting glow of the candle from time to time, as if confirming its connection to the murals.

C: 可以考考我的朋友们吗？
E: Can you test my friends?

C: 这座人台表面布满了或深或浅的凹痕，显然曾被卷入黑潮造物的袭击。
E: This mannequin is covered with dents of varying depths, evidence of its involvement in battles against creations of the black tide.

C: 让我看看…啊呀？贵客您居然已经拿到石板了？太厉害了吧！
E: Let me see... eh? You actually managed to obtain the slate already? Esteemed guest, you're absolutely incredible!

C: 其他地方应该还有尚未搜集的若虫，贵客不妨去帮帮我的衣匠同伴们。我替它们感谢您！
E: There should be still more nymphs elsewhere. Why not lend a hand to my fellow Garmentmakers? Allow me to thank you on their behalf!

C: 叠词词，喜欢欢。
E: Becwause you awe adowaboo.

C: (x３っ「除开奇美拉，不就是五只吗？」)∋
E: (x３っ "That's five, minus chimera, right?" )∋

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「…你站住！你看我状态是否还活着？」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "...You there, stop! Can you check my vitals?" )∋

C: 圣烛装置上似乎有某种可以操控的按钮。
E: There seems to be a control button on the holy candle device.

C: 这是我存…不是，这是刻法勒的祭器，很尊贵的。没事的话，我先走了…别，别碰。
E: This is my... No, this is a ritual vessel of Kephale, very valuable. Anyway, I'll be leaving now... just don't touch it.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>…为什么？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>...why?</color>

C: 纹金壁画在深色背景里熠熠生辉，记录着过往的故事与荣光。千百年过去，唯有这些死物依然闪耀。
E: The gilded murals shimmer against the dark background, recording stories and glories of the past. Thousands of years have passed, yet only these lifeless objects continue to shine.

C: 你胡说，一个下午怎么可能钓到四十条鱼？
E: You're making that up! How could anyone catch forty fish in just one afternoon?

C: 等披索那小子再大一点，我就把这家传的宝弓交给他，教他射箭的本领。
E: Once Piso's a little older, I'll pass down the family's prized bow and teach him how to shoot properly.

C: 「不好意思，是我来的不是时候。」
E: "Oh, my apologies. Seems I came at the wrong time."

C: 她的身世，她的过往，以及她和你那位粉色旅伴的关系…少女清澈的面容被一片疑云笼罩着。好在你还有时间去认识她，与她分享彼此的秘密。
E: Her origins, her past, her connection to your pink-furred companion... The girl's clear face was shrouded in a cloud of suspicion. But for now, it's lucky that you still have time to know her better and share your secrets.

C: 无论走上多少次，你都担心会不会掉下去。艾格勒的动线设计对膀胱不是特别友善。
E: No matter how many times you cross, you always worry you'll fall off. Whoever designed Aquila's walkways wasn't thinking about, uh, bladder emergencies.

C: …所以，谢谢你，留着这只臂鞲。于你，它只是件巧匠装备；于我，它意义非凡。
E: ...So, thank you for keeping this bracer. To you, it's just a craftsman's handiwork. But to me, it means much more than that.

C: 谢谢你。
E: Thank you.

C: 就算你不做那些事也…
E: Even if you hadn't done all that...

C: …抱歉。
E: ...My apologies.

C: 第一次来到这个巨大的空间，是不是很震惊喀？
E: First time in this massive space, huh? Quite a shock, crrk?

C: 旅者，告诉我，我是否已经在至高的顶点？那光的来处！
E: Traveler, tell me, have I reached the highest summit yet? The source of the light!

C: 飞行而来的贵客，您的速度真令虫惊叹！
E: Esteemed guest from the skies, your speed truly leaves this nymph in awe!

C: 我心甘情愿被爱判入终身囚笼！
E: I willingly accept being sentenced to a lifetime prison of love!

C: 听说要吃十二碗才能成功喀，果然是困难的挑战啊……
E: I heard you need to drink twelve cups to succeed, crrk. That's definitely one heck of a challenge...

C: 我连开场白都想好了——「瞧瞧是谁来拜访本蝶了？是异乡的勇士嗡！」结果现在所有惊喜都没啦……
E: I even had my opening line ready: "Look who's come to visit me? It's a warrior from afar, buzz!" But now all the surprise is ruined...

C: 姬子有察觉到异样吗？
E: Himeko, did you notice anything unusual?

C: 列车长好像很焦虑…
E: The conductor seems very anxious...

C: 是的，没错…
E: Yes, that's right.

C: 和你说这些，我也不是毫无所求～别怪我说话直白哦，{NICKNAME}，忆庭想要保存你的记忆。
E: There is actually something that I need. So I'll get right to it. {NICKNAME}, the Garden of Recollection wants to preserve your memories.

C: 但是别担心，我们不会「夺走」它，只想从你那里复制珍贵的片段。你可以把它看作一笔交易……
E: But don't worry, we won't take it from you. We just want to make a copy of the precious moments. You can see it as a trade between us...
Hmph...

C: 我的事情除了你以外，谁也不能知道。一旦发现他们记忆里出现了我的关键词，就只能修改掉了…你为什么不相信我？我不会伤害他们的。
E: You and only you can know about me. If a keyword related to me shows up in their memories, then we'll have no choice but to get rid of it... Why don't you trust me? I won't hurt them.

C: 你就是邓恩的副官？
E: Are you Dunn's aide?

C: 再给我讲讲这次的行动计划。
E: Tell me about the plan for this mission.

C: 可以啊，那就去找呗。
E: Sure, let's go look for it.

C: 啊啊啊啊我要变身！
E: Ahhh... I want to transform!

C: 查询使用记录
E: Check usage logs

C: 她和我一直通过终端保持联系，她委托我代她管理大家，我向她汇报了大家的表现，她说对我非常满意。
E: She and I have always communicated through the terminal. She entrusts me to manage everyone. I've reported everyone's performance to her, and she is very pleased with me.

C: 这本书是怎么回事？
E: What's with the book?

C: 吃了，听打嗝吗？
E: I'm already stuffed — wanna hear me burp?

C: 但是，如果一段记忆能以「更美」的样子被记住，是不是…不算一件坏事呢？
E: But if memories can be remembered in a "beautified" way, wouldn't that... not be such a bad thing?

C: 滴答！我是钟表小子！
E: Tick tock! I'm Clockie!

C: 我想在这里再测测这「匣里流光」的性能，这事我一人可做不了。你来帮我测试，我在旁边记录，这样的武器测试才算有效率。
E: I want to test the performance of the Luminflux Pyxis here. But I can't do it alone. You do the test, and I will record by your side — this will make our weapon test efficient.

C: 不过粒子降了速，穿透力肯定得打个折。哎，二者不～可～得～兼～呐，老夫还得再考虑考虑。
E: But if the speed of the particles is decreased, their penetrating power will be reduced. We can't have both. I have to think about it again.

C: 说起来，你可能不知道，工造司里的工匠强迫症都挺严重的。比如说我，必须用右脚踏入工造司内第一步，如果不是，我就浑身难受。
E: You may not know, but the craftsmen in the Artisanship Commission are all obsessive in that way. For example, I have to use my right foot to take the first step in the Artisanship Commission. If I use my left foot, I will feel really uncomfortable.

C: 放心吧，绝不会让你白干。
E: Don't worry about it. I'd never let you do it for nothing.

C: 匠人不来了吗？
E: What about that craftsman?

C: 那我就直说了吧，我受某个不愿意透露姓名的老板委托，想预测星际和平公司期货贸易市场的价格波动。
E: Then I'll put it bluntly: I was commissioned by a manager who wishes to remain anonymous to predict price fluctuations in the IPC futures trading market.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 星际和平公司的收费频道有转播。
E: It's broadcast on the IPC's premium subscription channel.

C: 至于我嘛，我当然是为免节外生枝，替您将这阵法事后复原，去掉了些许冗余记录而已。
E: As for me, I restore the matrix after you go and remove any redundant records of course to avoid things spiraling out of control.

C: 释放罪犯？会乱套吧？
E: To release a fugitive? That's asking for trouble.

C: 关于例行占算
E: About routine divinations

C: 别告诉我你害怕了。
E: Don't tell me you're scared.

C: 都最后一题了，你还要打断一下吗？快点回来。
E: It's the last puzzle, and you still need to interrupt me? Hurry and come back soon.

C: 他什么都没跟我说。
E: He didn't tell me anything.

C: 你看不见还怎么下棋？
E: How do you play if you can't see?

C: …谢谢你，我感觉心里暖暖的，你之前送过来的积木，我已经处理完了，不会再对我的伙伴们产生负面影响了。
E: ...Thank you! I feel all warm and fuzzy inside now. I've already taken care of all the blocks you gave me. They won't harm my companions anymore.

C: 我感觉我的齿轮有些不一样了…表盘里有一种东西在萌芽…我好想去这个世界看看。
E: I feel my gears transforming... Something is starting to sprout on the dial... I can't wait to see the world!

C: 「游客真的愿意修好我们吗？」
E: "Is the guest really willing to fix us?"

C: 当然。我尊崇自由意志，谜题的意义应当由解谜的人决定，就是你——
E: Of course. I respect free will. The meaning of the puzzle should be decided by the one who solves it, which is you...

C: 你们是我见过的最怪的迷钟。
E: You're all the weirdest Tickers I've seen in my life.

C: 能复述下预言的内容吗？
E: Can you repeat the prophecy?

C: 那便回答我吧——在烈阳熄灭的地方，曾经万人瞩目的会场上，如今有多少火焰仍在燃烧？
E: Answer me this then — in the place extinguished of the fiery sun, on the stage once watched by thousands, how many flames still burn bright?

C: 瑟希斯的造物们共享着同一套生命的质素，世上相似的奇美拉不可计数，精灵有一两只撞脸也很正常。
E: The creations of Cerces share common elements in life. Countless chimeras resemble each other, just as it is common for a spirit or two to look alike.

C: 关于突然出现…
E: About your sudden appearance...

C: 我自有妙用。
E: I have my own use for it.

C: 桀桀，当年兽牢疏忽，斗兽群涌入斗技场。身无利器战士们束手无策，敝人毫不忌惮，挺身将它们一一捉拿，也因此得到尊称「执牛角的勇士」。
E: Hehe. Once, the beast cage broke and the beasts flooded into the arena. The unarmed warriors were completely helpless. However, I had no fear and single-handedly caught them all one-by-one. That's where I got the title: "The Horned Warrior."

C: 这段时间，咱还是先金盆洗手，找份正经工作吧——您有什么推荐吗？
E: During this period, we should turn over a new leaf and find a proper job. Got any recommendations?

C: 我只好回答它：「好险，可是谁吃果子还会吃果核啊？」
E: I had no choice but to reply to it: "That is harrowing, but who would eat the seeds along with the fruit?"

C: 先住手——今天我得说说你。我巴特鲁斯的行窃生涯里，还是头回见你这样的人。
E: Stop for a moment... I have to tell you something about you. In all of my years of thievery, I have never met someone like you.

C: 嗯嗯？怎么回事，我们以前见过面吗？
E: Hmm? What do you mean? Have we met somewhere before?

C: 桀桀桀，自恋可是一种美德，巴特鲁斯感谢您的赞赏。
E: Hehehe, vanity is a virtue, and I, Bartholos, thank you for the compliment.

C: 好啦，这种子本身也不是我想偷的东西，就大方地送给你吧。这树林子里只能进、不能出的道路不止一处，你可千万别阴沟翻船搞迷了路啊？
E: Tell you what. I wasn't really after this seed anyway, so consider it yours. Just remember — the Grove's paths often lead you in, but not back out. Mind you, don't lose your way!

C: 一码归一码！再说，这明明是无主的宝箱，你我都是用智慧和气力在争夺——怎么就是你的了？
E: That's another thing! Besides, it's unowned. Both of us claimed it by wit and strength — why is it yours?

C: 累了，赶紧把宝箱还我……
E: I'm beat. Just hand over the chest already...

C: 因为你是巴特鲁斯。
E: Because you're Bartholos.

C: 倒是你，能继承{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神力…要说只是普通的异邦人或者活死灵，这谁信啊？
E: But for someone who can inherit {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s power... who'd believe you're just a regular traveler or living dead?

C: 巴特鲁斯曾经也偷过这个。
E: Bartholos has pilfered this before.

C: 桀桀？
E: Heh-heh?

C: 别闹了，快把短矛还我
E: Stop playing games and give me back my spear.

C: 对此，那位前辈和我都无法做出任何经得起推敲的解释。或许只有从不同的挑战中记录下更多不同的这类低语，我们才可能解答自己的疑问…当然也可能带来更多的疑问就是了！
E: The scholar and I couldn't come up with any explanations that withstood scrutiny. Maybe the only way for us to answer it is to record more such whispers from the different challenges... But that might also bring about more questions!

C: 关于「黄金替罪羊」……
E: About the Golden Scapegoat...

C: 迷津展露了。完成你的工作吧，辅祭。
E: The Maze has been revealed. Do your job, acolyte.

C: 不出意外，需要继续追问才能得到解答。伟大的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，请赐予信徒更详尽的指示——
E: As expected, we'll need to refine the question for a clearer answer. Great {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, please grant our follower more detailed guidance —

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 我来找你聊聊天。
E: I'm here for a little chat.

C: 球还在原位，但若虫不在。上面有一行小字——「我先去吃个饭，等会回来」
E: The iron ball hasn't moved, but the nymph has disappeared. A tiny message on the ball says: "Taking a lunch break, be right back"

C: 交给你啦，我就在这飞来飞去。哗啦啦——
E: It's up to you now, I'll be flying around here. *whoosh*

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你…帮助我做了件能让自己感到佩服的事。
E: {NICKNAME}... Thank you. You helped me do something I can be proud of.

C: 抱歉抱歉，我这人就是容易大惊小怪。
E: Sorry, sorry! I tend to get overexcited.

C: 怕死亡那一瞬间的痛苦，也怕死后漫长黑暗中的了无知觉。尽管也有人许诺了彼岸……
E: Afraid of the pain in that final moment, afraid of the endless dark that follows. Even if some promised salvation beyond...

C: 说清楚点，好处是什么？
E: Get to the point, what are the rewards?

C: 在烟雾深处，你看见一个模糊的人影：祂看上去像是由一片片镜子组成的，反射五彩斑斓的光华。光线摇曳，晃得你头晕目眩，而就在模糊成一团的视线中，你看见了…卡芙卡？大雨倾盆。长得很像卡芙卡的女人撑着伞，雨水从伞边似瀑布般垂落。你见过她，可是此刻，她是那么陌生，仿佛这是你第一次与她相见。好奇怪啊，她看上去好像有山那么高……
E: Through the layers of smoke, you see a vague figure. THEY appear to be made up of mirrors, a splendid kaleidoscope. The light flickers, making you dizzy and blurring your vision. You see... Kafka? Rain is pouring down. A woman who looks like Kafka is holding an umbrella, and the rain is falling down from the brim of her umbrella like a waterfall. You know who she is. However, right this moment, she seems like a stranger, as though this is the first time you've ever seen her. It's so strange. She looks as tall as a mountain peak...

C: 我会为你提供更多帮助。
E: I'll help you out some more. Don't worry.

C: 它模拟的是什么？
E: What exactly does it simulate?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「…混乱变成时间你的失职注定过去体积不再等比例缩小步伐一步两步三尺离开阻止你好自为之艾利欧列车前进婴儿坠地癌症正在长大…」</color>祂听到了你的话。祂缓缓回应，你感到寒气扑在脸上，皮肤上绒毛战栗。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"...chaos become time your dereliction determine past volume no longer proportional shrink steps one step two steps three feet depart prevent you be warned elio express advance baby fall cancer growing now..." </color>THEY respond to you after hearing what you say. You feel the chill on your face, and the hairs on your skin shudder.

C: 你感到自己正被黑色液体吞没，这是片黑暗之海。声音、嗅觉都被隔绝，一切变得离你很远。
E: You feel yourself being swallowed by some black liquid — a sea of darkness. Your hearing and smell are cut off, and everything becomes far away from you.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「斯蒂芬•劳艾德提了一堆把『模拟宇宙』做有趣的点子，对于钓星神这件事毫无帮助，不过也许能让你玩得更开心点。」</color>黑塔叹气。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Stephen Lloyd has come up with a bunch of different ideas for making the Simulated Universe more fun. It won't help us attract more Aeons, but it might just help you have more fun."</color> Herta sighs.

C: 「那个东西。」黑塔不耐烦地说，「就是你平时走在路上，会用球棒打破的玩意儿。你怎么不去打它了？没看见吗？」
E: "That thing," Herta says impatiently, "that's what you usually smash with a bat when you walk past it on the road. Why didn't you go and hit it? Can't you see it?"

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「这次不一样，这里是『模拟宇宙』。」</color>黑塔叹了口气，<color=#dbc291ff>「在『模拟宇宙』里，可破坏物会掉落珍贵的东西，也就是宇宙碎片。现在，回去把那玩意打了。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"This time it's different. This is the Simulated Universe."</color> Herta sighs once again. <color=#dbc291ff>"In the Simulated Universe, destructible objects can drop precious things called Cosmic Fragments. Now, go back and smash those things up."</color>

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 但强烈的战斗渴望永远不会被浇灭！你突然觉得为了「毁灭」的「开拓」也不错…
E: However, your burning desire to fight will never be dampened! You suddenly find the idea of Trailblazing for the sake of Destruction to be acceptable...

C: 「螺丝咕姆，他与阿哈交流的方式估计跟我们不大一样。你这么想也没错…」
E: "I suppose Screwllum doesn't communicate with Aha in the same way as we do. I can see where you come from..."

C: 「哼，拭目以待吧。」
E: "Hmph! Let's wait and see."

C: 一种饱含着毁灭欲望的火焰在你心中燃烧起来…你多么恐惧消亡！不可违抗的恐惧叮叮铃铃地传来，促使你做出了抢劫的判断——你控制不住举起的右手…
E: A ravenous desire for Destruction smolders in your heart... stoked by your overwhelming fear of annihilation! Your right hand rises uncontrollably as an irresistible fear tinkles through you and forces you to make a decision to commit robbery...

C: 你注视着炉中的灰烬，它们仿佛诉说着梅尔希耶兹的曾经：她还在等孩子如同往常那样回家，直至屋内的食物被耗尽，屋外的一切变作狼藉——她跌跌晃晃，打开了门，纵身一跃，投身于遮天的黑暗之中。
E: You gaze at the ashes in the furnace, and they seem to speak of Melchidek's past. She had been waiting for her children until her food had been depleted and everything outside had been devastated. She stumbled, opened the door, and cast herself into the darkness that enveloped the sky.

C: 好吧…那种感觉十分魅惑。你决定依偎在它身边。它似乎已对进食产生厌倦，对你并无敌意。时间流逝地很快，不知过了多久……
E: It is a bewitching emotion... and you decide to snuggle up to its gigantic body. Having grown tired of feeding, it shows no signs of hostility toward you. Time passes quickly...

C: 他用大脚在地上踩了一个坑，邀请你一起进去歇息。你摇了摇头，叹了口气离开了……
E: He uses a giant foot to stamp a crater in the ground, then invites you to rest in it together. You shake your head, sigh, and leave...

C: 最终，他看到了你——他认出了你，熟悉的朋友。他的眼神闪烁出一些微小的震栗，但作为一尊古老的墙前雕塑…他已老得不能再挪动他的大脚了。
E: Finally, he sees you and recognizes you as a familiar friend. His eyes shimmer with a faint ripple of shock, but as an ancient wall statue... he is already too decrepit to move his feet anywhere.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了求药使的祷告。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into a prayer from an Elixir Seeker.

C: 祂分明是*一*，却将自己切分为*二*。祂控握两个祂者，却又将*自己*揉在一起。
E: THEY are obviously One, but THEY have split THEMSELF into Two. THEY wield control over both of THEM, yet mold THEMSELVES together.

C: ——你看向了祂，你的心中充满疑问。
E: — You look at him as your mind overflows with questions.

C: 你又看到了那张面庞——等等，你在哪里见过她？天才俱乐部#4…「寂静领主」的名字钻入你的脑海，那是波尔卡•卡卡目向「博识尊」发问的一刹——她糖果色的裙摆拂过整片宇宙。
E: Once again, that familiar face is in sight. Hold on. Where have you seen her before? The 4th member of the Genius Society... The name of Lord of Silence comes to mind, and you see Polka Kakamond raising a question to Nous — her pastel-colored skirt sweeps across the entire universe.

C: 「博识尊的计算无可违背。」她冷淡地说，「那个『时刻』到来时，大家都要死。」
E: "Nous's calculations are unquestionable. When that moment comes, everyone must die," she announces nonchalantly.

C: 不要伤害我的孩子！
E: Don't touch my children!

C: 赶赴前线。
E: Rush to the front line.

C: 不过，你可不想他们抢走你最大的乐趣，为你授勋的君王。
E: However, you don't want them taking away your greatest pleasure — a king to confer honor upon you.

C: 靠得更近一些。
E: Get closer.

C: 剔除过剩个体。
E: Eliminate excess individuals.

C: 用更文学的方式？
E: Use a more literary method?

C: 你将沙盘的时间流速调整为现实的三万倍。「权杖」指出<unbreak>013</unbreak>次文明将在内部纪年<unbreak>2947</unbreak>年打响世界大战，导火索是第二帝国总督的爱妃饮鸩身亡。战争在十七年后结束，因为那杯酒被证明无人下毒，毒素来源于酒桶内侧的铜质标签，它把整桶酒都染成了翡翠一般的颜色。
E: You increase the time flow speed of the sandpit to thirty thousand times that of the real world. The Scepter points out that Civilization <unbreak>013</unbreak> will fall into world war in the year <unbreak>2947</unbreak>. The trigger for this great war is the death of a governor's concubine in the Second Empire, who drinks poison. The war ends <unbreak>17</unbreak> years later as it is proven that her cup was never poisoned. The source of the poisoning was a copper label that was inside the barrel that dyed the entire barrel's content jade green.

C: 「但限制我们走出去的，不仅仅是智慧。还有落后的有机脑组织，以及短暂的寿命。」克劳奇与你四目相对，呼吸宛如机械引擎，「所以，完美学者才需要更长的寿命，无限长的寿命——你…你！告诉我，怎样才能拥有不被约束的生命！」
E: "But what restricts us from leaving isn't just intellect alone. There is also our primitive organic brain structure and our fleeting lifespan." Crouch's eyes stare into yours, his breathing like a mechanical engine's. "Which is why the perfect scholar requires longer life... infinite life. You... You! Tell me, how can we attain an unfettered life!"

C: 那感染者呢？
E: What about the infected?

C: 一定是这样。
E: Definitely.

C: 你怎么来了？这里不开放测试，赶紧回其他区域自个儿玩去。
E: What are you doing here? This place is not for testing. Go and entertain yourself in some other domains.

C: 一只蝴蝶扇动翅膀，哪怕数百光年外的世界因此毁灭，蝴蝶也对此一无所知，因为它只是在扇动翅膀。为实验修正偏离的变量，避免未知信息的干扰，这是每位学者都会做的事。
E: When a butterfly beats its wings, even if worlds hundreds of light-years away are destroyed because of this, the butterfly would not know any better because it is just beating its wings. Correcting deviating variables in an experiment and avoiding interference from unknown information — this is what every scholar would do.

C: 这是诡辩！
E: This is just sophistry!

C: 还有高手？
E: Another master has appeared?

C: 宇宙在混乱中加速膨胀，如同小丑在生日宴会上为孩子们吹胀的气球。无论是你们，还是波尔卡，彼此的距离都在膨胀中被无限延长。你看见黑塔走进核心，全宇宙的「权杖」在共鸣中再度成为完整的神经系统。
E: The universe rapidly expands in the midst of the chaos, like how a clown blows up balloons at a children's birthday party. Whether it's you or Polka, the distance between you both stretches endlessly. You watch Herta walk into the core, all of the Scepters in the universe in complete resonance, reuniting into one neural system.

C: 没人对你的警告做出回应。
E: No one responds to your warning.

C: 您好，{NICKNAME}。我受P<unbreak>-45</unbreak>「真珠」小姐委任，代表战略投资部前来与黑塔女士洽谈合作。
E: Hi, {NICKNAME}. I was appointed by Miss Pearl, P<unbreak>-45</unbreak> to discuss our cooperation with Madam Herta on behalf of the Strategic Investment Department.

C: 打开祝福商店。
E: Open the Blessing Store.

C: 请别再继续问。
E: ...Please stop asking.

C: 我是萝卜？
E: I'm a radish?

C: 阿哈玩偶的计数器疯狂跳转，它的数值膨胀至<unbreak>2147483647</unbreak>时突然跳转至了0，数据溢出了。你鄙视在如今使用<unbreak>32</unbreak>位int类型储存数据的制造商。
E: The number on the counter increases rapidly. When it reaches <unbreak>2147483647</unbreak>, it suddenly shifts to zero — This is an integer overflow. You spite the manufacturers who are still using <unbreak>32</unbreak>-bit systems to store data in the modern world.

C: 你继续追寻着这股味道——你抬头，发现一位黑发女子站在你面前。她吮着食指上残留的糕泥，你能嗅到她唇齿留有的香味。
E: You continue to trace the source of the aroma. As you look up, you find a dark-haired lady standing in front of you. You can smell the residual aroma on her lips while she licks the bits of pastry stuck on her fingers.

C: 「但是，我保证我会给你的。你信任过我，是老客户。接下来我要教会你贸易的最后一条准则：永远不消耗自己的信用。」他呲牙笑。
E: "But I promise I'll give it to you, as you trust me and are my regular customer. Next, I'll teach you the last rule of business: Never lie to your customers." He grins.

C: 你回应了呼唤…那声音十分虔诚。
E: You answer the call... The voice sounds very pious.

C: 齿轮…
E: The gear...

C: 他非常开心！你终于领略到他用尽一生所推动的事业——令众人都能理解集成式交换咕咕钟的快乐！
E: He is over the moon! You finally comprehend the great work he spent his life setting into motion - The great work of making everyone understand the joy of ensembled tradeable cuckoo clocks!

C: 你打开门——它长大了。它从那种茶菁的表皮中褪色，蜕变出一种掺杂着白毫、黄绿以及褐青色的斑斓花纹…这是「着涎香」已成为成虫的证明。它发出着阵阵呼唤…那是对你*爱*的证明。
E: You open the door and find that it has grown up. Its skin, which was initially green, has faded and is now covered by a colorful pattern that is a mixture of white, yellowish green, and brownish blue hues... They are the signs that Sweet Saliva has matured into an adult bug. It calls out for you... which is the proof of its *love* for you.

C: 你未能得到回应。
E: Nothing happens.

C: 你感到神清气爽，如同清凉药剂抹在天灵盖上！但你接着开始看到第IX机关在天上乱跑的景象，你感到自己有些不太对劲了…可恶的混沌医师！你决定立刻绕路离开。
E: You feel so rejuvenated as though you have just slathered some cooling ointment on your forehead! But then you star seeing Device IX shifting across the sky, and start to feel unwell... It must be the fault of that Doctor of Chaos! You decide to take a detour and leave immediately.

C: 「本应用旨在为患有特格林综合症、奇洛兹第三神经失调等选择困难症患者提供帮助，辅助他们做出决定，以防他们在决定今天吃什么前，饿死在点餐软件前。」
E: "This app is designed to assist sufferers of Tergryn's Syndrome and Keylov's tertiary neurological dysfunction in making decisions, to prevent them from starving to death in front of an app before being able to decide what they would like to eat."

C: 你的外壳变成了发皱的树皮，双腿上不断地生出根须，似要扎根进土壤。
E: Your outer shell transforms into aged bark and your legs begin to grow endless roots that seem to want to burrow into the soil.

C: 突如其来的刺激让苍猿骤然暴起，它咆哮着甩开你的手，浑身肌肉紧绷，来自大自然的霸气毫无预兆地浮现在它的身上。
E: The sudden stimulus riles up the ape immensely, howling as it slaps away your hand, all its muscles tensed up. The sheer domination of nature, raw and without warning, emanates from its body.

C: 诗人微微阖眼，你沉没在一片寂静的海洋。音符是它的水滴，歌声是它的流向，故事沿着水流浸入你的胸膛。
E: The poet slightly closes his eyes as you sink into a lonely ocean. The notes are the drops of water, the song is its flow and the story follows the rhythm of the waves into your chest.

C: 「终末」的存在，无疑是未来可观测的有力证明。过去无可改变，而未来正是「末王」的过去。故可以推论——未来早已注定。
E: The existence of Finality is undoubtedly a powerful proof that the future can be observed. The past cannot be changed, yet the past is Terminus' future. Therefore, it can be deduced that — The future has long been set in stone.

C: 「你！你们！欺机太甚！」售货机的泪水从电池箱里漏了出来，它挥动机械臂，嚎哭着扑向你。
E: "You! You bullies!" Tears leak from the vending machine's battery box as it flails its mechanical limbs and lunges at you with a wail.

C: 不不不，这一定不是你的问题，肯定是颜料太劣质了。只要买来最好的颜料，别说是妖怪，就算是反物质军团你也能随手画出来。
E: No, no, no, you can't be the problem here. It's the paint. It's too low quality. Once you buy the highest-quality paint, you'll be able to paint this monster freehand, or even something like the Antimatter Legion.

C: 你献上手中的秘宝，如同命运三相殿的祭司，向泰坦祈求加护。
E: You offer the treasure in your hands, akin to a priest of the Temple of the Three Fates beseeching the Titans for protection.

C: 在众神争斗不息的时代，战争在盾牌上溅射出火花，落下的碎屑成为悬锋城盾的秘密。无论事实如何，那些古老的盾牌已无法再造。
E: In an age where divine battles raged incessantly, war made sparks upon the shield. Its fragments became the guarded secret of Castrum Kremnos' defenses. Anyway, these ancient shields can no longer be replicated.

C: 模仿神明的战争，人子们创造了自己的战争。他们中的佼佼者，则围绕在尼卡多利的身下，以纷争为它献上血祭。
E: Imitating the divine battles, the children of humanity crafted wars of their own. The fiercest among them gathered under Nikador, offering their blood in ritual conflict.

C: 它为玛雷拉城降下赐福，令长发化作黄金。可一旦削落，头发便恢复如初。众人蓄着满头黄金行走，直到被压断了脖子，也不愿将它们剪下。
E: They bestowed blessings on the city of Marela, turning hair to gold, which, once cut, returned to normal. People bore their golden burdens on their heads until their necks snapped, never willing to shear them off.

C: 狂醉的神明掀起浪花。
E: The drunken god stirs waves.

C: 它遍寻翁法罗斯，采撷众多生灵最美丽的鳞羽，创造出黄金的蝴蝶。而世间传述浪漫、美与爱情的诗篇，就此翻开了第一页。
E: They wander Amphoreus, collecting the most beautiful scales and feathers from many creatures, creating golden butterflies. Thus began the world's poems of romance, beauty, and love.

C: 雅努斯为负世泰坦的选择降下赐福，延伸出无限的道路。
E: Janus bestows blessings upon the choices of the Worldbearing Titan, stretching forth endless roads.

C: 你竭尽所能摆出各种挑衅姿势，骂出各种羞辱话语，你自己都不知道这些姿势和话语是从哪学来的。但效果是显而易见的，巨狮已经彻底疯狂。
E: You unleash a barrage of insults, each one sharper than the last, your body moving instinctively into taunting stances you don't even remember learning. Whatever possessed you, it's working — the beast has snapped.

C: 强者死于话多，你沉默地摆出进攻姿势，一场血战在即。
E: The talkative ones die first. You drop the theatrics, shift into a battle stance, and steel yourself for the bloodbath ahead.

C: 洗浴确实是很重要的事，但把它当成科研成果未免有些小题大做，也许爱泡澡的评委会喜欢？
E: Bathing is undoubtedly important, but presenting it as a groundbreaking scientific discovery? That might be a stretch. Then again, maybe there's a bath-loving reviewer on the panel?

C: 抬头看看那深邃的夜吧，黯淡的群星无法给人启示，回应我们的只有沉默的黑，仿佛世界上已经没有了这位泰坦的存在。
E: Look up at the deep night, the dim stars offer no guidance, and all that responds to us is the silent darkness, as if this Titan no longer exists in the world.

C: 我不理解这种公平。
E: I don't understand this kind of impartiality.

C: 每一个小偷都在咒骂着塔兰顿，咒骂那座天平。
E: Every thief is cursing Talanton, cursing that scale.

C: 艾格勒被勒令打造出一座「天平」，交付新生的刻法勒保管，由它划定「黎明」和「黄昏」，平衡白昼与黑夜。
E: Aquila was ordered to forge a great scale and entrust it to the newborn Kephale. It would be the scale's duty to divide dawn and dusk, ensuring the balance between day and night.

C: 尊敬的{NICKNAME}，空间站本年度员工体检已完成，请勿重复提交体检申请。
E: Dear {NICKNAME}, your annual staff medical examination has been completed. There is no need to resubmit medical examination applications.

C: 抱歉，我真的忍不住。
E: Sorry, I really couldn't help myself.

C: 一枚千纸鹤，轻轻一碰就有被撕碎的风险，你小心地将它拆开，字迹浮现于眼前——
E: An origami crane that risks falling apart with the slightest touch. You gently take it apart, and some words unfold before you...

C: 验证码
E: Verification code

C: 你注意到，《危机预知》在榜单上从垫底跃升到页面中部，但如果想让它传播到更多人的耳朵里，似乎还差得远呢。
E: You notice that "Crises" has leaped up from the bottom to the middle of the leaderboard, but it still seems like a tall order to spread it on to even more ears.

C: 你接过黑塔递给你的纸笔，签了自己的名字。纸的质地很奇怪，墨水落在纸上瞬间就干涸了。当笔尖离开纸面时，你的心脏突然悸动。
E: You take the paper and pen from Herta and leave your signature. The paper is made from a bizarre material, and the ink dries up the moment it touches the paper. When you move the tip of the pen away, your heart suddenly flutters.

C: 帮它强制关机！
E: Force a shutdown!

C: 你坐上「新世界大门」，刚按下冲水键，一股古怪的吸力传来——
E: You sit down on the Door to A New World. As soon as you push the button, you start to feel a strange suctioning force —

C: ——如果有他们在，那么这宴席必将充满欢声笑语。然而，如今这破败的廊厅中却只剩下无边的寂静在回荡。
E: ...If they were here, the banquet would be a lively and joyful occasion. But now, there is nothing but silence in this run-down hall.

C: 你正用后脑勺那颗浑浊的义眼窥视着身后的金发女人，或者说，女机器人。你盯着她的手机屏幕，欣赏着那如同连续剧一般的情感故事。
E: You are using the cloudy prosthetic eye at the back of your head to peep at the blonde woman — or, more precisely, the blonde female robot — behind you. You stare at her phone screen, happily browsing her romantic life that reads like a soap opera.

C: 偷偷告诉你一个秘密：「双开门」其实不止两扇，而是无穷扇！不过我只见过三扇……
E: Let me tell you a secret: The "twin doors" aren't just two doors, but endless doors! I've only seen three so far though...

C: 宝宝你是一只会说话的蝴蝶…
E: Babe, you are a talking butterfly...

C: 这位灰发的听众，请问你有何评价嗡？
E: Dear gray-haired listener: How do you think it sounds?

C: 这里的蒸汽可真强劲，像屏障一样，我根本没法触及水面嗡……
E: The steam here is so strong, it's like a barrier. I can't even touch any of the water...

C: 好像要长脑子了…
E: It feels like my head is getting smarter...

C: 多谢你，贵客…我注意到你已经获取了预言所指的目标。真是神奇，你身上果然还藏着我们想不到的秘密。
E: Thank you so much, esteemed guest... I notice that you have already obtained the target mentioned in the prophecy. Remarkable. You truly bear secrets we could never imagine.

C: 您…没听说吗？最近有些不、不干净的东西在这「后巷」里作乱……
E: Have you... not heard? So-Some ghostly goings-on have been happening in the "back alley" recently...

C: 对我不必尊称「您」…
E: You don't have to be this polite with me...

C: 在外漂泊的游子，一想到有温暖的港湾等着自己，心底都会踏实很多喀？
E: Travelers from afar always find themselves more at ease when they think of the safe harbor awaiting them, right?

C: 据说只有真正的勇者，才能拔出这柄持矛君王首肯的长剑喀！可我已经竭尽全力，它还是纹丝不动……
E: Legend has it that only a true hero can pull out this longsword endorsed by the Spearlord themself! Try as I might, though, it won't budge an inch...

C: 我、我也要鼓起勇气，不能给吾主丢脸喀！
E: I... I need to pluck up my courage, so I don't bring shame unto my master!

C: 要我重复一遍？
E: Do I need to repeat myself?

C: ——是无比巨大的敌意散发出的恶臭。
E: It is the stench of an incomparable hostility.

C: 一般
E: Neutral

C: 你用手指拨开刚刚填好的反馈，发现底下还摞了厚厚一叠相同的纸卡。摆在你面前选择有几种……
E: You flip back the feedback card that you've just completed, and discover a thick stack of identical cards. You are faced with several options...

C: 这是一辆贝洛伯格特产汽车，前机盖正散发着引擎开足马力运转过后独有的燥热。
E: This is a car specially made in Belobog. The hood is letting off a dry heat unique to an engine that's going at full throttle.

C: 你一定是我的同好……
E: You must be a fan just like me...

C: 红色方明明大好局势啊…我解说不下去了喀！
E: The red side clearly has a major advantage... I can't go on with my commentary!

C: 八秒？
E: Every 8 seconds?

C: 喀！据说雕像所刻的这种怪物曾经真实存在，但我从来没见到过活着的…难道是都被战士们清缴了喀？
E: Crrk! Legend has it that the mythical beast carved by that statue actually existed once, but I've never seen a live one before... I guess warriors must've wiped them all out?

C: 以上都是。
E: All of the above.

C: 曾经的这里可是圣地，泰坦于此降下神谕，联盟于此商谈要事。
E: This place used to be a holy site where Titans delivered prophesies and alliances discussed matters of importance.

C: 诶呀——你、你怎么突然回头啊…吓死虫了喀！
E: Eek! Wh—Why did you turn so suddenly... you frightened me, crrrk!

C: 没错！但它也可以是一棵大树、一顶华盖……
E: Correct! But it could also be a big tree, a canopy...

C: …喀？找我有事吗？没事的话请安静，我正在为即将出版的《神悟树庭风俗考》做田野调查喀。
E: ...Crrrk? You need something? If not, please stay quiet, I'm conducting field studies for my upcoming Grove of Epiphany Cultural Studies.

C: 我说过。「幸」或「不幸」是绝对的私人体验。
E: I already told you. Good or bad luck is all a matter of personal experience.

C: （还是找找更合适的藏身处吧……）
E: (Maybe I should look for a better hiding spot...)

C: 这都什么跟什么呀！是你输了！
E: What are you even talking about? You lost!

C: <size=36>回家睡大觉咯！</size>
E: <size=36>Go home and get some sleep!</size>

C: 何等丑陋的造物…
E: Such a hideous creation...

C: 还是太嫩！
E: Still too green!

C: 想想那一刻吧，但愿它能为你带来一些安慰……
E: Think of that moment. May it bring you a little comfort...

C: 走位~砸不中~
E: Dodge! You can't hit me~

C: 肯定是「友商」干的好事！
E: This must be the work of a competitor!

C: 是可动模型吗？你不太确定，要不要亲自上手摸摸看？
E: Is it a movable model? You aren't sure. Do you want to try and touch it?

C: 都怪你多嘴，说不定这个{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}根本没有发现我是假装的，反倒是你输不起，急着要揭露我们之间的赌约。
E: It's all your fault. This {F#girl}{M#boy} wouldn't have even noticed me at all but you had to be a sore loser about it and spill the beans about the bet.

C: 也许就像这只机巧鸟说的一样，「这不是你应该插手的战斗」。在勇敢的战士为你冲锋陷阵之前，至少你应该问问它为何要帮助你。
E: Perhaps it's just like what this cycrane said, "this is not your battle." Before allowing a brave warrior to charge into a risky battle, its cause should first be ascertained.

C: 住手，我不想看到你受伤。
E: Stop, I don't want to see you get hurt.

C: 你根本不是一个合格的战士。
E: You're nothing like a qualified fighter.

C: …其实你要是拒绝署名的话，我们是打算以「机巧鸟捕手」的身份给那人寄过去。
E: ...Actually, if you refused to sign it, we're planning on sending it from the "Ace Cycrane Catcher".

C: 看来吾主也是有脾气的喀……
E: Seems my master has quite the temper...

C: 悬台来得实在太慢，我都要迟到了喀！
E: The suspended platform is so slow! At this rate, I'm going to be late, crrk!

C: 是数据流突然断了，绝对不是我的问题，你一定要相信我喀！
E: The stream must have been cut off! I swear it's not my fault — you have to believe me, crrk!

C: 啊…这热浪！
E: Ah — this scorching heat!

C: 所以我想着找一个更能扛事儿的人来帮他一起分担。两人协同连接，应该能搞定…吧。
E: So I was trying to look for someone more resilient to share the burden. With two people, it should work... I think.

C: 伸出双手。
E: Extend both arms.

C: 你把我说服了。
E: You've convinced me.

C: 你口气也太狂了吧！
E: That's some huge accusation!

C: 啊？难道你不知道可以这么做吗？那还真是可惜，没有聪明的头脑，注定令人惋惜的童年…哎，你错过了多少赚钱的大好机会啊。
E: Huh? Don't you know that's something that can be done? What a shame. Without the smarts, you will live a pitiful childhood... You missed out a great earning opportunity.

C: 是啊，惊梦剧团拜服在光明飞车的耀眼魅力之下，这情况很难理解吗？
E: Sure — can't you see how the Dreamjolt Troupe admires the dazzling charm of Radiant Speedster in awe?

C: 没错，它就是著名的七井盖之一，毁灭之井盖！
E: That's right, this is one of the famous Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Destruction!

C: 现在…时过境迁啊。
E: Now... times have really changed.

C: 列车将它们的嬉笑声留在原地，穿过天鹅绒和红宝石铺成的海洋，奔向它在梦境的下一站。而现在，便是它的到站之刻！
E: The train leaves their mirth where it is, piercing through an ocean paved in velvet and rubies, rushing toward the Dreamscape's next stop. And now, it is the moment of its stop!

C: 门被锁住了，你试图开门，但任你如何叫门，它纹丝不动。
E: The door is locked. You try to open it, but it wouldn't budge, no matter how much you call out for somebody to open it.

C: 求取宇宙的答案么…
E: Looking for the answer to the universe, huh...

C: 什么时候去天宫？
E: When are you heading back to the Palace?

C: 我可是亲身经历过的。
E: I experienced it myself.

C: 怎么能在这迷路的？
E: How did you even lose your way here?

C: 这技法，很妙啊…
E: That is a brilliant technique...

C: 全身都快散架了……
E: I feel like I'm gonna fall apart...

C: 我想再回去泡一会。
E: I want to head back for another soak.

C: 我们已经在新世界了吗？
E: We're already in the new world?

C: 哎呀呀呀，哎呀！怎么又没扔中？我还有急事要去一趟永狩原呢，我那些伙伴们还等着我一起去放生呢……
E: Ahh, good grief! How'd I miss again? I'm gonna be late to the Ever-Hunt Plains, all my friends are waiting for me for the life-release ceremony...

C: 喝茶吧，烈焰浓茶很劲道。
E: How about a cup of tea? Flaming Potent Tea is pretty strong.

C: …{NICKNAME}乘客怎么和三月七乘客一样…不过出门在外，的确得带够食物，以免饿肚子。
E: ...{NICKNAME}, you're just like March 7th... But really, please take enough food out with you, otherwise you'll get hungry.

C: 我给你唱个摇篮曲吧！
E: I can sing you a lullaby!

C: 我是多愁善感的类型。
E: I get sentimental easily.

C: 还好，我随便逛逛就好…
E: It's okay. I can just go for a stroll if I want...

C: 还行，但没什么特别的。
E: It's alright, but nothing special.

C: 姑且就先将这个数据记下来吧！说不定三月乘客开始裁剪布料的时候，帕姆又长高了呢？
E: Let's pencil in this data for now! Perhaps by the time March 7th starts cutting her cloth, Pom-Pom will have grown a little more again?

C: 那万一…有的乘客说这不是「宠物」，而是自己的伙伴！遇到这种情况的话，「行为准则」就废掉了帕！
E: ...Then, what if... What if someone says that something isn't a "pet," but is instead their "companion"!? If this happened, the Express Regulations would be useless!

C: 你回来啦！
E: You're back~

C: 没办法，刚刚打扫完车厢，实在有点累，一个不留神就……
E: What could I do? I was tuckered out after cleaning up the coach. My mind drifted off without me realizing it...

C: 所以{NICKNAME}乘客有在哪儿结交到什么朋友吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, did you make any friends there?

C: 一些基础物资可以直接去找对应科室要～当然，太过贵重和麻烦的东西还是不要麻烦他们了。
E: For some basic supplies, we can go directly to the corresponding department to ask for them. Well, but don't ask for things that are too expensive and troublesome.

C: 关于「资源补给协议」…
E: About the resource supply agreement...

C: 要制定列车行为准则，帕姆还有很长的路要走呢。
E: Pom-Pom still has a long way to go to develop a code of conduct for the Express.

C: 不过有好几次，帕姆都看到他明明是睡着了，但「拟态」还在不断循环播放动画。
E: On several occasions, Pom-Pom caught Welt sleeping in the middle of the broadcast!

C: 你需要突破我们设下的封锁线，并在终点接受邓恩队长的试炼。
E: You have to break through the blockade we've set up, and take on Captain Dunn's trial at the end.

C: 没错！这种规格的禁区演练，还是得靠我才能撑住场面啊！
E: That's right! You'll have to rely on me to handle drills of this scale in the restricted zone!

C: 喔唷，{NICKNAME}！你居然真来了！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! I can't believe you are here!

C: 我有种预感，{NICKNAME}——这次我们要面对的敌人肯定更加难缠。不过好在技术部已经提前部署好了照雪灯炉，对我们的行动有很大帮助。
E: {NICKNAME}, I have a feeling we'll be up against even tougher enemies this time. Luckily, the Technology Division has made sure all the Snowshine Lamps are ready — it is a tremendous help to our action.

C: 之前的两次作战，你的表现真是惊人——铁卫里的小年轻都在疯传你的事迹呢。依我看，你在部队里的名望很快就要超过我了，可喜可贺！
E: Your performance in the last two raids was outstanding! The young Silvermane Guards can't stop talking about you. In my opinion, your reputation in the troop will soon surpass mine. Congratulations!

C: 我这把年纪，上前线硬拼已经有点力不从心了。我还是从远处欣赏你作战的英姿吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Fighting at the front lines is a tall order for someone my age. I'll stay here to watch you in action, {NICKNAME}.

C: 希望你一路安全，保持远程联系，我们一会碰头。
E: Be careful. We'll stay in remote contact, and I'll catch up with you later.

C: *电波滤音*我们已经侦查到行医市集附近有着大量怪物聚集，应该都是随着「云吟术」的异象一起出现的，想必你已经有经验了。
E: *electronic voice* We've detected a lot of monsters near the Healer's Market. They must have manifested with the cloudhymn magic anomalies, but I'm pretty sure you know well how to handle them.

C: （是上一次逃走的次元扑满，是被饵食吸引到这里来了吗？）
E: (Did the Warp Trotter that escaped last time get attracted here by the bait?)

C: 是吗，您玩得开心就好。
E: Oh, really? Glad to know that.

C: 这里似乎没有污染。那些怪物就交给云骑来清理吧。不过，还是要当心不要踩到那些「看不见的线」。
E: There's no pollution here. Leave the monsters to the Cloud Knights. Still, be careful not to trip on any of those "invisible wires."

C: 只要你能在一局一胜制的「猜拳」比赛中将他们全部击败，就能得到我们「黑暗拳斗大赛」组委会准备的超豪华奖励！
E: If you can beat them all in single rounds of rock-paper-scissors, you'll win a fabulous prize from the committee!
