C: 复读机啊你？
E: Are you a parrot?

C: 呃，好吧。
E: Uh, okay.

C: 喂，你！
E: Hey, you!

C: 我、我投降…
E: I... I give up...

C: 这是我的自由，你管不着！
E: What I do is my right and it's none of your business!

C: …再大胆点，发挥你的想象力！
E: Go wild. Use your imagination!

C: 没错，没错！瞧瞧，你已经完全上道了！
E: Yes, yes! Now you finally get it!

C: 此处贴着一幅艳美绝俗的画像…或者说，通缉令。画中的男性神情淡漠，手执蓝花，冷艳如冰霜。
E: There's an otherworldly, sensuous portrait here... or rather, a Wanted poster. The guy in the poster appears aloof, holding a blue flower as cool as ice.

C: …这些居然还没撤掉吗？！杰帕…啊不，戍卫官他到底在干什么……
E: ...Haven't these been removed yet!? Gepa— Ack, I mean, what the heck is the captain up to...

C: 东北方有什么？
E: What is in the northeast?

C: 继续向南。
E: Go further south.

C: 看向北方。
E: Look to the north.

C: 其实这里只用作接待访客，我的工作场所另在别处。这是出于安全考虑——
E: This room's actually just where I receive guests, and my workspace is elsewhere. For the sake of security...

C: 最终，你还是数出了喷泉里的硬币数量：10 / 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8 / 90 / 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8 / 9。这个数字有意义吗？可能有。你把这个数字记了下来，但之后数字或许将是另一个数字了。
E: In the end, you reach the final count: 10 / 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8 / 90 / 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8 / 9 coins. Is this number pertinent? Perhaps. You write it down, but then again the number might change later on.

C: 哎，不管怎么样，它的训练也算上有所成果——谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！
E: Ah, its training has paid off in any case — thank you, {NICKNAME}!

C: 我觉得可能是底层系统出现了问题，导致它有了不稳定的倾向。
E: I think there may be a problem with the core systems causing it to lose stability.

C: 这是我一点心意，还请笑纳。
E: This is the reward I prepared for you. Please enjoy.

C: 快点，我赶时间，你准备出多少？
E: C'mon, I'm in a hurry... How much can you pay in damages?

C: 这么珍贵的文物怎么搁在街边？
E: How can such a precious relic just be left on the street like this?

C: 没事，反正我也没上当。
E: That's okay, I didn't get scammed anyway.

C: 是受害者没跑了。这厮惯常拿什么「祖传宝刀」骗外来的旅客。受害人对仙舟不熟悉，就很容易着了他的道。
E: You must be the victim. This guy used the old "Family Treasure Sword" scam to trick Outworlders all the time. The victims are unfamiliar with Xianzhou history, and so are easily tricked.

C: 「『退婚？你…你们究竟是何人…我失去的一切，我一定要亲手拿回来！』丹鼎司天才医师昏迷数载，醒来竟遭未婚夫退婚羞辱！且看她如何逆转败局，夺回失去的一切！」
E: " 'Call off the marriage? Y—You... Who are you to... I've lost everything, and I'm going to claw it back with my bare hands!' The prodigy healer from the Alchemy Commission fell into a coma for several years, and awoke to the humiliating news of her fiancé's broken engagement! A thrilling story of reversing defeat and reclamation!"

C: 你正准备按下去，耳畔却突然响起一声呵斥——
E: You were about to press the button when a reprimanding voice caught your attention...

C: 你干嘛呀你！
E: Hey, what are you doing!

C: 哈哈哈哈，别那么害怕。你不肯给，我自然也不会强取。
E: Hahaha, don't be scared. I won't take anything you don't want to give.

C: （把手伸进去。）
E: (Reach in with your hand.)

C: 我不会再把手伸进去了。
E: I'm not sticking my hand in there again.

C: 尊敬的陌生人…
E: Dear stranger...

C: 你也明白，自己不可能留在这里，一辈子扮演那位替人消愁破闷的「逍遥先生」——尽管你或许真的很想这么做。
E: You also know that it's impossible for you to stay here, role-playing as Mr. Carefree and solving problems for everyone for the rest of your life — no matter how much you want to.

C: 怎么又要打怪…
E: Monsters again?

C: 如果你准备好了，我们这就出发吧。
E: If you're ready, we'll go ahead and move out.

C: 我再复述一遍吧…鹤运物流希望能委托你去到货物丢失的地方，操纵机巧鸟来寻找丢失的货物。
E: Allow me to repeat... Heron Express hopes to entrust you to go to places where the goods went missing and find them by controlling cycranes.

C: 等等再去。
E: Maybe later.

C: 这当然是不错，估计能换5个信用点？
E: This is pretty good, and you could maybe get about 5 credits for it?

C: 你是怎么知道那个人需要的？
E: How did you know they needed it?

C: 听说仙舟上有位从<color=#dbc291ff>星际和平公司远道而来的仙舟通</color>，他可能对「鲛人泪」感兴趣……
E: I heard that there's a Xianzhou <color=#dbc291ff>aficionado who came all the way from the IPC</color>. He might be interested in your Draconic Tears...

C: 阿然女士反复扫视着你脸上每一寸表情，半晌才如释重负般长舒了口气。
E: Miss Ran scanned your every expression again and again before letting out a sigh of relief after what seemed like an age — and what seemed like a heavy burden to bear.

C: 当看到别人因自己的帮助而重新振作起来时，那种满足感是难以言喻的。
E: That feeling of satisfaction you get when you see someone pick themselves up again because of your help... it's beyond words.

C: 嘘…您听到了吗？广场对面有人在哭…有人在笑。哭是因为心有渴望，笑是自嘲潦倒……
E: Shh... did you hear that? Someone is crying across the plaza... and someone's laughing. They cry because they still have desires, and they laugh out of ironic satire to their own despondency...

C: …又是这种态度、就是这种态度！你、你们…就因为大部分观众都是你这种水准……
E: ...There it is, this old attitude again! Y—You... because most of the audience are on the same level as you...

C: 我能明白您的感受，一直以来真是辛苦您……
E: I can understand how you feel. It's been so hard on you this whole time...

C: 再次睁开眼睛，「我」已经身处黄金的时刻，当起梦境中的酒店前台啦。
E: The next time I opened my eyes, "I" was already in the golden hour as a receptionist at the hotel in the dreamscape.

C: 听起来很困难。
E: That sounds difficult.

C: 我知道这故事很难以置信，但宇宙中离谱的事情实在太多了…何况我们是无名客，无名客不能被现实束缚了思维！
E: I know this story is unbelievable, but so many extreme things happen out there in the universe every day. Besides, we the Nameless cannot limit ourselves to the boundaries of reality!

C: 如果公司的效率真高到有了坐标就能立即出动，那他们早把我抓住了。
E: If IPC were ever powerful enough to send out an immediate dispatch for my coordinates, they'd have had me long ago.

C: 那两人为什么要纠缠你？
E: So why were those two bugging you then?

C: 等解开了钟表匠的秘密，我就要踏上自己的冒险了。这可能是我人生中最后一场冒险。
E: Once I've solved the Watchmaker's riddle, I'm going to embark on an adventure of my own. And it could just be the final adventure of my life.

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 拿过奖吗？
E: Have you won any awards?

C: …咳，算了，反正也不关我事。总而言之，那座新城给我的感觉就是「平庸」。
E: ...Ahem, forget it. It's none of my business. Anyway, that new city is nothing but mediocre, if you ask me.

C: 您对筑梦边境项目怎么看？
E: What do you think of the Dream's Edge project?

C: 展开说说？
E: Care to elaborate?

C: ——小部分盲目吹捧的拥趸将会被舆论攻击；小部分等待口碑反噬的看客会开始狂欢。而对于其他人——也是占到百分之九十的大多数而言——他们不会在乎。
E: Some will come under fire for blindly supporting the project, and some will be sitting on the edge of their seats, waiting to see the studio's reputation take a nosedive. As for the rest, which makes up to ninety percent of the public, they simply won't care.

C: 今天是个好日子，伙计！把那些不愉快的事统统忘掉吧——头脑转起来！手臂动起来！
E: Today is a good day, buddy! Let's put all the bad things behind us! Move those gears in your head! Get those arms moving!

C: 我们可是奇迹本杰明的筑梦师，匹诺康尼的建设者。我们在打造一项前人闻所未闻的事业！
E: We're the Dreamweavers from Miracle Benjamin. We're going to make history in Penacony!

C: 说就说，我都记下来了。
E: Sure. I've jotted it all down.

C: 「真对不起，{F#小姐}{M#先生}！我以名誉保证，我的玩笑里没有恶意…我真的没想到会伤及您的感情，请您接受我最郑重的道歉……」
E: "Oh, I'm truly sorry, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.}! I sincerely assure you there was no ill intent in my joke... and I genuinely didn't intend to hurt your feelings. So, please accept my most sincere apology..."

C: 真奇怪，我手上有这么厉害的发明，之前怎么没想着用呢…算了，想那么多干嘛？现在动手也不算晚！
E: Weird... I have such an awesome invention, yet I didn't think of using it before... But never mind! It's better late than never!

C: 哦，{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}在上！我们的好兄弟怎么倒下了？！
E: Oh! {RUBY_B#Harmony}Great One{RUBY_E#}! How did our poor brother end up like this!

C: 等着瞧吧，等艾默里奇的商业帝国拔地而起…老子绝对要让那个叛徒吃不了兜着走！
E: Just you wait... Once my business empire takes off... I'll make that traitor pay for his misdeeds!

C: 什么时候也能在乎一下我的精神追求，我是为了当武打演员才入职的……
E: Can somebody listen to what I really want, too? I joined this company to be a martial art actor...

C: 哈哈哈…我猜这些年轻人听到我的想法一定会很开心的！
E: Hahaha... I can imagine how thrilled those youngsters would be when they find out what I think!

C: 打个比方——苏乐达是公认的美味，但如果您每天的饮品都只有苏乐达，甚至连洗漱用水都变成了苏乐达，日复一日、年复一年…如此一来，您还会喜爱它吗？
E: For example, SoulGlad is widely recognized as a delicacy, but if you had to drink SoulGlad every single day, even use it for washing... day after day, year after year... would you still love it in the same way?

C: 自从发生那件事后，每当我凝望夜空，眼前都会浮现出那孩子的脸。
E: After that incident happened, I kept seeing the girl's face whenever I stared into the night sky.

C: 那你更该珍惜自己的人生！
E: That's all the more reason for you to cherish your life then!

C: 什…看来你比我想象中要开放得多啊，我的朋友……
E: Wha... Seems like you're more open-minded than I thought, my friend...

C: 皮皮西盯着你，似乎在估量你价值几何——即便你只看到他黑漆漆的镜片。
E: The Pepeshi fixates his gaze on you, seemingly to gauge your worth, though all you can see is his dark lenses.

C: 有机生物的观念来源于记忆。只有通过重复动作加深印象，才能养成良好的习惯——所以我希望大家都能捡起身边的垃圾。
E: Organic lives form their perceptions based on memory. One can only cultivate a good habit by repeating an action and strengthening their memory of it. Therefore, I hope everyone can pick up the surrounding trash.

C: 这会是一份极具价值的事业。可惜筑梦边境的工作让我抽不开身，没法亲自搜集各地的垃圾。
E: This is going to be a profitable business, but I'm too busy with my work at the Dream's Edge to collect trash myself.

C: 我出发时，母星的能源就开始逼近枯竭。如今又一个琥珀纪过去，根据我的计算，那里已无人烟。
E: The sources of energy on my home planet were already close to depletion when I left. Now that an Amber Era has passed, the planet should be uninhabited, according to my estimation.

C: 格-蕾的身体突然发出一阵颤抖。即便她的脸只是纯色金属，你还是能从中品出些许愤怒。
E: Go-Ray's body shudders all of a sudden. Although her face is made of metal, you can still discern a touch of rage in her expression.

C: 真是不见棺材不落泪！恐怕只有等出现了不可挽回的后果后，他们才能明白保护环境的重要性。
E: They'll only realize the importance of preserving the environment when they suffer the consequences!

C: 但无论别人怎么说，都不影响我每天睁眼闭眼都是黑影、鬼脸、各种可怕的怪物。
E: But no matter what they say, it still doesn't change the fact that I see shadows, horrifying visages and frightening monsters every waking and sleeping moment.

C: …{F#她}{M#他}？哦，{F#她}{M#他}是被困在酒店里的宾客，我正打算送{F#她}{M#他}出去……
E: ...{F#Her}{M#Him}? Oh, {F#She's}{M#He's} a guest who's trapped in the hotel. I was just about to escort {F#her}{M#him} out...

C: 酸酸的…甜甜的……
E: Sour... sweet...

C: 你再三确认，眼前的家伙就是玩具的买主，他鬼鬼祟祟地站在这里，不知道还以为在交易见不得人的东西。
E: You confirm and re-confirm that this guy is indeed the buyer of the toys. He looks super-shady as he's standing there, as though he's planning to deal in something dodgy.

C: 你是个和平世界的人，这些知识或许你一辈子也用不着。但谁能说清呢？
E: You come from a peaceful homeworld, and might not put this knowledge into practice for the rest of your life. But who knows?

C: 奥科萨娜恶狠狠地盯着你，看来，她也终于感受到了——善意的回报。
E: Oksana stares at you in rage. Looks like she's finally getting a taste of her own karma.

C: 如果不是那个讨厌的家伙横插一脚，这届冠军本该是我的囊中之物！
E: If it weren't for that meddling fool, this season's championship should have been in the bag! My bag!

C: 嗐，和这所学校刚经历过的危机相比，我个人的苦难又算得上什么呢？该死的模因病毒！
E: Eh, my suffering is inconsequential when compared to the crisis that this university was put through. That darned memetic virus!

C: 再往后，匹诺康尼成了盛会之星，谐乐学院也随之成立。它主要负责培育优秀的乐手、歌者和艺人，知更鸟小姐就是我们的名誉校友之一。
E: Later, Charmony Academy was established when Penacony became the Planet of Festivities. Charmony Academy is mainly responsible for nurturing talented musicians, singers, and artists. Miss Robin is one of our honorary alumni.

C: 哪里有星光？怎么什么也没有啾！
E: Where's the starlight? Why can't I see anything, tweet?

C: …怎么是沙滩椅在说话。
E: ...Is that deckchair talking?

C: 我只是想看看你。
E: I just wanted to see you.

C: 从这里看下去，每个人都是一颗颗忙碌的小星星！奇怪，我的视线里怎么会有这么多星星在转圈……
E: From this angle, everyone looks like a busy little star! Weird, why are there so many stars circling in my vision...

C: 偷听别人讲话不好吧。
E: Eavesdropping isn't right.

C: 我得回去梳洗一下了，希望下次能带给你真正的惊喜啾！
E: Gotta go preen my feathers now. I'll give you a proper surprise next time, tweet!

C: 极其普通的杂物箱，你不知道是哪位无聊人士把它们堆叠在一起的。堆叠的手法并不严谨，箱体看起来有些摇摇欲坠，你决定——
E: Ordinary boxes filled with clutter. You have no idea who was bored enough to stack them all up together like this. They aren't stacked very neatly, and seem to be on the verge of toppling over. You decide to...

C: 以你的身高，你是怎么做到的？
E: How do you manage that with your height?

C: 我还没准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 遍布星球各地的同胞...真想亲眼看见那一天啊。
E: Our kin-folk spread across an entire planet... I long to see such a day with my own eyes.

C: 地髓萃取液。
E: Geomarrow extract.

C: 可惜工地上没什么值钱的东西，就先收下这些吧。
E: It's a shame we have nothing of value on the site. Take these as our thanks.

C: 原来没加工梦泡是不能吃的，真是遗憾啾。
E: So unprocessed dream bubbles are not edible. What a shame, tweet.

C: 鸟怎么游泳？
E: How can birds swim?

C: 其他小鸟也这么说，但宝藏不就是应该藏在最意想不到的地方吗啾？
E: The other birdies also said this, but aren't treasures found in the least expected places?

C: 梦里还会冷？
E: It gets cold in dreams?

C: 来，这是人家给客官准备的礼物，请好好珍惜啾~
E: Here, this is a gift I've prepared for you. Please treasure it, tweet!

C: 太感谢客官了啾！一点小小的礼物，请务必收下啾~
E: Thank you so much, tweet! This is a token of my appreciation. You must accept it, tweet~!

C: 太吓鸟了，翘班差点被发现了啾…还是先回去吧啾……
E: That was scary. I almost got caught for slacking off, tweet... Better go back first, tweet...

C: 那就快去把小家伙们找回来吧，啾啾！
E: Hurry and bring the little ones back, tweet tweet!

C: 但是「魔法硬币」可以唤醒在下潜藏的记忆啾！
E: But a Magic Coin can awaken my hidden memories, tweet!

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个聪明的孩子很擅长把自己藏在<color=#dbc291ff>「贴图橱窗」里</color>，但它不知道其实只要换个角度自己就暴露了啾……
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet tweet... That's right! There's a smart kid that excels in hiding in <color=#dbc291ff>sticker display cases</color>, but it doesn't know that you can see it plain as day from another angle, tweet...

C: 哼哼~危险也是一种魅力啾~
E: Hehe, danger can be attractive too, tweet!

C: 怎么样，是不是很帅！
E: What do you think, don't I look cool?

C: 但我只有翅膀。快来帮我摁一下啾！
E: But I only have wings, help me push it, tweet!

C: 哼，我要回去找黄金公子告状了啾！
E: Humph, I'm going back to tell Young Master Gold about this!

C: 啾啾——孩子们果然是在朝露小屋里跑散了啾！
E: Tweet tweet... I knew they were running around Dawndew Hut, tweet!

C: 给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
E: Tell me the story of the origami birds...

C: 没关系，折纸小鸟中有许多擅长拍电影的小帮手啾！本公子已经想好了剧本，就当它们开拍了啾！
E: Not to worry, I have many assistants among the origami birds that are great at filmmaking! I have already come up with the script, it's just up to them to get shooting, tweet!

C: 请先把刚刚说的那个助手叫过来吧~
E: Please get that assistant we just mentioned to come back first!

C: 让我瞧瞧您的翅膀…哦，看来您应该是观众啾。
E: Let's take a look at your wings... Oh, you must be here to spectate the races, tweet.

C: 如果一直种下去，我是不是能高得连剧场都装不下啾？
E: If I keep watering myself, will I grow so tall that I can't even fit into a theater, tweet?

C: 演出什么时候开场呢？我都快等不及了啾。
E: When does the show start? I can't wait, tweet.

C: 真是个古板的朋友，要懂得苦中作乐啾。
E: What an old-fashioned friend. You must learn how to find joy in sorrow, tweet.

C: 噗噗噗…
E: Fufufu...

C: 咻噜噜噜噜…
E: *slurp*...

C: 那你说说应该怎么叫？
E: You tell me how what they sound like then.

C: 顺带一提，如果你对折纸小鸟玩法有任何的意见或者建议，这是你最后的机会啾~
E: By the way, if you have any feedback or suggestions to share about the gameplay for the Origami Birds, this is your last chance, tweet!

C: 我也回去仔细想想，就这样啾。
E: I'll go back and have a think, that's all, tweet.

C: 感谢好评，已记录您的回答啾。
E: Thank you for the good review. I've recorded your response, tweet.

C: 以公司和文明的名义，我要对你做出惩罚！
E: In the name of civilization and the IPC, I will reprimand you!

C: 好哇，我就知道你遵纪守法的态度是装出来的！看来今天必须得好好修理你一顿了！
E: Ha-ha! I knew that law-abiding attitude of yours was all fake! Looks like I'll have to teach you a real good lesson today!

C: 居然真有人能做到...
E: Someone really did it...

C: 我可以送你回去。
E: I can take you back.

C: …我头上可不会长杂草。喏，这是花，我最喜欢的漂亮小花。
E: ...I don't have any weeds growing on my head. Look! These are flowers. My favorite little pretty flowers.

C: 你们神策府的人还挺有意思，一开口就不对味，但一个个都挺自信的。
E: It's funny how you folks from the Seat of Divine Foresight never seem to fit in with the more dicey crowd, yet all believe you fit in so well.

C: 我俩都是学宫的学生，前段时间在丹鼎司实习。我们一直听说丹鼎司有很多不能给外人看的「禁忌书典」，趁着丹鼎司乱作一团，就想搞一本来偷偷看看。
E: We are both students at the academy, and we were interning at the Alchemy Commission not long ago. We heard about the forbidden tomes, so we took advantage of the chaos in the Commission and snatched one of them.

C: 这书原来是被那几个实习的学生给偷走了…我还在想呢，要是丹枢大人的那些残党，肯定都知道这书没什么价值，不会去偷的。
E: So it was stolen by those interns... You know, I was wondering why Lady Dan Shu's remnants would steal this book, because they should be well aware that this book is totally worthless.

C: 至少我听说的版本是这样的，强行植入他人的记忆，这种事情天方夜谭，除非有忆庭的人才能做到…等等，好像也有可能？
E: At least, this is what I've heard. As for "transplanting memories," that's simply too wild to be true. It's impossible without the help of the Garden of Recollection... Wait, what if they're really involved?

C: 您要只说「阿幸」，我还真未必能想起来。但您要加上「倒霉的」这个定语，那就没别人了…他每次的卜卦都是凶签，但还是坚持不懈地卜卦。
E: A-Xing? Well, I may not remember the name along, but since you mentioned "jinxed," I can hardly forget someone as unlucky as him... I mean, he has never drawn a "Weal" stick, but he just keeps on trying anyway.

C: 玉兆开始转动，某种看不见的屏障隔绝了你与外界的联系。在突如其来的宁静里，某个模糊的画面渐渐清晰了起来——
E: As the jade abacus starts spinning, some kind of invisible barrier separates you from the outside world. In the midst of the sudden tranquility, a blurred yet unmistakable image gradually becomes clear...

C: （丹恒问我借钱？真的假的…该怎么办好呢？）
E: (Dan Heng asked to borrow money from me? Is he for real...? What am I going to do?)

C: 哼，我见过不少像你这样嘴硬的人，没关系，到了十王司了你就会明白自己现在有多可笑了。
E: Hmph, I've seen lots of tight-lipped people like you before. It's fine. You'll see just how ridiculous you're being once we get to the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 救、救救救命啊——
E: H—Help me...!

C: 谢谢你，琴师的遗作完成了，我也满足了。我自由了！
E: Thank you. The guqinist's legacy is now complete, and I'm happy too. I'm free!

C: 此夜且与君成双，可怜我来日又守空房。
E: At night, we'll embrace as one, so tight. Come tomorrow, you'll take your flight.

C: 他大概会什么都不做，在原地等我。但我实在也懒得动弹……
E: He would probably do nothing and just sit there. But I'm really too lazy to move...

C: 这就结束了吗？以后还有吗？
E: Is this all? Will there be nothing else?

C: 哟，伙计！不得不说，游戏确实有让人心情舒畅的魔力，我感觉自己越来越上手了！
E: Hey, buddy! I have to admit, gaming really does have a soothing magic to it. I feel like I'm getting better and better!

C: 这是一个帕姆玩偶，与你在列车上见到的别无二致…但是它为什么出现在这里？
E: This is a Pom-Pom doll, identical to the Pom-Pom you see on the Express... But why would it be here?

C: 你说得对，女儿，你说得对。
E: Quite right.

C: 它理应得到报应！为了你被浪费的宝贵时间、为了你被辜负的恻隐之心！
E: It deserves punishment! It wasted your precious time and your kindness!

C: 有困难，找猎犬——我随时为你效劳！
E: If you're in trouble, call the Bloodhounds on the double — we are always at your service!

C: 这位朋友，你看，我们多次不期而遇，说明缘分不浅，介意再帮我个忙吗？
E: My friend, look, we have run into each other many times, that means we are fated. Would you be willing to help me?

C: 家族当然不是好骗的，所以他把这个托付给了你，只要你能到场，他就有把握赢下这场和家族的生死局。他为这天准备了很久了。
E: Of course, The Family is not so easy to trick, so he gave this to you to look after. As long as you went to watch the game, he would be able to seize victory and win this gamble to the death with The Family. He spent a long time preparing for that day.

C: 我知道的就这么多。那块碎片…既然他送给了你，就还是由你保管吧。
E: This is all I know. As for this fragment... He gave it to you, so you should keep it safe.

C: …不是同色。我输了。
E: ...It's not the same symbol. I lost.

C: 得盯紧点…
E: We need to keep an eye on him...

C: 唉。想必您也看出来了，我并非这儿的本地人，沦落至此…全因过往的那场悲剧。
E: Ah. I'm sure you can tell, I am not of this place. My being here is all because of that tragedy in the past...

C: 可以开始了。
E: Let's begin.

C: 当然要尽心爱戴啦！
E: Of course I will treasure it!

C: 我们怎么变成了这样？
E: How did we end up looking like this?

C: 啾，朋、朋友，你，您现在有空么？
E: Tweet, m—my friend, do—do you have a minute?

C: 没错，真英雄慧眼识珠，就让这两个乡巴佬瞧瞧，真正的高档酒。
E: That's right, the hero has the discerning eye that will allow you two common bumpkins to witness what a high-quality wine truly is!

C: 就像是，飘着一团看不见的梦。
E: It's like there are invisible dreams floating above you...

C: 别查案了，去玩吧。
E: Don't worry about the case. Just go and play.

C: 来吧，走出你的第一步，让我大赚——我是说，成为桶王的第二位门徒。
E: Come on. Take your first step, and let me get rich — I mean, let me guide you to become the second disciple of the King.

C: 都是老熟人了，我也不多说什么，赶快交钱走人，大家都轻松。
E: We know each other by now, I ain't gonna keep explainin'. Pay the money n' scram n' we can all relax.

C: 虽然你这幅样子很适合去撑场子，但现在是做暗号的时候吧！
E: That face ya got might give us street cred, but now it's time to do the secret signal!

C: 睡觉。
E: Sleep.

C: 看来你已经很熟悉我们的暗号了。
E: Looks like you're now real familiar with the secret signal.

C: 做梦泡赚钱！
E: Make dream bubbles to earn money!

C: 我？当然是冰点苏乐达，那完美地停留在冻结前一刻的危险体验。
E: Me? Ice SoulGlad, obviously. The danger of staying in that state just before you freeze completely is perfect!

C: 哼，所谓的苏乐达地窖，也不过如此。
E: Hah, is this all the legendary "SoulGlad cellar" has to offer?

C: 我…不知道。千头万绪，一时间实在是让人无所适从。
E: I... don't know. There are too many things happening, I'm too confused to process them right now.

C: 感谢惠顾！两位真是知更鸟小姐最忠实的粉丝啊，我深表尊敬。这位灰色的朋友怎么想呢？再不出手，货就要卖完咯？
E: Thanks for the business! You two truly are the most devoted fans of Miss Robin, and I sincerely take my hat off to you. What do you say then, my gray buddy? If you don't act soon, it'll be sold out.

C: 走，跟我去自首！
E: Come with me and turn yourself in!

C: 不知道能不能抢到…
E: Hope I can grab one...

C: 这人谁啊，哪个小明星吗，我怎么没见过……
E: Who's that? Is that some small-time singer? I've never seen her before...

C: 「请闭上眼睛，再往前看」
E: "Close your eyes and look ahead."

C: 《午夜特快》
E: "The Midnight Special"

C: 很可惜，在你如今所在的世界里没有那种奇妙的量化标准。但你握住了这枚硬币，好似握住了整个银河的气运，心中平白多了不少底气。
E: Unfortunately, miraculous quantitative attributes such as a "luck value" do not actually exist in the world that you're currently in. Nevertheless, you grip the coin tightly, almost as though you are holding the entire cosmos's fate in the palm of your hand. Doing so fills you with confidence.

C: 邀请星穹列车全员！
E: Invite the entire Astral Express crew!

C: 请容我为大家介绍一下——
E: Allow me to explain...

C: 没想到景元将军出手的场景如此震撼，没能亲眼见证实在可惜。
E: I never imagined General Jing Yuan's appearance would be so astounding. It's a shame I couldn't see it for myself.

C: 嗯，这就是开拓精神！
E: Ahh, such is the spirit of trailblazing!

C: 你终于拿到了*谁也找不到的《魔阴身考》*，要是有一个世界广播，你应该告诉银河里所有想要找到这本书的朋友。
E: You finally get your hands on the unfindable A Study into the Mara-Struck. If only there were a global channel, you would tell everyone in the Cosmos who's trying to find this book.

C: 要打便打，哪有那么多废话？
E: Let's just cut to the chase and duke it out.

C: 我就靠你的声音了哦，保持联系。
E: I'm counting on you to tell me where to go. Stay in touch!

C: 啊！一种说不清的成就感，油然而生。
E: Ah, this sense of achievement welling up within me!

C: 别急，别急。
E: Easy, buddy.

C: 你常常在大型场馆、或者会议入口，或者交通枢纽，见过这样的行李安检的传输带。为了公众的安全考虑，仔细查验包裹中是否携带违禁设备。
E: You often see conveyor belts like this used for baggage screening at large-scale venues, conference hall entrances, and transport hubs. Out of concern for public safety, packages are carefully screened for prohibited items.

C: 当然，不客气。
E: Of course. You're welcome.

C: 哥你先合上嘴…好了，这样我们就统一意见了。
E: Brother, shut your mouth for just a second... Alright, now we're on the same page.

C: 老早就想这么做了，好爽！
E: I've always wanted to do that, and that feels great!

C: 放炮一时爽，坐牢悔断肠。
E: Setting off a cannon may be fun, but you'll regret it in prison when you're done!

C: 哼哼，只有没亲眼看过飞行编队表演的人，才会做出如此无知的发言。
E: Humph! Only someone who had never seen my display team with their own eyes would dare make such an ignorant statement.

C: 这套阵型以仙舟古兵法为基础改编，退可聚拢为守，进可直进为攻，变幻无穷。
E: This formation is adapted from ancient Xianzhou military formations. As they retreat, they tighten ranks to defend. As they attack, they advance straight. The routine changes endlessly.

C: 没错！好兄弟，我们得喊点什么壮壮胆气——
E: That's right! Brother, let us do a battle cry to evoke our courage...

C: 呃…那既然罪犯已经伏法，剩下的事就交给我们吧。
E: Uhh... Well, as the criminal has been brought to justice, you can leave the rest to us.

C: 「我是谁、我在哪、今天吃什么」——正当你迷茫的小脑袋瓜开始不自觉思考起人生的终极难题时，却见讲师突然转身，双手重重拍在讲台上。
E: "Who am I, where am I, what should I eat today" — just as your baffled little brain starts to ruminate on the ultimate questions of life, the lecturer suddenly spins around, both his hands slamming down hard on the lectern.

C: 一个纸团「啪——」地落在你的桌面上。
E: A paper ball falls on your desk with a soft thud.

C: 导演已经决定了，就由……
E: The director has decided, and it'll be...

C: 噢！还有反转！会是怎样惊人的展开呢？所有人都等着，只见阿红选手迅捷地跳起……
E: Oh! A twist! What jaw-dropping display will there be? Everyone is waiting, to see Reddie dexterously jump...

C: 拍摄结束了，感觉还不错吧？哎呀，不愧是著名童星，临场表现能这么出色。
E: The shoot's over. Not bad, eh? Gosh, that was absolutely the acting chops of a child star. Such an outstanding spontaneous performance.

C: 顶端熠熠生辉的神秘装置，它究竟是用的什么燃料？你无从考证，只觉得此时此景，就这么开着似乎有些浪费能源……
E: A mysterious device that dazzles with radiance at the very top of the installation. What does it use for fuel? You are unable to confirm this. You just feel that it's a waste of energy to leave it on right now...

C: 点燃试试。
E: Ignite it.

C: 你收起钱袋就跑，急转身时却不慎摔倒，钱袋跌了出去，旁边商铺的老板在谈话间正好发现。
E: You take the money and run, but as you're turning, you slip and fall, and the pouch goes flying away from you. It just so happened to get noticed by a business owner of a nearby shop while they were in mid-conversation.

C: 您请放心，我在闲暇之余，已经将心理诊疗课程自学完毕。
E: Don't worry. I've completed the psychotherapy courses through self-study in my spare time.

C: 说明您喜欢黑色。
E: It means you like black.

C: 抱歉，亲爱的无名客，看来「脑波扫描」果然还是个不大稳定的技术。
E: Dear Nameless, I'm sorry, but it seems that Brainwave Scan is still an unstable technology.

C: 柔软的床垫，温暖的被子。你枕在云朵似的枕头上，困意顿时如潮水般袭来。
E: Soft mattress, warm quilt. As soon as your head hits the cloud-like pillow, sleepiness comes in waves.

C: 瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
E: By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!

C: 合情合理，只还<unbreak>40</unbreak>万！
E: It's very reasonable to only repay <unbreak>400,000</unbreak>!

C: 大地兽是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的神圣造物，只可租赁，禁止私人售卖。
E: Dromases are the divine creations of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}. They are only available for rental — private sale is forbidden.

C: 要是当天不回家呢？
E: What if the person doesn't go home on that day?

C: 求己不如求人！
E: Might as well ask someone!

C: （全部喝掉）
E: (Drink it all)

C: 路过的人，找到我的人，想要好东西。给我，给我。
E: You by the side of the road. You who have found me. I want something good. Give me something good.

C: 漂亮！看来你还精通基础数学，我的垃圾桶定理后继有人了！
E: Well done! You're skilled at basic math too, it seems! Now, I have a successor to my Trashcan Theorem!

C: 怎么，你是在怀疑本王的判断？看来必须好好教导你一些皇室礼仪了。
E: What? Are you questioning the King's judgment? Looks like someone needs a lesson in royal etiquette.

C: 什、什么？可恶……
E: Wh—What? Dagnabbit...

C: 这批苏乐达钱已经付过了，你直接把货拿走就行。不过以防万一我还是先问一句，接头暗号是什么？
E: The goods have been paid, so you can just take them. Just to be safe, please tell me the passphrase for this transaction.

C: 请告诉我出去的办法…
E: Please tell me how to get out of here...

C: 不就是打黑工？
E: Isn't that just illegal labor?

C: 既见本尊，为何不拜？
E: The person you're looking for is right in front of you. Are you not going to acknowledge your master?

C: 师傅…我悟了！
E: Master... I get it now!

C: 还是等白厄写吧。
E: Better wait for Phainon to reply himself.

C: 这也是一种锻炼勇气和真诚的方式。
E: That too is a way to practice courage and sincerity.

C: 我相信我们会在旅途中再次相遇。
E: I believe we'll meet again, somewhere along the way.

C: 叮——这个承载着「启程」约定的风铃再度响起，仿佛应和着来自过去的遥远回音。
E: Ding — this wind chime carrying the promise of "Departure" rang again, as if echoing a distant memory from the past.

C: （我的身边…？）
E: (Right next to me...?)

C: 嗯哼，果然很顺利呢。就这样小心前进……
E: Going smoothly, just as I expected. Be careful on your way in...

C: 打谷场…要是从天上看，会不会像是一座被麦浪簇拥的小岛？
E: Threshing grounds... If we looked down from the sky, would this look like an island surrounded by ripples of wheat?

C: 可惜都被我找到了！哀丽秘榭还是站在人家这一边的嘛。
E: Too bad for you, I found you every time! Aedes Elysiae is on my side, after all.

C: 看上去你和人家一样，都很期待彼此下一次美好的同行吧？
E: You look just as excited as I am for our next wonderful journey together, don't you?

C: 是因为战争的气息太过浓烈，以至于士兵的神智都模糊不清，误以为自己便是那指挥全军的将领了么？无论如何，看来我选错了人质。
E: Could it be that the spirit of battle has overwhelmed your sanity, causing you to become confused? Does a mere soldier believe themself to be a general of the whole army? Whatever the case, it seems that I have picked the wrong person as a hostage.

C: 原来你不是尼卡多利的随从？
E: So, you're not a follower of Nikador?

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Climb inside the wooden horse's stomach)

C: 唔，没事，就是有点晕。刚才传送的时候，好像和上一位祭司撞上了，现在灵智有些混乱…好心人，请问我现在传到哪来了？
E: I'm alright, just dizzy. Must have bumped into the previous priest during transport, and my mind's rather confused... Tell me, friend, where have I been shipped to?

C: 是啊，你并非树庭学者，也对那些艰深的学术探讨提不起兴趣。学院生活并不适合像你这样将「开拓」视为终身事业的无名客，还是以后再来吧。
E: Fair enough, you're not a Grove Scholar, and such deep academic pursuits hold little appeal. Scholar's life ill suits a Nameless devoted to "Trailblazing" — better to return later.

C: …你认为自己缺乏智慧吗？当然不会。这行充满着嘲弄意味的标语激起了你的逆反心理，无论是否得到许可，你都偏要试试。
E: ...Think yourself unwise? Certainly not. Such a taunting message only strengthens your rebellious resolve — permitted or not, you'll make the attempt.

C: 呼唤雅努斯降下神迹需要时间。涅柔娅只是走向了天父为她安排的归宿，不要让忿恼惊扰她的安眠，一同来祷告吧。
E: Calling upon Janus to bestow a miracle takes time. Nereia simply walked toward the destiny the Heavenly Father had prepared for her. Let not anger disturb her rest, let us pray together.

C: 跟我聊聊秘酿。
E: Talk to me about ambrosia.

C: 秘酿…仙馔秘酿是至宝！用大地的身体发酵…灌进天空的云朵里…他生气了，嘻嘻嘻……
E: Ambrosia... Celestial Ambrosia is supreme! Fermented with the land's body... encased in the sky's clouds... He's angry, heeheehee...

C: 那就理你一下吧…
E: Let me tease you...
Woof...

C: 我还有一些问题想要咨询…
E: I have a few more questions for you...

C: 你辛苦了，我没有什么想要问的了。
E: Thank you for your hard work. I don't have any other questions.

C: 关于那位古恩老师……
E: About Mr. Gunn...

C: 就是你我二人脚下站定的位置，黑塔科员向「反物质军团」组织反击的据点。
E: It is the very ground on which we stand. The stronghold from which the space station researchers fought back against the Antimatter Legion.

C: 很遗憾，这里的科员大多数是一些自私之辈。他们过分关注眼前短浅的利益，升职加薪一类的事情更值得他们去付出心血。
E: Unfortunately, most of the researchers here are selfish. They care too much about short-term interests. They are more willing to put their efforts into things like promotion and salary.

C: 她作为密卷科的明星科员，作为访问学者出使了丰饶星域。
E: As a celebrity researcher of the Department of Insight, she is on a visit to the Abundance segmentum.

C: 请你搞清楚，我是埃美丽！虽然从血亲上说我是她的妹妹，但希望你可以独立地认识我，不要和其他人一样，老是把我和那个女人扯上关系。
E: Understand this, I'm Emily! Even though technically I'm her sister, I hope you can get to know me as an independent individual, instead of associating me with that woman, like everybody else.

C: 哦，知道了。
E: Okay.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 是吧，豆沙灰灰说得没错，「盐渍冬梅」的味道已经过时了，所以阮•梅女士打心底不喜欢我，所以她一直不回来看我。
E: Right? Gray Bean Paste's not wrong to say that I'm an outdated snack. That's why Miss Ruan Mei dislikes me from the bottom of her heart and never comes back to visit me.

C: 你是…？
E: You are?

C: 我受够了，为什么换个零件这么复杂！
E: I'm so sick of this! Why is it so difficult to replace the part?

C: 好吧，说吧，你到底想说什么？有什么事赶紧说，别耽误我时间！
E: Fine. Just tell me what's on your mind. Make it quick and don't waste my time!

C: 急躁？你看看，你看看，这里都乱成一团了，如果不及时清理干净，阮•梅要是突然回来了怎么办？看到我们把家里弄得这么脏，她肯定会很伤心的。
E: Impatient? Can you see how disorganized this place is? What do we do if Ruan Mei suddenly comes back and the place is not cleaned? She'll be upset to see us turning the place into a mess, that's what.

C: 是的。不过我这样做，其实是在故意绕远路。在找到她之前，我想先行探索生命的奥秘，还有——
E: Yes. Actually, I've been taking the scenic route, in the hopes that I'll uncover the secrets of life before meeting her. Also...

C: 这里很危险，还是回去吧。
E: It's dangerous here. You should go back.

C: 小机器人突然宕机了，你决定——
E: The little robot suddenly crashes. You decide to...

C: 假如用他的盾防御你的矛…
E: If you used his shield to block your lance...

C: 你俩怎么又在一起？
E: What are you two doing together again?

C: 基于「开拓」的精神，你有些好奇这东西是否还能正常使用，于是你将其翻找一番。
E: Your trailblazing spirit makes you curious as to whether this thing can still be used, so you decide to rummage through it.

C: 无意义的诡辩。你的提问无非是在混淆概念。
E: A meaningless argument. Your line of questioning is conflating different concepts with each other.

C: 我并非不愿思考，而是不愿动摇思考的根基。
E: It is not that I am unwilling to reflect. I am unwilling to shake the very foundation of thought itself.

C: 哈，当然！莫非你想要说，你思想中的阿卡索斯城永恒存在、真实可信，看得见摸得着的城邦，反而不如你的想象那般确定？
E: Hah, of course! Are you trying to claim that the Icatus in your mind will exist forever, whereas a visible and tangible city is not as much a certainty as the one in your imagination?

C: 我们看到了圆形的东西，才得到「圆」的概念。「阿卡索斯」也是这样，但现在你却说，「阿卡索斯」规定着所有能找到的阿卡索斯城。
E: I have to see a circular object to obtain the concept of a "circle." "Icatus" is the same. However, you are now saying that "Icatus" itself defines the cities of Icatus that we discover for ourselves.

C: （质疑：论证方式有误。）
E: (Question: Your means of refutation is flawed.)

C: 你的这番言论，属实有些太过欠缺思考了。还是仔细想想吧。
E: These remarks of yours require further reflection. Why not think about this a little more?

C: 若是「阿卡索斯」真实存在，请问——它到底以什么方式存在？
E: If "Icatus" truly exists, then allow me to ask you... In what form does it exist?

C: 赫卡忒沉默地阅读起手中的石板，随着时间流逝，她的脸色变得愈发阴沉。
E: Hekate silently reads the slate in her hand and, as time passes, her face grows ever more somber.

C: 话不能乱说。
E: Please don't joke about that.

C: 要多消灭点怪物哈。
E: Keep slaying those monsters, okay.

C: 没错，真的有人能拒绝一个楚楚可怜的小姑娘吗？何况你是如此富有，十个故事也负担得起。
E: That's right, could anyone ever hope to refuse that girl with those puppy dog eyes? Besides, you're so rich now that you can afford the price of ten news items.

C: 有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
E: Did you see a child running this way?

C: 她的藏身处就在右边高台上，去找吧，她把所有财宝都放在那里了。
E: She's hiding up high on a platform to the right. Go take a look. That's where she stashes all her precious stuff.

C: 有多远？难道他们背着我偷偷回故乡了吗？我要去找他们！
E: How far? Don't tell me they went back to our hometown without telling me? I wanna find them!

C: 放心，完全不带怕的。
E: No worries. I can handle anything.

C: 反物质军团怎么就突然来了，我不会要死在这里吧？爸爸，妈妈，亲爱的…我好想你们。
E: Why did the Antimatter Legion suddenly come here? I don't wanna die here! Mom, dad, my sweet angel... I miss you so much.

C: 咳咳…我再试一次：「椰冻奶盖拿铁最好喝！」
E: Ahem... let me try again: "Coconut milk lattes are the best!"

C: 怎么就不对了？
E: How is it not right?

C: 一个投影而已，至于吗？
E: It's just a projection, though. So what?

C: 噢，那我试试吧。
E: Alright, I'll give it a shot.

C: 我不知道，我只是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}祝福的旅人。
E: I don't know... I'm just a traveler blessed by {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}.

C: 伊俄，你和埃德加各一半责任。
E: Eio, the responsibility is shared — half yours, half Edgar's.

C: 那个，可以拜托你去和守卫大叔沟通一下吗，他看上去有些凶，我不敢过去……
E: Um, would you mind talking to the guard? He looks kinda scary, and I'm too scared to approach...

C: 这…恕难从命，我们也有职责在身，不能随意给平民放行，还请贵宾理解一二……
E: This... my apologies, but we have our duties. We can't casually allow civilians through. I hope you understand...

C: 如实相告。
E: Tell him the truth.

C: 再说了，世界都要重启了，最后的时刻不疯狂一把，未免也太亏了。大不了来世再见嘛！
E: Besides, the world is about to reset. If we don't go all out in these final moments, it'd be such a waste. Hey, worst case scenario, we'll meet again in the next life!

C: 上吧！以健美形态出击！
E: Go for it! Charge in with your bodybuilding form!

C: 哈哈，刚才气氛都到那个份上了，不说点悲壮的话，都有些下不来台了。
E: Haha, the atmosphere was so intense back then, it'll be awkward not to say something tragically stirring.

C: 这边的也别忘了。
E: Don't forget this one too.

C: 是啊…我小时候，他最喜欢用扩声器假扮各种声音逗我玩。
E: Yeah... He liked to use it to play pretend... making voices for me when I was small.

C: 但、但不许看！不然，我、我真的会找个地缝钻进去，再也不出来了……
E: B—But don't look! Otherwise, I—I'll seriously find a crack in the ground to crawl into and never come out again...

C: 想想朋友们，想想维吉妮娅……
E: Think about our friends, think about Verginia...

C: 我当然是阿波罗尼，树庭贤人、逐火军参谋，这确凿无疑。
E: I am, without a doubt, Apollonius, Sage of the Grove and advisor to the Flame-Chasers.

C: 唉，您说话很直白，我很难过。
E: *sigh* Your bluntness hurts.

C: 老人家，您醒醒。
E: Ma'am? Ma'am! Time to shake off that buzz.

C: 这是海瑟音给我尝过的…
E: This is the taste of...

C: 那我走？
E: Should I... leave you to it?

C: 呵呵…很像是他会做的事。
E: *sigh* ...That sounds like him alright.

C: 我来告诉你答案吧：当然是我们的诊所更漂亮哦！
E: I'll tell you my answer: It's the clinic!

C: 喔！感觉、感觉是电影里会出现的那种，很酷的台词！
E: Yeah! Sounds like one of those cool movie lines!

C: 这次回去就把这件事提上日程吧。
E: I'll add it to my to-do list.

C: 抱歉，好像说到别的地方去了。{NICKNAME}，请别在意。
E: Oh, uh, what were we talking about again? Coffee! Sorry, {NICKNAME}.

C: 没想到在参观列车的时候还能帮上大家的忙……
E: Who'd have thought I'd get ideas for office furniture while sightseeing on the Express...

C: 前些日子在罗浮认识了你们列车上的丹恒兄弟，他邀请我得空时来列车上玩。
E: I met an acquaintance of yours several days ago named Dan Heng. He invited me to board the Express should I have the time, and so here I am.

C: 舒适性反倒在其次，主要还是做生意么。我们一般都用公司的量产运输舰。
E: What I mean to say is, comfort comes second to business. We generally use the Company's mass-produced transport ships.
*sigh*

C: 不过，感觉虽然很像，却意外地沉静，没有万界之癌那种狂暴和贪婪……
E: The sense I speak of is familiar to me, yet unexpectedly characterized by a calmness. It lacks the fervor and greed that the Cancer of All Worlds possesses.

C: 你也有弱点啊。
E: So you do have weaknesses, huh?

C: 本该是我看厌了的风景，可如今又让我不由得感叹…天空真是高远啊。
E: It should be a view I tire of seeing, but it always leaves me in awe... The heavens really are boundless.

C: 给列车带了些备用药……
E: I've prepared some medicine for the Express...

C: 好呀，让我来一起准备，你们肯定也会喜欢的。
E: Great! I'll help — you'll love what I've got in mind.

C: 那就好，本小姐肯定是长高了。
E: That's good. I knew I'd gotten taller.

C: 谢谢你，我已经开始愉悦了。
E: Thank you, I feel happier already.

C: 可惜我没时间养猫…不过我收藏了很多猫猫的视频、贴纸、照片什么的，平时拿出来看看就觉得特别开心。
E: Pity I have no time to look after a real cat... But I collected lots of cat videos, stickers, and photos. Just looking at them makes me happy.

C: 信件可以交给拉明娜，她会处理好的。期待下次与你的相见——或者与你的文字相见。
E: You can give your letter to Lamina and she will look after it. I look forward to seeing you again — or seeing your letters.

C: 不过事后想来，那时候的他确实露出了从没展示过的眼神。应该可以说是…「真诚」的眼神吧？希望他之后也可以保持这份真诚。
E: But now that I think about it, he did show a look that I had never seen on his face before. Maybe that's... a "sincere" look? I hope he can keep being so sincere in the future.

C: 刚刚也和丹恒老师聊起这个…
E: Funnily enough, that was a part of our conversation...

C: 等一下直接去问问帕姆老师好了…也许帕姆老师愿意和我过上几招呢。
E: I should go and ask Pom-Pom about it — maybe I could pick up a few tricks!

C: 还是不聊了…
E: Let's stop here...

C: 好在因祸得福，让我休息了几天，总算是睡了个好觉……
E: Mercifully, it turned out to be a blessing in disguise. I got to take a few days off, and finally got a good night's sleep...

C: 我没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 哎，是你啊，来找老头子是有什么事吗？
E: Ah, it's you again. How can an old man like me help you?

C: 此前与姬子小姐聊天，我这才了解到雅利洛-Ⅵ并非唯一因为星核蒙受灾难的星球，宇宙中遭遇了同样命运的世界远超我们想象……
E: It was only after talking to Himeko that I learned that Jarilo-VI isn't the only planet suffering from the Stellaron's calamity. The number of worlds that endured such a fate far surpasses what we imagined...

C: 你是说…卡利白？
E: Do you mean... Kali-Kapo?

C: 干脆现在就回家去收拾行李吧……
E: Maybe I should go pack my bag right now...

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}，找到你了。
E: Ah, I found you.

C: 姬子认为，采取宇宙际玛姬诺夫理论，可以迭代出最佳的优化模型。
E: Himeko thinks the Interstellar Maginov Theory can iterate the most perfect optimization model.

C: （愉快的叫声）
E: (Joyful Noises)

C: <unbreak>71642</unbreak>。
E: <unbreak>71,642</unbreak>.

C: {NICKNAME}，我借机翻看了一下列车智库里的数据，希望你们不会介意。
E: {NICKNAME}, I took the opportunity to look through the Express' data bank. I hope you guys don't mind.

C: 等再过几年——或是几十年——贝洛伯格的天气稳定下来，我一定要给布洛妮娅提个建议：在贝洛伯格修一条铁道。
E: Perhaps in a few years... or maybe a few decades... When Belobog's weather stabilizes, I'll suggest that Bronya construct a railway in the city.

C: 果真是百闻不如一见……
E: Some things must be seen to be believed...

C: 「松弛感」？什么意思？
E: State of composure? What do you mean?

C: …原来这不是假的吗？我、我的腿好像有点站不住了……
E: ...Wait, r—really? Uh-oh, m—my legs are feeling a bit wobbly...

C: 伸张正义要考虑方法，子弹不能打中要害、不能搜刮恶人财产…还高低得给他改过自新的机会！
E: Apparently you have to consider your methods when upholding justice. Bullets can't hit vital parts, you can't steal criminals' property... and you have to give them a chance to repent!

C: 抱歉…好像惊讶过头了。在梦境之外，我还是第一次见到这么特别的玩偶。
E: Sorry... I seem to be overreacting. Outside the Dreamscape, this is my first time seeing such a unique doll.

C: 我决定也为你打造一个专属面具！
E: I've decided to forge an exclusive mask for you!

C: 有啊~可以叫我帮你打开！
E: Yeah? You could've gotten me to open it for you!

C: 这是为列车组准备的记忆福袋，赠礼微薄，请不要介意。
E: This is a memory fortune pouch I prepared for the Express Crew. My gift is meager. I hope you don't mind.

C: 如此坚韧又具有生命力的美丽植物，它还好吗？
E: What a beautiful, resilient plant full of vitality! How is it doing?

C: 如果能在希世难得号上打造一间智库……
E: If I could install a data bank on the One and Only...

C: 无论何时，你的回答都会超出我的预期……
E: Every time, your responses exceed my expectations...

C: 哇啊！怎么从背后吓人！我可差点就拔剑了！
E: Ah! You can't scare people like that! I almost drew my sword!

C: 兜兜转转，最终买了几十盒朱明特制的咸甜风味糕点，吃了数月之久。
E: After wandering around a bit, we finally bought a few dozen boxes of the Zhuming's special salty-sweet pastries and ended up munching on them for several months.

C: 排队站好，来报个数。
E: Stand in line at attention and number off.

C: 噢，我以为你升职了呢。
E: Oh, I assumed you had been promoted.

C: 不行啊，报社有要求，主编有规定：首先字数得给够，这玩意有指标的，我们按字数结工资……
E: It won't do. The paper has its requirements and the chief editor has his own. Word count needs to hit quotas, that's for sure. We get paid by words after all...

C: 这就完了？不打算预购吗？我告诉你，机不可失，失不再来！
E: So soon? Not going to make the purchase? It's a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity!

C: 虽然可以看出作者尝试对自我意识进行探寻和突破，美中不足的是思考浅尝辄止，终究成不了文学史上留名的杰作。
E: Their attempt to question and explore the spiritual side of mankind is commendable but unfortunately falls short compared with some of the greatest works of literature.

C: 你到底在研究什么？
E: What is the subject of your research?

C: 所以你全靠自学？
E: So you are self-taught?

C: 你得打破行业陋习。
E: You'll have to challenge that.

C: 呜呜…阿尔乔姆他真的好温柔……
E: Oooh... Artem is such a gentleman...

C: 「覆夏竹」？
E: Summershade Bamboo?

C: 啦啦啦啦～「他说我的琴弦撩动着他的心～作为回应他的笛声彻夜奏鸣～」
E: La la la la. He said that my strings stirred his heart, and to that tune, his flute played all through the night.

C: 毕竟，「塔米拉的声音听了很出戏，一点也不少女」——导演是这么说来着。
E: He said, "Tamila's voice isn't catchy and girly enough."

C: 是不是你们之前有过什么恩怨？
E: Did anything happen between the two of you?

C: 没事，是小女子打扰你了。那么小女子就继续练歌，慢走不送了～
E: Bye bye. I'll go back to practicing my singing now.

C: 突然感觉桑博怪可怜的…
E: I suddenly feel pity for Sampo.

C: 你可千万不能同情他啊！不然轻则贪小失大，重则倾家荡产……
E: Don't ever sympathize with him! You'll either end up losing some money at the minimum, or even see your family fortune go down the drain...

C: 你在煦日节的家族聚会上能听到超过一万种类似街坊故事的变体，那些故事说来说去，不就是换着花样的「道德绑架」吗？我反正是一点兴趣都没有。
E: You can hear thousands of stories like this at Solwarm Festival family gatherings. Those stories are, in the end, moral blackmail, which I'm not interested in at all.

C: 但我毕竟是个法律工作者，给民众普法是我的职责——每到这个环节，那群人就开始假装听不明白了——
E: But I am a legal practitioner after all, so it is my duty to help the public get to know the law. Every time it gets to this part, they start to pretend like they don't understand me.

C: 我想读科幻小说。
E: I like reading science fiction.

C: 是有点乱，上次你在矿场也见到了吧…不过闹归闹，那些流浪者迟早会消停下来的。
E: Yes. As you saw last time in the mine, it's been a bit chaotic... but it will end. The vagrants will stop messing around sooner or later.

C: 大家都已经把力气用到这份上了，还有什么不能完成的工作？
E: Everyone has already worked so hard for this, do you think there is anything that they cannot do?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: …还不是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}先来搭话的嘛。
E: ...You came up to me first.

C: 哼哼…{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}果然不明白。
E: Hmmm... you seriously do not understand.

C: 当然不能！这可是我们「鼹鼠党」的头号机密之一！
E: No! That's one of The Moles' most important secrets!

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 怎么，今天有什么事吗？
E: What's up today?

C: 哎呀！你瞧我这记性，都忘了问了…被褥枕头合不合适？房间的温度呢？地髓炉没出故障吧？
E: Oh! I almost forgot... How do you find the bed and pillow? And what about the room temperature? Is the Geomarrow Furnace working fine?

C: …呃，基本上都是。
E: ...Well, basically everything.

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 这些残页上刊登了模样和功能都比较类似的物品，一般还是很有参考价值的。
E: There are articles that show items with similar appearance and function. They are of a great reference value.

C: 我敢和你们打包票：这是下层区最美味的洞螈料理，没有之一！
E: I can assure you, that is the most delicious olm dish in the Underworld!

C: 当上「大守护者」的感觉如何？
E: How does it feel to be the Supreme Guardian?

C: 于我而言，「大守护者」不过是个称号，仅此而已。不管有没有这个头衔，我都会坚持做正确的事。
E: For me, it's just a title and nothing more. I'll still stick to doing the right thing with or without this title.

C: 你想离开的原因应该没那么简单吧？
E: The reason you want to leave isn't so simple, is it?

C: 你接着忙吧。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 确实，我也很享受这份工作——从杂乱的信息中梳理出秩序的部分，恐怕没有比这更让人愉悦的事情了。
E: Indeed, and I really enjoy my work. Nothing is more fun than making things in order from a mess.

C: 哈…你可真不谦虚，哪怕装装样子也行呀？
E: Haha... Modesty means nothing to you, huh?

C: 不过嘛，这件事能顺利解决也多亏了你的协助，无论如何都要谢谢你才是。
E: Anyway, your help has played a crucial role in this matter. We really appreciate it.

C: 但这位「螺丝咕姆」对于雅利洛-Ⅵ的未来发展表现出了乐观态度。这是好事。
E: However, this "Screwllum" expresses an optimistic view regarding the future development of Jarilo-VI. This is a good thing.

C: 唷，{NICKNAME}！你居然还在下层区，真是好兴致啊！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! Glad to see you here, in the Underworld!

C: 不过，至少我这把老骨头又能派上一份用场，这就够了。能为这桩事业贡献一份力量，我也算是不留遗憾了……
E: At least now this old man can do something useful again, and that's good enough for me. Now that I've contributed to this great cause, I won't have any regrets...

C: 你这里都卖些什么？
E: What are you selling here?

C: 咕！咕呜呜！
E: Arf! Groooo!

C: 我是把行李放这儿了啊……
E: I did put my luggage here...

C: 是啊是啊！
E: Yeah. Yeah!

C: 多亏了她啊……
E: We're so lucky to have her...

C: 打滚…打？滚滚滚滚……
E: R—Roll? Rolling rolling...

C: 不可能吧…
E: No way...

C: 爸爸下次会赢回来的。
E: Daddy will get it back next time.

C: ...必须时刻保持警惕。
E: ...We've got to stay vigilant all the time.
Ah...

C: 我没问题了，就到这里吧。
E: I have no further questions.

C: 司狱大人可以不理会他们？
E: But you're the Jailer. Can't you ignore them?

C: 没毛病啊老板，您这名字已经取得足够好了，我看倒也不必更改。
E: That sounds just fine. Your name is fine as it is. I see no need to change it.

C: 那可是谁也无法捉摸的概率暗流。要捕捉如此细微之物，反倒要投入巨量的资源和靠着山一样占卜器械方能成事。
E: That's a hidden current of probability no one can ever fathom. To capture such an intricacy, you'd have to invest massive resources and rely on devices as huge as mountains to calculate that.

C: 有点儿事想问你…
E: There is something I want to ask you...

C: 商业机密是指什么？
E: Business secrets? Such as?

C: 所以…您之后也要小心行事啊，我还等着您来咱的店里惠顾呢。
E: So... You have to be careful in the future. I'm still waiting for you to come and visit us in-store.

C: 仙舟上很少有传家宝…或者说，传家宝大多不是什么常用的物件。因为常用的物件寿命总是比仙舟人短很多。
E: There are hardly any heirlooms aboard Xianzhou... Or to put it another way, heirlooms aren't everyday items. Items used every day would never keep up with the long-lived Xianzhou people.

C: 行吗？我怎么觉得有点恶心呢？
E: Yeah? Why do I feel slightly disgusted?

C: 我知道你说的是什么意思。这和工造技术是一样的，诗歌存在着「规范」和「技术」，只要我解决了这些难题，就能达到你说的「素养」。
E: I know what you mean. This is just the same as developing new artifex tech. Poetry has its rules and techniques. As long as I can solve these problems, then I'll have achieved that level of training.

C: 但说真的，他可能说得没错，我情商确实不太高，哎…不过，我听他们说最近我的情商有所进步，如果不是挖苦我的话，就说明我真的成长了。
E: Frankly speaking, I think he's right, as I really don't have a high EQ... But, I've heard them say that I've gotten better lately. If it's not sarcasm, it probably means I have improved.

C: 最大的工坊？星际和平娱乐已经将巨量的资本轰入幻戏界，建立起了「星和幻娱」，「香薷幻娱」已经完蛋了！
E: The largest production studio? The IPC has poured vast quantities of capital into the genre, creating their own Interastral Peace Entertainment subsidiary. Elsholtzia Fantasy Entertainment is done for — it's over!

C: 不过我相信只要我们集团内部团结一心，持续为客户提供优质的服务，就肯定能挺过这个寒冬！
E: But I believe that as long as our group stays united and continues to provide premium service to our customers, we'll definitely be able to brave through these harsh circumstances!

C: 当初十王司审判我的时候，我也是这么说的啊！可惜判官们说了，无论有何苦衷，参与侵略战争就是错的，必须要为此付出代价。
E: I said the exact same thing when I was sentenced by the Ten-Lords Commission! But the judges said that no matter what reasons I had, participating in an invasion was wrong, and I had to pay the price.

C: 截至目前，我已经攒了7次「小功」了！
E: As of today, I have already collected 7 "Small Merits"!

C: 您平常也是行走江湖的，应该也免不了和人发生点冲突…以后有机会的话，来我们拳馆练练吧！我给您优惠！
E: Being out there in the world like you are, you're sure to bump heads with people from time to time... Why don't you drop by my boxing gym and have a session someday? I'll give you a discount!

C: 天涯何处无芳草…
E: Surely there's plenty more fish in the sea...

C: 是啊，总算停下来了…先前长起来的时候别提有多吓人了！
E: Yes, it has finally stopped... It looked so frightening when it was fully grown!

C: 你能怎样帮到我？
E: How can you help me?

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 先前这消息一出来，我就忙不迭地跟我爹娘说去了，他们老说「唉！建木都重新长大了，我们家阿浮怎么还没长大啊？」
E: When the news first came out, I couldn't wait to tell my parents about it. "Hey, even the Ambrosial Arbor is growing up again. How come our darling Fulie hasn't grown up yet?" This is what they used to moan about all the time.

C: 每日只八瓶就能满足全天的含水量，只收个成本费，区区五百巡镝，机不可失时不再来啊！
E: With just eight bottles a day, you can meet your daily hydration needs. It's only a nominal cost of <unbreak>500</unbreak> strales. You don't want to miss out!

C: 比方咱们这个公廨。日常处理的也就是老百姓生活中会遇到的种种困难琐事。
E: Take for example our Chancery. It deals with all kinds of difficult details that people run into in their everyday lives.

C: 哎…我从小听着景元的传奇长大，不知你听过「云上五骁」的故事吗？
E: Hey, I grew up listening to the legends of Jing Yuan as a kid. Did you ever hear the one about the High-Cloud Quintet?

C: {NICKNAME}大人，今日莅临神策府，请问有何贵干？
E: {NICKNAME}, may I ask to what do we owe the pleasure of your visit at the Seat of Divine Foresight today?

C: 诶，通融通融嘛，这点小事，你先去跟将军说好了，我这边也好办事嘛。
E: Gosh, let's give them a break then. It's nothing really. You go and talk things through with the general and I'll take care of things from here.

C: 这有什么嘛，就是发明了一种新技术，有海外商团希望就这项技术展开合作，就差神策府这边点头了。
E: So what? It's a new technological breakthrough. Some foreign business interests want to invest as a joint venture, and all we need is for the Seat of Divine Foresight to green-light things.

C: 事关核心技术，你们天舶司应该再慎重一些。
E: This involves Xianzhou's core technology. It's you guys at the Sky-Faring Commission who should be more cautious.

C: 普通上班族的抱怨。
E: The complaint from a regular staff member.

C: 还可以吧。主要是不管有没有灾难，我都挺忙的…以至于现在也没什么灾难不灾难的实感。
E: I think the workload is okay. The thing is, I'm always busy, whether there is a disaster or not... I guess that's why I can't feel any difference.

C: 哎！这事你可别跟他说啊，省得他又瞎操心。
E: Hey, please don't tell him about this. I don't want him to worry about me.

C: 你为什么在这儿？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 其实我很清楚…咳咳…这并非因为我的文字多么秀美壮丽，而是因为克里姆特原本就是如此…只要如实记录，就足以打动读者。
E: Actually, I have no misgivings... ahem... It's not due to any beautiful prose of mine, but rather because Klimt has always been like that... Any non-fiction writing is enough to rouse an impressed readership.

C: 我怀疑他是来做慈善的，不是做生意的。一开始我也不想介意，后来想了想，我在外行商这么多年，怎么能在这种土老帽面前示弱。
E: I suspect he's here for charity instead of business. I didn't mind at first, but after thinking it through, as an experienced traveling merchant, how could I show any weakness in front of this oaf.

C: 后来，我以为里面装着什么金银财宝，棺材只是一种掩人耳目的方式，你可能听说过银河里有一些不能被自然光直射的宝贝……
E: Later, I thought there must be a treasure or fortune inside, and the coffin was just a red herring. You may have heard that some cosmic treasures don't fare well under natural light...

C: 麻烦总是会有的，「没有公文」不会是最难的那个。再说了，只要没人故意使坏，公文始终还是会下来的…好在，我们运气很好最后等到了。
E: There'll always be things that are a pain, and "Not having official documents" won't be the worst. I mean, as long as nobody deliberately messes things up, it'll get done sooner or later... Fortunately our luck held out until we got there in the end.

C: 哎，我没有办法将这种事情叫作「经验」，请老爷见谅呀。
E: Hey, but I wouldn't call this any kind of "experience." Please forgive me.

C: 毕竟公文系统是联盟法政体系的重要组成部分，格式和措辞都大有讲究，有时候一字之差就会酿成重大行政事故，没受过专业训练的人写不来。
E: Official documentation is an extremely important part of the alliance's legal system. The style and terminology are extremely particular, and sometimes just a small difference in wording can lead to a massive administrative accident. Anyone without formal training wouldn't be able to compose them.

C: 你好像和青雀很熟的样子？
E: You seem pretty close to Qingque.

C: 这太卜司可真不是正常人待的地方，嚯，害我天天都头疼……
E: This is no place for normal people. Ahhh, it gives me a headache every single day...

C: 总算是解决了。犬子要是泉下有知，应该也会感到欣慰吧。
E: It is finally over. If my late son learned about it, I suppose he would feel relieved too.

C: 你多保重，再见。
E: Take care and goodbye.

C: 这到底是怎么回事啊，怎么就乱成这样啦？
E: What in the world is going on? Why are things in such a mess?

C: 那个，我得先说清楚——我才回罗浮不久，对这里的一切还不太熟，你要是想问路或者打听什么，我未必能帮到你，到时候你可别怪我。
E: Just so you know, I've only been back for a short while, and I'm not very familiar with things around here in Luofu. If you want to ask for directions or about the latest happenings, I might not be very helpful, just so you know.

C: 说是有这么回事，然后云骑军封锁了部分地区，正在缉拿乱党呢。
E: It seems to be true. The Cloud Knights have sealed off some areas and are hunting them down.

C: 你是犯了什么事被关进来？
E: What did you do to get locked up in here?

C: 我还有不少事务要处理…你若是有事，不妨直说。
E: I have a lot of things on my plate... Could you be more concise with your question, if you don't mind?

C: 在机巧鸟身上附身久了，搞得我经常以为这只鸟才是我的本体。至于真正的本体在哪，我自己都忘了。
E: I've been possessing this cycrane for so long that I often start to believe that this is my actual body. I don't even remember where my real body is anymore.

C: 你不关心我手上有大把的工作，你干嘛关心我在哪里介绍工作呢？
E: Who cares about where I work my trade? Shouldn't you care more about what jobs I have available?

C: 这金人巷果真名不虚传，就连这空气里，满满的都是柴米油盐酱醋茶的味道。
E: As expected from Aurum Alley. Even its air is full of the scents of ordinary life.

C: 茶庄里客人的闲聊大多是没有营养的话题，就像波月古海的海浪，留下的是砾石和水草，运气好的话，偶尔能捡到一枚珍珠。
E: No, because most gossip in a tea house doesn't deserve any serious attention. It is like stumbling across a precious pearl in the waves of the Lunarescent Depths — Nine out of ten times you would only find rubble and weeds.

C: 你想听标准的回答，或者是「别的版本」？
E: Would you like to hear my "official" answer, or "another version"?

C: 会长说「待人真诚」一次不难，要始终「待人真诚」才是难事。
E: According to the president, it's easy to be sincere with someone once, but it's hard to be sincere all the time.

C: 人活太久了就容易麻木，越是麻木就越需要刺激…不过和你说这些，你大概也不明白，估计只会觉得是「仙舟人活太久以至于活腻歪了」吧？哈哈哈。
E: Those who live too long tend to become numb, and that's why they need constant stimulation... Well, I don't think you'd really understand how we feel. You probably just think "these guys have lived too long to say 'no' to their deathwish." Hahahaha!

C: 桂乃芬？哦哦，小桂子姐当然认识啦！那可是我们杂技团的当家摇钱树啊！
E: Guinaifen? Oh, you mean Little Gui? Of course, I do! She's our best performer and moneymaker!

C: 你跑到我这儿买合法药品，是不是有点大可不必了？
E: Don't you find this place a little too out of the way to travel to just for licit medicines?

C: 捉鬼小队最近还好吗？
E: How's the ghost-hunting squad been doing?

C: 这不是{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}嘛，哪儿不舒服啦？我看你气色不错，也没有什么毛病，我给你拿点儿糖果吃就当是医案结了。
E: Isn't this {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}? Are you feeling unwell? You look fine to me, and there's nothing wrong with your body. Let me give you some sweets and close your file.

C: 下次记得还要来找我呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: Come again next time, {NICKNAME}.

C: 下次再聊吧。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: （只要不答应就不会有事）
E: (I'll be okay as long as I don't respond)

C: 资料检索中。
E: Searching information.

C: 看你有些面生，应该是刚来仙舟不久吧？我们「广云袖」是仙舟上最负盛名的服装店，就连景元将军也得给店里的设计师一个面子。
E: You look somewhat unfamiliar. I trust that you haven't been on Xianzhou long? Cloudbreadth Sleeves is Xianzhou's most prestigious place of couture. Even General Jing Yuan himself has to respect our tailors.

C: 可能你有些听不惯，就算是景元将军来定制礼服，我也是这个态度。
E: You may think it's a slight to you, but even if General Jing Yuan himself comes to tailor his attire, I would address him similarly.

C: 简而言之：接引魔阴身、处理恶性犯罪、管理生死秩序。
E: In short, it guides those who succumbed to mara, deals with vicious criminals, and manages the order of life and death.

C: 算了，我下次再来吧。
E: Forget about it. I'll come back next time.

C: 随后，我们便在欢声笑语中完成了交易，皆大欢喜。
E: Later, we laughed gaily as we completed the trade, and ended the affair on a happy note.

C: 先前的风波…掌柜能赚不少吧？
E: You earned a great fortune from the previous crisis, didn't you?

C: 再说了，我看这「不夜侯」的茶品不错，您要是愿意听在下推荐，点上一壶「狩原毛峰」尝尝滋味，保准满意。
E: Besides, the tea at the Sleepless Earl isn't too shabby. If you'd like some recommendations, I'd say order a pot of Hunter Maofeng tea. Satisfaction guaranteed.

C: 我建议星槎海的所有厨师聚在一起办一个厨王争霸比赛，输了的一律不许开店。
E: I'd suggest for all the chefs in Starskiff Haven to compete in a culinary showdown. Those who lose must close their restaurants.

C: 说实话，确实不太方便。所有的朋友，所有的回忆在一个月之后就全部忘记了，好像被全世界抛下了一样。
E: To be honest, yes. All my friends and memories just get completely wiped after a month, as though the whole world had abandoned me.

C: 不过，短暂的记忆也并不全是坏事。美好的记忆大多数都很短暂，就像是聚会总是短暂——聚会结束后独处的落寞才会更为长久。
E: But having a short memory isn't all that bad. Most of our best memories are brief, just like parties are all destined to end. It's the loneliness between those moments that feels like forever.

C: 咱们说话小声点儿吧，那边的官老爷们也不太希望我还跟人闲聊的…毕竟，现在小仙我只是一介罪人罢了。
E: We should lower our voices. The guards over there don't want me to be chatting with others... I'm nothing but a lowly criminal now.

C: 我也纳闷儿呢，十王司的冥差怎么还不来啊。
E: I'm puzzled too. Why aren't the Ten-Lords spiritfarers here yet?

C: 向肌肉许愿吧！我将开启新的命途！
E: Make a wish upon my muscles! I will blaze a new Path!

C: 为什么来比赛？
E: What brings you to the competition?

C: 哈哈哈哈，原本我还在母公司的时候就对仙舟文化略知一二，现在有机会外驻了，便提前调查了一下。
E: Hahaha, I already knew a little about Xianzhou culture back at HQ. Now I have the opportunity to be stationed here, I have prepared ahead.

C: 最直观的感受，就是近二百年来我越来越繁忙了。您能想象吗？在一百五十年前，星槎海的繁华区，每天只会飞过六千四百多架次货运机巧鸟。
E: It's just a hunch, but I've grown busier and busier these past two hundred years. Can you imagine? Around <unbreak>150</unbreak> years ago, down at the busy Starskiff Haven zone, we'd only be able to handle over <unbreak>6400</unbreak> cycrane deliveries per day.

C: 我因为工作的关系被派遣到仙舟上出差，结果前段时间因为玉界门封锁，暂时没办法离开仙舟…原本我滞留在这儿的原因是这样的。
E: I was dispatched to Xianzhou because of work, but have been unable to leave since the Jade Gate's closure... That's the main reason for my situation.

C: 你哪位？
E: Who are you again?

C: 他们真的嘲笑你了？
E: Did they really mock you?

C: 不能理解。
E: Nope.

C: 哈哈，我就知道！
E: Haha, I knew it!

C: 在畅饮活动期间购买苏乐达，还能参加「开盖有奖」活动，丰富的奖品等着你拿！
E: During the Drink Up event period, participate in the Uncap and Win event when you purchase SoulGlad. Many exciting rewards are up for grabs!

C: 反正现在没有顾客，我陪你聊聊吧。
E: Sure, I'm not looking after a customer anyway.

C: 好梦气泡饮就…嗯，按照我的标准来说，不算是苏乐达。
E: Mm... I'll put it this way: Sweet Dreams Soda isn't SoulGlad in my book.

C: 航运数据…
E: Shipping data...

C: 那实在是太多了…
E: Oh, there're loads...

C: 不知道。我们家已经在仙舟上住了三十多代啦，都算是半个仙舟人了……
E: I have no idea. My family has lived on Xianzhou for over thirty generations, and they're all at least part-Xianzhou now.

C: 那位「南帝」发言极少，但短短几句就让人觉得器宇不凡。我们在暗网约好见上一面，以他的人品来看，不会食言的。
E: That Southern Emperor really didn't say much, but I could tell he was extraordinary from those few lines. We said on the dark net that we'd meet up. From his demeanor, I can tell he isn't one to renege on his words.

C: 那我们随便聊聊吧…
E: Let's banter then...

C: 你有什么资格教别人下棋？
E: What credentials do you have for teaching a kid chess?

C: 你们人类总喜欢夸大「爱」的作用…爱能战胜敌人、爱能超越时间、爱能使人突破阻碍……
E: You humans love playing up the power of "love"... How love can conquer anything, can transcend time, can give people strength enough to overcome obstacles...

C: 这还用我展开讲讲吗？你不就生活在这么个无趣的世界里吗？
E: Do I really need to say any more? You are already living in this joyless world.

C: 要让岁阳来办成这些事，那得花上数不尽的能量。可金钱只是转手便做到了。我怎么能不爱死这种颠来倒去的感觉呢！
E: If heliobi were to try and do this, it would require vast amounts of energy, but money achieves this simply by changing hands. How could I not be obsessed with this process of something bouncing through owners like this?

C: 我在那里被通缉了。
E: I was a wanted suspect there.

C: 呵呵，看来{NICKNAME}颇有些心得呀，这点倒是没错。
E: Hehe, I see you have some familiarity with the position, {NICKNAME}. You're quite right.

C: 文人雅士都爱来到这里…
E: The literati all love coming here...

C: 吾有一数，复行癸遍。
E: I'm thinking of a number, over and over again.

C: 你觉得那能对吗？
E: You think that could be right?

C: 金人系统自检程序启动…
E: Aurumaton self-diagnostics system is activated...

C: 原来这是你的乐团啊？
E: So this is your band then?

C: 六合之位各记曰「一零一零一零」者…录之于「道」，可推占……
E: Hexagraphic code is "1 - 0 - 1 - 0 - 1 - 0"... Broadcasting the Way, it can be seen...

C: 不知道啊，我也是听说的…工作性质不同吧……
E: I dunno. It's just what I heard... We work different jobs...

C: 我明白了，因为我们才是仙舟的栋梁。
E: Got it. Because we are the true backbone of Xianzhou.

C: …我觉得没什么区别啊。
E: ... It looks the same to me.

C: 是个药王秘传的信徒。
E: ...is a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 仪式？那是什么？
E: Ceremony? What's that?

C: 「欢迎来到昏光庭院。请问有什么可以帮到您？」是…像这样吗？
E: "Welcome to the Twilight Courtyard. How can I help you?" ...Like this?

C: 希望铭记的东西…呀，看灰宝期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
E: Something to remember...? Oh, judging by Grayie's eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?

C: 好，希望你的胃口能和你的嗓门一样大。
E: Alright, let's hope your appetite is as big as you say it is.

C: 奶奶您可别不信啊，我还带了证人来——巴特鲁斯，快说点什么！
E: Granny, you've gotta believe me! I even brought a witness. Bartholos, say something!

C: 桀、桀桀，大、大姐头说的句句都是实话！
E: Heh, heh heh, B—Boss lady's speaking nothing but the truth!

C: 最近收成还好吗？
E: How's the harvest been lately?

C: 停——停！
E: W—Wait!

C: *我们*知道，有些人觉得这不是预言，而是谎言。因为没有人能确定，大家真的能在明天相见。
E: We know some people think this isn't a prophecy, but a lie. Because no one can be certain that we'll all meet again tomorrow.

C: （尝试捏捏缇宝的脸）
E: (Try to pinch Tribbie's cheeks)

C: 我们是好搭档！
E: We're great partners!

C: 这可是好事，你和我不也总是聊起战争结束之后的事吗？现在它已经来了，我反倒是没有做好准备……
E: This is a good thing. Haven't you and I always talked about what would happen after the war? Now that it's here, I find myself unprepared...

C: 嗯，味道确实不错。可我们身为人臣，哪有独自享用的道理？去把凯撒大人请来。
E: Hmm, the taste is exquisite indeed. But as loyal subjects, how could we enjoy this by ourselves? Go and invite the Great Imperator.

C: 对了，有个美中不足的地方：这里的水域有些狭小，偶尔会挥舞不开鱼鳍呢。
E: Oh right, there's one small downside: The water bodies here are rather narrow, and sometimes I can't stretch my fins as freely as I'd like.

C: 小玻吕茜亚，我…也没有每天吧……
E: Little Polyxia, I... I don't do it every day...

C: 不过，与她们相处的点点滴滴，也让我得到了灵感的眷顾。
E: Still, all those little moments spent with them have blessed me with inspiration.

C: 翁法罗斯的持明卵？
E: An Amphorean Vidyadhara egg?

C: 触摸大地兽之王的感觉如何？
E: How does it feel to touch the Dromas King?

C: 哦？呵…看来这回是我棋差一招。
E: Oh? Heh... Guess it's a tactical oversight on my part this time.

C: 相声可是冒犯的艺术！
E: Crosstalk is the art of offending others!

C: 没几天就消失了。
E: Vanished into thin air after a few days.

C: 你说你这和「今天仰卧，明天起坐」有什么差别呢？
E: Isn't that the same as the people saying "I'll eat more today and exercise tomorrow"?

C: …这里是幽囚狱，容不得睁一只眼闭一只眼。
E: ...this is the Shackling Prison. There's no turning a blind eye to things.

C: 此处为鳞渊境幽囚狱的入口，同样也是出口…
E: This place is the entrance of Scalegorge Waterscape's Shackling Prison. But at the same time, it is also the exit...

C: 请确保身上无金属物品。
E: Ensure you're not carrying any metal.

C: 进狱系主播。
E: A convicted television host.

C: 坐牢还能带武器？
E: Are you allowed weapons in a prison?

C: 肆意生长的生命力是不言自明的丰饶罪证
E: The ever-growing vitality is clear evidence of Abundance-related crimes.

C: 我已经背下来了。
E: I've already memorized it.

C: 星槎种子内容物包括金属材料、生物材料，以及携带遗传信息的玉兆。遗传信息会确保种子顺利长成美观的星槎，而不是某种装置艺术。
E: A starskiff seed contains metal materials, biological materials, and a jade abacus that carries genetic data. The genetic data will ensure the seed grows into a visually-appealing starskiff instead of a piece of installation art.

C: 你信手抽出了其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

C: 地衡司的宣传栏，用于向仙舟居民普及地衡司工作流程与生活常识。
E: The bulletin board at the Realm-Keeping Commission is used to keep the Xianzhou citizens informed of the workflow at the commission and useful knowledge of life.

C: 你是我们的骄傲！
E: You are our pride and joy!

C: 这是我的游戏奖品啊。
E: But this was my reward from the game!

C: 它不值得我浪费时间。
E: It is not worth my time.

C: 你想了想，决心把时间浪费在更有趣的事情上，转身离开了箱子。
E: Having decided to spend your time on more interesting stuff, you turn around and walk away from the package.

C: 这本书封面上写着《来自远古的回声•仙舟传统曲艺大观》，似乎出自西衍先生之手。
E: The cover of this book reads "Echoes of Antiquity: A Grand Overview of Traditional Xianzhou Folk Culture," it seems to come from the hand of Mr. Xiyan.

C: 紧接着，你倒在了地上。你看到身边有一只坠毁的机巧鸟——你猜自己大概是被它砸中了。
E: The next second, you collapse on the ground and see a crashed cycrane next to you. You think you probably got hit by it.

C: 这个乐队出什么事了吗？
E: Did something happen to this band?

C: 「你想让我睹狗思人对吧？你以为我会在看到这条狗的时候心软得淌了一地，然后立刻抛下手头一切飞奔向你？你想让我看着你的账单愧疚的睡不着对吧？」
E: "You want to give this to me so it can remind me of you, don't you? You think my heart will skip a beat when I see this dog, and I'll come running back to you? You think seeing all your bills will keep me up at night, wracked with guilt? Right?"

C: 废话，能让你看出来，那就不叫艺术了。
E: Duh. If you could tell, then it would not be art.

C: 也许「快递之龙」并未给出一个答案，但它却提出了一个尖锐的问题——当现代生活与传统价值碰撞时，诞生的究竟是什么呢？
E: Perhaps Delivery Dragon cannot give us any answers, but it poses a powerful question: What could be created when modern life collides with traditional values?

C: 别再往门缝里看了，万一真的看到什么可怎么办呀。
E: Stop peeping through the doorway. What if you really saw something?

C: 似乎有人在定期维护这块墓碑，墓碑表面虽有风化痕迹，但其余地方却很干净。
E: It seems like someone has been regularly maintaining this tombstone. Aside from its weathered surface, the rest of the area is clean and tidy.

C: 「苏乐达——欢乐的源泉、美梦的精华！」
E: "SoulGlad — the source of joy, the quintessence of dreams!"

C: 「看啊，我们坚固如山。再激烈的玩闹也不足以让我们倒塌。」
E: "Look here, we are immovable like a mountain. Even the most intense shakedowns will not topple us."

C: 你随手从书堆里抽出一本，封面的标题处歪歪扭扭写着：「存在与钟表维修技术」。
E: You casually pull out a book from a pile, and near the cover title, something is written haphazardly: "Existence and Watch Repair Techniques."

C: 吊灯张开翅膀飞翔，书本在下方笨拙地追赶——光是看着这一幕，你就感到脖子一阵酸痛。
E: The chandelier spreads its wings and flies, the books clumsily pursuing below — the sheer sight of this is causing a sore pinch in your neck.

C: 属于熟悉女孩子的房间，不过这次没有对你敞开大门。
E: The room belongs to a girl with whom you are close, but the door isn't open to you this time.

C: 视野绝佳的观景台，几乎能将整个筑梦边境的景色尽收眼底。
E: The observation deck with breathtaking views. You can almost see the entire Dream's Edge at a glance.

C: 酒店公用的梦境电话，可以打给不同「时刻」…不知它还能不能用了。
E: The hotel's public dreamphone that can call different Moments... Is it still operational?

C: 「好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好听吗好好好好好好好好好听吗——」
E: "Didyoulikedidyoulikedidyoulikedidyoulikedidyoulikedidyoulikedidyoulikedidyoulikedidyoulike—"

C: 啊，「钟表匠」……
E: Oh, Watchmaker...

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，锐利的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his sharp gaze piercing through your face.

C: 呵呵，您不是知道的很清楚嘛？怀疑是假名的话，可以去询问酒店前台哦。
E: Heheh, I thought you already knew that? If you suspect that it's a fake name, you can ask the hotel reception.

C: 呀…自顾自说了这么多，实在是失礼了。您好，我是克劳迪娅，一名业余小说家。
E: Ah... excuse my discourtesy for hogging the conversation. Hello, I am Claudia, a freelance novelist.

C: 你的动作停住了。
E: Your movements stop.

C: 好吧，每个人都有被认可的需求，你确实觉得这种感觉…还不错。
E: Fine, everyone has a need for validation. You come to realize that this feeling... really is not bad.

C: 挠挠它的喉咙。
E: Scratch its throat.

C: 果然，匹诺康尼就不该有谛听存在。
E: Indeed, Ditings have no business being in Penacony.

C: 哎？你听到了？
E: Huh? You heard that?

C: 没什么。
E: Nothing else.

C: 这个啊，幸得你的鼎力相助，匹诺康尼电视台已经恢复了往日的秩序。
E: Ah, that. Well, thanks to your kind efforts and assistance, the Penacony TV station has been restored to its former order.

C: 没必要这么愤世嫉俗。
E: There's no need to be so jaded.

C: 给我动！动啊！
E: I say, move! Move it!

C: 即便如今已经退休，他钛合金脑壳的光芒还是那么耀眼，很难不让人敬畏。
E: Even though he retired, the glow of his titanium skull is still dazzling. It's hard not to be in awe of him.

C: 眼下的生活有什么不好的吗？没有！多少人想要这么厉害的父母都没处找去呢！
E: What's so bad about my life? Nothing! Not everyone can have such amazing parents!

C: 可能的确如此…了解我的背景的人大概都会这么觉得吧？
E: Maybe you're right... Anyone who knows my background would probably feel the same way, right?

C: 钟表小子动画。
E: Clockie the cartoon.

C: …因为那个人能隐身？
E: ...Because the robber was invisible?

C: 去去去、离远点，别捣乱！
E: Shoo! Shoo! Don't disrupt us!

C: 这不是工地吗？
E: Isn't this a construction site?

C: 本着尊老爱幼的传统美德，你耐着性子和老妇人聊了起来。
E: In line with the tradition of respecting your elders, you summon your patience and chat with the old lady.

C: 等到长大了…生意场上哪有什么两肋插刀的朋友？能不被人家惦记上、背后插你两刀已经实属难得。
E: When I grew up... Where would you even find true friends who'd do anything for you in the business world? You'd be glad if you went unnoticed, and that all you got was a knife in the back.

C: 有一说一，确实。
E: You do make sense, indeed.

C: 怎么说，挣钱好像也没想得那么难嘛！
E: How do I put this, guess it's not that hard to earn money!

C: 今天的朋友费结一下？
E: So, what about today's friendship fee?

C: 奇怪，我感觉…有点累。难道是最近嗨过头了？
E: That's strange. I feel... a little tired. Maybe I have overdone the partying a little lately?

C: 不对，现在不是思考这些的时候。如果不赶紧玩的话，我来「黄金的时刻」不就失去意义了吗？
E: No, now is not the time to be thinking such things! If I don't start having fun right now, then coming to Golden Hour loses all meaning. Don't you think?

C: 唉…我以前以为我懂什么是二次元，但事到如今，我也搞不清楚了…到底什么是二次元呢？
E: Oh... I used to think I understood what anime was but recently, I can't seem to tell... Just exactly what IS anime?

C: 根据您轻浮的态度与无理的要求来推断，只怕早已是骚扰皮皮西的惯犯了吧。
E: Judging from your carefree attitude and irrational requests, I fear that you may already be a repeat offender when it comes to harassing the Pepeshi people.

C: …哼哼哼♪…哼、哼哼哼……
E: Hmhmhm♪... Hm... Hmhmhm...

C: 你靠近舞台，清了清嗓子——钢琴家没反应；
E: You approach the stage and clear your throat, but the pianist remains unresponsive.

C: 但我还没成年…
E: But I'm not an adult yet...

C: 匹诺康尼的梦境结构复杂，不稳定的通道将大概率导致难以预估的后果。
E: Since the dream structure within Penacony is complex, unauthorized entries may lead to unpredictable consequences.

C: 据统计，<unbreak>86.9%</unbreak>的宾客持有与您相同的意见。
E: According to statistics, <unbreak>86.9%</unbreak> of our guests share the same sentiment as you.

C: 哎，你看昨晚的机动球比赛了吗？那可是顶级盛宴，不容错过！
E: Hey, did you watch the Roboball game last night? It was an outstanding spectacle that must not be missed!

C: 我要去论坛发帖，逼他们换掉主教练，再踢掉那几个老东西，高价引入外援，组建新的宇宙战舰！这才叫未来可期！
E: I'll post on the forum and demand a change in the management. Those old geezers need to hit the road and bring in some fresh blood to create a new Space Powerhouse! That's how you make a real impact!

C: 作为一名大堂经理，时刻关注客人们的需求、为大家排忧解难就是我的天职。
E: As the lobby manager, it's my responsibility to attend to the guests' needs and help them resolve their issues.

C: 我怎么看你有点眼熟？
E: Why do you look a bit familiar to me?

C: 哦？如果是非常有趣的梦，我愿意高价回收。
E: Oh? Then I'm willing to offer a good price if they are particularly interesting.

C: …别用那么大力气！那个箱子里装的都是母亲大人送我的手工艺品，很容易摔碎的。
E: ...Don't use so much force! That box contains handicrafts Mother gave me, and they could break easily.

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 「那些未完成的画，仍在流淌的歌」
E: "Those unfinished paintings and the songs that are still playing."

C: 吃了？没关系，快来幽鲁士！幽鲁士餐饮连锁，让你吃了还想吃。
E: You have eaten? Come to Yuluxe's Culinary Chain anyway! Our food will make you want more.

C: 哎，无聊的人…那几个我都熟得很，先说说看，你想换成哪辆飞车？
E: Alas, humans are so boring... I'm familiar with the other models. Which one do you want?

C: 我该怎么充电？
E: How do I charge the car?

C: 哈哈哈哈哈。朋友，当然可以，守护人们是我义不容辞的责任啊！
E: Hahahaha. Of course I can, friend. After all, I am duty-bound to protect humans!

C: 不过我告诉您的那些八卦——您记得为我保密呀！
E: Although, these rumors I've told you... You have to keep them a secret!

C: 我有要坦白的罪过。
E: I have a sin to confess.

C: 我对垃圾桶怀有无限的喜爱，曾在多个世界向它动手动脚，窃取其中的宝物……
E: I have an unfathomable love for trashcans, having fondled them all across many different worlds. I also stole plenty of valuables from inside them...

C: 啊…我终究没法像真正的「铎音」那样，将告解者的苦恼尽数消化……
E: Ah... I'm ultimately not a true Bronze Melodia, and am unable to fully assuage all the burdens of those who confess...

C: 哎呀，我怎么还在这说闲话，明明有很多事情没做呢……
E: Gah, what am I doing here still chatting away. I still get lots of things to do...

C: 我先走了，拜拜。
E: I've got to go. Bye.

C: 他开始一本又一本地著书立说，驳斥一切在他看来的异端邪说；而我则只身来到匹诺康尼，成为了一名梦境鼓励师……
E: He began penning book after book to refute everything he deemed heretical, while I traveled to Penacony all by myself to become a Dreamscape Motivator...

C: 更可气的是，家族还不能对他做出过分的惩罚，只能将他逐出梦境…我不甘心啊啊啊啊！
E: Much to my dismay, The Family only ousted the guy from the Dreamscape without any heavy sentences... That's unacceptable!!!

C: 唔…突然有一股奇怪的情感涌上心头。按理说不该发生这种事的……
E: Hmm... I can feel a weird sentiment getting stronger. This isn't supposed to happen...

C: 这让我回想起去年的那场邂逅…不行，现在不是说这个的时候！
E: It reminds me of the encounter with a certain someone last year... No, now isn't the time to discuss that!

C: 行吧。关于匹诺康尼，如果你还有什么想要了解的，尽管来问我就好。
E: Alright. If there's anything else you want to know about Penacony, come and ask me anytime.

C: 行吧，那就来一份。
E: Alright, I'll take one.

C: 说吧，又要推销什么…
E: Go on, what are you trying to sell me this time...

C: 他们没有给我留下任何可以追踪的线索，我也没专门去找过他们。
E: They didn't leave me any clues to find them, and I have never gone in search of them.

C: 沟通是信任的基础，要是将话藏在心里不说，被误会了也没法怪别人，对吧？
E: Communication is the foundation of trust. If you keep things in your heart and don't say them out loud, then you cannot blame other people when they misunderstand you, can you?

C: 没事情的话，就在酒吧里随便逛逛呗。记得多跟怪物们聊聊，它们都可想你了。
E: If you're not busy, why not take a stroll around the lounge? Make sure you talk with the monsters, too! They've missed you so much!

C: 汪！危险！这个披萨就交给我去送哇，你们都不准靠近！
E: Woof! Danger! Leave the pizza delivery to me, and none of you are allowed to get close!

C: …您是生气了嘛，那下次换人家来给您带来幸福呀。
E: ...Are you angry? Then next time allow me to bring you happiness.
(Meow...)

C: 想听听你对情绪的看法。
E: I'd like to hear your thoughts on emotions.

C: 他们把自己的一切恶行标榜为正义，以至于能与「同谐」的愿景几乎混为一谈。
E: They label all of their evil deeds as justice and start believing it is basically the same as Harmony's vision.

C: 这样宏伟的地方，里面居然也有我出的一份力，想想就觉得开心。
E: Just the thought of contributing to a place as magnificent as this makes me so happy.

C: 在我还是学生的时候，很喜欢捏梦泡。
E: I used to love making dream bubbles when I was a student.

C: 哦，哦！我知道了，你是说《银河球棒侠传说》的主人公吧。看你这身打扮……
E: Oh! I get it. You mean the main hero from the Legend of the Galactic Baseballer. Judging by how you're all dressed up...

C: 那个时候啊，有个不知道天高地厚的银头发小姑娘跑来挑战我，哼，我稍微动了动手指，就把她的游戏账号全注销了！
E: Back then, there was a silver-haired girl who was full of herself who tried to challenge me. Hmph, with a swipe of one finger I just canceled all of her gaming accounts!

C: 网友们最喜欢复读了。
E: There's nothing on the internet more popular than copypasta.

C: 是不是人设搞错了…
E: What's with this guy...

C: 好像有个广告牌…
E: I think I saw you on a billboard...

C: …它在动！看到了吗，它在动！
E: ...It's moving! Did you see that? It's moving!

C: 呵呵，多动听啊，年轻人的歌声果然充满了活力。
E: Hehe. You have a lovely voice. The voices of the young are always so full of vitality.

C: 这实在是太不公平了……
E: This is too unfair...

C: 并非是我想打击您，想凭一个人的力量扭转忆质流动的趋势太困难了。
E: Not that I wish to put you down, but it will be tough to try to reverse the flow of memoria single-handedly.

C: 我们一起在流梦礁闲逛，讨论着一道悬而未决的难题。不愧是拉扎莉娜女士，我们马上得出了正确的结果。
E: We hung out together at the Dreamflux Reef and discussed a difficult conundrum. And as expected of Madam Razalina, we quickly came up with the correct answer.

C: …你愿意听我讲讲过去的故事吗？
E: ...Would you like to hear a little story about my past?

C: 哎呀，是你来啦？抱歉，我现在正苦恼着呢…介意听我稍稍抱怨一会儿吗？
E: Oh. It's you. Sorry. I'm working on something tricky right at the moment... would you mind if I vented my spleen a little?

C: 哎呀，刚刚有个常来光顾的年轻人，问我要不要和他一起回去美梦去。
E: Oh. A young customer who's one of our regulars just came by asking if I wanted to go back to the sweeter Dreamscapes with him.

C: …算了，这个名字从你嘴里吐出来总感觉怪怪的…你还是叫我「湛蓝爵士」吧。
E: ...Never mind, this name sounds weird when you're the one saying it... Better just address me as Dr. Blues.

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 据说，在猫头鹰老师还没搭建出美梦小镇的时候，好梦剧场就已经在这儿了啾。
E: It's even said that the Dreamgood Theater already existed before Professor Owl even established Dreamville, tweet.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个喜欢唱歌的孩子，哪里有音乐哪里就有它，一见到<color=#dbc291ff>舞台周围的管风琴</color>，就再也不肯走了啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, there's a child that loves to sing. It goes wherever there's music. When it sees <color=#dbc291ff>the pipe organ by the stage</color>, it definitely won't go anywhere, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子吵着要学调饮，我说等它长大一点再教它，它啊，多半在<color=#dbc291ff>吧台</color>偷偷练习啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, there's a child that keeps bugging me to teach it bartending. I told it to wait till it's a little older, but it's probably secretly practicing by the <color=#dbc291ff>bar counter</color>, tweet!

C: 啾！多亏了客官，才没让这几个调皮的孩子打扰到其他客人啾。
E: Tweet! It's all thanks to you that these playful children weren't able to disturb the other guests, tweet.

C: 呵呵，这都是我自传里的名句，听我的，准没错。
E: Heh-heh, this is an iconic quote from my memoir. You won't go wrong listening to me.

C: 顾客，有机会就来看看我的生意吧——我的玩具可不是普通的玩具，保准让您满意。
E: Come take a look at my business when you get a chance — my toys are not your common fare. I guarantee your satisfaction.

C: 哦~这就说来话长了。
E: Ohh, now that's a long story.

C: 等到我的系统恢复，就已经在流梦礁了。比起上面，我更喜欢这个地方，没有家族盯着，能够更自由地感受大家激烈的情绪，哦~
E: When my system recovered, I was already at the Dreamflux Reef. I much prefer this place to the higher layers. Without The Family's eyes on me, I can freely experience everyone's intense emotions, ohh!

C: 哈努努确实不是一位完美的领导者。他在统治匹诺康尼期间犯下了许多错误，也让一些无辜的生命消逝……
E: Honestly, Hanunue was not a perfect leader. He made many mistakes while governing Penacony, resulting in the loss of many innocent lives...

C: 只要从未出发，我就永远不会被盖棺定论？
E: As long as I never actually take the first step, then nobody will be able to judge me?

C: 苏打豆汁
E: Mung Bean Soda

C: 他是如此风度翩翩，总能以智械的视角，给出些不同寻常的提议。
E: He had such dignified elegance, and offered unique insights from the perspective of an Intellitron.

C: 我与客人共同「谱曲」的习惯，也是在遇到他之后才养成的。
E: In fact, I only started this habit of "composing" with my guests after meeting him.

C: 只要精心调配，那种辽远的香气，甚至能让你如同置身于匹诺康尼的开拓时代……
E: Blend it meticulously enough, and its distant aroma could transport your senses back to when Penacony was still being built.

C: 但他还活着，并且仍然是位「大厨」。
E: Suffice to say that he's still alive and is actually still a "chef."

C: 在那时的我看来，就算世上的食材如同音符那样可以穷尽，但它们的组合，用一生的时间也难以探寻。
E: At the time, I believed that even if the potential of every ingredient in the universe is finite like musical notes, they hold infinite potential in combinations.

C: 或许，您也听说过「主宰」这个词是从何而来？
E: Do you know where the word "chef" comes from?

C: 那时我刚刚入行，总觉得自己应该抓住每一个机会。也就理所当然，没能避开一些奇形怪状的客户。
E: I was still new to the industry at the time, so I latched onto every opportunity I could find, which meant I ran into some peculiar clients.

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 最昂贵的顶级牛排。
E: The most expensive premium steak.

C: 哎，黛博拉啊黛博拉…你可真够不成器的！
E: Deborah, oh Deborah! You're really not good for anything!

C: 这倒是激发了我投资艺术品的兴趣——啊，抱歉，在我看来这是很有趣的事，不过对于非投资领域的人，可能听起来就有点太过无聊了。
E: They piqued my interest in art investment. Oh, sorry, I realize what fascinates me might not be as intriguing to those outside the investment world.

C: 我遇到的一个「女明星」——她自称的——极力劝我给她的娱乐公司投资，说什么收视率高，广告接不停，又有公司背书，如何如何厉害…呵，我差点信以为真。
E: I met a self-proclaimed "superstar" who tried to get me to invest in her entertainment company, touting high ratings, loads of commercial deals, and even an endorsement from the IPC... Pfft, I nearly fell for it.

C: 别跟我说扯什么「年轻人不吃这一套」，我老人家还不吃这一套呢！装什么铁面无私职场清醒…那成，想求我？到我老婆那儿排队吃屁去吧！
E: Don't give me that "young people don't buy this" crap. We older folks aren't buying it either! To heck with that impartial and ethical facade! Want to beg me? They can line up to kiss my wife's behind!

C: 你也太抠门了吧？
E: Isn't that a bit cheap of you?

C: 可以让小鸟们离开一会儿吗？
E: Can you get the birds to leave for a while?

C: 哎，还是您本人的嗓音更好听…我还得加油努力，多多练习才行。
E: *sigh* Your voice is still more beautiful... I'll have to work harder and practice more.

C: 好的，请您稍等，我就吩咐人去改。
E: Certainly. One moment, please. I'll have someone change it right this instance.
