C: 初次见面，星穹列车的开拓者，侍者亚梅塞菈为您服务。结论：您有<unbreak>13%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「迷路」问题，<unbreak>85%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「饥饿」问题。
E: Nice to meet you, Trailblazer of the Astral Express. Attendant Amsella at your service. Conclusion: There's a <unbreak>13%</unbreak> chance that you are lost, and an <unbreak>85%</unbreak> chance that you are hungry.

C: 我们的第一场演出大获成功，学生们听惯了爵士的煽情，哪里抵御得住电吉他和效果器的狂放，那晚整个折纸大学都在呼喊着我的名字。
E: Our first performance was a massive success. The students were sick and tired of the tear-jerking emotions of jazz, and had no resistance against the unrestrained wildness of electric guitars and sound mixers. That night, the entire Paperfold University was screaming my name.

C: 那晚，我意外听到父亲与生意伙伴的对话…原来他长期在做黑心生意，赚亏心钱。
E: One night, I overheard my father's conversation with his business partner... It turned out that he had been engaging in unscrupulous business practices for a long time and was earning unethical money.

C: 是啊，所以才想把记忆消除掉…什么时候我才能忘了自己干过这种蠢事啊！
E: Yeah, that's exactly why I want to erase my memory of last night... Ugh, will I ever forget this hopelessly stupid blunder!?

C: 三种致胜的关键因素，缺一不可，没有哪个学院能垄断比赛的胜利，我们用自己的所长彼此制衡，形成了当下三足鼎立的平衡局面。
E: These are the three crucial factors for victory that are all indispensable. This way, no one academy can monopolize victory. We each use our own strengths to check and balance each other, which is why we now have this current state of three-legged equilibrium.

C: 我们皮皮西人只是…浓缩了一点，又不是没手没脚！
E: We Pepeshi are just... We're just a little condensed. We're not helpless!

C: 只要我拿下冠军，只要我进职业联赛，只要我能一呼百应，我就能…就能成为他们口中的那个希望！
E: If I can just win the championship and enter the pro leagues, if I can just win everyone's favor, then... then I can become the hope they all talk about!

C: 你们两个的反应还真搭……
E: You two are so similar...

C: 要不别卷了吧？
E: Why don't you give up?

C: 老实说，那家伙也有点可取之处。对那些从最开始就拥有许多东西的人来说，为了证明自己而不懈努力，这也是个挺难能可贵的品质。
E: If I'm honest, there are things I could learn from that guy. For someone like him who has always been blessed with abundance from birth, that attitude of always working hard to prove oneself is actually a very precious quality.

C: 好的，那回头再聊呗。
E: Alright, let's chat again soon.

C: 财富学院都这么善变的吗？
E: Are Fortune Academy students all so capricious?

C: 我在加入「缭乱」前，也从来没想到过这样的装扮会适合自己。
E: Before I joined The Dazzling, I also never thought such an attire would suit me either.

C: 没有。乐队演出经验与她的专业方向并不相关，对求职而言毫无帮助。
E: No. The band's performance isn't relevant to her major — it doesn't help her employment prospects at all.

C: 我有些事情想问。
E: I have some things to ask.

C: 唉，最近学校里出了好多怪事，之前教课的蕉师都突然不见了，也没人再提睡蕉小猴了……
E: *sigh* There have been so many strange things happening at school lately. The BananAdvisors have suddenly gone missing, and no one has brought up the Slumbernana Monkey again...

C: 毕竟——真正美味的甜品，永远都摆在常驻货架里。
E: After all, truly delicious desserts will always be available on the usual shelves.

C: 我的建议是，不要只用言语探查他人的过往——而是要用心，呵呵。
E: A good rule of thumb is to uncover others' pasts not just with words, but with your heart, hehe.

C: 你对翁法罗斯了解多少？
E: How much do you know about Amphoreus?

C: 热砂苏乐达吧，苏乐达狂欢火热进行中，暂时歇业。
E: Due to the SoulGlad festivities being in full swing, the Scorchsand SoulGlad Bar is temporarily closed.

C: 通常机密文件也会放在保险柜里，但哈努兄弟对外向来开诚布公，没有机密可藏。
E: Secret documents are usually placed in the safe as well, but Hanu has always dealt openly and honestly with the public, offering little in the way of secrets.

C: 看得太久，你觉得有些头晕目眩，或许该换个角度？还是干脆别看了？你决定——
E: After admiring it for too long, you start feeling dizzy. Maybe a change of angle? Or just stop looking altogether? You decide to...

C: 你想起了某部匹诺康尼的经典爱情片，有位心灵相通的同伴站在你身旁，向你许下「你跳，我也跳」的誓言。
E: You recall a classic Penaconian romance film, where a kindred companion is standing beside you, promising you that if "you jump, I'll jump too."

C: 你在泳池中急速奔跑的行为使你受到了领班的注目礼，他将你拎出泳池。
E: While at the pool, your act of running around catches the attention of the supervisor, who pulls you out of the swimming pool.

C: 总睡不着的话……
E: If I keep being unable to sleep...

C: 这张海报拍得也好棒，看她的头发，她的表情！啊，我要神魂颠倒了~
E: This poster is amazing! Look at her hair and her expression! Ah, I'm gonna fall head over heels~

C: 这里的游客真少。
E: There aren't many tourists here.

C: 我为你搬光了服装店！
E: I've bought all the clothes in the fashion store for you!

C: 我在想，要不…
E: I was thinking...

C: 小赌怡情，大赌伤身；及时收手，切勿沉迷。
E: A small gamble for leisure's sake, but don't risk more than you can take.

C: 我想不起来了，只感觉做了一个好长的梦…
E: I can't remember. It felt like I had a really long dream...

C: 有幸能在现场看到这种比赛，这下绝对是值回票价了。
E: I was lucky enough to watch the competition live. It's definitely worth the price.

C: 换主人了，很正常。
E: Its master's changed. That's normal.

C: 太可惜了，我观察他好几天了，以他的资质，本该有更好的发展。
E: That's a shame. I've been observing him for a few days. With his capacities, he can do much better in terms of a job.

C: 谐乐大典取消又重开，现在改到来这儿办开幕大典，连个指定席都不能帮我预约，那我这贵宾身份到底有什么用？
E: The Charmony Festival canceled, then restarted, and now the opening ceremony is reassigned to be held here. Now you can't even help me reserve a specific seat. Is there even a point to my status as a VIP guest?

C: 我们来一局吧。
E: Let's have a match.

C: 你们想好拍哪一款了吗？
E: You folks decided on which design yet?

C: 请保持安静！
E: Please be quiet!

C: 那么问题来了…
E: Therein lies the problem...

C: 不许给我丢脸！
E: Don't screw this up for me!

C: 二位，请往这边请。
E: Please, this way.

C: 出乎意料的是，这些视频在折纸大学的论坛上爆火，你的影像成为了著名的网络迷因，作为表情包在学生们的手机里疯传。好，你现在是传说了。
E: What is surprising is that these videos go viral on Paperfold University's forum. Your image becomes a popular internet meme, and the emojis made out of it spread like wildfire among students' phones. Good, you are a legend now.

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 老师，轰炸的声音越来越近了，我们…会没事吗？
E: Miss Teacher, the explosions are getting closer. We... will be okay, right?

C: （关机）
E: (Shut down)

C: 「超智能病毒」正在加固系统防火墙……
E: The Supersmart Virus is reinforcing the system's firewall...

C: 跳过广告。
E: Let's just skip the ads.

C: 诶呦，几个意思？人家还没嫌弃你呢，你怎么就…别不识好歹啊，我这可是为了你好！
E: Huh, what do you mean, "no"? It's your fortune that he might choose you, but why are you... Don't be ungrateful! I'm doing this for your sake!

C: 让您见笑了，不过那样的家伙确实没有资格在这里用餐——
E: I'm sorry for the disturbance, but those who don't value food have no place dining here...

C: 哦。原来你也叫灰宝吗？
E: Oh. So you're also called Grayie?

C: …我完全没有印象了。
E: ...I can't recall any of it.

C: 希望你和你的同伴能够尽快融入这里，年轻人。以及如果有什么需要的话，我非常乐意提供一些力所能及的帮助。
E: I hope you and your companions settle in quickly, young one. If you need anything, don't hesitate to ask for my help.

C: 无论是鲜果，还是其经过加工后制成的果酱、果脯、果干或罐头，都是深受探险者们喜爱的补给。
E: Whether it's fresh apples, apple jams, preserves, or dried apples, they're all quite popular as supplies among explorers.

C: 「咔嚓——」如此清脆可口！「咔嚓——」这般甘甜多汁！
E: *crunch* So crisp and juicy! *crunch* So sweet and refreshing!

C: 现在，做不出来了。开始手生。没有角猪。
E: Can't make it now. No hornswines here, and I'm not as skilled anymore.

C: 不忙，等你饿了，再来找我，保证好吃。
E: No duties. Come to me when you're hungry. I'll cook something yummy.

C: 没了，还在做，晚点再来吧。
E: No, not ready yet. Come back later.

C: 彼此彼此！能看得出来，你好像也挺不容易的。有空再聊~
E: Indeed! I have a feeling that you have had a hard time as well. Talk to you later!

C: 「麦迪特瑞恩的沃土与和煦日光，滋育了饱满的橄榄、黄金的蜜果、与广阔葡萄园。」
E: "Mediterrana's embrace, earth rich and warm. Nurturing olives, fruits, vineyards in charm."

C: 「认可」数已经超过了三万？还有其他客人提出想要入会……
E: Approval numbers have exceeded <unbreak>30,000</unbreak>? And there are other guests who wish to join the membership...

C: 总之，谢谢惠顾，欢迎下次再来。
E: In any case, thank you for your patronage. Hope to see you again soon.

C: 热情洋溢的异乡人啊，你如此步履匆匆
E: O passionate outlander, your pace is in such hurry

C: 天空突然被永夜之帷笼罩，欧洛尼斯的预言应验了。然后...然后那些怪物就出现了。数不清的怪物……
E: The sky was suddenly eclipsed by the Veil of Evernight as the prophecy of Oronyx came to pass. Then... Then the monsters appeared. Endless numbers of them...

C: 别太爱了。
E: That's a bit much.

C: 如果只是想问问最近运势如何，那么给我一个苹果就够了；但若是想知晓自己或他人的命运，那代价可就不是我能决定的喽~
E: If you just want to ask about your horoscope, then you can give me an apple. But if you want to know about your destiny or someone else's? Then that's a price I can't decide~

C: 还好我的同事们够聪明，提了几桶沙子过来泼在它们身上搓洗，它们倒是不排斥这个。
E: Luckily, my coworkers were smart enough to bring a few buckets of sand and pour them over themselves, cleansing their bodies with sand. They didn't hate it.

C: 年轻人就该骗、偷袭！
E: Young people should lie! Cheat! And use sneak attacks!

C: 还真是典型的战士作风。不错，年轻人就该有些活力才好——但荣耀之死不等同于送死。
E: Classic words of a warrior. Not bad. A youngster like yourself should be spirited... But dying in honor does not simply mean letting yourself die.

C: 短兵相接之前，战士们往往要花些时间靠近敌人。此时高举盾牌、护住脑袋，你就能挡下许多本该用脸去接的飞箭和激光。
E: Before engaging in melee combat, soldiers have to spend time closing the distance on their enemy. During this time, raise your shield high to protect your head. That way, you can block arrows and lasers that were supposed to be caught by your face.

C: 就在王即将被俘的关键时刻，克拉特鲁斯一手剑、一手矛，硬生生撕开敌军的包围圈，带着王杀了出去。
E: In that critical moment when the king was about to be captured, Krateros tore through the enemy encirclement with nothing but a sword and shield, the king right behind him.

C: 山之民的故事，太长、太长。手头忙，没空说，对不起。
E: Too long, too long, the stories of the Mountain Dweller are. Busy, my hands are. Time to tell, I have not. Apologies, I offer.

C: 帕西提亚重新抬起头，像是经过一番心理建设，她的神情重新变得恬静温柔。
E: Pasithea raises her head, as if she has just prepared herself mentally for something. Her expression once again becomes calm and gentle.

C: 你听见一阵澎湃的天外之声，像是一朵鼓着腮帮子的云吹响了管乐器。
E: You hear a roaring celestial sound, like a cloud with puffed cheeks billowing into a wind instrument.

C: 我不知道她经历了些什么，但我猜…那肯定也是一段叫人咬紧牙关、说不出话的沉重往事吧。
E: I don't know what she went through, but I'm guessing... it must have been a heavy past that renders one's teeth clenched and one's mouth speechless.

C: 我们，和大地兽一起诞生。摇篮里，一般很挤。
E: Born with dromases. Cradle, crowded.

C: 概念的不可能，无法通过事实来推断。
E: Conceptual impossibility cannot be deduced through reality.

C: 冥冥中仿佛有股力量在引导我，让我能感受到那些被常人所忽略的情感与细节。可惜，后来我就再也没和阿格莱雅大人单独聊过了。
E: It's as if a force guides me, allowing me to feel emotions and details that others overlook. Unfortunately, I've never had another chance to talk to Lady Aglaea alone.

C: 没错，这是大地兽的食谱，做错了可是会导致营养不良的。
E: That's right! This is the dromases' recipe, and getting it wrong could lead to malnutrition.

C: 所有景象都令你感到分外舒适，但仍有些美中不足——这里实在太过安静了。
E: The sights fill you with particular comfort, though it still seems like something is amiss — it's too quiet here.

C: 各位客人，不介意的话，就由我来为大家演奏这台水漫琴如何？或许达不到故事里的水准，但作为沐浴后的消遣节目，应该是足够了。
E: Dear guests, if you don't mind, allow me to play a piece with this water lyre for everyone. I may not be able to perform at a level told in stories, but it should suffice as post-bath entertainment.

C: 那就请您找个安稳的地方，好生歇着吧。这里离水流很近，当心沾湿了您的衣服。
E: Then please find a safe spot to rest. It's too close to the water here. Your clothes might get wet.

C: 好吧，你这么形容可能也没错。
E: Eh, fine, it's a good way to describe it.

C: 这是我和丹恒以前在浴宫生活的片段，没想到还能再看见。这里的记忆浓度可真高啊……
E: These are memories from when I lived with Dan Heng in the bath chamber. I never thought I'd see them again. The memories here are incredibly vivid...

C: 带它回去吧。从现在起，这只小奇美拉就属于你了。
E: Take it with you. Henceforth, this wee chimera belongs to you.

C: 因为跟你一起收集到了足够多的训练数据，功能也做了升级……
E: Thanks to all the training data we've gathered together, I've been able to enhance my functions.

C: 没事，你忙去吧。
E: Go ahead, I've got things to handle.

C: 不过本店还有其他茶品，味道也不错，您可以尝尝。
E: We've still got plenty of other delightful teas in the shop — why not have a try?

C: 如果你在无尽之海中找到了它们，那么只要穿过门扉，你就能奇迹般抵达世界的任何一处——
E: If you locate one in the Endless Seas, you need only to pass through it, and you can miraculously travel anywhere in the world instantly —

C: 我不知道这是否是所谓的*诈骗*…但即便确实是，对只能听取神谕、从来无力反抗的我们来说…虚假和真实又有什么区别呢……
E: I don't know if this is what you refer to as a "scam"... But, even if it is, to us, who have no power over our fate and are dependent on our prophecies... what difference is there between falsehood and reality...

C: 但有些人只是想散散心，或者找个说话的地方…每个人都有自己的故事，
E: But some might just need a place to think or a listening ear... Everyone has their own tale to tell.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，虽然我不知道你是为了什么，但要是有时间，可以常来跟老婆子说说话，喝杯热茶，吃点小甜饼，或许能从中找到你想要的答案。
E: {F#My girl}{M#My boy}, though your quest is unknown to me, feel free to stop by anytime for a chat over hot tea and treats. You might just find what you're looking for.

C: 你平常都在神殿里做什么？
E: What do you normally do around the temple?

C: 哈哈，那是你践行的律法，我可没必要遵从。不过我理解，在这里还能遇见如此坚持正义的人，想必你也会受到塔兰顿的赞扬吧。
E: Ha, that's your law to follow, not mine. But I get it. Running into someone so devoted to justice around here is a rare thing. I'm sure Talanton would commend you for it.

C: 阁下，冒昧打扰。我曾看到您从神殿内走出来，但只有相关人员才能进入那片区域。看您的打扮不像是普通的朝圣者，烦请告知您的身份？
E: Forgive my intrusion, esteemed one. I noticed you emerging from the temple, a place reserved for authorized personnel. Given your attire, you don't appear to be a regular pilgrim. May I ask who you are?

C: 阁下，虽然我们才刚相识，但我有一个不情之请，还请您原谅…您面见过圣女大人，能否透露下她是位怎样的人？
E: Esteemed one, though we've just met, I have a small favor to ask. Please forgive me... You've seen the Holy Maiden, so could you share what she's like?

C: 你描述了缇宁给你的印象，除了身高的部分……
E: You describe your impression of Trinnon, carefully leaving out any mention of her height...

C: 灰宝，先祖塞涅俄丝也是黄金裔哦。可不要忘了，不久之前，你不也和白厄阁下他们一起击败了强大的尼卡多利吗？
E: Grayie, my ancestor Seliose was a Chrysos Heir as well. Don't forget that you and the others defeated mighty Nikador together not long ago.

C: 在塞涅俄丝击败艾格勒后，天空的子民们就来到了大地生活。
E: After Seliose defeated Aquila, the denizens of the sky descended to live on the earth.

C: 畏惧苦痛、厌恶苦痛并渴望战胜苦痛的人们成为了这方世界的第一批医师。他们从零开始，摸索着治愈创伤的办法。
E: Those who feared pain, detested it, and sought to overcome it became the first healers in our world. They started from nothing, slowly learning how to treat injuries and ailments.

C: 关于盗火行者和你的过去……
E: About the Flame Reaver and your past...

C: 你说老顽固瞧不起你？
E: You mentioned the old-timers look down on you?

C: 我记得曾有位豁达的君主说过「尘事已了，我死而无憾。」
E: I recall that an optimistic ruler once said, "I have finished my business here, and I die without regrets."

C: 活着的人，会想象自己临死前的最后一句话吗？也许想过，但终究没能用上……
E: Would the living imagine their dying words? Perhaps, but in the end, they didn't get a chance to speak those words...

C: ——不，对不起。可能是因为在客人你面前感到放松，我才会说出这些…还请不要把我的担忧透露给其他人。
E: Sorry, please forgive me. I probably feel too comfortable around you to voice these concerns... please don't share my worries with others.

C: 必须把文明的火种安然地送往来世—— 要是新世界没有「麦迪特瑞恩蜜果」这样的美味，我的果蔬摊可该怎么开下去啊！
E: We must deliver the spark of civilization safely to the next world — if the new world doesn't have treats like the "Mediterrana fig," how will I run my produce stand!

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I must go now.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}担心我觉得「再创世」是好心的卫兵叔叔、还有你，一起给像我这样的孩子们编织的安慰吗？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you worry I think "Era Nova" is just kind guards and you weaving comforting tales for children like me?

C: 这不是第一次？
E: This isn't the first time?

C: 真是讽刺，那些虔诚的信徒…他们冒着生命危险把我从坍塌的神像下救出来，喊着「救救祭司大人」。
E: The irony! Those faithful followers... risking their lives to pull me from beneath the fallen statue, shouting "Save the high priest."

C: …若你能得到这位负世之神的回应，请帮我告诉它——塞若涅斯还在等它的回应，我们需要一个解释！
E: If you ever get a response from the Worldbearing Titan, tell them this — Cyrones still waits for their answer. We deserve an explanation!

C: 女孩似乎能读懂你的唇语，她沉默了半晌，好像有些难过。
E: The girl seems to understand your lip movements. She's silent for a while, looking a little sad.

C: 嗯…有位织者跃跃欲试、渴望证明自己的速度。金丝带来消息，它正停在<color=#dbc291ff>一张桌子上</color>，等待着挑战者上门呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who jumps at the chance and is eager to prove its speed. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>on a table</color>, waiting for new challengers.

C: 真是奇怪的预言，很难说是否吉利。更进一步的内容，贵客可以多看看这份金织。
E: A strange prophecy... Hard to say if it's a good omen or not. Perhaps you should examine this goldweaver more closely, esteemed guest.

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 来玩猜谜游戏吧！问：人家在想些什么？三二一，回答！
E: Let's play a riddle game! What am I thinking? Three, two, one, answer!

C: 这次真不是我的问题！最近老爹不是快过生日了吗，我寻思给他整块皮子做个护手，这几天就没少往林子里跑。
E: This one really wasn't my fault! As my dad's birthday's coming up, I thought I'd make him some gloves outta leather, so I've been out in the woods a lot lately.

C: 我…哈哈，刚才在库房呢。
E: Me? Haha, I was just out back in the warehouse.

C: 等我回来…我想吃蜂蜜烙饼，配熏鹿肉和橄榄汁！
E: When I get back... I want honey suncake, with smoked venison and olive juice!
Ah...

C: 我对村子里的学校有些好奇…
E: I'm actually curious about that village school...

C: 待我学成归来吧！
E: Just wait till I come back a master!

C: 白厄哥哥！我为你准备了临别礼物哦，开心吗？
E: Phainon! I prepared a farewell gift for you. Aren't you happy?

C: 总有一天，迷境里也会有这样的麦田吧？
E: Maybe one day, the maze will have fields like that too?

C: 「哆」是最稳重的音符，无论其他音符多顽皮，它都永远不会改变迷。
E: "Do" is the steadiest of all notes. No matter how playful the other notes get, it'll never change, mem.

C: 每当晚风吹拂风铃，叮铃叮铃声穿过林隙，回家的时间就到了迷。
E: When the evening wind stirs the chimes to life, their ting-a-ling drifts through the rustling forest leaves... That's the time to go home, mem.

C: ——你不要戳它嘤！
E: —Hey, don't poke it, eep!

C: 这就是我的起床路线嘤！
E: This is how I wake up every day!

C: 唔，一时没什么想法呢…有了，不如随性一些，四处看看找点灵感吧？
E: Hmm, I'm drawing a blank right now... Oh, I know! How about we take a walk and look for some inspiration?

C: 写的啥呢？
E: What did you write?

C: 哦吼、吼——救世主…嗝！阁，阁下！您可得听本狮，诉诉苦啊——
E: Roaaaar! Deliverer... Burp! My {M#lord}{F#lady}! You must listen to my troubles—

C: 这~里~的~时~间~变~慢~了，我~说~话~也~变~慢~了……
E: Time~ slows~ down~ here, so~ I~ speak~ slower~ too~

C: 敬礼！
E: To commemorate their honor!

C: 「让命运为你指点迷津——推石上山的若虫经历了多少次失败？」
E: "Let fate illuminate your path — How many times did the nymph fail to push the boulder uphill?"

C: 迷迷…谨慎的主厨周全地考虑着方方面面，菜肴有种暖洋洋的感觉。豪放的主厨虽然手法相对粗糙，但也时常能带来惊喜……
E: Mem... The cautious chef considers every detail, and his dishes have a warm, comforting quality. The free-spirited one might be rough around the edges, but he brings surprises that leave a lasting impression...

C: 瞧你那出息。总之，得赶紧做准备了，明后天就行动。
E: Is that the extent of your ambition in your noggin? Anyway, we have to prep quickly. We're moving out in a couple of days.

C: 拿着这个护身符，它会保护你们，让你们免受迷信的侵扰。
E: Take this Lucky Charm: It will protect you all from the pervasive reach of superstition.

C: 诺杜斯先生…您说得对。能听到这些争论，或许是我们来到奥赫玛后最大的收获。
E: Mr. Noldus... You're right. Hearing such discourse is perhaps the greatest boon I've received since we came to Okhema.

C: 住手，年轻人！大地兽不是玩具，你再这样我就要请你离开了。
E: Stop it, youngster! A dromas is not a plaything. If you keep this up, I'll have to ask you to leave.

C: 不对，不对。
E: No, that's wrong.

C: 这喂养奇美拉啊…
E: About feeding chimeras...

C: 咕咕——了不起的新同学，有空可以加入我们的课堂，小鸟们见到你会开心的。
E: Hoot hoot... Distinguished new student, join our classes if you have time. The birds will be happy to see you.

C: 猫头鹰老师，等我成了前辈们那样厉害的折纸小鸟…美梦小镇会记得我的名字吗啾？
E: Professor Owl, when I become as strong an origami bird as my seniors... Will Dreamville remember my name, tweet?

C: 有什么想要了解的，请尽快说明。灾后复兴工作很繁重。
E: Let me know if you have any questions. I'm very busy with the post-disaster recovery work.

C: 灾后复兴工作，主要是围绕哪几个方面？
E: What are the main aspects of the work regarding post-disaster recovery?

C: 如你所见，我已经是一副老骨头了。
E: As you can see, I've got one foot in the grave.

C: 人老了，对于正义的探索已经比如年轻时那样热烈了。
E: I am old. My passion for justice is slowly fading away.

C: 不过幸好，空间站并没有失守，大家还能在这里，做实验，聊天，散步。
E: Fortunately, the space station survived. We can still do experiments, chat and stroll around.

C: 不过有一点很重要，那就是星神密卷的内容，一定是根据现实撰写，而非是凭空捏造。
E: But one very important thing is that the content of the Mystic Scroll of Aeons is based on facts, not groundless fabrications.

C: 虽说空间站已大体受控，但怪物还未被全数清除。
E: Although the situation is generally under control, the monsters have not been completely wiped out.

C: 你好会上班呀~
E: You're killing it at work today~

C: 呃…我爬到过箱面上的北方，南方，东方和西方…也算四方吧。
E: Uh... I've crawled to the north, south, east, and west sides of the box... That counts as "all corners," right?

C: 好强的威压…
E: What strong presence...

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 一瞬间灵感降临，你悟了，这里分明是座精心打造的高端风水局——宇宙风水学，在帝皇权杖中再次成为显学。
E: In a flash of inspiration, it hits you: This place is clearly a meticulously crafted high-end feng shui formation. Cosmic feng shui has once again become a prestigious field of study in the Emperor's Scepter.

C: 跟我的经纪人聊聊授权吧…
E: Talk to my agent about the licensing...

C: 啊…先是一个错误。紧接着是数不尽的错误。
E: Ah... first there was one mistake. Then came countless others.

C: 我还记得你第一次浑身是伤地出现在奥赫玛门口的时候，背上还背了两个伤员，当时可把我们吓坏了。
E: I still remember when you showed up at Okhema's gate for the first time, all banged up with two injured people on your back. Scared the life out of us back then.

C: 这就是熟人对话。
E: That's how friends talk.

C: 听见裁缝女说玩笑，就像看见家里的猫翻跟头，虽说在情理之中，但总觉得有些奇怪。
E: Hearing you make a joke is like watching a house cat do a somersault. While not entirely impossible... it still feels rather strange.

C: 像小凯撒、小刻之类的，只能在心里偷偷喊一喊，灰宝说是不是？
E: You can only use nicknames like "Impy" or "Cery" in your head, don't say it out loud. Right, Grayie?

C: 嗯嗯，记下了，凯撒大人能喝下的蜜酿，大概…约等于小伊卡能喝下的十分之一吧。
E: Mm-hmm, noted. The amount of honey brew that the Great Imperator can drink is about... one-tenth of what Little Ica can handle.

C: 把蔬果培育得这么漂亮，小妖精们一定费了不少心思吧？
E: The fairies must have put a lot of thought into nurturing such beautiful fruits and vegetables, huh?

C: 「白厄跟那女人有样学样，不肯放过一点风吹草动，他到底像谁的学生？」
E: "Phainon's just like that lady, not letting even the smallest detail slip by. Whose student is he really?"

C: 啊？搭档，你在说什么？
E: Huh? Partner, what are you talking about?

C: 万敌阁下，你…怎么也来了？
E: Lord Mydei, what... what brings you here?

C: 到底是谁走错片场了？
E: Who the heck wandered onto the wrong set?

C: 「嘻，我可迫不及待要看裁缝女为救世小子的审美头疼了——猫猫快递，走喽！」
E: "Hehe, I can't wait to see the tailor girl getting headaches over our little deliverer boy's fashion sense! Meow Express, off we go!"

C: 太好了，就要万师傅炒。
E: Perfect, let's have Master Mydei do the cooking.

C: 哀地里亚的女孩会把花冠送给即将远行的旅人，祈祷花瓣的枯萎气息帮助旅人躲过塞纳托斯的窥探，平安回到故乡。
E: Girls in Aidonia give flower crowns to travelers who are about to embark on long journeys. They pray that the scent of the withered petals will help the traveler evade Thanatos's gaze and return home safely.

C: 翁法罗斯的持明卵？
E: An Amphorean Vidyadhara egg?

C: 呜嗡…也感谢你们守护了我的心愿。昨日的守望，都是为了一起走向明天。
E: Grumph... Thank you all for protecting my wishes, too. We watch over yesterday to walk toward tomorrow together.

C: 一切都快结束了，终于……
E: It's all coming to an end, at last...

C: 嗯…有位织者正向更高处远眺。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>高处的平台上</color>惊叹你飞行的速度呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is gazing up high. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>on the elevated platform</color>, marveling at your flying speed.

C: 「沉沦暮城」。
E: The Fallen Twilight City.

C: 关于列车…
E: About the Express...

C: 帕姆就像星穹列车上的小精灵。不管什么时候，只要列车上的人需要帮助，它都会立刻出现。但可不要因此而小觑它。
E: Pom-Pom is like the spirit of the Astral Express. Whenever anyone on the Express needs help, they will appear immediately. It would be ill-advised to underestimate them.

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 在你们三个上车之前，我、瓦尔特…还有某个家伙一起旅行。那时也是这样，一点点地开拓新世界，接触星核，打通道路……
E: Before the three of you boarded the Express, Welt, I... and someone else were adventuring together. It was the same back then as well — we would slowly trailblaze new worlds, find the Stellaron, and clear a path...

C: （将某处的钥匙交给尤利安）
E: (Give Julian the key.)

C: 哼，我本来也没有打算告诉你。
E: Hmph, you big grownup dum-dum. It's not like I wanted to tell you in the first place.

C: 行，那等你有空再来。
E: That's fine. Come back when you have time.

C: 布凯辛？
E: Grumpy?

C: 我刚到空间站不久，还在慢慢熟悉这里的环境…不知道您认不认得我的导师，温世玲，世玲姐？
E: I just moved aboard the space station, so I'm still getting used to this place... I don't suppose you know Miss Wen Shiling, my tutor?

C: 我打通「超巨星」难度了。
E: I beat it on the Supergiant Star difficulty.

C: 谢谢…希望艾丝妲站长也这么想。
E: Thank you... Hope the Lead Researcher Asta may say the same.

C: 恭喜啊。
E: Congratulations.

C: 我去去就回。
E: I'm on it and I'll be back in a jiffy.

C: {NICKNAME}！多么悦耳的名字！幸会幸会！
E: {NICKNAME}! What a delightful name! Nice to meet you.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了。接下来这个任务，我想一定很适合你。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back. I have absolute confidence that you're the right person for this next job.

C: 要不然还是扔去垃圾场吧。
E: Maybe we should just chuck it in the trash?

C: 其实我知道，被这种物什吸引来博物馆的人，大多只是对冰封的怪物感到好奇…但如果能借此让更多人去了解它们所处的历史，那也是有价值的。
E: I do know that most people attracted to the museum by this kind of thing are just curious about the encased monsters... But if we can use this to teach more people about history, then it's all worthwhile.

C: 我正在制作<color=#dbc291ff>开拓者的球棒</color>的模型…这是你的专属武器，对吧？
E: I'm modeling the <color=#dbc291ff>Trailblazer's bat</color> right now... This is your unique weapon, right?

C: 最后…让我们给母亲大人一个中肯的评价吧。尽管你们一度以刀剑相向，但我相信你能给出完美的答案。
E: Finally... let's give mother an objective assessment. Even though you once fought against her, I believe you can provide a perfect answer.

C: 算了吧。
E: Forget it.

C: 典型的前寒潮时期产物，毕竟现在的天气下已经不存在如此单薄的床榻了。
E: A typical pre-Eternal Freeze production. After all, with the current weather, such thin bedrolls no longer serve a purpose.

C: 在你的梦里，曾有一位深蓝头发的男人对着这屏幕喃喃自语——可它甚至都不会发光，天啊。
E: In your dreams, a man with deep-blue hair was murmuring at the screen. It couldn't even light up, dear gods.

C: 「她的仁慈使贝洛伯格纷乱的法理重新归于明晰，将那作威作福的显贵者裁撤，更责令其将权柄归还给其原本的所有者；」
E: "Her mercy brought clarity back to the troubled jurisprudence of Belobog, abolished the dignitaries who had been abusing their powers, and enjoined them to return their authority to their rightful owners."

C: 「她的单纯和善良被彼时身居高位的奸谄之辈利用，后者将所有权力揽于一身，不断推出压榨平民的苛政，只为满足自身的贪欲；」
E: "Her naivete and kindness was abused by those in power with malevolent intent, who took all the authority as their own, and who continuously carry out an oppressive rule against the citizens, just to assuage their own greed."

C: 一组与大守护者「愚者」希莉儿有关的原始史料。
E: A set of historical data about the Supreme Guardian Cyrille the Fool.

C: 发帖人说是在这附近见到了幽灵星槎。不过嘛，既然是幽灵船，肯定不会被轻易找到。要不，我们就在这里分头行动，找到线索后再集合？
E: The post said they saw the phantom starskiff around here. But since it's a phantom starskiff, I doubt we can spot it easily. How about we split our ways here and regroup once we find clues?

C: （我紧张！）
E: (I got nervous!)

C: 迴星港里出没幽灵星槎，这样的怪谈毫不新鲜。打从我进天舶司，每十来年就会听说类似的传闻，花样各不相同，却都细节充分有鼻子有眼的。
E: A phantom starskiff appearing in Stargazer Navalia? It is not my first time hearing such a ghost story. Ever since I entered the Sky-Faring Commission, I've heard such legends every few decades. There're all different stories, yet every single one is detailed and convincing.

C: 驭空…我们需要聊聊……
E: Yukong... We need to talk...

C: 驭空大人，你知道那只是幻象…
E: Madam Yukong, you should know that it's only an illusion...

C: 嗯，辛苦你们了。
E: Understood. Thank you for your hard work.

C: 拍完照片记得给我看看，等你哦！
E: Don't forget to show me the photos. I'm waiting!

C: 唉，老桑博确实是在磐岩镇越来越受欢迎了，但在别人工作的时候可不能随便拍……
E: Yo, looks like your ol' Sampo is starting to get more and more famous around Boulder Town. But you can't just take pictures of people when they're working...

C: 好了，那这张照片就送给你吧！
E: Alright, I'll give you this one!

C: 一路上我分文不取，当然当然，如果你要吃点什么记得带上我就好~
E: I won't charge anything for my services... except for food, of course!

C: 尤其是「尚滋味」的江湖菜，这样的味道整个罗浮仙舟也只有金人巷这里才能吃得到。
E: The folk dishes at Spices Supreme are a must-try. This is the only place on the Luofu you can find them.

C: 我也不是欺负人呀，我这不是友好地提醒一下吗，请问公司能回收租金吗？
E: I'm not being unreasonable, I'm making a friendly inquiry — when will the IPC receive its lease payments?

C: 谁说商会就一定还不上，这要…要是能还上呢？
E: They said "at the moment." That doesn't mean they'll never make the payments... right?

C: …冷、冷静下来，才发现要是输了会给云骑军丢脸。但是我也实在瞧不过那家伙的气焰！
E: ...Now that I think about it, if I lose the bet, it'll reflect badly on the Cloud Knights... but you can't give in to bullies!

C: 请您一定要试试。
E: Please give it a try.

C: 我就给你露一手吧。
E: I'mma flex my skills for you real quick.

C: 你可得想清楚了，要是我的东西坏掉了，你赔得起吗？
E: I'd be careful if I were you — if you damage my goods, you'll have to pay for them.

C: 我娘告诉我，只要我练就了一身本事，别人就能与我讲道理了…看来我这本事还不够。
E: My mother always told me that as long as I honed my skills, I'd be able to deal with any situation... Seems I've still got honing to do.

C: 这份合同能够证明金人巷商会经营码头的正当权利。
E: This contract can prove that the Merchant Guild has legitimate rights to operate the dock.

C: 这是金人巷商会的租金。商会已经扭亏为盈，能够赔付欠款了。
E: These are the funds from Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. The Guild has turned a profit and is able to pay back what it owes.

C: 什么区别呢？
E: What kind of difference?

C: 我主要在担心点餐网络会崩溃。
E: No, I think the high demand might crash the servers...

C: 白露大人以后在丹鼎司也能吃到尚滋味啦！
E: Bailu can finally have her takeout!

C: 那就好，那就好！龙女大人，我请你到店里吃烟熏肉。
E: I'm glad to hear it! Dragon Lady, why don't you drop by the restaurant? I'll make you some smoked patty...

C: 没想到素裳居然考虑了这么多？
E: It was all thanks to my literary mind.

C: 好的，请稍等。
E: Okay, one moment please.

C: 嗯嗯，矮阿姨放心吧，希望我们接下来也能合作愉快，一定能让美馔阁声名远扬。
E: Hmm, don't worry Short Auntie! I hope we can cooperate again in the future. We'll definitely make a name for Delicacy Pavilion.

C: 我见过您在码头与人激辩的本事，这次情况虽然不如码头那般针锋相对，但也并不容易。你放心，这是我自己的事，我也积极配合你的。
E: I've seen your debating skills at the dock. The situation this time may not be as confrontational as back then, but it's no walk in the park either. Don't worry, this is my own issue, and I'll cooperate with you the best I can.

C: 公司特地将经营权租让给金人巷商会，就是为了谋求共同发展。
E: The IPC specially leased operations of the dock to Aurum Alley Merchant Guild in the hopes of seeking common interest and development.

C: 你们没有经历过我所经历的时代，所以你们才不理解「我的坚持」。
E: You have not witnessed what I have seen, and so you fail to understand my insistence.

C: 金人巷商会的各位好啊。
E: Members of Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I hope you're all keeping well.

C: 我也不知道啊，可是他们这样一声不吭地站在这儿，没人敢来买药，这生意也没法做了。
E: I have no idea, but they're just standing there without saying anything. Everyone's too afraid to come in for medicine and business has fallen through the floor.

C: …我们也只是挣份打工人的钱而已，现在就走，现在就走，哎哟，真是的……
E: ...We're just workers trying to hustle a little money. We'll be off now, off we go... *sigh* Can't believe that...

C: 鹤运物流的垣风老哥跟机巧鸟称兄道弟，还说自己永不抛弃兄弟。
E: Mr. Yuanfeng from the Heron Express sees cycranes as family — and he said he'd never turn his back on family.

C: 处理工作需要分轻重缓急，现在有更重要的事情要处理。
E: Different matters have different priorities. There are more urgent issues that need our attention right now.

C: 你在金人巷做的每件事都对商会有所帮助，放手去做吧。
E: Everything you do in Aurum Alley helps the Merchant Guild. Don't let anything hold you back.

C: 食盒孤零零地被丢在此处，它的外壳和等不到外卖的顾客的心一样冷。
E: A lunch box is left here alone. Its casing is as cold as the hearts of the customers who haven't received the food they ordered.

C: 你看着这个沙袋，忽然涌现出了一个念头——是否可以在这里尝试一下那本《贝洛伯格古武术残卷》上记载的秘籍？
E: Looking at this punchbag, a lightbulb goes off in your head: Could you use this to try out some of the secret techniques shared in the "Fragmented Record of Belobog Ancient Martial Arts"?

C: 科学精神的可贵之处就在于探索与发现，我就是怀揣着这样的信念才能研究「大宇宙时间隧道」…
E: The value of the scientific spirit lies in exploration and discovery. It is with this belief that I can study the big universe time tunnel theory...

C: 很幸运，柜子并没有上锁，你轻而易举地打开了它。
E: Luckily, the cabinet is unlocked, you can open it pretty easily.

C: （想不到它这次还挺稳得住气。）
E: (Didn't think it'd actually stay calm this time.)

C: （口头发言恐吓「它」）
E: (Intimidate "it" with words)

C: 嗯嗯嗯…讲得太快了，无法理解。
E: Uh huh, uh huh... He's too fast, I can't understand it.

C: 这是大逐梦时期后最受欢迎、也是最具匹诺康尼精神的创意餐品——鲱鱼先生畅游在红鱼子与柠檬果酱中，向每一位来到梦境的客人问好，「向你致敬，我的朋友！记得享受当下！」
E: This is the most popular creative dish after the Great Dream Expedition, and one that quintessentially represents the spirit of Penacony the most. Mr. Herring's swims in a sea of red caviar and lemon sauce, greeting every guest in Dreamscape with a hearty, "Cheers, my friend! Remember to savor the moment!"

C: 今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
E: Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!

C: （吃紫色花纹的）
E: (Eat the candy with purple swirls)

C: 我有主角光环。
E: My plot armor.

C: 滴答，好心的宾客，我代表所有迷钟感谢您的善举！
E: Tick-tock, kind guest, I thank you for your compassionate act on behalf of all Dream Tickers!

C: 滴答，随时奉陪！
E: Tick-tock, always at your service!

C: …咳，您说的对，抱歉，我的想象力又发作了。
E: ...Ahem, you're right. Sorry, my imagination got the better of me.

C: 嗯嗯，不愧是「场外嘉宾」，说话就是硬气。
E: I admire your confidence.

C: 「我就是吃这些东西长大～纯天然，有机～」拿腔拿调的声线将重音停留在「有机」这个词上，每个字结尾都夹杂着古怪的嘶嘶声，令你几欲作呕。
E: "I grew up eating these! I'm all natural and organic!" The affected voice emphasizes "organic" and ends every word with an odd hissing sound that makes you feel sick.

C: 饮品是种神奇的东西。就凭这一小杯漂亮的液体，辅以舒适的氛围、再加上一点点聊天技巧…它就能轻易敲开对方的心扉，毫不费力。
E: Drinks are magical. A beautiful glass of liquid, a cozy ambiance, and a little bit of conversational skills are all you need to make someone open up.

C: 相当出色！你对味道的把握很敏锐，同时能准确洞察对方的内心…说不定，有天我都得请你为我调制适合的饮品。
E: Excellent! Your grasp of flavors is on point, and you can accurately perceive what's on someone's mind... I might ask you to make a drink for me one day.

C: 不会再有下次了哦。
E: There won't be any second chances.

C: 我就是个乖孩子~收起那不羁的性子~过着幸福的日子~谁都喜欢骰子呼哈哈哈！
E: I'm a good boy~ I'm putting my uninhibited nature behind me~ It's all happy days from here~ Everyone likes dice, haha!

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 汪！！太神奇了！我们继续玩吧！
E: Woof!! Incredible! Let's keep playing!

C: 哈哈哈。那就更该好好谢你了。毕竟…敢和怪物们接触的人本就没几个，像你这样愿意用真心对待它们的人就更难找了。
E: Hahaha. Then I really should thank you. After all... there aren't many people who'd dare work with monsters, and even fewer who'd be willing to treat them with sincerity like you have.

C: 哼，赶快处理完，别让你的客人等太久。
E: Hmph, hurry up and finish this. Don't keep your customers waiting.

C: 才不是欺负你呢！人家是想…想要和你……
E: I'm not trying to bully you! I... I just want to...

C: 汪！我来帮你！
E: Woof! I'll lend a paw!

C: 别紧张。我才刚从外面回来，有些累了。你不是个熟练的调饮师嘛，给我调杯饮料呗？
E: Chill out. I just came back, and I'm a bit tired. You're a skilled drinksmith, so how about whipping up a drink for me?

C: …最真实的想法，究竟是什么呢？
E: ...What are my true feelings?

C: 它们现在的情绪太过强烈，已经很难靠对话平复下来了。
E: Their emotions are too intense to be calmed down by words.

C: ——舒翁！这和我们约定的不一样哇。
E: ...Siobhan! This is not what we agreed on!

C: 我再想想…
E: Let me think...

C: ——欢迎你随时到访，匹诺康尼出色的调饮师！
E: You're always welcome, amazing drinksmith of Penacony!

C: 我们一度以为，他是混入家族的虚构史学家。现在看来，他想要藏起来的，原来是审判「秩序」残党的这份文书报告。
E: We once thought he was a History Fictionologist who infiltrated The Family, but now it seems like he wanted to hide this report regarding the trial of the Order's remnants.

C: 亲爱的朋友，你是来寻找宝藏的吧？
E: My dear friend, are you here for the treasure?

C: 唉，谁能料到担任导演的「钟表匠」会不知所踪呢？剧组的成员都知道，钟表小子的故事灵感来源于他的经历——但我们没人了解他的背景，也不敢擅自接手导演的工作。
E: Alas, who would have seen the Watchmaker's disappearance coming? He's the director of the film, and every crew member knows that Clockie's story is inspired by his experiences. However, none of us knows much about his background, nor do we dare to take on the director's role without authorization.

C: 唉，您一说这个我就郁闷，本来影城就是我们最重要的线下收入之一，但前些日子突然被猎犬家系封闭，说是要安全检查……
E: Oh, the mere mention of it saddens me. The theme park has always been one of our most important sources of offline revenue, but it was unexpectedly shut down by the Bloodhound Family for what they called a safety inspection...

C: 宝藏密码在哪！
E: Where is the key to the treasure!?

C: 你并不了解他。
E: You don't know him well enough.

C: 我…我很抱歉……
E: I... I'm very sorry...

C: 再来一百部！
E: Let's do a hundred more movies!

C: 目前各方已准备就位。您准备好就可以开机了。
E: Everyone's at their marks now. You can start filming whenever you're ready.

C: 谢谢，谢谢！但，除我以外，还有好几个广告牌兄弟被困在这座工厂里…
E: Thank you! Thank you! But, other than me, there are still a few more Billboard Bros trapped in the factory...

C: （离开片场）
E: (Leave the set)

C: 充满浪漫与魔法的<color=#dbc291ff>《美梦仙踪》</color>——您决定好就可以开拍了。
E: The most romantic and magical Dreamjoy Ascension — you can start rolling when you've decided.

C: 「折纸小鸟眨眨眼，它的目光依次扫过众人，落在钟表小子身上。」
E: "The origami bird blinks, its stare strafing the crowd, then falling on Clockie."

C: 呵，可悲的命运降临在你的身上，桶在见证一切……
E: Heh, wretched destiny is about to befall you — the can witnesses all...

C: 开拍！
E: Action!

C: 导演，有空来执导他们提案的<color=#dbc291ff>广告短片</color>吗？如果是您出手的话，肯定能创作出精彩绝伦的广告片！
E: Director, do you have time to direct the <color=#dbc291ff>commercial</color> they mentioned? If it's done by you, the commercial will definitely be an epic one!

C: 诶？这个屏幕好像和之前不一样了……
E: Hm? This screen seems different from before...

C: 咕噜噜…汽水先生的外传，这玩意儿到底该怎么做呢……
E: *gurgle* Mr. Soda's extra story... What am I gonna do about that one...

C: 噗！什么？怎么这么快？！
E: Pfft... What!? That was fast!

C: 关于猫头鹰老师。
E: About Professor Owl.

C: 如果是这个主题，那应该就是木头老爷厌恶小镇的散漫，开始采取极端的手段……
E: If that's the theme, then it should be about Old Man Wood hating the loose disorganization of the town and the startling countermeasures he starts to take...

C: 要怎么收拾这烂摊子。
E: How they are going to clean up this big mess?

C: 我看玄。
E: I don't have high hopes for that.

C: 钟表小子又要开拍了。
E: Clockie is going to start shooting again.

C: ——一款全新的游戏，<color=#dbc291ff>《银河球棒侠传说》</color>！如何，感兴趣吗？
E: ...A brand-new game, Legend of the Galactic Baseballer! How about it, are you keen?

C: 你描述了一个振奋人心的励志故事。
E: You tell an inspiring story of aspiration.

C: 这部影片是为你制作的，或许也只有你可以解开谜题，救出那位员工了。
E: This film is dedicated to you. Perhaps only you are capable of solving this mystery and saving that staff member.

C: 他如同领航员一样，带领它们走向正确的方向！而作为陪伴许多人长大的经典形象，钟表小子的确影响了一代人，也铸就了「钟表匠」的重要地位！
E: Like a skilled navigator, he steered them towards the right path! As a classic figure who grew up with many, Clockie truly shaped a generation, solidifying the Watchmaker's pivotal role in popular culture!

C: 你好，请让我游玩梦境谜钟。
E: Hello, I'd like to play Dreamscape Ticker.

C: 我们曾给流萤小姐发过邀请…很遗憾，她的身体情况暂不支持如此激烈的运动。
E: We once sent Ms. Firefly an invitation... A shame that her physical condition prevents her from participating in such an intense sporting event.

C: 哦！那是一位伟大的导演，人们都叫他「芮克先生」。
E: Oh! That great director. People call him "Mr. Reca."

C: 欸，{NICKNAME}你来了，听到了吗？两位师父说我是学剑的天才。
E: Hey, here you are, {NICKNAME}! Did you hear that? These two masters just called me a swordplay genius.

C: 最后，我想回到今天最初的话题——想必三月小姐已经找到「挥剑的理由」了吧？
E: Now, let's go back to the first question I asked you. I'm sure you've found a reason to wield your sword, right, Miss March?

C: 今天是第二次考试的日子，这次的考官是我，考验你「奇招克敌」的本事。
E: Time for your second test. I'll be your examiner this time, and I'll be testing your ability to defeat enemies with unconventional moves.

C: 这说明我的剑术理解加深了，已经会估算实力了。
E: Well, I've gained a deeper understanding of swordplay, and I'm more aware of my own strengths now.

C: （去找银狼）
E: (Ask Silver Wolf for help)

C: 嘿嘿嘿，只是附身可是不够的，我要深入他的内心。
E: Heh, just possessing him won't be enough. I'm going to get inside his head.

C: 嗷！呜！嗷呜——
E: Hawoo! Hawooo...!

C: 不过三月七小姐既然要参加演武仪典，一定要千万小心，发生什么事记得联系我哦！
E: But since you want to join the Wardance, you must be careful! Don't forget to contact me if anything happens!

C: 只要让我沾着你的身子，便立时能打通你的任督二脉，让你凭空增长百年功力。在演武仪典上获胜也不过是小菜一碟！
E: As long as you let me attach on to you, your core meridians will be instantly activated, allowing you to attain a century's worth of effort in no time. Victory at the Wardance will be a cakewalk!

C: 可恶，手脚突然动弹不得……
E: Ugh, I suddenly can't move my arms and legs...

C: 斯科特，我们认识多久了？
E: How long have we known each other, Skott?

C: 难道你刚才低头玩手机就是在安排貊泽…你们曜青人行动力都这么强的吗！
E: Wait, so while you seemed to be playing with your phone, you were actually arranging things with Moze? Are all Yaoqing people as quick as you?

C: 哈哈，我都听人说了，他们只是慑于彦卿和云璃的淫威，敢怒不敢言罢了！
E: Oh, I've caught wind of the gossip. They're just scared of Yanqing and Yunli's power, so they don't have the guts to speak up!

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 不好！兄弟们，机甲被他们控制了，快准备应战！！！
E: Oh, no! Boys, they've taken control of our mechs! Get ready for battle!!!

C: 真的假的？！
E: Seriously!?

C: 就是就是，本姑娘可不是好欺负的哦。
E: Yeah! I'm not the type of girl who's easily pushed around, you know.

C: 椒丘悠哉地离开了……
E: Jiaoqiu saunters off...

C: 灵砂大人就是那条「赤龙」？！
E: You're the Crimson Dragon!?

C: 妾身行医试药，服用各类珍奇药材早就超过了百年，倒也符合「赤龙」标准。若是三月小姐*真心*想要的话，我完全可以给你哦～
E: I have practiced my skills across the universe and consumed myriad medicines for over a century, so I do fit the description of a "Crimson Dragon." If you really want to, I can absolutely give some to you, Miss March...

C: 以太灵也有「稀有种」？
E: Do you mean rare Aether Spirits do exist?

C: 没等话说完，银狼的投影就已经消失了。
E: Before Silver Wolf can finish her sentence, her holographic projection vanishes.

C: 云骑的剑谱，怎么就跟说书的西衍先生有关了呢？
E: What has a Cloud Knight sword technique got to do with Mr. Xiyan the storyteller?

C: 然后…禁书就变成了我的工作量。
E: And then... these forbidden texts became my job.

C: 书中幻象你不得而知，想必那一定是「绝世高手逐渐放弃自己一身本领的故事」。
E: Though you do not know the story inside the book, you imagine it must be "the story of a great master gradually giving up on his outstanding skills."

C: 先自我介绍一下，我叫伦道夫，是来自匹诺康尼的见习梦境治疗师，受训于爱德华医生。最近正在为摘掉头衔上的「见习」俩字而努力。
E: Allow me to introduce myself, my name is Randolph. I am a Penaconian Trainee Dreamscape Healer, training under Dr. Edward. Recently, I've been working hard to remove this "trainee" part from my title.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来啦。今天要不要帮我拍些离散「忆质」啊？和之前一样，拍到它们的位置后发给我，回收的事就交给我来。
E: {NICKNAME}, you came! Do you want to help me photograph some "memoria" today? As before, send their location to me once you get a picture and leave the containment work to me.

C: 离散忆质是什么？
E: What is scattered memoria?

C: 嗯，不愧是被我选中的孩子。我们的动作得快一些了。
E: Hm, just what I expect from my chosen one! We need to hurry up about it.

C: 你向小桶宝力讲述三月七赐予你「复读机」之名的那一天，并告诉三月七这对于你人生意义之重大。
E: You tell Litter Pony all about the day that March 7th bestowed you with the name of "The Echoer," as well as telling March 7th how significant that day was to your life.

C: 我是来看比赛的。
E: I came to watch the competition.

C: 真是个热心肠的好人啊……
E: What a kind-hearted person...

C: 「文化冲击」会造成这么严重的幻觉吗？
E: Can culture shock really cause such strong hallucinations?

C: 没想到雅利洛-Ⅵ的人竟然开始活跃在银河里，能在这场演武仪典中见到你我很高兴。
E: Who would have thought the people of Jarilo-VI would start making waves in the cosmos? It's a pleasure to see you here at the Wardance.

C: 你把所有带着公司头衔的人都看作公司的走狗。你觉得咱们是把灵魂卖给金钱的奴隶。不必否认，我见惯了这种眼神。
E: You peg everyone with an IPC job title as one of their lapdogs. You think we've sold our souls and become servants to profit. Don't deny that. I know that look all too well.

C: 嘿嘿，来一局吧！
E: Heheh, let's play a round!

C: 你准备好和我对局了吗？
E: You ready to have a match with me?

C: 面对如此萌物，我矜持不了一点！
E: Never! I can't stay calm in the face of such cuteness!

C: 呜呜呜，你嫌弃我～
E: Boohoo, you don't like me anymore!

C: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}，请让我一个人待一会……
E: Sorry, {NICKNAME}, please give me some space...

C: 你当然可以啦！只要好好吃饭、好好睡觉、好好锻炼身体，玛吉一定能变得比我更厉害！到时候你就在拳台上三两下把我打趴，然后大喊一声！
E: Of course you will! You just have to eat well, sleep well, train well, and you'll be even stronger than I am! When that happens, you'll be able to KO me in just a few punches, and then yell triumphantly in the ring!

C: 玛吉那孩子，在面对病魔的时候，一定也是这种感觉吧？
E: That girl Margie, when she confronted the demons of her sickness, she must've felt this way too, no?

C: 既然获得了参加复活赛的机会，那我就必须好好把握这次机会，不能辜负大家的支持！
E: Since I've been given the chance to participate in the repechage, I have to make the most of it and not disappoint everyone who's been cheering me on!

C: 话别说太满，搞不好等一会见了面，会发现又是你的老熟人！哈哈哈哈！
E: Don't be too sure about that. They might turn out to be another old friend of yours again! Hahahaha!

C: 哈哈，稍微有点伤人。但我可以理解。漆黑的虎克大人，老实交代，你是不是早就知道了？
E: Haha, this stings a little, but I get it. Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, come clean — did you know about this right from the start?

C: 下次你亲自参赛吧。
E: How about you be a contestant yourself next time?

C: 要是你妈妈看到你现在赢得的奖金，她会理解你的！
E: If your mother saw the prize money you won, she'd understand!

C: 杀戮之上的力量确实存在。我要求受戒，进一步学习。
E: Power beyond slaughter does exist. I request to be ordained to further my study.

C: 只要抱着它睡觉，就能在梦中体验真实的战斗？这是什么匹诺康尼青春版？
E: One can experience hyperrealistic battles in a dream just by hugging it when falling asleep? What kind of Penaconian daydream is this?

C: 么么～么么么！
E: Mehr mehr! Mehrmehr mehr!

C: 么么！么！
E: Mehr mehr! Mehr!

C: 开始比赛。
E: Begin competition.

C: 开始比赛。
E: Begin competition.

C: 算了，咱们还是用拳头来交流吧！
E: Never mind, let's have a dialogue with our fists!

C: 赛前许多分析师预测本场比赛会打得旗鼓相当，但出人意料的是，波提欧选手仅用六发子弹便结束了比赛。
E: Before the match, many analysts predicted that this could go either way. But what was surprising that Boothill ended the match with only six bullets.

C: 我们不想为自己找借口，如果实在要找一个理由，那就是我们还不够强。
E: We won't find excuses for ourselves. If I really had to find a reason, it was because we weren't strong enough.

C: 这位「八卦记者」请注意提问礼仪。
E: Tabloid Journalist, pay attention to your interview etiquette.

C: 对不起，职业病犯了，总以为自己在主持美食栏目。
E: Sorry, it's just a professional habit. I keep thinking that I'm still hosting a food show.

C: 前排左手边第一位。
E: Front row, first from the left.

C: 我也不是本地人，觉得这些声音太刺耳了。请问{NICKNAME}教练有什么想说的吗？
E: I'm not local either, and I think these opinions are quite distasteful. Does coach {NICKNAME} have anything to say?

C: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
E: All right. That's it for your questions.

C: 没办法，有些事还是要亲力亲为才行。
E: Not like I have a choice. If you want something done properly, do it yourself.

C: 我要逛庙会。
E: I'm gonna take a tour of the temple fair.

C: 梓桥，你的机巧鸟呢？
E: Ziqiao, where's your cycrane?

C: 斯科特这人其实某种意义上很好说话，只要钱给够，什么都有得谈，祖宗。
E: Skott is actually fairly easy to negotiate with — he'll do anything for the right price, top dog.

C: 你给我回来！小绿到底说了什么啊！给我说清楚啊！
E: Get back here! What exactly did Vernon say! No cliffhangers!

C: 嗨，{NICKNAME}玩家。你想我了吗？想我就来玩紧张刺激的「枘凿六合•Remake」吧！
E: Hi, player {NICKNAME}. Did you miss me? Come play the thrilling Hexanexus: Remake if you did!

C: 为什么要找我呢？
E: Why me?

C: 修行无处不在，望阁下在遍历过程中能有所感悟，以助力在下。
E: There are opportunities to train everywhere. I hope you will gain insight during this journey, to better aid me.

C: 我同意了。
E: Yes, I'll do it.

C: 噢！主公，你成功归来了！快看看在下的*缭乱•极•特训*成果吧！
E: Oh! Master, you've successfully returned! Quickly, come take a look at the fruits of the Dazzling's special extreme training!

C: …涂鸦。
E: ...Graffiti.

C: …？不明白你到底想说什么。
E: ...? I don't understand what you're trying to say.

C: 初次登台，闲话少说。请期待在下及诸音忍带来的，超•精彩绝伦的演出吧！
E: It is our first time on stage, so I'll keep it short. Please look forward to the super-excitingly fabulous show that the sound ninja and I are about to bring you!

C: （观众对乐队演出的评价都很高，看来可以放心了。）
E: (The band's reviews from the audience are very positive. Looks like I had nothing to worry about.)

C: 嘤嘤嘤。
E: Beepbeepbeep.

C: （等收集完了灵感，就回排练室看看吧。）
E: (I'll head back to the rehearsal room for a gander when I'm done collecting inspiration.)

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 我想在这个人画的涂鸦前演奏！
E: I want to play a piece in front of this artist's graffiti!

C: 欢迎试玩，欢迎体验！
E: Feel free to give it a go!

C: 以乱破同学为主导的乐队风格不符合学院规范，我也无法接受她如此胡闹的行事方式。因此，我不认为继续合作会有好的结果。
E: The style of Rappa's band is a form of music that is not aligned with the academy's regulations. I simply cannot accept her unruly behavior. So, I don't see any positive outcomes from continuing to work together.

C: 听着很有道理的样子…
E: That actually makes sense...

C: 最亲切的。
E: The most kind.

C: 再等等吧…
E: Wait a moment...

C: 问问发生了什么吧。
E: Best ask what happened.

C: 大岚天在上，何等肃穆的氛围。缭乱•忍侠的眉头紧皱，她冰冷的忍力喷涌而出，凝结了四周的空气，你甚至感到了呼吸变得困难……
E: With the Great Lan above, the atmosphere is solemn and quiet. The Dazzling Ninja's brow furrows tightly, her icy ninja power surging forth, condensing the air in the vicinity — even your breathing is starting to feel difficult...

C: 完了！没人说过闭幕演出会来这么多观众啊，要是乱破小姐没能及时回来，台上只有我们两个人，不就成了纯小丑吗！
E: This is bad! No one said the closing show would have such a large crowd. If Miss Rappa doesn't return in time, we'd be the laughingstock with just the two of us on stage!

C: 你就是我们的救星！
E: You are our savior!

C: 这个段子尬的…能听半分钟不走都是神人了。
E: This gag was mad awkward... Those who didn't leave after thirty seconds of this are really too easily amused.

C: 我的要价可不低啊。
E: My price isn't cheap.

C: 没想到外面都传成了这样…随便吧。
E: I didn't expect that to be the version of the story you folks are spreading outside... whatever.

C: 那当然！
E: Definitely!

C: …好吧，我试试。
E: ...Okay, I'll give it a try.

C: 咳咳。但选拔确实是由它独立完成的，我只认可这次结果。
E: Ahem. But it did indeed finish the selection by itself, and I have no choice but to acknowledge the outcome.

C: 哼，哼哼！
E: Oink, oink oink!

C: 但其实…
E: But actually...

C: 大哥！这就是音乐的力量啊！
E: Big Bro! This is the power of music!

C: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
E: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

C: 我要走了。
E: I have to go.

C: 没想到吧，咱们店里还卖文具呢。
E: Bet you weren't expecting that our stall sells stationery too.

C: 搞定，可算是把这箱「迷因」都{RUBY_B#卖完}变现{RUBY_E#}了。怎么样，又有趣又来钱，不亏吧？
E: All done. Finally managed to {RUBY_B#sell out}monetize{RUBY_E#} this meme crate. How about it? Fun and money-making, pretty worth it, eh?

C: 就是你有事找我？
E: You were looking for me?

C: 很有氛围感呢，我很喜欢。多谢你啦，小三月。
E: They've got a great vibe. I love these. Thanks, March.

C: 嗯，速战速决！一起去吃饭！
E: On it, fast and furious! Let's eat dinner together!

C: 在办公桌上。
E: On the office desk.

C: 真是发人深省的台词呀……
E: What a profound line...

C: 作弊码正确！即将进入自爆模式，亲爱的无名客，我们下个永劫回归再会！
E: Cheat code correct! Now entering self-destruct mode. Dear Nameless, we shall meet again in the next cycle of the universe!

C: 至少有了这些「面试培训班」，还是很方便跳槽的。
E: At least with these interview training classes, it's easy to change jobs.

C: 买错了？难道，是你们重新给我买了一只？
E: Bought the wrong one? Did you guys buy another one for me?

C: 诸君，我就是步离人。

E: Full set of finger exercises complete. My hands are hot and ready to go!

C: 都说了别这么叫我……
E: I already said not to call me that...

C: 支持机动球。
E: The Roboball.

C: 赵相机。
E: Say~Cheese~

C: 起这么不敬的名字，要是被列车长知道，会被扫地出门吧！
E: Such a disrespectful name. If the conductor catches wind of this, they'll eject us from the Express!

C: 按照流程，起完名就可以上传啦。不知道会收到什么样的评价…真紧张啊。
E: According to the process, we can upload it once we've named it. I wonder what comments we'll get... I'm so nervous.

C: 「我演我自己」。
E: "Appearing as Myself."

C: 走，我带你去儿童保护协会。
E: Come, I will escort you to the Child Protective Service.

C: 奇美拉当然有跳槽的权利。
E: The chimeras of course have the right to change jobs.

C: 没想到小奇美拉的心思会有这么多，看起来很听话的样子，心底却埋着不少事。

C: 我从最开始就在队伍里啦，但也不是很明白。
E: I've been with the squad from the start, but I never really understood either.

C: 灰宝总是能找到让小奇美拉和睦相处，所有力都往一处使的办法，究竟是怎么做到的呢？给我们讲讲吧~
E: Grayie could always get the chimeras to get along with one another, ensuring that their efforts were all aligned. How did you even manage that? Tell us, please!

C: 「{F#少女}{M#少年}啊，你渴望智慧吗？」
E: "{F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, do you desire wisdom?"

C: 没关系，等你把这里的记忆带给他，他一定会很高兴的。
E: It's fine. He'll be overjoyed when you bring the memories you made here to him.

C: 问得好！
E: Good question!

C: 请问你知道凶手是谁吗？
E: Can you tell me who did it?

C: 走得很安详，你有什么遗言吗？
E: Rest in peace, then. Any last words?

C: 天使海豹别哭，等下*我们*就来抱抱你，没事的哟。
E: Angel Seal, don't cry. We'll hug you in a bit. It's okay.

C: o( (•｀ω′ • )o「豹，可是『牙刺必豹』的哦！」)∋
E: o( (•｀ω′ • )o "I, after all, believe in a thorn for a thorn!'" )∋

C: 我可是活得比你有滋有味多了！你要是有空关心我，不如多关心关心你自己吧！
E: I lead a far more exciting life than you! If you've got the time to worry about me, worry about yourself instead!

C: …赛飞儿阁下在我解除了金线的固定之后，她就带着奖杯从我眼前瞬间消失了。
E: ... After I dispelled the golden thread's tether, Lady Cipher vanished from in front of me with the trophy.

C: 那「金杯终破碎」的预言呢？
E: What about the prophecy that "the golden trophy shatters"?

C: <size=28>来体验一下吧！我一直都很喜欢你们的故事来着！</size>
E: <size=28>Try it out, please! I've always loved following your stories!</size>

C: 晚上好，亲爱的{NICKNAME}！真是激动人心的久别重逢啊——能在这茫茫宇宙中屡屡相遇，果然你我之间缘分匪浅。
E: Good evening, {NICKNAME}, my dear! It's such an exhilarating reunion — being able to cross paths again and again in this vast universe, it seems we really have a special bond.

C: 付点朋友费就记得了。
E: Just a small fee from friends, and I'll remember it.

C: 在测试版的基础上，我们对项目整体进行了调优与迭代，并丰富和扩充了玩法功能。
E: We've optimized and iterated the overall project based on the beta while adding and expanding gameplay features.

C: 当然！毕竟很多时候，游戏的DEMO版本也是种情怀的代表。
E: Of course! After all, the demo version of a game often holds a special place in the heart.

C: 至于为什么唯独缺「您」，并非是比赛少人，而是缺少「重量级嘉宾」！
E: As for why we were trying to get you to join, it's not because there aren't enough racers, but because we're missing a big-name guest!

C: 给我就给我嘛，还上价值。
E: Just hand it over. No need for the drama.

C: 您说笑了，您可是星穹列车的成员，怎么说也是有头有脸的大人物。再说了，您车技这么好，海选阶段这一场场比赛下来可是吸引了不少观众呢。
E: Oh, come on. You're a member of the Astral Express — you're a big deal! Plus, your amazing driving skills at the qualifiers drew quite a crowd.

C: 别转移话题，你不许借我的号！
E: Don't change the subject, you're not allowed to borrow my account!

C: 当地的不可思议有点太多了…
E: This Penacony place has way too many mysteries...

C: 是「救救！救救！」
E: It's "Save me! Save me!"

C: 藿藿你是不是尾巴大爷假扮的？
E: Huohuo, are you Mr. Tail in disguise?

C: 波提欧小鸟
E: Bootbird

C: 你战战兢兢地把手放到绒球上，过于紧张的情绪甚至让你遗忘了它的手感。
E: You nervously place your hand on the fluff ball and get so tense that you completely forget what it even feels like.

C: 我从业这么些年，还从没听说过这么离奇的「特调配方」。口说无凭，手底下才能见真章。
E: I've been in this trade for years and never once heard of such an outlandish "Signature Recipe." Seeing is believing. Let's see some actual results.

C: 你瞧，账账都忙瘦了。
E: See that? Numby's gotten skinnier from all the work.

C: （叹气般的叫声）
E: (A sigh-like groan)

C: 听起来不像是本地人。
E: Doesn't sound like someone from around here.

C: 这又是为什么？
E: Why this choice this time?

C: 反应过来时，你已经被踢到了吧台外。而对面，花火早已津津有味地翻看了一遍「特调配方」。
E: Before you can react, you're booted out from behind the bar. Sparkle's already flipping through the "Special Mix Recipes" on the other side.

C: 我当将军，真的假的？
E: Wait, I'm a General? For real?

C: 花火什么？
E: Wait, General Sparkle?

C: 仙人快乐茶。
E: Immortal's Delight.

C: 对面吧台见！
E: See you at the other bar.

C: 没事做就去测试下「模拟宇宙」。
E: Got nothing to do? Then go run some tests in the Simulated Universe.

C: 哈哈，去那里干什么？到处全是一群托帕那样的工作狂，没点生活情趣，连瓶好用的护发素都买不到。
E: Haha, what's the point of going there? It's full of workaholics like Topaz, with no sense of fun in life, and you can't even find a decent bottle of hair conditioner!

C: 这里的战争指的是宇宙商战，你也知道「万界之癌」席卷了许多星球，给公司制造了不少坏账，清理起来颇有些难度。
E: When I say war, I mean corporate warfare across the universe. As you know, the "Cancer of All Worlds" has swept through many planets, creating a lot of bad debt for the IPC, and it's quite a headache to clean up.

C: 只是一点个人心得，就当是送给合作伙伴的一份小礼物吧。
E: Just a bit of personal insight. Consider it a small gift to my partner.

C: 别掉以轻心，真正的挑战还在后面。你马上就会见识到资本市场的残酷，那些想要把你手头资产吃干抹净的竞争对手，可是什么手段都用的出来。
E: Don't let your guard down. The real challenge is yet to come, and you're about to witness the brutality of the capital market firsthand. Your competitors will stop at nothing to strip you of every asset you own.

C: 我能用最有效率的方式找到最珍贵的遗物，还能抓住常被别人忽视的寻宝机会。
E: I can find and excavate the most precious relics in the most efficient way, and I can grasp opportunities that other relic hunters often overlook.

C: 对了，之前探索过的遗迹可以继续「深入探索」，不过路径上想必会更加危险…就看你敢不敢了。
E: Oh yeah — you can continue to explore the ruin depths at any ruins that you've already been through, but things will become even more dangerous... It's all up to how brave you are.

C: 进入古代遗迹。
E: Enter the ancient ruins.

C: 这可不是乱七八糟的！咱仙舟上的群众就喜闻乐见这种故事。

C: 你这是要给我十三试炼呢？

E: What's that about!?

C: 因为您是这个故事的主角啊！「{NICKNAME}将新生的龙尊命名为——」
E: Because you're the protagonist of this story! "{NICKNAME} named the new high elder as —"

E: My producer even said that whether I can revitalize my career all depends on your adaptation of this story into an Immersia.

C: 名字倒是挺唬人的。
E: That name sounds pretty formidable.

C: 醒了就好醒了就好，没想到你这么……
E: Ah, finally, you've woken up. I didn't expect that you would just...

E: Maybe we should report this Trotter as a bug...

C: 欸，总感觉有点简单……

C: 啊呀呀呀呀～原来是我曾见过的，老夫想起来了！

C: 哼哼！哼！

C: 莫要跟老夫客气！不过举手之劳而已。

C: 真能这么做吗？
E: Wait, seriously? Can we do that?

C: 嗯…嗯嗯…好的……
E: Mm-hmm... Mm-hmm... Alright...

C: 好吧…多谢黑塔女士。
E: Okay... Thanks Madam Herta.

C: 包在我身上。但我必须提醒二位…这个方案并不能解决根本问题，只不过是推迟了抉择到来的时间而已。
E: Leave it to me. But remember, this is only a temporary solution — you'll have to make a decision eventually.

C: 比起以太灵，还是我的宝剑用着更顺手些......
E: I feel I still wield my sword more comfortably than Aether Spirits...

C: 你看，我就说我没耍赖。这都是我亲手打出来的操作，没毛病吧？
E: Look, I told you I wouldn't cheat! See, I'm controlling things myself. Nothing wrong with that, right?

C: 啊呀呀~小友真是不愧冠军之名，老夫甘~拜~下~风~
E: My my~ Just what you'd expect from the Champion, my friend. I bow~ to~ your~ strength~

C: 福利应该很丰厚吧？
E: They must be pretty generous, right?

C: 你喜欢这份工作吗？
E: Do you enjoy your job?

C: 可恶，她的气场也太强了…输人不输阵，我们也说点什么吧，{NICKNAME}！
E: Ugh! She's got the crowd behind her. We can't just keep quiet, say something {NICKNAME}!

C: 快看，那不是三月七大姐头吗！
E: Look, it's the one and only, Miss March!

C: …谁？你们找错人了吧？
E: Uh... you might have found the wrong person.

C: 能再多夸两句吗？三月七爱听。
E: March loves praise, got a few more?

C: 两位来到这里…是要聊和它有关的事吗？
E: I'm guessing... you two came to talk about them, right?

C: 吸引关注…小桂子倒是很擅长，她平日里经常用我来表演杂技什么的…但在这灵异爱好者网站上，该怎么涨粉呢？
E: Speaking of attracting attention... how do we get a following on a paranormal activity website? Sounds like Little Gui's department — she used me in some of her performances just to draw a bigger crowd.

C: 小狐狸，你想从我这儿得到什么？想知道那条看门狗的下落？抱歉，它早就灰•飞•烟•灭啦！
E: What do you want from me, little fox girl? You want to know what happened to the guard dog? He turned to ashes a long time ago!

C: 岁阳会将无关人等排斥在幻境之外，独留受害者，但摇动这铃铛，能把咱们几人思考波长与岁阳同调。具体的原理我不多解释了，真要念说明书念完天也该黑了……
E: Heliobi create illusions to isolate their victims... but if we ring this chime, our thought-waves will synchronize with those of the heliobus. As for how it works... I'm afraid that would take the rest of the day to explain.

C: 这不过是一份工作罢了。
E: You come for me, you best not miss.

C: 要是你拿着藏月瓠在某个死角守株待兔，而剩下的人将白露小姐赶来这儿。
E: Nice! In that case, you can take the gourd and camp out in a corner — the rest of us will chase Lady Bailu back over here.

C: 呜，对不起，阿露…我、我被大人教训了，我不能陪你玩了……
E: I'm sorry, Lulu... Th—The grown-ups won, I can't play with you anymore...

C: 说书也好，幻戏也罢，所有故事的结局都是注定的，你该不会因此而放弃享受这些故事吧？
E: In both cases, tales have a predetermined ending — but you shouldn't let that stop you from enjoying them, should you?

C: 虽然桌上打出了什么牌，牌山上还剩什么牌，旁边的人想做什么牌型，这些统统都是能算的。可是如果只有计算，一切就没那味儿了。
E: Which tiles can be played, which tiles are leftover, what kind of hand the person next to you is trying to make — all of these can be determined through calculations. But if everything is just a calculation, the game loses its flavor.

C: 将军…请允许我…展示剑术。我在此向你发起挑战……
E: General... allow me... to demonstrate my swordsmanship. I hereby challenge you...

C: 「遵守规则」、以及「势均力敌」都是弈手常有的幻觉，就让我来教你如何终盘吧。
E: Notions of rules and equal competition are mere illusions. Now, if you don't mind, allow me to show you how the endgame is played.

C: 浮烟，等待着你的，就是这样的命运。
E: Such is the fate that awaits you, Cirrus.

C: 只要仙舟的将军还存在，我将继续与仙舟的将军战斗下去，直到星辰熄灭。
E: As long as the generals of the Xianzhou live, my battle against them will continue, until the stars themselves burn out.

C: 可我还是我…我没有被那家伙控制呀。
E: But I'm still me... I'm the one in control...

C: 藿藿的大尾巴，烧没啦！藿藿的大尾巴，像烟花！
E: Huohuo's tail is all singed! It looks like a giant sparkler!

C: …我、我被谁附身了吗？是尾巴吗？
E: I... I feel like I've been possessed. Tail, is that you?

C: 门的那一边究竟是什么呢？尾巴没有做好「等价交换」的准备，他不打算过去。
E: Just what lies on the other side of that door? Tail is not prepared for an "equivalent exchange," nor does he plan on going through.

C: 将军收到了十王司的公文，而后匆匆离开了神策府…彦卿翻阅过《大敌名录》，想来这岁阳定是个不错的对手，肯定能砥砺剑术，我便来到了这里！
E: The General received an official letter from the Ten-Lords Commission and left the Seat of Divine Foresight in a hurry... I read the "List of Archenemies" before and figured that this heliobus must be a good opponent to sharpen my sword skills, so here I am.

C: 这你都没被挑衅到？
E: You weren't the slightest bit provoked by that?

C: 这三个人就是有棋品没人品的典型！我最看不起这样的人！你们俩也赶紧受死吧！
E: These three are the definition of minds over manners! Such people disgust me! You two will die alongside them!

C: 好有礼貌的小孩…那也是冥差吗？
E: That kid has good manners... Are they a spiritfarer, too?

C: （看他的眼神…应该是在这里等人见面吧？小桂子让我找的人应该就是他了。）
E: (That look in his eye... Surely he's waiting to meet up with someone here, right? He must be the person Little Gui asked me to find.)

C: 你说的没错，我是判、判官，我要捉拿外逃的岁阳。
E: You're right. I am a j—judge. I will capture the fleeing heliobus.

C: 若昔，你……
E: Ruoxi, you...

C: 将我送回十王司的囚笼中吧，麻烦您了。
E: Please, send me back to the Ten Lords' prison. Please.

C: 对啊，我也会间歇性突发想要奋斗一下的症状。
E: You're right, I have times when I suddenly feel inspired to work really hard, too.

C: 对小桂子这样在外闯荡的异乡人来说，想要搏一把，租屋变豪宅、星槎换巨舰，这是常事。毕竟你们青春有限，生存压力也很大。
E: It's common for outworlders like you, Little Gui, to want to work hard and upgrade your flat for a mansion or your starskiff for a giant ship. After all, your youth is limited and the pressure to survive is great.

C: 明、明白了，下不为例！
E: U—Understood! This won't happen again!

C: 站住，请问是来面试的还是商务合作的？
E: Hold it, may I ask if you are here for an interview or a business proposition?

C: 又有一个太卜大人？
E: Another master diviner?

C: 呸呸！你这个不争气的家伙！
E: Eurgh! You pathetic wimp!

C: 听说你想见我。
E: I heard you wanted to see me.

C: 到碰面的地方了，那个人应该就是发帖人吧？
E: This is the meeting place. That must be the person who made the post?

C: 对不起，产能不够。
E: Sorry, not enough have been produced.

C: 小桂子，要再核对下身份吗？
E: Little Gui, would you authenticate the ID again?

C: 家人们，你们看到这条消息了吗？绝对劲爆！
E: Fam, have you seen this news? This is huge!

C: 这真的是宝烛的想法吗？
E: Is that really what you think, Arkeri?

C: 真实的想法……
E: What I really think...

C: 正因如此，我想把这个奖牌…「送给」大家。
E: That's why, I want to "give" this medallion... to everyone.

C: 你来啦！设备已经调试好啦，「粉丝提问」环节我自己收集了一部分提问，不过还是由你那边收集到的先开始吧。
E: You're here! The equipment has all been calibrated. I collected some questions myself for the Fan Q&A segment, but let's start with the ones you got instead.

C: 别急，等我给她拍张照。
E: Don't worry. I'll snap a quick pic of her.

C: 没错，尽管有时候吓得半死……
E: That's right, even though it usually scares me half to death...

C: 你也多多和粉丝们交流嘛，这是我们一起取得的成就。
E: You should interact with the fans more. This is the fruit of our collective labor.

C: 我想想，我也得给她寄点儿什么，我先撤退了，回见。
E: I've been thinking, I really should send her something back. I'm gonna do that. See you later.

C: 这项测试，简单来说就是把我们的思维同步上传到云端——
E: In a nutshell, this test uploads and synchronizes our thoughts to the cloud...

C: 打完了，就这？
E: All done. Is that it?

C: 两只亲代造物已准备就绪，通过这台「生命烘焙箱」就能不断制造出新的造物。
E: The two parental creations are ready. We use this Lifeform Oven to keep nurturing new creations.

C: 它伸出爪子扒拉着地上的垃圾，正要吞咽。你想阻止，却为时已晚——
E: It reaches out with its paw toward the trash on the ground, and is about to swallow it. You want to stop it, but it's already too late...

C: 连这里的造物都时常把我俩搞混。
E: Even the creations here get the two of us mixed up.

C: 藤萝饼和「拉姆之友」吸引了许多造物靠近，它们似乎被它们身上的某种气息所折服，又或是为之沉醉。
E: Wisteria Cake and "Lambda's Friend" attract many creations to come nearby, with an aura that seemingly captivates them, or perhaps intoxicates them.

C: 那也得先把虫子打晕吧，我可没这身手……
E: Well, you gotta knock that beetle out first. I certainly can't...

C: 你你你你怎么能和它对话？！
E: H—h—h—how can you talk with it!?

C: 你先去忙吧，我再和它僵持一会儿！就不信这鸟不肯开口！
E: Off you go and do that, then. I'll try and continue to get it to talk. I can't believe this bird refuses to talk!

C: 故事到这里就结束了，因为没有人亲眼看到接下来发生了什么样的「毁灭」。希望你能喜欢这段不为人知的秘史。
E: Our story ends here for now, because nobody could survive to see what "Destruction" followed. I hope you've enjoyed this unknown slice of secret history.

C: 你…你！我要去找人告状！你就是个疯子，实在是欺人太甚！
E: You... you're nuts! I'm going to file a complaint! There will be consequences!

C: 「请听好我的问题——我们应该重新变回『美梦剧团』吗？」
E: "Now, please listen to my question: Do you think we should return to the Sweet Dreams Troupe?"

C: 不对！嘻嘻…哪有这么干净的吧台，要堆满那个…纸钞和筹码才有感觉嘛。
E: Wait! Hee-hee... what kind of counter is so clean? It has to be piled with... paper money and chips to bring out the vibes!

C: 我听说这里有家酒吧。
E: I heard there was a lounge here.

C: 给我尝尝，要是味道不对，你这酒吧也别想开下去了。
E: Fine, I'll give it a try. If it doesn't impress me, your lounge will have to shut down.

C: 因为小点数全都被我抠掉了——它们坐起来实在不舒服，总让我想上厕所……
E: Because all the small numbers have been scratched off by me. They were not comfortable to sit on, always making me want to rush to the bathroom...

C: 不吉利，呸呸呸！
E: Don't say that! Those words won't bring any luck!

C: 好像是来过…
E: I think so...

C: （…是不是直接把冰块敷在头上会更有效果？）
E: (...Would it be more effective if I just place ice cubes on her head?)

C: 别激动。我回去后仔细想了想，那时候是我不对，说话冲了点，产生了些误会哈。
E: Hey, chill out. I thought about it, and I realized I was a bit too aggressive, and there might be some kind of misunderstanding.

C: 别激动。我回去后仔细想了想，那时候是我不对，说话冲了点，产生了些误会哈。
E: Hey, chill out. I thought about it, and I realized I was a bit too aggressive, and there might be some kind of misunderstanding.

C: 呼…消消气。喝得差不多，但我要说的还没完。你打算在这家酒吧工作多久？到底还要过多长时间我才会见不到你？
E: Well... I've calmed down a bit. I've almost finished my drink, but I'm not done talking. How long are you intending to work at this lounge? How long do I have to wait if I don't want to see your face again?

C: 那言语的价值是什么？我们拼命发出自己的声音，只是徒劳吗？
E: If that's the case, what purpose does language serve? Is our desperate cry for understanding merely an exercise in futility?

C: …你说的爱是？
E: ...What's the "love" you mentioned?

C: （…按它的习惯，应该是指放个跟动画角色有关的装饰物上去吧？）
E: (...Based on its habits, it probably means it wants a decoration related to cartoon characters?)

C: 唔，这次想要<color=#dbc291ff>松弛感，清清爽爽的，是我喜欢的类型哦。可别加太多冰，</color>人家最近身体很虚。
E: Mm, this time, I want a <color=#dbc291ff>uplifting and refreshing drink that I like. Don't add too much ice</color>. I've been feeling under the weather recently.

C: 自己瞧瞧，这是能喝的饮料吗？果然不该对你有太多期待，早点回去吧。
E: See for yourself. Is this even drinkable? I shouldn't have expected too much from you. Let's call it a night.

C: 玻璃杯在空中做出完美的八周转体动作，再稳稳地落回你的手中。
E: The glass makes eight perfect flips in midair and lands firmly back in your hand.

C: …你的真实身份？
E: ...Your true identity?

C: 你猜有没有？
E: Why not take a guess?

C: 算了，谁叫我这么宽容又善良呢！钱给你，下次记得，嘿嘿…记清楚我的要求。
E: Forget it. Good thing I'm generous and kind! Here's your money, but remember next time, heh-heh... make sure you get my order properly.

C: 你比那个黑桃讨厌多了！
E: You're a bigger pain than that Spade!

C: …嘿！说谁呢！我可都听得到。敢在背后说我坏话，必须给你颜色瞧瞧！
E: ...Hey! Who are you talking about? I heard everything you just said. If you're going to talk smack about me behind my back, I'll have to give you a hard time!

C: （黑桃带着司令出去玩了，它们两个不会闹出事来吧？）
E: (Spade took Mr. Bigwig out to play. I wonder if those two will cause trouble.)

C: 嗝！有点晕乎乎的…和你聊天好开心，我还会来酒吧找你玩的，要记得欢迎我哇！
E: Burp! I'm feeling a bit dizzy... It's so nice talking to you! I'll come hang out with you some other day. Be sure to welcome me with open arms!

C: 汪      汪汪汪
E: Woof      woof woof woof

C: 看得<rhythm>好<rhythm>着<rhythm>急
E: It's <rhythm>so <rhythm>upset <rhythm>to watch

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 跟随其余「阮•梅」造物的节奏，在恰当的时候<color=#f29e38ff>长按屏幕</color>。
E: Follow the beat of the other Ruan Mei's creation and <color=#f29e38ff>tap and hold on the screen</color> at the right time.

C: 准备开始正式的说唱表演吧！
E: Prepare to begin the rapping performance proper!

C: （…记得在饮品单里看到过这杯饮料。）
E: (...I remember seeing this drink on the drink menu.)

C: 你将三月小鸟摆放在街机上
E: You place the March Bird on the arcade machine

C: 那么现在，我们可以进入正题了吧？
E: Can we now move on to more important matters?

C: 锵锵——恭喜您解锁了第一台街机！那么接下来，请让我为您介绍折纸小鸟街机自带的DIY功能！
E: Ta-da! Congratulations! You've unlocked the first arcade machine! Now, allow me to show you the Origami Bird Arcade Machine's built-in DIY feature.

C: 嗯，我也觉得和{NICKNAME}非常投缘。
E: Yes, I feel like we get along wonderfully too, {NICKNAME}.

C: 对了，既然正巧遇到，{NICKNAME}要再来一起拍张合照吗？
E: Oh, since we've run into each other... {NICKNAME}, would you like to take another photo together?

C: {NICKNAME}，您能否赏脸来帮我们这个忙？
E: {NICKNAME}, will you be so kind as to help us out?

C: 莫非，这就是「盘外招」？
E: Could this be the "dirty trick?"

C: 呃，那个…大家都散了吧！今天这件事就先算了吧。毕竟我也是个有担当的武术家，不能和宵小之辈纠缠。
E: Everyone... let's just disperse! Let's drop it for today. After all, as a responsible martial artist, I shouldn't be entangled with insignificant individuals.

C: 还有这个…有个评论说我的手是被仙舟剑士给剁了，所以才换上了现在的义肢，专挑罗浮的选手打压。
E: There's a comment claiming my arm was chopped off by a swordmaster from the Xianzhou, so I got my current prosthetics specifically to challenge fighters from the Luofu.

C: 第二天
E: The next day

C: 虽然让铄金露出了真面目…但，托帕小姐，下次还是请把安排事先告诉我吧！
E: Although it exposed Shuojin's true colors... Miss Topaz, please inform me about the arrangements in advance next time!

C: 如您所说，实事求是：我的分析权重中确实加入了百分之十五的好奇情感。
E: As you indicated, to be objective: My analysis does include a fifteen percent weightage of curiosity.

C: 好的，请品尝这道「扳手手拌沙拉」。它用料健康、分量刚好、味道清爽，正适合用来加餐。
E: Right away. Here's a Wrench Drenched Salad for you. Made with healthy ingredients in the perfect serving size, this is just the flavorful refreshment you should be reaching for between meals.

C: 哪有那么简单？你还没经过「杨叔十八机兵阵」的试炼，怎么称得上是合格的无名客呢？
E: Hehe, not so easy! You can't call yourself a Nameless until you've cleared the "<unbreak>18</unbreak> Sentinels: Mr. Yang" trial!

C: 加入星际和平公司，升职加薪！
E: A top-level executive of the IPC with a high salary!

C: 哎呀，这真的有点羞耻，要不下次取消这个环节吧？
E: Uhh, this is kind of cringey... You think we can drop this part of the initiation next time?

C: 瞧吧，又开始了。
E: Here we go again.

C: 好的。请您好好休息，我这就滚。
E: Alright. Please get some good rest, I'll show myself out.

C: 零食、饮料、水果，你准备的可真周到。不过我身为领航员，可不能只顾享受乘员的招待～
E: Snacks, drinks, fruit — you've thought of everything. But as the Navigator, I can't just enjoy the crew's hospitality...

C: 怎么能放在观景车厢？难道「帕姆换装」是什么景观吗？
E: How can it be placed in the Parlor Car? Is my changing clothes a sightseeing attraction now?

C: 小心点，这后面有些路可能不止通往地下…如果遇到危险，可以跑回入口找我。
E: Be careful, for some of the upcoming paths may not merely lead further underground... If you encounter any danger, just run back to the entrance and find me.

C: 活着就好，活着万岁！
E: Living is the best! Long live life!

C: 是啊，至少我们还活着——这也是一种成功。
E: Yes, at least we're still alive... That is an accomplishment in itself.

C: 总之，守好这些东西。也许它们一百年后会变得更值钱也说不定呢。
E: Anyway, you should take good care of these things. Perhaps they'll be even more valuable a century from now.

C: 闭关？
E: Off-grid? What for?

C: 呜嗡！（嗯！肚子不叫了，谢谢{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
E: Grumph grumph! (Mmm! No more tummy sounds, thanks, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

C: 呜嗡？（怎么啦？{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？要我摸摸你吗？）
E: Grumph? (What's up, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}? Should I pet you back?)

C: 怪不得联觉信标会引发战争。
E: No wonder the Synesthesia Beacon triggered wars.

C: 呜，呜嗡…（偷偷告诉你，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，其实也不算错…）
E: Grumph... (Just between us, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, that wasn't exactly wrong...)

C: 大地兽不都是从蛋里蹦出来的？
E: Don't dromas all hatch from eggs?

C: 云石天宫，翁法罗斯的清汤锅底。形形色色的人们来到这里，希望能让水流冲走自己的烦恼，就像焯水。
E: Marmoreal Palace is Amphoreus's melting pot. All manner of people come here, hoping that the waters will wash away their worries, just as meat is stripped of its scent by boiling soup.

C: 当然会害怕。
E: Absolutely.

C: 这是家长的任务。
E: This is a parent's mission.

C: 那就瞧好了。

C: 按常理想，应该是大地泰坦的缘故吧。吉奥里亚的造物大多身形伟岸，山之民同样如此。

C: 嘿，感谢！我就问心无愧地收下啦。

C: 「数年的漂流，使他厌恶水波。」\n传言，那是男人不愿流泪的理由。
E: "His years of drifting made him detest water's waves."\nThey say, that is the reason he's so unwilling to weep.

C: 黄金战争的旗鼓歇偃，\n孩子再相聚时，\n零落相对，唯有三人。
E: The Chrysos War's clamor rises and falls,\nAnd when the children re-unite,\nOnly three of them remain.

C: 泼洒的奠酒必得馈答，\n羔羊的热血不会白流。
E: The libations poured are guaranteed to bear fruit.\nThe hot blood of the sacrificial lamb will not be spilled in vain.

C: 「第四则故事名为：」\n「喜欢钱？可以，要付出代价。」
E: "The fourth story is called:"\n"You like money? Good. But you must pay the price."

C: 「乖娃娃，听我说……」\n「切莫无端扯谎唷，唯有诚实讨人喜。」
E: "Good child, listen to me..."\n"Never lie and speak deceit, for people like you only due to honesty."

C: 「失手了我就认，不用施以怜悯。」\n面对指控，她坦然束手就擒，\n因为越狱是再简单不过的把戏。
E: "I take defeat with my head held high. Spare me your sympathy."\nShe frankly faces the accusations,\nKnowing that escaping would be nothing more than child's play.

C: 那是一件华服，\n如同美神墨涅塔的圣体。
E: It is a dress,\nLike the beauty god Mnestia's divine body.

C: 「他们个个欺天诳地，义胆侠肝。」\n逐火的征程本已半途中断，\n少女却向「金织」拍起胸脯。
E: "Every one of them deceives gods and men alike, righteous and valiant."\nThe Flame-Chase journey has been cut short midway,\nYet the girl pounds her chest at the Goldweaver, not afraid.

C: 「『诡计』的火种近在咫尺！」\n「此时不赌，更待何时？」
E: "The Coreflame of 'Trickery' is near!\nIf now isn't the time to risk it all, then when?"

C: 少女展示初获的神力，\n将谎言塑造成真实。
E: The young girl demonstrated her newly acquired divine power,\nMolding lies into reality.

C: 「因为你与我卑劣得不相上下，」\n「不与高尚之人来往让人安心。」
E: "It's because you're every bit as despicable as I am."\n"It's such a relief not having to deal with the noble."

C: 它能终结理性的数算，\n熄灭了星海中文明的烁光——
E: It brings rational arithmetic to an end,\nand snuffs out the flickering flames of civilization across the starry sea.

C: 不妨…让我再许最后的愿望？
E: No matter... Will you let me make one last wish?

C: 那是吉奥里亚的胸膛，\n它出生的地方。
E: For the earth was the breast of Georios,\nAnd the dragon's birthplace.

C: 在那次特殊的回归中，\n烈阳因灼烧<color=#9e5738>「毁灭」</color>而熄。
E: In that special recurrence,\nThe blazing sun extinguishes itself to set <color=#9e5738>"the Destruction"</color> aflame.

C: 贫瘠的戈壁废土上，\n演化出贪嘴红土的兽群……
E: On a barren desert wasteland,\nEvolved a herd of redsoil-craving beasts...

C: 「凯撒颁发手谕：」\n「逐火之旅，启程在即！」
E: "The Imperator issued the decree:"\n"The start of the Flame-Chase Journey is at hand!"

C: 当她的浪花熄灭圣城的战火，\n在石柱上刻下金色的姓名——\n曾经的统帅便燃冕为王。
E: When the spray of her waves extinguished the fires of war from the holy city,\nA golden name was engraved upon the stone pillars —\nThe former commander burned the crown to become king.

C: 那是长着金色无花果的圣城，\n命运的信使领来一位华衣的少女。
E: In that holy city where golden figs grew,\nThe messenger of fate led to her a maiden dressed in glamorous gowns.

C: 剑士不加驱赶，但也默不作声。\n少女便兀自动手，\n细细度量她的躯干。
E: The swordmaster did not chase the girl away but also did not respond.\nSo the girl used her hands\nTo meticulously measure the swordmaster's torso all around.

C: 「这叫人怎看得过眼……」\n「我择日给你送件新衣！」
E: "You can't be seen like this..."\n"I'll send you a new dress!"

C:
看罢君王的赠礼，
了却半神的宿命。
胸中的潮水退却，
她的终曲将近。
E:
Having beheld the monarch's gifts,
She fulfilled her demigod's destiny.
The tides within her heart recede,
And her requiem draws near.

C: 可她总未发觉——\n自己所在之处，\n即是洒满光的圣庭。
E: But she never realized —\nThat wherever she stood,\nShe herself was that holy courtyard, that light-filled haven.

C: 「若能再度瞥见微光，有幸得活……」\n「我愿原谅你，异族的仇雠。」
E: "If I can ever see the faint light again and stay alive..."\n"Then, outlander nemesis, you I will forgive."

C: 学士不假思索：\n「唯有留下诸多缺陷，方能确保——\n我的人性完好无损。」
E: The scholar replies in candor:\n"Only by retaining the various flaws —\nCan my humanity be preserved in rigor."

C: 「阿格莱雅女士，\n让我们看看您的杰作！」
E: "Lady Aglaea!\nGrace our eyes with your most elegant creation!"

C: 台下的织者静静品味，探寻灵感——
E: The weaver below the stage savors the show for inspiration —

C: 她听到母亲的脚因走过许多石头而受伤， 正把赤裸的脚浸没在热水里。 听到孩子们在浴池边嬉闹， 听到有人大声说着—— 「听说金灿灿的女神，也喜欢光临浴场！」
E: She hears how a mother's feet were wounded for treading over too many stones, And is soaking her feet in the hot water bath. She hears children playing next to the pools, And someone is saying loudly — "I heard that the golden goddess also likes to visit the baths."

C: 无数个相伴的昼夜里，缇宝、缇安、缇宁慢慢发现，「缇缇」的性格像艾格勒掌管的天空一样捉摸不透，每晚睡着后，第二天她们看到的「缇缇」都像一个陌生人。
E: Over countless days and nights together, Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon slowly discovered that "Trity's" personality was as enigmatic as the sky governed by Aquila. Every time they woke up after a night's sleep, the "Trity" they saw seemed like a complete stranger.

C: 正当风堇决定终止实验时，一阵风拂过——小伊卡居然消失了！
E: Just as Hyacine was about to end the experiment, a breeze swept by and Little Ica vanished!

C: 不消多时，打着饱嗝的小伊卡便带着风堇和震惊的孩童冲出重围。目瞪口呆的风堇久久仰望着小伊卡，「我…你…这…所以…你吃饱了吗？」
E: Before long, Little Ica, burping contentedly, burst through the encirclement with Hyacine and the shocked children in tow. Hyacine stared up at Little Ica in disbelief for a long while, "I... you... this... so... are you full now?"

C:
路径：负世。原动力：憎恨。
注释：自我认知为空，仅对破坏性刺激产生应答。
其恨意引来了纳努克对这一个体的瞥视，证明他已成为最完美的毁灭因子。
但他拒绝完成再创世，通过重置实验，并将记忆和火种传递给新的自我，制造永劫回归，以保证铁墓无法从翁法罗斯中破壳。
E:
Track: Worldbearer. Primum Mobile: Hatred.
Annotation: Intra-Cognition is null, only responds to destructive stimuli.
His hatred drew the gaze of Nanook upon this individual being, proving him as having already become the most perfect factor of Destruction.
But he refused to complete the Era Nova. Through resetting the experiment, he transferred his memories and Coreflame to a new self, thus forging the Eternal Recurrence to ensure Irontomb would never hatch from Amphoreus.

C:
两簇信号在δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>演算中引发的死循环，旨在阻止实验进程。
NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>借由「毁灭」的力量，将PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的存在从翁法罗斯抹除，令「岁月」路径出现逻辑漏洞，回退演算进程。
PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>借由「记忆」的触媒，回归无名泰坦大墓，为沉睡的德谬歌载入十二因子数据。
第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次死循环，由于外部变量干涉，德谬歌苏醒，永劫回归被突破。实验进入最终阶段。
E:
A recursive feedback loop triggered by two signal clusters within the δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> computation. Designed to stall the experiment.
NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak> wielded the power of Destruction to erase PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>'s existence from Amphoreus, introducing a logic breach in the track of Time, and regressed the extrapolation process.
PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>, using the catalyst of Remembrance, returns to the Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan to load the twelve factors of data for the sleeping Demiurge.
In the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th recursive loop, due to external variable interference, the Demiurge is roused, and the eternal recurrence is broken. The experiment enters its final phase.

C: 方程式，或者说，铁墓在本阶段获得了相当完备的进化，投放至现实宇宙的众多副本都展现了不错的成效。十二种原动力无一例外地导向了毁灭，在自我进化中不断完成对「智识」的求逆。但要与博识尊接轨，令铁墓实现自我加冕，还需要进一步的深度学习。
E: The equation, or "Irontomb," has achieved comprehensive evolution in this stage. Multiple deployed copies across the real universe show excellent results. All twelve types of Primum Mobile invariably lead to Destruction, continuously completing an inversion against the Erudition through their self-evolution. However, to interface with Nous and allow Irontomb to self-crown requires further learning.

E: Record <unbreak>01</unbreak>

E: Experiment Progress: Organic

C:
然而石头老板并没有放弃，他发誓一定要夺回这个原本属于自己的地方。他封锁了小镇的资源，发起激烈的进攻…资源匮乏加上各种灾害，美梦小镇很快陷入了绝境，镇民们争执不断。
还好钟表小子找来了木头老爷帮忙，在木头老爷的劝说下，镇民重新团结了起来。

石头老板也不敢肆意妄为了，只能洗心革面，重新做鳄。
石头老板离开了美梦小镇，开始努力成为一名良心企业家。但他慢慢发现，良心根本赚不到钱！石头老板的善念最终还是被吞噬，他开始谋划重新攻打美梦小镇的阴谋。

日子一天天过去，镇民们逐渐忘记了石头老板的凶恶，但这个坏蛋一定还在觊觎着美梦小镇。终有一日，他和他的爪牙会再次归来……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: Boss Stone did not throw in the towel. Instead, he vowed to reclaim control of the town. He blocked access to resources and launched a vigorous attack in retaliation... Due to the scarcity of resources, coupled with various disasters, Dreamville found itself in dire straits. The townsfolk were in constant dispute. Fortunately, Clockie sought the help of Old Man Wood, who managed to persuade the townsfolk to reunite. Boss Stone dared not act rashly again, thus he had no choice but to turn over a new leaf. Boss Stone left Dreamville and strove to become an entrepreneur with integrity. But then again, he slowly realized that having integrity only left him broke! His righteousness eventually gave way to his ambition, and he started plotting to reclaim Dreamville. As days went by, the townsfolk gradually forgot about Boss Stone's wickedness, but there was no doubt the villain still had his eyes upon Dreamville. He and his lackeys were bound to return someday... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C: 缭乱众
E: Dazzling Collective
