C: 好伙伴，我当然是白厄！\n来自哀丽秘榭，是希洛尼摩斯与奥妲塔之子。这段血缘关系最危险的时候，是八岁那年下雨天我忘了收麦子。\n有时家长的严厉也是一种爱。同样的，村长大概也只是担心你被骗吧，保持警惕是一件好事。
E: Dear friend, of course I'm Phainon!\nBorn in Aedes Elysiae, I'm the son of Hieronymus and Audata. Well, my family bonds nearly ended the day I left the wheat out in the rain when I was eight.\nLet's just say a parent's tough love is a form of love nonetheless. Likewise, maybe the village chief was just worried that you'd be scammed. A little caution never hurt anyone, after all.

C: 「虚无」的令使，黄泉，实现了他的夙愿。\n他的人生与安详无缘，而命运却教他活着，用他的与生俱来的「幸运」亲手杀死每一位至亲。现在，他终于有机会解脱了。
E: Acheron, Emanator of Nihility, granted his long-cherished wish.\nHis life was destined to be divorced from the concept of peace, but cruel fate still commanded him to live, and for him to use his innate "good luck" to kill every one of his family members with his own hands. Now, he finally has a chance to be free from it all.

C: 看来…你珍惜「开拓」之旅的每一个瞬间，每一次交汇。\n真有趣，那位拉扎莉娜也曾有过无比相似的感想。如果你们生活在同一时代……\n…你们一定会有许多共同语言吧。
E: It seems... you cherish every moment and every encounter of your trailblazing expedition.\nHow fascinating. That Razalina once felt the same way. If you two were alive in the same era...\n...You'd definitely have a lot in common.

C: ——幸运的你来到了避难所的安全屋，没有怪物，只有宝物。

E: — A defective monitoring automaton appears with an air of danger about it... The final battle at the end of the ruins will soon begin!

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Lair Protector</color>: Enemies with the Garrison ability will strengthen themselves according to the surroundings. Defeat them to obtain the Door Card.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「超频博弈」</color>是一种所需游玩<color=#f29e38ff>时间更短</color>的快速模式，每个位面都拥有<color=#f29e38ff>更少的流程节点</color>。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Overclock Gambit</color> is a fast-paced mode that requires <color=#f29e38ff>less time</color> to play, with <color=#f29e38ff>fewer progression nodes</color> in each plane.

E: By using the <color=#f29e38ff>intersection points</color> where multiple guiding light beams meet, you can deduce the target's location. At that location, use the Home-Use Object Finder <color=#f29e38ff>again</color> to locate the target.

E: When <color=#f29e38ff>all</color> the photoshoot requirements are met, you can press the shutter to complete this shoot. Try to meet all the requirements if you can.

C: 有的宝珠可以<color=#f29e38ff>照向多个可选区域中的一个</color>。启动宝珠后，可<color=#f29e38ff>点击屏幕上的黄色圆形印记</color>切换宝珠的朝向。
E: Some orbs can <color=#f29e38ff>shine at one of the multiple selectable areas</color>. After activating the orb, <color=#f29e38ff>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} the yellow circular marking on the screen</color> to change the direction of the orb.

C: 「欧洛尼斯祷言」的能力存在着制约，通常状态下只能<color=#f29e38ff>维持三秒</color>。如果使用超过三秒，物件却仍然未回溯至关键的时间点，便会返回发动能力前的状态。
E: The power of Oronyx's Prayer has limitations. Under normal conditions, it can only <color=#f29e38ff>be sustained for three seconds</color>. If used beyond three seconds without the object rewinding to the critical time point, it will return to its state prior to activating the ability.

C: 使用方向键控制移动，使用右侧按键上升，下降。按下<color=#f29e38ff>退出键</color>可以结束操控。「扎格列斯之手」将会<color=#f29e38ff>留在原地</color>。
E: Use the directional keys to control the movement and the right-side buttons to ascend and descend. Hit the <color=#f29e38ff>Quit button</color> to disengage. The Hand of Zagreus will <color=#f29e38ff>remain at the spot</color>.

C: 每一次找齐周围的<color=#f29e38ff>「翻飞之币」</color>，都可以获得这一「扎格列斯之手」的财宝。
E: After collecting all the <color=#f29e38ff>Coins of Whimsy</color> nearby, you can obtain the treasures of the specific Hand of Zagreus.

C: 通过祷言<color=#f29e38ff>回溯</color>【黄金短矛】，可以重演它的路径。<color=#f29e38ff>跟随并抓住</color>回溯后的【黄金短矛】，可以获得对应的奖励
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Rewinding</color> the "Golden Short Spear" via the prayer will replay its path. <color=#f29e38ff>Follow and capture</color> the rewound "Golden Short Spear" to obtain corresponding rewards

C: 与符文基座交互，可以获得<color=#f29e38ff>「追忆符文」</color>。持有符文时，「奇迹宝珠」的照射范围<color=#f29e38ff>会跟随角色移动</color>，使角色周围的时空发生反转。
E: Interact with the rune base to obtain the <color=#f29e38ff>Rune of Recollection</color>. With the rune in possession, the Miracle Orb's illumination radius <color=#f29e38ff>moves with your character</color>, and reverses the surrounding space-time.

C: 每次<color=#f29e38ff>重塑凝晶</color>，光芒区域的<color=#f29e38ff>边界都会扩大</color>，借助这一性质来完成试炼吧。
E: Every time you <color=#f29e38ff>reforge a Crystal</color>, the <color=#f29e38ff>boundaries of the lit area will expand</color>. Use this property to complete the trial.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>探索、战斗、拾取或使用道具</color>都将视为1次<color=#f29e38ff>行动</color>，每次行动都会减少倒计时。

C: 「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」期间，每次攻击敌人可积累<color=#f29e38ff>「觉醒攻击」</color>。\n根据阶段内积累的<color=#f29e38ff>「觉醒攻击」</color>次数，将在阶段结束时返还一定的<color=#f29e38ff>「战意值」</color>。
E: Every time you attack enemies during "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken," <color=#f29e38ff>Waken Attack</color> accumulates.\nBased on the accumulated <color=#f29e38ff>Waken Attacks</color> during this phase, a certain amount of <color=#f29e38ff>Grit Value</color> will be returned after the phase concludes.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>弱点被击破后</color>，行动额外延后，受到的伤害<color=#f29e38ff>大幅提高</color>。
E: After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is Broken</color>, additionally delays action and <color=#f29e38ff>greatly increases</color> its DMG taken.

C: 魔法师施放<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>时，若敌方场地有空位，召唤1个<color=#f29e38ff>有害垃圾</color>站在敌方场地中。\n同时使所有敌方场地中的有害垃圾<color=#f29e38ff>立即行动</color>。
E: After the Magician uses their <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color>, if there is an empty slot on the enemy's side, summons 1 <color=#f29e38ff>Hazardous Waste</color> on the enemy's side.\nAt the same time, causes all Hazardous Wastes in the enemy's side to <color=#f29e38ff>immediately take action</color>.

C: 崇信丰饶的秘密组织「药王秘传」信徒渴求的形态，摆脱人性重负，以仙道重塑的真体。\n太古时代，求道者们自建木中参悟玄旨，自诩「仙人」。他们自在无拘，将血肉众生如泥塑形。在无数次变化间，他们忘却了自己的本来面目。
E: The form craved by the members of Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, a secret organization that worships Abundance. A true appearance that cast off the burdens of humanity and has been reforged using the way of immortality.\nIn ancient times, those who sought immortality received wisdom from the Ambrosial Arbor and called themselves Celestials. They lived without restraints and molded the flesh of themselves and others at will. They have long forgotten their original appearances after countless metamorphoses.

C: 善良之心，曾相信人人本性良善。
E: A kind heart that once believed that everyone is good by nature.

C: 美梦剧团的演员们蒙受了「秩序」的恩典，化作宣明法度的傀儡。它们在至高的诫命下起舞，献演迎接乐园的剧目。
E: The actors of the Sweet Dreams Troupe have accepted the grace of the Order and become puppets that declare the law. They dance under the supreme commandments, beginning a show that will welcome the coming of paradise.

C: 要不换别人上吧……

C: 这…不可能……
E: This... can't be...

C: 我们能做的，不过是在这段时间内，短暂地陪伴对方。
E: I suppose all we can do is keep each other company... for a while.

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}，感觉你挺不错的呀，那颗星核对你没什么影响吗？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, you seem pretty cool. That Stellaron hasn't affected you at all?

C: 该做的事都做完了么？好，别睡下了才想起来日常没做，拜拜。
E: Done everything you needed to? Good, don't want to climb into bed only to realize you forgot to finish your dailies. Bye-bye.

C: 战斗体验该优化了。
E: This combat needs optimizing.

C: 嗯，手速还行。
E: Hm, not a bad time.

C: 疼疼疼……
E: Ow ow ow...

C: 救了我也不会给你什么好处的。
E: Saving me won't earn you any favors.

C: 难得在模拟宇宙之外见到你，这次想拿谁做实验？要我帮忙就直说。
E: I don't usually get to see you outside the Simulated Universe. Who do you want to experiment on this time?

C: 今天对你失去兴趣了，明天再说。
E: *sigh* I've lost interest in your research potential for today. See you tomorrow.

C: 手握圣剑之人，战必无愧于心。
E: The one wielding the holy sword always fights for what's right.

C: 如果他遇到的每个对手都像你一样，那他会成为一个好人的。
E: If every opponent he faced was like you, he'd probably turn out to be a decent person.

C: 喔，又见面了。好在你是个聪明人，交流起来比较省力。
E: Oh, back again, huh? I'm glad you've got a good head on your shoulders... makes conversations a lot less tedious.

C: 筑城者为我们砌成堡垒，使我们远离风雪，但我们必须铭记，风雪从未消失。
E: The Architects built us a fortress to keep the blizzards at bay, but we must never forget that those blizzards are still on the horizon.

C: 偶有闲暇，去散散步吧。
E: If there's nothing pressing, let's take a walk.

C: 辉煌的战绩属于过去，切记不能骄傲自满。
E: Medals of the past won't win the battles of tomorrow.

C: 好疼。
E: Ouch.

C: 作战报告稍后发送。
E: The combat report will be ready soon.

C: 买家要什么，我就卖什么，结果他们说我是骗子，你说气不气人……
E: I sell things that buyers want to buy — and they call me a con man! It's outrageous!

C: 下层区的大人归地火管，小孩归鼹鼠党管，而我就是鼹鼠党的老大，你可以称呼我为——漆黑的虎克大人！
E: Haha, the grown-ups in the Underworld listen to Wildfire and the kids listen to us Moles. I'm the leader of The Moles, by the way. You may call me Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 只要装得下，最好再来点。
E: If they can fit in my rucksack, I'm taking them.

C: 有时候我也会觉得不可思议，居然会有人甘愿打一辈子的铁，敲一辈子的矿…我懂，不是每个人都有资格谈梦想。但要是没有它…我恐怕撑不到今天。
E: It's hard to believe, but there are folks willing to spend their whole lives putting hammer to iron or pickaxe to stone... I know, I know — not everyone has the opportunity to follow their dreams... but without dreams, I don't think I'd have made it this far.

C: 职场上为人处事的小技巧，那真是多到列都列不全。但我始终认为，最重要的一点就是保持真诚——不论是对待同事还是客户，这都是我的底线。
E: There are so many tricks for dealing with people in the workplace that I can't even list them all. But I always believe that the most important part is to remain sincere — whether it's with coworkers or with customers. That's my bottom line.

C: 啊？对哦。目光放远，聚焦长线…就是投资成功的秘诀！
E: Huh? Right! Investing in victory... means playing the long game!

C: 诸邪回避~
E: Evils begone~

C: 小看你了。
E: I underestimated you.

C: 势如疾风！
E: Galeforce!

C: 气冲云霄！
E: To the clouds!

C: 走了？正巧本座也忙得很，就不远送了。
E: You're leaving? Good timing, I too have other affairs to attend to.

C: 凶巴巴的，小心上火。
E: Calm down or you'll overheat!

C: 你欺负我！
E: You bully!

C: 无尽形寿，岂会命丧于此？
E: Did you think my lifespan would be cut short?

C: 容我想想…人生之初，最爱的莫过于习练剑艺、战胜强敌；随后，是品尝白珩自星间带来的种种佳酿；而今…是教仇敌痛彻心扉，生不如死。我的爱好，很奇怪吧？
E: Let me think... In the beginning, most of my time was spent on swordsmanship and defeating my enemies. Later, I found myself indulging in all manner of wines that Baiheng brought to me from different planets. And now, watching my enemies suffer has become my newfound passion. Strange pastimes, no?

C: 死期未到。
E: Death has yet to claim me.

C: 我听人说家里张贴罗浮将军的画像能够镇邪，我试过了，没有什么用…啊，那个，我不是说将军没用，是画像没用，这种镇邪的事情可千万信不得。
E: People say that the general's portrait can be used to dispel evil. I tried but... useless... I—I mean the portrait, not the general. I shouldn't have believed in such superstitious nonsense.

C: 藿藿：我的尾巴被岁阳给「吃掉」了，我也差点被吃掉了，还好十王司的判官们把它封印住了……\n尾巴：谁让狐人的尾巴最好吃呢…现在好了，我成尾巴了，碰上什么妖魔鬼怪都先薅老子一把！
E: Huohuo: My tail was consumed during a heliobus attack — the rest of me barely got away. It's a good job the Ten-Lords Commission sealed the demon in my tail before it had the chance to finish me off...\nTail: It's not my fault that foxians have the most scrumptious tails... However, now that I'm a tail, I've realized all sorts of monsters want to have me for breakfast!

C: 尾巴：你干嘛？站着装死啊？\n藿藿：嘘、嘘——
E: Tail: Fool! You can't play dead standing up!\nHuohuo: Shh...

C: 翾翔不坠，万载常胜！
E: Always soaring, forever triumphant!

C: 我还记得…无论是驾驶星槎亦或统领天舶司，仙舟的航向上始终都有驭空大人的身影。
E: I still remember... Whether it was driving starskiffs or leading the Sky-Faring Commission, Madam Yukong was always present in the Xianzhou's course.

C: 希望小女子能帮到诸位。
E: I hope I can be of help.

C: 五大家系中，「猎犬」担负着守护家园的职责。也就是说…所有犯事儿的家伙都由我处理。要让一个人凭空消失，可比让他凭空出现容易多了。
E: Among the five great families, the "Hounds" bear the responsibility of safeguarding the land. So... usually it falls to me to handle anyone who steps out of line. Come to think of it, it's much easier to make someone vanish than to make them materialize.

C: 没找到…「祂」……
E: I... couldn't find THEM...

C: 生命，不仅存在于呼吸之间。
E: There's more to life than drawing breath.

C: 我们继续吧。
E: Let's continue.

C: 我们又看上了同一个项目？行，有你在，我就得空喘口气。
E: Same project again? With you here, I've got nothing to worry about.

C: 他们将自己奉献给了真理…这么说也没错，毕竟他们的一切所为都是为了「博识尊」。
E: They dedicate themselves to truth... And it's right to say so — after all, everything they do is for the sake of Nous.

C: 优雅、有趣、高贵，但是危险…越是这样的人，越是想摧毁她，不过我也可以退而求其次，被她摧毁…不是不行！
E: Graceful, entertaining, distinguished, yet dangerous... I'm just itching to bring someone like that down, but hey, her wrecking me... is totally on the table too!

C: 记忆是静默的深海，有些人是摇曳的小鱼，而她则是游动起来足以遮蔽光芒的存在。
E: Memories are a silent and deep sea, and some people are the swaying little fish within. She, however, can block the very light in that water whenever she swims.

C: 又一场雨，一场空白。
E: Another blank canvas.

C: 一点小伤，麻烦了。
E: Don't worry, it's just a scrape.

C: 愿歌声为我们带来胜利。
E: May song bring us victory.

C: 华丽的服装，优美的歌喉，温柔的举止…许多人因此轻视了她。但比起闪耀的外表，她的勇敢和纯粹更令我印象深刻。
E: Her gorgeous attire, her exquisite voice, her gentle demeanor... They all cause many people to underestimate her. But compared to her glittering appearance, her bravery and purity leave an even deeper impression.

C: 艾利欧能看见自己的未来，我也能「看见」自己的未来，他说命运只有一种，可在那之前，我想知道自己还能做什么…我有这个权利。
E: Elio can see his own future, and I can also "see" mine. He says that there is only one kind of destiny, but before I reach mine, I want to know what else I can do... This is my right.

C: 充沛的补给…难得。
E: Full of supplies... a rare find.

C: 这、这也太贵重了！我不能收…
E: I can't possibly take something this valuable...

C: 怎么了，还想继续自讨苦吃？
E: What's the matter? Eager for some more self-inflicted misery?

C: 这小子天天惦记着他那欠爱的宝贝电影，魔怔起来什么都不顾…要说他是个坏人倒是冤枉他了，可谁要不提防着点他，说不好什么时候就被这呜呜伯养的当作「电影素材」了。
E: This guy is always obsessed with his beloved muddle-fudgin' films, and when he gets fixated on something, he ignores everything else... It's unfair to call him a bad person, but if you're not cautious around him, you might end up as "film material" for this here diggity fudge.

C: 模拟宇宙怎么玩，现在就怎么玩~
E: Play like how you usually do in the Simulated Universe~

C: 灵魂絮语，化成万片飞去。
E: The whispers of the soul shatter into thousands of pieces and fly away.

C: 一、二…不够我们分啦。
E: One, two... not enough for us to share.

C: 退后，前方有我一人便足够。
E: Stay back. I alone am enough.

C: 在来到奥赫玛之前，我听悬锋的孩子提起过，有个来无影去无踪的侠盗时不时会找他们玩。有时告诉他们哪儿的果子最解渴，有时告诉他们黑潮会从哪儿袭来，现在想来，想必便是她了。
E: Before I came to Okhema, I had heard from the Kremnoan children about a thief who came and went as they pleased, often playing with the children. Sometimes, they would tell the children where the juiciest fruits could be found. Other times, they warned of where the black tide would strike. Looking back now, it must have been her.

C: 你收着吧，权当赏赐。
E: You may have it. Consider it your reward.

C: 若是瑟希斯看到这道题，定会被气笑。
E: If Cerces saw this puzzle, they'd die from laughter.

C: 这儿的味道，含金量超标呐！
E: The air here practically smells of money!

C: 小时候，我总是偷偷溜进剧场看别人的英雄故事，泡在那里一天一夜也不想离开。现在倒是想进就进，可每次谢幕之前啊，我就离开了。
E: When I was a kid, I always snuck into the theater to watch heroic shows about other people, and I could spend a whole day and night there. Now I can go to any theater any time I want, but I always leave before the show ends.

C: 每个人都想破茧成蝶，飞向广阔的天空，但只有她们…选择了回到茧中，为了这世界的重新诞生。
E: Everyone wishes to break free of their cocoon and fly toward the open sky as a butterfly, but they were the only ones who... chose to return to the cocoon, all for the sake of this world's rebirth.

C: 纵然经历了这么多生离死别，她依然会为那些无法治愈的病痛落泪…但那眼泪绝不会带入病房，她想让人们看到的，是永远明媚的阳光。
E: Even after witnessing so much life and death, she still sheds tears for those suffering from incurable ills... But she'll never let those tears into the patient's room. She wants to bring an ever-radiant sun to people's lives.

C: 不急。偶尔放空思绪也是缓解疲惫的良药~
E: No rush. Emptying your mind is a good way to relax as well~

C: 我曾见过的君主，大多擅在酒杯里下蛊，但凯撒则选择在王旗上浇油。那面燃烧的旗帜，即便在深海之中，也能感受到它的炙热和光芒。
E: Most rulers I've known were adept at slipping poison into goblets, yet the Imperator poured oil over the king's standard. That blazing banner... Its heat and light could reach you, even from the ocean's abyss.

C: 它曾不断呼唤我们，依恋我们，反复落入岁月的梦境后，它也在一次次轮回中遗落了自己…我知道那种感觉，身为记忆之影，只能不断承受记忆的变化与离去，却无法创造真正的记忆这件事，有多令人惶恐。
E: They once kept calling for us, yearning for us... They, too, lost themselves in the endless recurrences, within time's inescapable dream... To be a shadow of memory, forced to endure its shifts and disappearances, yet never able to create new ones of your own... I know that terrifying feeling.

C: 要开始了。
E: Let's go.

C: 合演，开场！
E: Let the show begin!

C: 如果没有选择登上列车，我会度过怎样的一生…不，不会有如果。
E: What kind of a life would I have lived if I didn't choose to board the Express... No, there is no such possibility.

C: 我来送你上路。
E: You've outstayed your welcome!

C: 还没…结束……
E: Not over... yet...

C: 没关系，我会出手。
E: Don't worry, I'll do it.

C: 镜头移动右
E: Move camera right

C: 下降
E: Descend

C: 在「橡木鸣蛀之梦」中，重温昔日旧梦
E: Relive past dreams in the Dream of Gnawing Oak

C: 生是与死擦肩而过
E: Life Is a Near Miss With Death

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
若开拓者在以往版本完成过对应角色的试用关，可以直接领取奖励。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.
If Trailblazers have already completed the trials of corresponding characters in past versions, they can directly claim the rewards.

C: 我方全体角色在战斗过程中【负载生命值】均不超过<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>并通关
E: Clear the stage without any ally character's "HP Overload" exceeding <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> during combat.

C: 不断燃烧……
E: And keep on burning...

C: 去为他们，为我，夺回「开拓」的权利。
E: Go. Take back the right to "Trailblaze," for them, and for me.

C: 来搞事
E: Troublestarter

C: 猫咪神偷
E: Master Cat-Thief

C: 欧洛尼斯的火种
E: Oronyx's Coreflame

E: When entering the store: This unit gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Experience and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>its ATK increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 进入对战时每有<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>，在自身被击倒时：召唤<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>级真老实，至少召唤1只
E: For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color> this unit has at the start of combat, upon being knocked down: Summons <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Lv. <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Old Honest, with a minimum summon of 1

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的努努斯会召唤大地兽。每回合开始时：大地兽使紫色稀有度及以上的我方奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Nanus in the team will summon a dromas. At the start of each turn: The dromas causes all ally chimeras with purple rarity and above <color=#dc6f33>have their <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increased by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 商店中会出现【阿格莱雅的金丝装备】
E: "Aglaea's Golden Thread Equipment" will appear in the store.

C: 进入对战时每有<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值，在自身被击倒时：召唤<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>级真老实，至少召唤1只
E: For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP this unit has at the start of combat, upon being knocked down: Summons <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Lv. <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Old Honest, with a minimum summon of 1

C: 同伴被召唤时：使其<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When a companion is summoned: Increases <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 可以给任意奇美拉提供经验
E: Can provide Experience to any chimera.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的努努斯会召唤大地兽。每回合开始时：大地兽使紫色稀有度及以上的我方奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Nanus in the team will summon a dromas. At the start of each turn: The dromas causes all ally chimeras with purple rarity and above have their <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increased by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的比格椰自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>，并对随机1名对手造成<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的伤害
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Vigethos in the team causes its own <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> and deals DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK to 1 random opponent.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的奇兽爵召唤<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>级的咕噜鱼儿
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Dux Beast in the team summons <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> level-<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Gurgling Fish.

C: 商店中会出现穿戴【风堇亲卫队徽章】的奇美拉，它们拥有更强的属性
E: The store will feature chimeras wearing the "Hyacine's Royal Guard Badge," and they possess stronger stats.

C: 我方奇美拉被召唤时，使其<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When an ally chimera is summoned, increases its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 每回合商店出现1个免费的炼金药水，可以将任意1只奇美拉转化为同等或更高稀有度的奇美拉
E: A free Alchemy Potion appears in the Store in every turn, which can transform any chimera into another chimera of equal or higher rarity.

C: 喜欢小三月嗷呜~
E: I like March, awoo~

C: 喜欢小三月嗷呜~
E: I like March, awoo~

C: 感觉浑身充满了力量！
E: I can feel power surging through my body!

C: 我说的都是真心话。
E: Everything I say is sincere.

C: 收下最后的馈赠吧！
E: Take this final gift!

C: 顺手的事！
E: A simple feat!

C: 张牙舞爪的，不足为惧。
E: Thrashing claws... hardly worth fearing.

C: 既是切磋，还请不要留手。
E: Since this is a spar, please don't hold back.

C: 好认真呀，我也得加油啦。
E: You're so dedicated, I need to step up my game too!

C: 锦标赛
E: Tournament

C: 标记成功
E: Successfully Marked

C: 选择放弃对决将重置当前进度
E: Giving up on the duel will reset current progress

C: 保护
E: Protect

C:
・在被星期日卷入太一之梦后，你在黑天鹅的帮助下苏醒，并与其他同伴会和。
・黑天鹅向你讲述了太一之梦足有三重的本质，众人决定将其合力击破。
・黄泉将会斩出一刀，在波提欧的配合下破除星期日编织的美好幻觉。
・流萤与寰宇蝗灾的核心存在「示死祸源：深魇蝗灾」对决，并在取胜后夺得星核，暂时获得了寰宇蝗灾的掌控权，借此在原始梦境撕开裂口——而她也因此迎来了自己的第二次死亡。
・十二时刻中，花火爆破了整个匹诺康尼，让众人得以跨越梦境直面星期日；而知更鸟则独立促成了谐乐大典，从爆破中保护了每一个入梦者。
・翡翠解放了她的基石，汇聚梦境中的力量，迫使几乎成为星神的星期日降格为令使。
・最终，你和列车组的同伴们再次直面星期日，并且将其战胜。
E:
・ After being drawn into Ena's Dream by Sunday, you awakened with Black Swan's help and reunited with your companions.
・ Black Swan revealed to you the three-phase nature of Ena's Dream, and everyone decided to work together to break it.
・ Acheron would deliver a strike, working with Boothill to shatter Sunday's beautiful illusion.
・ Firefly confronted the core of the Swarm Disaster, "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare." After victory, she claimed the Stellaron to temporarily gain control over the Swarm Disaster, using it to tear a fissure in the Primordial Dreamscape, though this led to her second death.
・ Within the Twelve Hours, Sparkle detonated all of Penacony, allowing everyone to cross the dreamscape and face Sunday directly. Meanwhile, Robin independently orchestrated the Charmony Festival, protecting every dreamer from the blast.
・ Jade released her Cornerstone, gathering power from within the dreamscape to force Sunday, who had nearly become an Aeon, to descend to an Emanator.
・ Finally, you and the Express Crew faced Sunday once again, and emerge victorious.

C: 执掌「终末」命途的星神，在「四末说」的任何一种可能到来时便会诞生，逆时而行。\n彼时，祂会将全部的神力化作漆黑猫群，穿行于宙域之间，喃喃宣布着必将实现的预言。
E: The Aeon that presides over the Path of Finality shall be born whenever any one of the Theory of Four Apocalypses could possibly unfold, and move backward in time.\nAt that moment, THEY'll manifest THEIR entire divinity into a clutter of black cats that travels across the universe while murmuring a prophecy that is destined to be fulfilled.

E: Robin's memories are slowly emerging...

E: Why aren't you talking?

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，蕴藏掠夺而来的「理性」。被制造出来的意义并非是研究普遍的知识，而是钻研杀戮的兵法与弱肉强食的残酷理论，散布假名为哲学的疯病。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They contain plundered "rationality" within their vessels. The reason behind their creation is not truly toward the study of universal knowledge, but to delve deep into brutal martial tactics and the merciless laws of survival, further spreading madness masquerading as philosophy.

C: 黑潮参议
E: Black Tide Council

C: 「『齐响诗班』神主日」召唤四个「旧梦的回声」，「旧梦的回声」受到的伤害均由「『齐响诗班』神主日」承受。自身和「旧梦的回声」受到弱点击破时，行动额外延后。且自身每层韧性被击破后，对我方施加【<u>在光明中行</u>】。
E: "Harmonious Choir" The Great Septimus summons 4 "Echoes of Faded Dreams". The DMG taken by the "Echoes of Faded Dreams" is completely redistributed to "Harmonious Choir" The Great Septimus instead. When this unit and "Echoes of Faded Dreams" become Weakness Broken, additionally delays action. For every stack of this unit's Toughness that is broken, apply <u>Walk in the Light</u> to the Party.

C: 「『哲学的胎儿』星期日」拥有全属性弱点。「『哲学的胎儿』星期日」在处于【太初有力】状态时，将在我方目标每次行动后立即行动，并免疫来自我方目标造成的行动延后效果，自身受到弱点击破时行动额外延后。且自身每层韧性被击破后，对我方施加【<u>在光明中行</u>】。
E: "Embryo of Philosophy" Sunday has weaknesses of all Types. While "Embryo of Philosophy" Sunday is in the "Im Anfang war die Kraft" state, it will immediately take action after every action taken by targets and becomes immune to action delay effects caused by targets. When it becomes Weakness Broken, its action is additionally delayed. Moreover, after one stack of its Toughness is Broken, it applies <u>Walk in the Light</u> to targets.

E: Enter battle and obtain #2 Equation Blessing(s) after victory.

C: 随着越来越多的星球加入到泛银河市场，星际和平公司急需一款小型化的超距传输装置，来发放给那些驻扎边缘星区的员工。最终，纯粹造物学派的「星际漫游寻呼机」赢得了竞标。这款机器延续了琥珀王的美德：坚固，可以同时承担泡面压、开罐器、紧急求生锤的作用；它的信号也极其坚韧，无论在宇宙何处，即使是黑洞里都能收到讯息。一经列装后，边缘星球的逃班率大大减少了。
E: As more planets joined the pan-cosmic market, the IPC urgently needed a miniaturized hyper-distant delivery device for employees stationed in frontier regions. Eventually, the School of Pure Creation's "Interstellar Roaming Pager" won the bid. This device inherited the virtues of the Amber Lord: sturdy enough to serve as a noodle-cup weight, can opener, and emergency survival hammer all in one. Its signal was equally tenacious, maintaining a connection anywhere in the cosmos, even from within a black hole. Once deployed, frontier planets promptly saw a significant drop in absenteeism rates.

E: When obtaining this Curio, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> 2-star Blessing(s). After achieving victory in Encounter, Conversion and Boss Domains, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> random Blessing(s) of 1- to 3-star rarity. This curio can be leveled up through Occurrences.

C: 在说什么呢，亲爱的妹妹？
E: What are you talking about, dear sister?

C: 你愿意信任我到哪种程度？
E: How much are you willing to trust me?

C: 那么这一次，你还想知道答案吗？
E: So this time, do you still want to know the answer?

C: 我和她…应该能被称为朋友。我更希望为她大哭一场，像所有普通人那样，为她感到悲伤。
E: She and I... we could be called friends. I wish I could just break down and cry for her, like any normal person would, to mourn her loss.

C: 歌斐木将她留在这里，究竟是为了什么呢？他正在筹划的一切，无论怎么想，也无法与「繁育」产生联想。
E: Why did Gopher Wood leave her here? No matter how much I think about it, everything he's scheming couldn't possibly be connected to the Propagation.

C: 因此，我也感受得到——你知道我是谁，也知道这把刀，知道它背后的…「意义」。
E: Therefore, I can sense it. You know who I am, you know this blade, and the... meaning that lies behind it.

C: 不对——这不是一段「记忆」？
E: No. Is this not a "memory"?

C: 她或许在暗示什么，但我还猜不透她的用意。
E: She might be hinting at something, but I still can't figure out what she means.

C: …知更鸟小姐？听得见吗？
E: ...Miss Robin? Can you hear me?

C: 尚不清楚，与此有关的线索不多。但我怀疑，是「秩序」。
E: It's not clear yet. There aren't many clues about this, but I suspect it's the Order.

C: 是吗？我倒很想假戏真做，好好折磨你一番呢。可惜，只要禁制尚存，我就身不由己。不能作出任何不利于歌斐木的举止，也无法透露他的秘密。
E: Oh, really? I'd love to drop the act and give you a proper taste of torment. But alas, as long as the constraints on me remain, I'm not my own master. I can't do anything that would harm Gopher Wood, nor can I reveal his secrets.

C: 还好我们一直这么默契，始终相信对方的「反复无常」。
E: Good thing we've always had this kind of tacit understanding... Always trusting in each other's "capriciousness."

C: 从一开始，他就不存在于「任何地方」。
E: From the very beginning, he never existed "anywhere" at all.

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 你也绝非例外
E: Nor shall you

C: 因为这是一件随葬品，只有为巡海游侠立下赫赫战功的英雄才配拥有。当它的光芒出现在宇宙，也就意味着一颗巨星的陨落，而它落下的方向……
E: Because it's a burial artifact, worthy only of a hero who has served the Galaxy Rangers with honor. When its light illuminates the universe, it means the fall of a hero, and in the direction it falls...

C: 哥哥，<color=#dbc291ff>生来拥有翅膀的鸟儿，飞上天际时不需要理由。</color>
E: My brother... <color=#dbc291ff>Birds born with wings need no reason to soar into the sky.</color>

C: 你的愿望呢？
E: What about your wish?

C: 比起能够改变结果，这只是程度更深的自欺欺人。
E: This is just an even deeper form of self-deception compared to actually changing the outcome.

C: 托帕 翡翠
E: Topaz and Jade

C: 你看到的，都是我机缘巧合得到的「剧本」，它记载了确切发生过的一切——而借助它的刺激，你竟真正以自己的视角走入回忆，将一切重新记起。
E: All you've seen is a "script" I came across by chance. It recorded everything that had happened, and using its stimulation, you actually managed to enter the memories from your own perspective and remember everything anew.

C: 都死了，命运最喜欢看他们触礁，愚人就该有愚人的下场。
E: So they all died. Destiny loves to watch them crash onto the reefs. A fool deserves a fool's end.

C: 流萤？
E: Firefly?

C: 或许，你能够理解我的烦恼？
E: Perhaps, you can understand what I'm going through?

C: 再以这样的势头生长下去，这些蕈菌或许也能发展出璀璨的文明，在某个幽暗的地域演绎一出争夺王位的戏码。
E: At this rate of growth, these fungi might just develop their own dazzling civilization and put on a show of power struggles for the throne in some dark corner of the universe.

C: 我看了刚才的对战。不错，你确实是个强劲的对手。
E: I watched your recent battle. Not bad, you're indeed a formidable opponent.

C: 说几句给我听听？
E: Say something for me, will you?

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你知道么？天黑之后，城里到处都是怪物。幸好一名卫士发现了躲在罐子里的我，将乌拉尼娅带到生命花园。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you know what? After dark, monsters are everywhere in the city. Luckily, a guard found Urania hiding in a jar and brought Urania to the Garden of Life.

E: This is a special competition invitation ticket. Grayie, you can use it to invite other trainers to participate in the competition!

C: 队伍编成•流萤
E: Added to Team With Firefly

C: 在与「虚无」的周旋中，她在死亡的边缘跳跃，并以此为乐。或许，正因她从不执着于任何事物，才能如此肆意地盛放吧。
E: She dances at the edge of death and takes delight in it while she consorts with the Nihility. She desires nothing, and perhaps that is how she can bloom so carefree.

C: 别让我失去兴趣呀……
E: Don't make this boring for me...

C: 该打算打算，何时启程离开了呢。
E: Time to consider when to move on to my next destination.
